Existing studies mainly mitigate the WD problem via encoding WD-prone data patterns under in-place updates, yet we find that when turning to out-of-place updates, they can gain the potential to reduce more WD errors. We present LearnWD, an approach that mitigates the WD problem in NVM via coupling machine learning with out-of-place updates. LearnWD first employs clustering algorithms to classify the stale data based on the error proneness. To perform a write operation, LearnWD carefully examines the aggressivity of new data and the error proneness of stale data, so as to speculatively minimize the resulting WD errors. We conduct extensive experiments using 15 real-world data sets with different data types, showing that LearnWD can assist a variety of data encoding schemes to further reduce 20.1% of WD errors, shorten 11.0% of write latency, and extend 21.9% of write endurance.
papers.abstract_zh: 非易失性存储器（NVM）为解决主存储器的扩展限制提供了新的机会，但它仍然受到写干扰（WD）问题的阻碍。 WD问题错误地转换了NVM单元的值，从而严重恶化了存储器的可靠性并降低了访问性能。现有研究主要通过在就地更新下编码易发生 WD 的数据模式来缓解 WD 问题，但我们发现，当转向异地更新时，它们可以获得减少更多 WD 错误的潜力。我们提出了 LearnWD，这是一种通过将机器学习与异地更新相结合来缓解 NVM 中的 WD 问题的方法。 LearnWD 首先采用聚类算法根据错误倾向对陈旧数据进行分类。为了执行写入操作，LearnWD 会仔细检查新数据的攻击性和过时数据的错误倾向，以便推测性地最小化由此产生的 WD 错误。我们使用 15 个不同数据类型的真实数据集进行了大量实验，结果表明 LearnWD 可以辅助多种数据编码方案，进一步减少 20.1% 的 WD 错误，缩短 11.0% 的写入延迟，并延长 21.9% 的写入耐久性。

papers.title: Modeling, Derivation, and Automated Analysis of Branch Predictor Security Vulnerabilities.
papers.abstract: With the intensification of microarchitectural side-channel attacks targeting branch predictors, the security boundary of computer systems and users' security-critical data are under serious threat. Since the root cause of these attacks is the neglect of security issues in the microarchitecture design of branch predictors, an analysis framework that can exhaustively and automatically explore these concerns in the design phase is imminent. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive and automated evaluation framework for inspecting the security guarantees of branch predictors at the microarchitecture design stage. Our technique involves a three-step modeling approach that abstractly characterizes 19 branch predictor states and 53 operations that could affect these states. Subsequently, we develop a symbolic execution-based framework to investigate all three-step combinations and derive 156 valid attack patterns against branch predictors, including 89 novel attacks never considered in the previous work. Finally, we apply our framework to 8 secure branch predictor designs and four typical hardware-based countermeasures against speculative execution attacks to evaluate their security capabilities. The result demonstrates that these security branch predictors provide efficient security guarantees and outperform those hardware-based alleviations against speculative execution attacks, indicating that the security branch predictors are promising in mitigating branch predictor security vulnerabilities.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着针对分支预测器的微架构侧通道攻击的加剧，计算机系统的安全边界和用户的安全关键数据受到严重威胁。由于这些攻击的根本原因是分支预测器微架构设计中忽视了安全问题，因此一种能够在设计阶段详尽、自动地探索这些问题的分析框架迫在眉睫。在本文中，我们提出了一个全面的自动化评估框架，用于在微架构设计阶段检查分支预测器的安全保证。我们的技术涉及三步建模方法，该方法抽象地描述了 19 个分支预测器状态和可能影响这些状态的 53 个操作。随后，我们开发了一个基于符号执行的框架来研究所有三步组合，并得出针对分支预测器的 156 种有效攻击模式，其中包括以前的工作中从未考虑过的 89 种新颖攻击。最后，我们将我们的框架应用于 8 个安全分支预测器设计和四种典型的基于硬件的针对推测执行攻击的对策，以评估其安全能力。结果表明，这些安全分支预测器提供了有效的安全保证，并且优于那些针对推测执行攻击的基于硬件的缓解措施，这表明安全分支预测器在减轻分支预测器安全漏洞方面很有前景。

papers.title: MOPED: Efficient Motion Planning Engine with Flexible Dimension Support.
papers.abstract: Motion planning aims to compute the high-quality and collision-free robotic trajectory. To solve the planning problems defined in varying dimensional sizes, motion planners, especially sampling-based, are typically computation intensive because of the costly kernel operations, and computation inefficient due to the inherent sequential processing scheme, hindering their efficient deployment. To address these challenges and enable real-time highly efficient motion planning, this paper proposes MOPED, an algorithm and hardware co-design for sampling-based motion planning engine with flexible dimension support. At the algorithm level, MOPED proposes a two-stage processing scheme to reduce the frequency and unit cost of collision check. It also fully leverages the spatial information and unique property of planning process to enable low-cost approximated neighbor search. At the hardware level, MOPED proposes a correctness-ensured speculative processing scheme to overcome the serialization problem. It also develop a multi-level caching strategy to reduce data movement and resolve resource conflict. We demonstrate the effectiveness of MOPED via implementing a design example with CMOS 28nm technology via synthesizing. Compared with the baseline motion planning processors, MOPED brings significant improvement on throughput, energy efficiency and area efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 运动规划旨在计算高质量且无碰撞的机器人轨迹。为了解决不同尺寸定义的规划问题，运动规划器，尤其是基于采样的运动规划器，由于内核操作成本高昂，通常是计算密集型的，并且由于固有的顺序处理方案，计算效率低下，阻碍了它们的有效部署。为了解决这些挑战并实现实时高效的运动规划，本文提出了MOPED，一种基于采样的运动规划引擎的算法和硬件协同设计，具有灵活的维度支持。在算法层面，MOPED提出了两阶段处理方案，以降低碰撞检查的频率和单位成本。它还充分利用空间信息和规划过程的独特属性来实现低成本的近似邻居搜索。在硬件层面，MOPED提出了一种确保正确性的推测处理方案来克服序列化问题。它还开发了多级缓存策略来减少数据移动并解决资源冲突。我们通过综合实现采用 CMOS 28nm 技术的设计示例，展示了 MOPED 的有效性。与基线运动规划处理器相比，MOPED 在吞吐量、能源效率和面积效率方面带来了显着提升。

papers.title: Morphling: A Throughput-Maximized TFHE-based Accelerator using Transform-domain Reuse.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has become an increasingly important aspect in modern computing, particularly in preserving privacy in cloud computing by enabling computation directly on encrypted data. Despite its potential, FHE generally poses major computational challenges, including huge computational and memory requirements. The bootstrapping operation, which is essential particularly in Torus-Fhe(tfhe) scheme, involves intensive computations characterized by an enormous number of polynomial multiplications. For instance, performing a single bootstrapping at the 128-bit security level requires more than 10,000 polynomial multiplications. Our in-depth analysis reveals that domain-transform operations, i.e., Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), contribute up to 88% of these operations, which is the bottleneck of the TFHE system. To address these challenges, we propose Morphling, an accelerator architecture that combines the 2D systolic array and strategic use of transform-domain reuse in order to reduce the overhead of domain-transform in TFHE. This novel approach effectively reduces the number of required domain-transform operations by up to 83.3 %, allowing more computational cores in a given die area. In addition, we optimize its micro architecture design for end-to-end TFHE operation, such as merge-split pipelined-FFT for efficient domain-transform operation, double-pointer method for high-throughput polynomial rotation, and specialized buffer design. Furthermore, we introduce custom instructions for tiling, batching, and scheduling of multiple ciphertext operations. This facilitates software-hardware co-optimization, effectively mapping high-level applications such as XG-Boost classifier, Neural-Network, and VGG-9. As a result, Morphling, with four 2D systolic arrays and four vector units with domain-transform reuse, takes 74.79 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> die area and 53.00 W power consumption in 28nm process. It achieves a throughput of up to 147,615 bootstrappings per second, demonstrating improvements of 3440x over the CPU, 143x over the GPU, and 14.7x over the state-of-the-art TFHE accelerator. It can run various deep learning models with sub-second latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 全同态加密 (FHE) 已成为现代计算中日益重要的一个方面，特别是通过直接对加密数据进行计算来保护云计算中的隐私。尽管 FHE 具有潜力，但它通常会带来重大的计算挑战，包括巨大的计算和内存需求。自举操作在 Torus-Fhe(tfhe) 方案中尤其重要，涉及以大量多项式乘法为特征的密集计算。例如，在 128 位安全级别执行一次引导需要超过 10,000 次多项式乘法。我们的深入分析表明，域变换操作，即快速傅里叶变换（FFT），占这些操作的比例高达 88%，这是 TFHE 系统的瓶颈。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Morphling，这是一种加速器架构，它结合了 2D 脉动阵列和变换域重用的战略使用，以减少 TFHE 中域变换的开销。这种新颖的方法有效地将所需的域转换操作数量减少了高达 83.3%，从而在给定的芯片区域中允许更多的计算核心。此外，我们还针对端到端 TFHE 操作优化了其微架构设计，例如用于高效域变换操作的合并分割流水线 FFT、用于高吞吐量多项式旋转的双指针方法以及专门的缓冲区设计。此外，我们还引入了用于平铺、批处理和调度多个密文操作的自定义指令。这有助于软件-硬件协同优化，有效映射 XG-Boost 分类器、神经网络和 VGG-9 等高级应用程序。因此，具有四个 2D 脉动阵列和四个具有域变换重用功能的矢量单元的 Morphling 在 28nm 工艺中占用 74.79 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> 芯片面积和 53.00 W 功耗。它实现了每秒高达 147,615 次引导的吞吐量，比 CPU 提高了 3440 倍，比 GPU 提高了 143 倍，比最先进的 TFHE 加速器提高了 14.7 倍。它可以以亚秒级延迟运行各种深度学习模型。

papers.title: Pathfinding Future PIM Architectures by Demystifying a Commercial PIM Technology.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) has been explored for decades by computer architects, yet it has never seen the light of day in real-world products due to its high design overheads and lack of a killer application. With the advent of critical memoryintensive workloads, several commercial PIM technologies have been introduced to the market, ranging from domain-specific PIM architectures to more general-purpose PIM architectures. In this work, we deepdive into UPMEM's commercial PIM technology, a general-purpose PIM-enabled parallel computing architecture that is highly programmable. Our first key contribution is the development of a flexible simulation framework for PIM. The simulator we developed (aka uPIMulator) enables the compilation of UPMEM-PIM source codes into its compiled machine-level instructions, which are subsequently consumed by our cycle-level performance simulator. Using uPIMulator, we demystify UPMEM's PIM design through a detailed characterization study. Finally, we identify some key limitations of the current UPMEM-PIM system through our case studies and present some important architectural features that will become critical for future PIM architectures to support.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算机架构师对内存处理 (PIM) 进行了数十年的探索，但由于其高设计开销和缺乏杀手级应用程序，它从未在实际产品中出现过。随着关键内存密集型工作负载的出现，多种商业 PIM 技术已被引入市场，从特定领域的 PIM 架构到更通用的 PIM 架构。在这项工作中，我们深入研究了 UPMEM 的商业 PIM 技术，这是一种高度可编程、支持 PIM 的通用并行计算架构。我们的第一个关键贡献是开发灵活的 PIM 模拟框架。我们开发的模拟器（又名 uPIMulator）能够将 UPMEM-PIM 源代码编译为其编译的机器级指令，这些指令随后由我们的周期级性能模拟器使用。使用 uPIMulator，我们通过详细的特性研究揭开了 UPMEM 的 PIM 设计的神秘面纱。最后，我们通过案例研究确定了当前 UPMEM-PIM 系统的一些关键限制，并提出了一些重要的架构特征，这些特征对于未来 PIM 架构的支持至关重要。

papers.title: PREFETCHX: Cross-Core Cache-Agnostic Prefetcher-based Side-Channel Attacks.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we reveal the existence of a new class of prefetcher, the XPT prefetcher, in modern Intel processors which has never been officially detailed. It speculatively issues a load, bypassing last-level cache (LLC) lookups, when it predicts that a load request will result in an LLC miss. We demonstrate that XPT prefetcher is shared among different cores, which enables an attacker to build cross-core side-channel and covertchannel attacks. We propose PREFETCHX, a cross-core attack mechanism, to leak users’ sensitive data and activities. We empirically demonstrate that PREFETCHX can be used to extract private keys of real-world RSA applications. Furthermore, we show that PREFETCHX can enable side-channel attacks that can monitor keystrokes and network traffic patterns of users. Our two cross-core covert-channel attacks also see a low error rate and a 122KiB/s maximum channel capacity. Due to the cache-independent feature of PREFETCHX, current cache-based mitigations are not effective against our attacks. Overall, our work uncovers a significant vulnerability in the XPT prefetcher, which can be exploited to compromise the confidentiality of sensitive information in both cryptography and non-cryptography-related applications among processor cores.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们揭示了现代英特尔处理器中存在的一类新型预取器，即 XPT 预取器，该预取器从未被正式详细说明。当它预测加载请求将导致 LLC 未命中时，它会推测性地发出加载，绕过最后一级缓存 (LLC) 查找。我们证明 XPT 预取器在不同内核之间共享，这使得攻击者能够构建跨内核侧通道和隐蔽通道攻击。我们提出了 PREFETCHX，一种跨核心攻击机制，用于泄露用户的敏感数据和活动。我们凭经验证明 PREFETCHX 可用于提取现实世界 RSA 应用程序的私钥。此外，我们还表明 PREFETCHX 可以启用侧通道攻击，从而监视用户的击键和网络流量模式。我们的两个跨核心隐蔽通道攻击也具有较低的错误率和 122KiB/s 的最大通道容量。由于 PREFETCHX 具有独立于缓存的功能，当前基于缓存的缓解措施无法有效抵御我们的攻击。总的来说，我们的工作发现了 XPT 预取器中的一个重大漏洞，该漏洞可被利用来破坏处理器核心之间的加密和非加密相关应用程序中敏感信息的机密性。

papers.title: Prosper: Program Stack Persistence in Hybrid Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: A persistent and crash-consistent execution state is essential for systems to guarantee resilience against power failures and abrupt system crashes. The availability of nonvolatile memory (NVM) with read/write latency comparable to DRAM allows designing efficient checkpoint mechanisms for process persistence. Operating system (OS) level checkpoint solutions require capturing the change in the execution state of a process in an efficient manner. One of the crucial components of the execution state of any process is its memory state consisting of mutable stack and heap segments. Tracking modifications to the program stack is interesting because of its unique grow/shrink usage pattern and activation record write characteristics. Moreover, the stack is used in a programmer-agnostic manner where the compiler makes use of the support provided by the underlying ISA to use the stack and the OS manages the memory used by the stack region in an on-demand fashion. In this paper, we show the benefit of a checkpoint-based mechanism for stack persistence and the inefficiency of adapting existing generic memory persistence mechanisms for the stack region. We propose Prosper, a hardware-software (OS) codesigned checkpoint approach for stack persistence. Prosper tracks stack changes at sub-page byte granularity in hardware, allowing symbiosis with OS to realize efficient checkpoints of the stack region. Prosper significantly reduces (on average ∼4 ×) the amount of data copied during checkpoint and improves the overall checkpoint time with minimum overhead (less than 1% on average). Integration of Prosper with existing state-of-theart memory persistence mechanisms (such as SSP) for heap provides 2.6 × improvement over solely using the state-of-the-art mechanism for the entire memory area persistence.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久且崩溃一致的执行状态对于系统保证针对电源故障和突然系统崩溃的恢复能力至关重要。具有与 DRAM 相当的读/写延迟的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 的可用性允许为进程持久性设计高效的检查点机制。操作系统 (OS) 级检查点解决方案需要以有效的方式捕获进程执行状态的变化。任何进程的执行状态的关键组成部分之一是其由可变堆栈和堆段组成的内存状态。跟踪对程序堆栈的修改很有趣，因为它具有独特的增长/收缩使用模式和激活记录写入特性。此外，堆栈以与程序员无关的方式使用，其中编译器利用底层 ISA 提供的支持来使用堆栈，操作系统以按需方式管理堆栈区域使用的内存。在本文中，我们展示了基于检查点的堆栈持久性机制的好处以及为堆栈区域调整现有通用内存持久性机制的低效率。我们提出了 Prosper，一种用于堆栈持久性的硬件软件 (OS) 协同签名检查点方法。 Prosper 在硬件中以子页字节粒度跟踪堆栈变化，允许与操作系统共生，实现堆栈区域的高效检查点。 Prosper 显着减少了（平均 ∼4 ×）检查点期间复制的数据量，并以最小的开销（平均不到 1%）缩短了总体检查点时间。将 Prosper 与现有最先进的堆内存持久化机制（例如 SSP）集成，比单独使用最先进的机制实现整个内存区域持久化提供了 2.6 倍的改进。

papers.title: PruneGNN: Algorithm-Architecture Pruning Framework for Graph Neural Network Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Performing training and inference for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) under tight latency constraints has become increasingly difficult as real-world input graphs continue to grow. Compared to traditional DNNs, GNNs present unique computational challenges due to their massive, unstructured, and sparse input graphs. Prior works have applied irregular and structured model pruning techniques to reduce the complexity of GNNs to accelerate GNN performance. However, irregular pruning techniques presented in the literature use floating point operations to estimate G NN performance, which does not reveal the true performance implications of model sparsity caused by the diminished parallelism of sparse matrix multiplication kernels. This paper quantitatively shows that irregular sparsity in G NN models is unable to be exploited to improve performance in parallel architectures that employ highly vectorized hardware. While structured pruning can overcome these issues, the existing structured pruning work for GNNs introduces performance scalability challenges as low-dimensional mapping of the pruned model is unable to exploit the full parallelism potential of the GPU's vectorized hardware. We propose PruneGNN, an optimized algorithm-architecture framework for structured GNN pruning. At the algorithm level, a dimension-pruning-aware sparse training method is proposed that achieves high sparsity while maintaining accuracy. At the architecture level, novel SIMD-aware kernels are proposed that exploit matrix-operator-level parallelism and unlock performance gains with reduced-dimension GNN models. The efficacy of the proposed framework is evaluated for end-to-end inference as well as training performance using real-world dynamic and static graphs on representative GNN models. Experimental results using an NVIDIA A100 GPU show that PruneGNN achieves an average of 2 x speedup over the prior structured pruning work for state-of-the-art GNN models.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着现实世界输入图的不断增长，在严格的延迟限制下对图神经网络 (GNN) 进行训练和推理变得越来越困难。与传统的 DNN 相比，GNN 由于其大量、非结构化和稀疏的输入图而带来了独特的计算挑战。先前的工作已经应用不规则和结构化模型剪枝技术来降低 GNN 的复杂性，从而加速 GNN 的性能。然而，文献中提出的不规则剪枝技术使用浮点运算来估计 G NN 性能，这并没有揭示稀疏矩阵乘法核并行性减弱导致的模型稀疏性的真实性能影响。本文定量地表明，G NN 模型中的不规则稀疏性无法用于提高采用高度矢量化硬件的并行架构的性能。虽然结构化剪枝可以克服这些问题，但现有的 GNN 结构化剪枝工作引入了性能可扩展性挑战，因为剪枝模型的低维映射无法充分利用 GPU 向量化硬件的并行潜力。我们提出了 PruneGNN，一种用于结构化 GNN 剪枝的优化算法架构框架。在算法层面，提出了一种维度剪枝感知的稀疏训练方法，在保持精度的同时实现了高稀疏性。在架构级别，提出了新颖的 SIMD 感知内核，该内核利用矩阵运算符级并行性并通过降维 GNN 模型解锁性能增益。使用代表性 GNN 模型上的真实世界动态和静态图来评估所提出框架的有效性，以进行端到端推理以及训练性能。使用 NVIDIA A100 GPU 的实验结果表明，与现有最先进的 GNN 模型的结构化修剪工作相比，PruneGNN 平均加速了 2 倍。

papers.title: Rapper: A Parameter-Aware Repair-in-Memory Accelerator for Blockchain Storage Platform.
papers.abstract: Blockchain storage platforms reward storage nodes for keeping user-uploaded data for a certain amount of time. These storage nodes are unstable and can go online or offline unpredictably at any time, leading to potential data loss. To prevent data loss, blockchain storage platforms adopt erasure codes on user-uploaded encrypted data. Data repair processes will be performed to recover the lost data. However, the data repair processes heavily rely on time-consuming erasure coding algorithms, mainly consisting of vector-matrix multiplications. The emerging processing-in-memory technique can efficiently speed up the processing of vector-matrix multiplications. It can be integrated into blockchain storage platforms to solve the data repair issue. This paper presents Rapper, a parameter-aware repair-inmemory accelerator for blockchain storage platforms. Rapper utilizes the computing power of emerging processing-in-memory architecture so that data repair processes can be processed in a parallel manner and the overall efficiency can be improved significantly. Specifically, at the hardware level, the ReRAM memory is reorganized into our proposed double bank, XRU, XGroup, and ReRAM crossbars structure. At the software level, a parallel decoding/encoding strategy is proposed to fully exploit the internal parallelism of ReRAM. We also propose an adaptive parameter-aware mapping to handle various sizes of stripes. To demonstrate the viability of the proposed technique, a representative blockchain storage project Storj is adopted as the default storage infrastructure. Experimental results show that Rapper can achieve a 1.96 × speedup on average compared to the representative scheme.
papers.abstract_zh: 区块链存储平台奖励存储节点将用户上传的数据保留一定时间。这些存储节点不稳定，随时可能出现不可预测的上线或下线，导致潜在的数据丢失。为了防止数据丢失，区块链存储平台对用户上传的加密数据采用纠删码。将执行数据修复过程以恢复丢失的数据。然而，数据修复过程严重依赖耗时的纠删码算法，主要包括向量矩阵乘法。新兴的内存处理技术可以有效地加速向量矩阵乘法的处理。可以集成到区块链存储平台中，解决数据修复问题。本文介绍了 Rapper，一种用于区块链存储平台的参数感知内存修复加速器。 Rapper利用新兴的内存处理架构的计算能力，使得数据修复过程可以并行处理，整体效率可以显着提高。具体来说，在硬件层面，ReRAM 存储器被重组为我们提出的双存储体、XRU、XGroup 和 ReRAM 交叉结构。在软件层面，提出了并行解码/编码策略，以充分利用ReRAM的内部并行性。我们还提出了一种自适应参数感知映射来处理各种尺寸的条纹。为了证明所提出技术的可行性，采用具有代表性的区块链存储项目 Storj 作为默认存储基础设施。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，Rapper 平均可以实现 1.96 倍的加速。

papers.title: RELIEF: Relieving Memory Pressure In SoCs Via Data Movement-Aware Accelerator Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Data movement latency when using on-chip accelerators in emerging heterogeneous architectures is a serious performance bottleneck. While hardware/software mechanisms such as peer-to-peer DMA between producer/consumer accelerators allow bypassing main memory and significantly reduce main memory contention, schedulers in both the hardware and software domains remain oblivious to their presence. Instead, most contemporary schedulers tend to be deadline-driven, with improved utilization and/or throughput serving as secondary or co-primary goals. This lack of focus on data communication will only worsen execution times as accelerator latencies reduce. In this paper, we present RELIEF (RElaxing Least-laxIty to Enable Forwarding), an online least laxity-driven accelerator scheduling policy that relieves memory pressure in accelerator-rich architectures via data movement-aware scheduling. RELIEF leverages laxity (time margin to a deadline) to opportunistically utilize available hardware data forwarding mechanisms while minimizing quality-of-service (QoS) degradation and unfairness. RELIEF achieves up to 50 % more forwards compared to state-of-the-art policies, reducing main memory traffic and energy consumption by up to 32 % and 18 %, respectively. At the same time, RELIEF meets 14% more task deadlines on average and reduces worst-case deadline violation by 14%, highlighting QoS and fairness improvements.
papers.abstract_zh: 在新兴异构架构中使用片上加速器时的数据移动延迟是一个严重的性能瓶颈。虽然生产者/消费者加速器之间的点对点 DMA 等硬件/软件机制允许绕过主内存并显着减少主内存争用，但硬件和软件域中的调度程序仍然忽视它们的存在。相反，大多数现代调度程序往往是截止日期驱动的，以提高利用率和/或吞吐量作为次要或共同主要目标。随着加速器延迟的减少，缺乏对数据通信的关注只会使执行时间变得更糟。在本文中，我们提出了 RELIEF（RElashing Least-laxIty to Enable Forwarding），这是一种在线最小松弛驱动的加速器调度策略，可通过数据移动感知调度来缓解加速器丰富的架构中的内存压力。 RELIEF 利用宽松性（截止期限的时间裕度）来机会性地利用可用的硬件数据转发机制，同时最大限度地减少服务质量 (QoS) 下降和不公平。与最先进的策略相比，RELIEF 的转发量增加了 50%，主内存流量和能耗分别减少了 32% 和 18%。与此同时，RELIEF 的任务期限平均提高了 14%，并将最坏情况下的期限违规情况减少了 14%，凸显了 QoS 和公平性的改进。

papers.title: Revet: A Language and Compiler for Dataflow Threads.
papers.abstract: Spatial dataflow architectures such as reconfigurable dataflow accelerators (RDA) can provide much higher performance and efficiency than CPUs and GPUs. In particular, vectorized reconfigurable dataflow accelerators (vRDA) in recent literature represent a design point that enhances the efficiency of dataflow architectures with vectorization. Today, vRDAs can be exploited using either hard-coded kernels or MapReduce languages like Spatial, which cannot vectorize data-dependent control flow. In contrast, CPUs and GPUs can be programmed using general-purpose threaded abstractions. The ideal combination would be the generality of a threaded programming model coupled with the efficient execution model of a vRDA. We introduce Revet: a programming model, compiler, and execution model that lets threaded applications run efficiently on vRDAs. The Revet programming language uses threads to support a broader range of applications than prior parallel-patterns approaches, and our MLIR-based compiler lowers this language to a generic dataflow backend that operates on streaming tensors. Finally, we show that mapping threads to dataflow out-performs GPUs, the current state-of-the-art for threaded accelerators, by 3.8×.
papers.abstract_zh: 可重构数据流加速器 (RDA) 等空间数据流架构可以提供比 CPU 和 GPU 高得多的性能和效率。特别是，最近文献中的矢量化可重构数据流加速器（vRDA）代表了通过矢量化提高数据流架构效率的设计点。如今，可以使用硬编码内核或 Spatial 等 MapReduce 语言来利用 vRDA，这些语言无法对数据相关的控制流进行矢量化。 In contrast, CPUs and GPUs can be programmed using general-purpose threaded abstractions. The ideal combination would be the generality of a threaded programming model coupled with the efficient execution model of a vRDA. We introduce Revet: a programming model, compiler, and execution model that lets threaded applications run efficiently on vRDAs. Revet 编程语言使用线程来支持比以前的并行模式方法更广泛的应用程序，并且我们基于 MLIR 的编译器将该语言降低为在流张量上运行的通用数据流后端。 Finally, we show that mapping threads to dataflow out-performs GPUs, the current state-of-the-art for threaded accelerators, by 3.8×.

papers.title: RiF: Improving Read Performance of Modern SSDs Using an On-Die Early-Retry Engine.
papers.abstract: Modern high-performance SSDs have multiple flash channels operating in parallel to achieve their high I/O bandwidth. However, when the effective bandwidth of these flash channels declines, the SSD's overall bandwidth is substantially impacted. In contemporary SSDs featuring high-density 3D NAND flash memory, frequent invocations of a read-retry procedure pose a significant challenge to fully utilizing the maximum I/O bandwidth of a flash channel. In this paper, we propose a novel read-retry optimization scheme, Retry-in-Flash (RiF), which proactively minimizes the amount of time wasted in conventional read-retry procedures. Unlike existing read-retry solutions that focus on identifying an optimal read-reference voltage for a sensed page, the RiF scheme focuses on determining early on whether a read-retry will be required for the sensed data. To know if a read-retry is needed or not at the earliest possible time, we propose a RiF-enabled flash chip with an on-die early-retry (ODEAR) engine. When the ODEAR engine determines that a sensed page requires a read-retry, a readreference voltage is immediately adjusted and the same page is re-read while ignoring the previously sensed page. By performing the key steps of a read-retry procedure inside a RiF flash chip without transferring the sensed uncorrectable page to an offchip controller, the RiF scheme prevents the read bandwidth of a flash channel from being wasted due to failed read data. To evaluate the RiF scheme, we developed a prototype RiF-enabled flash chip and constructed a RiF-aware SSD simulator using RiF flash chips. Our evaluation results show that the proposed RiF scheme improves the effective SSD bandwidth by 72.1% on average over a state-of-the-art read-retry solution at 2K P/E cycles with negligible power and area overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能 SSD 具有多个并行运行的闪存通道，以实现高 I/O 带宽。然而，当这些闪存通道的有效带宽下降时，SSD的整体带宽就会受到严重影响。在采用高密度 3D NAND 闪存的当代 SSD 中，频繁调用读重试过程对充分利用闪存通道的最大 I/O 带宽构成了重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的读重试优化方案，Retry-in-Flash (RiF)，它主动最大限度地减少传统读重试过程中浪费的时间。与专注于识别感测页的最佳读取参考电压的现有读取重试解决方案不同，RiF方案专注于及早确定感测数据是否需要读取重试。为了尽早了解是否需要读取重试，我们提出了一种支持 RiF 的闪存芯片，带有片上早期重试 (ODEAR) 引擎。当ODEAR引擎确定感测到的页面需要重试时，立即调整读取参考电压并重新读取同一页面，同时忽略先前感测到的页面。通过在 RiF 闪存芯片内部执行读重试过程的关键步骤，而不将感测到的不可纠正页面传输到片外控制器，RiF 方案可以防止闪存通道的读带宽因读取数据失败而浪费。为了评估 RiF 方案，我们开发了一个支持 RiF 的闪存芯片原型，并使用 RiF 闪存芯片构建了一个支持 RiF 的 SSD 模拟器。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的读重试解决方案相比，所提出的 RiF 方案在 2K P/E 周期下将有效 SSD 带宽平均提高了 72.1%，且功耗和面积开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: SACHI: A Stationarity-Aware, All-Digital, Near-Memory, Ising Architecture.
papers.abstract: Recently there have been efforts to solve difficult computation problems harnessing or drawing inspiration from nature. A prominent example is the use of Ising machines for solving NP-complete problems [1], [23]. Ising machines have evolved from quantum/optical annealers and oscillator-based designs [1] to the recent CMOS-based Von-Neumann [36]/in-memory designs [35]. While prior works have demonstrated the power of Ising machines to solve complex real-world problems, the state-of-the-art Ising accelerators are dedicated accelerators that are useful only for a class of problems, involve complex data converter circuits (ADCs/DACs), are unreliable compared to the rest of the CMOS SoC due to the use of process-variation sensitive/specific embedded memory technologies. In this paper, we present an all-digital Ising architecture realized using repurposing of L1 cache of a CPU. It relies on processing in-memory technology implemented in SRAM. SACHI solves the reliability problems of prior works such as BRIM, eliminates the need for ADCs/DACs, and provides Ising compute acceleration with minor hardware overhead over a CPU pipeline. The novelty of the proposed approach consists of (i) tightly coupled interfacing of the accelerator to the CPU, (ii) reuse/ repurposing of existing hardware to provide acceleration, (iii) ability to achieve higher parallelism than earlier Ising designs due to reuse-aware compute, and (iv) improved performance/energy for a wide variety of large-sized high precision real-life optimization problems using novel compute/mapping strategies. In comparison to BRIM, the proposed all-digital Ising accelerator achieves (i) 36x, 160x, 286x, 300x better performance, (ii) 72x, 79x, 80x, and 75x improved energy, (iii) reuse of 4x, 32x, 200x, and 4000x is observed for asset allocation, molecular dynamics, image segmentation, and traveling salesman respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，人们努力利用自然或从自然中汲取灵感来解决困难的计算问题。一个突出的例子是使用 Ising 机来解决 NP 完全问题 [1]、[23]。 Ising 机器已经从量子/光学退火器和基于振荡器的设计 [1] 发展到最近基于 CMOS 的冯·诺依曼 [36]/内存设计 [35]。虽然之前的工作已经证明了 Ising 机器解决复杂现实问题的能力，但最先进的 Ising 加速器是专用加速器，仅适用于一类问题，涉及复杂的数据转换器电路 (ADC/DAC)，由于使用了工艺变化敏感/特定的嵌入式内存技术，与 CMOS SoC 的其余部分相比并不可靠。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过重新利用 CPU 的 L1 缓存实现的全数字 Ising 架构。它依赖于 SRAM 中实现的内存处理技术。 SACHI 解决了 BRIM 等先前工作的可靠性问题，消除了对 ADC/DAC 的需求，并通过 CPU 管道以较小的硬件开销提供 Ising 计算加速。所提出方法的新颖性包括（i）加速器与CPU的紧密耦合接口，（ii）重用/重新利用现有硬件以提供加速，（iii）由于重用感知计算而能够实现比早期伊辛设计更高的并行性，以及（iv）使用新颖的计算/映射策略提高各种大型高精度现实优化问题的性能/能量。与 BRIM 相比，所提出的全数字 Ising 加速器实现了 (i) 36x、160x、286x、300x 更好的性能，(ii) 72x、79x、80x 和 75x 改进的能量，(iii) 在资产分配、分子动力学、图像分割和旅行推销员方面分别观察到 4x、32x、200x 和 4000x 的重用。

papers.title: Salus: Efficient Security Support for CXL-Expanded GPU Memory.
papers.abstract: GPUs have become indispensable accelerators for many data-intensive applications such as scientific workloads, deep learning models, and graph analytics; these applications share a common demand for increasingly large memory. As the memory capacity connected through traditional memory interfaces is reaching limits, heterogeneous memory systems have gained traction in expanding the memory pool. These systems involve dynamic data movement between different memory locations for efficient utilization, which poses challenges for existing security implementations, whose metadata are tied to the physical location of data. In this work, we propose a new security model specifically designed for systems with dynamic page migration. Our model minimizes the need for security recalculations due to data movement, optimizes security structures for efficient bandwidth utilization, and reduces the overall traffic caused by security operations. Based on our evaluation, our proposed security support improves the GPU throughput by a geometric mean of 29.94% (up to 190.43%) over the conventional security model, and it reduces the security traffic in the memory subsystem to 47.79% on average (as low as 17.71% overhead).
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 已成为许多数据密集型应用程序不可或缺的加速器，例如科学工作负载、深度学习模型和图形分析；这些应用程序对越来越大的内存有着共同的需求。随着通过传统内存接口连接的内存容量已达到极限，异构内存系统在扩展内存池方面受到了关注。这些系统涉及不同内存位置之间的动态数据移动以实现有效利用，这对现有安全实现提出了挑战，因为现有安全实现的元数据与数据的物理位置相关联。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种专门为具有动态页面迁移的系统设计的新安全模型。我们的模型最大限度地减少了因数据移动而导致的安全重新计算的需要，优化了安全结构以实现高效的带宽利用，并减少了安全操作引起的总体流量。根据我们的评估，我们提出的安全支持比传统安全模型将 GPU 吞吐量提高了几何平均 29.94%（高达 190.43%），并将内存子系统中的安全流量平均减少到 47.79%（开销低至 17.71%）。

papers.title: SegScope: Probing Fine-grained Interrupts via Architectural Footprints.
papers.abstract: Interrupts are critical hardware resources for OS kernels to schedule processes. As they are related to system activities, interrupts can be used to mount various side-channel attacks (i.e., monitoring keystrokes, inferring website visits, detecting GPU activities, and fingerprinting processes). Given that all these attacks rely on system file interfaces or architectural timers to probe interrupts, various countermeasures have been proposed to either remove the unprivileged access to the file interfaces or detect/cripple architectural timers. In this work, we propose SegScope, a new technique that abuses segment protection to provision fine-grained interrupt observations without any timer. As segment protection is widely used on x86, SegScope works across a wide range of Intel-and AMD-based CPUs. Particularly, we observe that while segment protection preserves the confidentiality of high privileged domain, it leaves a footprint via the data segment registers values when an interrupt occurs. With this key observation, SegScope is crafted by capturing the footprints. To show its security implications, we evaluate it in four case studies. First, SegScope has inferred website visits with a respective success rate of 92.4% on Chrome and 87.4% on Tor Browser in default system settings. Second, SegScope successfully extracts the keys from Cloudflare's Interoperable Reusable Cryptographic Library (CIRCL) vl.l. Third, SegScope steals DNN model architectures with an accuracy of over 80%. Last, SegScope effectively reduces the noise of interrupts to improve the performance of other side channels. As an example, SegScope reduces the error rate of Spectral side channel by 56×. Compared with existing timer-based interrupt-probing techniques, SegScope is fine-grained without introducing false-positives. Further, we leverage SegScope to craft a fine-grained timer, as regular timer interrupts as clock edges contain timestamps. Our evaluation shows that it achieves the same level of timing granularity as the high-resolution timer, i.e., rdtsc and rdpru. We then leverage the timer to break KASLR in about 10 seconds and mount a Flush+Reload based Spectre attack.
papers.abstract_zh: 中断是操作系统内核调度进程的关键硬件资源。由于中断与系统活动相关，因此可用于发起各种旁路攻击（即监控击键、推断网站访问、检测 GPU 活动和指纹识别过程）。鉴于所有这些攻击都依赖于系统文件接口或体系结构定时器来探测中断，因此已经提出了各种对策来删除对文件接口的非特权访问或检测/削弱体系结构定时器。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SegScope，这是一种滥用段保护来提供细粒度中断观察而无需任何计时器的新技术。由于段保护在 x86 上广泛使用，SegScope 适用于各种基于 Intel 和 AMD 的 CPU。特别是，我们观察到，虽然段保护保留了高特权域的机密性，但当中断发生时，它会通过数据段寄存器值留下足迹。通过这一关键观察，SegScope 是通过捕获足迹而制作的。为了展示其安全影响，我们通过四个案例研究对其进行评估。首先，在默认系统设置下，SegScope 推断网站访问的成功率在 Chrome 上为 92.4%，在 Tor 浏览器上为 87.4%。其次，SegScope 成功从 Cloudflare 的可互操作可重用加密库 (CIRCL) vl.l 中提取密钥。第三，SegScope窃取DNN模型架构，准确率超过80%。最后，SegScope可以有效降低中断噪声，从而提高其他侧通道的性能。例如，SegScope 将 Spectral 侧通道的错误率降低了 56 倍。与现有的基于定时器的中断探测技术相比，SegScope 是细粒度的，不会引入误报。此外，我们利用 SegScope 来制作细粒度定时器，因为时钟边沿包含时间戳，因此定期定时器中断。我们的评估表明，它实现了与高分辨率计时器（即 rdtsc 和 rdpru）相同水平的计时粒度。然后，我们利用计时器在大约 10 秒内打破 KASLR，并发起基于 Flush+Reload 的 Spectre 攻击。

papers.title: Smart-Infinity: Fast Large Language Model Training using Near-Storage Processing on a Real System.
papers.abstract: The recent huge advance of Large Language Models (LLMs) is mainly driven by the increase in the number of parameters. This has led to substantial memory capacity requirements, necessitating the use of dozens of GPUs just to meet the capacity. One popular solution to this is storage-offloaded training, which uses host memory and storage as an extended memory hierarchy. However, this obviously comes at the cost of storage bandwidth bottleneck because storage devices have orders of magnitude lower bandwidth compared to that of GPU device memories. Our work, Smart-Infinity, addresses the storage bandwidth bottleneck of storage-offloaded LLM training using near-storage processing devices on a real system. The main component of Smart-Infinity is SmartUpdate, which performs parameter updates on custom near-storage accelerators. We identify that moving parameter updates to the storage side removes most of the storage traffic. In addition, we propose an efficient data transfer handler structure to address the system integration issues for Smart-Infinity. The handler allows overlapping data transfers with fixed memory consumption by reusing the device buffer. Lastly, we propose accelerator-assisted gradient compression/decompression to enhance the scalability of Smart-Infinity. When scaling to multiple near-storage processing devices, the write traffic on the shared channel becomes the bottleneck. To alleviate this, we compress the gradients on the GPU and decompress them on the accelerators. It provides further acceleration from reduced traffic. As a result, Smart-Infinity achieves a significant speedup compared to the baseline. Notably, SmartInfinity is a ready-to-use approach that is fully integrated into PyTorch on a real system. The implementation of Smart-Infinity is available at https://github.com/AIS-SNU/smart-infinity.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近大型语言模型（LLM）的巨大进步主要是由参数数量的增加驱动的。这导致了对内存容量的巨大需求，需要使用数十个 GPU 才能满足容量。一种流行的解决方案是存储卸载训练，它使用主机内存和存储作为扩展内存层次结构。然而，这显然是以存储带宽瓶颈为代价的，因为与 GPU 设备内存相比，存储设备的带宽要低几个数量级。我们的工作 Smart-Infinity 解决了在真实系统上使用近存储处理设备进行存储卸载 LLM 训练的存储带宽瓶颈。 Smart-Infinity 的主要组件是 SmartUpdate，它对自定义近存储加速器执行参数更新。我们发现将参数更新移动到存储端可以消除大部分存储流量。此外，我们提出了一种高效的数据传输处理程序结构来解决 Smart-Infinity 的系统集成问题。该处理程序允许通过重用设备缓冲区来实现固定内存消耗的重叠数据传输。最后，我们提出加速器辅助的梯度压缩/解压缩来增强 Smart-Infinity 的可扩展性。当扩展到多个近存储处理设备时，共享通道上的写入流量成为瓶颈。为了缓解这个问题，我们在 GPU 上压缩梯度并在加速器上解压缩它们。它通过减少交通量提供进一步的加速。因此，与基线相比，Smart-Infinity 实现了显着的加速。值得注意的是，SmartInfinity 是一种即用型方法，已完全集成到真实系统上的 PyTorch 中。 Smart-Infinity 的实施可在 https://github.com/AIS-SNU/smart-infinity 上找到。

papers.title: SmartDIMM: In-Memory Acceleration of Upper Layer Protocols.
papers.abstract: There has been significant focus on offloading upperlayer network protocols (ULPs) to accelerators located on CPUs and SmartNICs. However, restricting accelerator placement to these locations limits both the variety of ULPs that can be accelerated and the overall performance. In particular, it overlooks the opportunity to accelerate ULPs running atop a stateful transport protocol in the face of high cache contention. That is, at high network rates, the frequent DRAM accesses and SmartNIC-CPU synchronizations outweigh the benefits of hardware acceleration. This work introduces SmartDIMM, which unlocks the opportunity for accelerating ULPs running atop stateful transport protocols that primarily operate on data stored in DRAM. We prototyped SmartDIMM using Samsung's AxDIMM and implemented endto-end offloading of (de/en)cryption and (de)compression– two ULPs widely employed in datacenters. We then compared the performance of SmartDIMM with accelerator placements on the CPU, SmartNIC, and PCIe cards. Our results demonstrate that ULP offloading on SmartDIMM outperforms CPU, SmartNIC and PCIe-based offload configurations. In comparison to a server executing (de/en)cryption and (de)compression on the CPU, SmartDIMM achieves 21.0% to 10.28 × higher requests per second and 36.3% to 88.9% lower memory bandwidth utilization.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们非常关注将上层网络协议 (ULP) 卸载到位于 CPU 和 SmartNIC 上的加速器。然而，将加速器放置在这些位置限制了可加速的 ULP 的种类和整体性能。特别是，它忽视了在面临高缓存争用的情况下加速在有状态传输协议上运行的 ULP 的机会。也就是说，在高网络速率下，频繁的 DRAM 访问和 SmartNIC-CPU 同步超过了硬件加速的好处。这项工作引入了 SmartDIMM，它为加速在主要对 DRAM 中存储的数据进行操作的有状态传输协议上运行的 ULP 提供了机会。我们使用三星的 AxDIMM 制作了 SmartDIMM 原型，并实现了（解/加密）加密和（解）压缩（数据中心广泛采用的两种 ULP）的端到端卸载。然后，我们将 SmartDIMM 的性能与 CPU、SmartNIC 和 PCIe 卡上的加速器布置进行了比较。我们的结果表明，SmartDIMM 上的 ULP 卸载性能优于基于 CPU、SmartNIC 和 PCIe 的卸载配置。与在 CPU 上执行（解/加密）加密和（解）压缩的服务器相比，SmartDIMM 每秒的请求数提高了 21.0% 至 10.28 倍，内存带宽利用率降低了 36.3% 至 88.9%。

papers.title: SPADE: Sparse Pillar-based 3D Object Detection Accelerator for Autonomous Driving.
papers.abstract: 3D object detection using point cloud (PC) data is essential for perception pipelines of autonomous driving, where efficient encoding is key to meeting stringent resource and latency requirements. PointPillars, a widely adopted bird's-eye view (BEV) encoding, aggregates 3D point cloud data into 2D pillars for fast and accurate 3D object detection. However, the stateof-the-art methods employing PointPillars overlook the inherent sparsity of pillar encoding where only a valid pillar is encoded with a vector of channel elements, missing opportunities for significant computational reduction. Meanwhile, current sparse convolution accelerators are designed to handle only elementwise activation sparsity and do not effectively address the vector sparsity imposed by pillar encoding. In this paper, we propose SPADE, an algorithm-hardware codesign strategy to maximize vector sparsity in pillar-based 3D object detection and accelerate vector-sparse convolution commensurate with the improved sparsity. SPADE consists of three components: (1) a dynamic vector pruning algorithm balancing accuracy and computation savings from vector sparsity, (2) a sparse coordinate management hardware transforming 2D systolic array into a vector-sparse convolution accelerator, and (3) sparsityaware dataflow optimization tailoring sparse convolution schedules for hardware efficiency. Taped-out with a commercial technology, SPADE saves the amount of computation by 36.3–89.2% for representative 3D object detection networks and benchmarks, leading to 1.3–10.9 × speedup and 1.5–12.6 × energy savings compared to the ideal dense accelerator design. These sparsityproportional performance gains equate to 4.1–28.8 × speedup and 90.2–372.3 × energy savings compared to the counterpart server and edge platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用点云 (PC) 数据进行 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶的感知管道至关重要，其中高效编码是满足严格的资源和延迟要求的关键。 PointPillars 是一种广泛采用的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 编码，可将 3D 点云数据聚合到 2D 柱中，以实现快速、准确的 3D 对象检测。然而，采用 PointPillars 的最先进方法忽视了柱编码固有的稀疏性，其中只有有效柱用通道元素向量进行编码，从而错过了显着减少计算量的机会。同时，当前的稀疏卷积加速器被设计为仅处理元素激活稀疏性，并且不能有效地解决柱编码带来的向量稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了 SPADE，一种算法-硬件协同设计策略，用于最大化基于柱的 3D 对象检测中的向量稀疏性，并加速与改进的稀疏性相称的向量稀疏卷积。 SPADE 由三个组件组成：(1) 动态矢量修剪算法，平衡矢量稀疏性的准确性和计算节省；(2) 稀疏坐标管理硬件，将 2D 脉动阵列转换为矢量稀疏卷积加速器；(3) 稀疏感知数据流优化，定制稀疏卷积调度以提高硬件效率。采用商业技术流片后，SPADE 可以为代表性 3D 对象检测网络和基准测试节省 36.3–89.2% 的计算量，与理想的密集加速器设计相比，可实现 1.3–10.9 倍的加速和 1.5–12.6 倍的节能。与对应的服务器和边缘平台相比，这些稀疏性比例的性能提升相当于 4.1–28.8 倍的加速和 90.2–372.3 倍的节能。

papers.title: SPARK: Scalable and Precision-Aware Acceleration of Neural Networks via Efficient Encoding.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable success; however, their increasing model size poses a challenge due to the widening gap between model size and hardware capacity. To address this, model compression techniques have been proposed, but existing compression methods struggle to effectively handle the significant parameter variations (activations and weights) within the model. Moreover, current variance-aware encoding solutions for compression introduce complex logic, leading to limited compression benefits and hardware efficiency. In this context, we present SPARK, a novel algorithm/architecture co-designed solution that utilizes variable-length data representation for local parameter value processing, offering low hardware overhead and high-performance gains. Our key insight is that the high-order part in quantized values are often sparse, allowing us to employ an identity bit to assign the appropriate encoding length, thereby eliminating redundant bit-length footprints. This reduction in data representation based on data characteristics enables a serialized structured data encoding scheme that seamlessly integrates with existing hardware accelerators, such as systolic arrays. We evaluate SPARK-based accelerators against some existing encoding-based accelerator, and our results demonstrate significant improvements. The SPARK-based accelerator achieves up to 4.65 × speedup and 74.7% energy reduction, while maintaining superior model accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已经取得了显着的成功；然而，由于模型大小和硬件容量之间的差距不断扩大，模型大小的增加带来了挑战。为了解决这个问题，已经提出了模型压缩技术，但是现有的压缩方法难以有效地处理模型内的显着参数变化（激活和权重）。此外，当前用于压缩的方差感知编码解决方案引入了复杂的逻辑，导致压缩优势和硬件效率有限。在此背景下，我们提出了 SPARK，这是一种新颖的算法/架构共同设计的解决方案，它利用可变长度数据表示进行本地参数值处理，提供低硬件开销和高性能增益。我们的主要见解是，量化值中的高阶部分通常是稀疏的，这使得我们能够使用同一位来分配适当的编码长度，从而消除冗余的位长度足迹。这种基于数据特征的数据表示形式的减少使得序列化结构化数据编码方案能够与现有硬件加速器（例如脉动阵列）无缝集成。我们将基于 SPARK 的加速器与一些现有的基于编码的加速器进行评估，我们的结果表明了显着的改进。基于 SPARK 的加速器可实现高达 4.65 倍的加速和 74.7% 的能耗降低，同时保持卓越的模型精度。

papers.title: Spatial Variation-Aware Read Disturbance Defenses: Experimental Analysis of Real DRAM Chips and Implications on Future Solutions.
papers.abstract: Read disturbance in modern DRAM chips is a widespread phenomenon and is reliably used for breaking memory isolation, a fundamental building block for building robust systems. RowHammer and RowPress are two examples of read disturbance in DRAM where repeatedly accessing (hammering) or keeping active (pressing) a memory location induces bitflips in other memory locations. Unfortunately, shrinking technology node size exacerbates read disturbance in DRAM chips over generations. As a result, existing defense mechanisms suffer from significant performance and energy overheads, limited effectiveness, or prohibitively high hardware complexity. In this paper, we tackle these shortcomings by leveraging the spatial variation in read disturbance across different memory locations in real DRAM chips. To do so, we 1) present the first rigorous real DRAM chip characterization study of spatial variation of read disturbance and 2) propose Svärd, a new mechanism that dynamically adapts the aggressiveness of existing solutions based on the row-level read disturbance profile. Our experimental characterization on 144 real DDR4 DRAM chips representing 11 die revisions demonstrates a large variation in read disturbance vulnerability across different memory locations: in the part of memory with the worst read disturbance vulnerability, 1) up to 2 × the number of bitflips can occur and 2) bitflips can occur at an order of magnitude fewer accesses, compared to the memory locations with the least vulnerability to read disturbance. Svärd leverages this variation to reduce the overheads of five state-of-the-art read disturbance solutions, and thus significantly increases system performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 DRAM 芯片中的读取干扰是一种普遍现象，可可靠地用于打破内存隔离，而内存隔离是构建稳健系统的基本构建块。 RowHammer 和 RowPress 是 DRAM 中读取干扰的两个示例，其中重复访问（锤击）或保持活动（按下）内存位置会导致其他内存位置中的位翻转。 Unfortunately, shrinking technology node size exacerbates read disturbance in DRAM chips over generations.因此，现有的防御机制面临着巨大的性能和能源开销、有限的有效性或过高的硬件复杂性。在本文中，我们通过利用实际 DRAM 芯片中不同存储位置的读取干扰的空间变化来解决这些缺点。为此，我们 1) 提出了第一个关于读取干扰空间变化的严格真实 DRAM 芯片特性研究，2) 提出了 Svärd，这是一种新机制，可根据行级读取干扰配置文件动态调整现有解决方案的攻击性。我们对代表 11 个芯片版本的 144 个真实 DDR4 DRAM 芯片进行的实验表征表明，不同内存位置的读干扰漏洞存在很大差异：与读干扰漏洞最弱的内存位置相比，在读干扰漏洞最严重的内存部分，1) 可能会发生高达 2 倍的位翻转次数，2) 访问次数可能要少一个数量级。 Svärd 利用这种变化来减少五种最先进的读取干扰解决方案的开销，从而显着提高系统性能。

papers.title: SpecFL: An Efficient Speculative Federated Learning System for Tree-based Model Training.
papers.abstract: Federated tree-based models are popular in many real-world applications owing to their high accuracy and good interpretability. However, the classical synchronous method causes inefficient federated tree model training due to tree node dependencies. Inspired by speculative execution techniques in modern high-performance processors, this paper proposes SpecFL, a novel and efficient speculative federated learning system. Instead of simply waiting, SpecFL optimistically predicts the outcome of the prior tree node. By resolving tree node dependencies with a split point predictor, the training tasks of child tree nodes can be executed speculatively in advance via separate threads. This speculation enables cross-layer concurrent training, thus significantly reducing the waiting time. Furthermore, we propose a greedy speculation policy to exploit speculative training for deeper inter-layer concurrent training and an eager rollback mechanism for lossless model quality. We implement SpecFL and evaluate its efficiency in a real-world federated learning setting with six public datasets. The evaluation results demonstrate that SpecFL can be 2.08-3.33x and 2.14-3.44x faster than the state-of-the-art GBDT and RF implementations, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于树的联合模型由于其高精度和良好的可解释性而在许多实际应用中很受欢迎。然而，经典的同步方法由于树节点依赖性而导致联邦树模型训练效率低下。受现代高性能处理器中推测执行技术的启发，本文提出了 SpecFL，一种新颖且高效的推测联邦学习系统。 SpecFL 不是简单地等待，而是乐观地预测前一个树节点的结果。通过使用分割点预测器解决树节点依赖性，可以通过单独的线程提前推测地执行子树节点的训练任务。这种推测可以实现跨层并发训练，从而显着减少等待时间。此外，我们提出了一种贪婪的推测策略，以利用推测训练来进行更深层次的层间并发训练，并提出一种热切回滚机制来实现无损模型质量。我们实施 SpecFL 并在现实世界的联合学习环境中使用六个公共数据集评估其效率。评估结果表明，SpecFL 的速度分别比最先进的 GBDT 和 RF 实现快 2.08-3.33 倍和 2.14-3.44 倍。

papers.title: START: Scalable Tracking for any Rowhammer Threshold.
papers.abstract: The Rowhammer vulnerability is worsening, with the Rowhammer Threshold (T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf>) reducing from 139K to 4.8K activations over the last decade. As thresholds reduce further, the number of possible aggressor rows increases inversely, making it difficult to reliably track such rows in a storage-efficient manner for typical Rowhammer defenses. To be secure at lower thresholds, academic trackers like Graphene must dedicate prohibitively high storage (hundreds of KBs to MBs) at the chip's design time. Recent in-DRAM trackers from the industry, such as DSAC-TRR, perform approximate tracking and sacrifice guaranteed protection for reduced storage overheads, leaving DRAM vulnerable to Rowhammer attacks. Ideally, we seek a configurable tracker that is secure and precise, incurs negligible dedicated storage and performance overheads, and scales at deployment to track arbitrarily low thresholds. To that end, we propose START - a Scalable Tracker for Any Rowhammer Threshold. Rather than relying on dedicated SRAM structures, START dynamically repurposes a small fraction of the Last-Level Cache (LLC) to store tracking metadata. START leverages the observation that while the memory contains millions of rows, typical workloads touch only a small subset of rows within a refresh period of 64ms. Thus, allocating tracking entries on demand reduces storage significantly. If the application does not access many rows in memory, START does not reserve any LLC capacity. Otherwise, START dynamically uses 1-way, 2-way, or 8-way of the cache set based on demand. START consumes, on average, 9.4% of the LLC capacity to store metadata, which is 5 × lower compared to dedicating a counter in LLC for each row in memory. We also propose START-M, a memory-mapped START for large-memory systems. Our designs require only 4KB SRAM for newly added structures and perform within 1% of idealized tracking even at T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf> of less than 100.
papers.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 漏洞正在恶化，Rowhammer 阈值 (T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf>) 在过去十年中从 139K 激活减少到 4.8K。随着阈值进一步降低，可能的攻击者行的数量反而增加，这使得典型的 Rowhammer 防御难以以高效存储的方式可靠地跟踪此类行。为了在较低阈值下确保安全，像 Graphene 这样的学术跟踪器必须在芯片设计时投入极高的存储空间（数百 KB 到 MB）。业内最新的 DRAM 跟踪器（例如 DSAC-TRR）执行近似跟踪并牺牲有保证的保护以减少存储开销，从而使 DRAM 容易受到 Rowhammer 攻击。理想情况下，我们寻求一种安全且精确的可配置跟踪器，专用存储和性能开销可以忽略不计，并且可以在部署时进行扩展以跟踪任意低的阈值。为此，我们提出 START - 适用于任何 Rowhammer 阈值的可扩展跟踪器。 START 不依赖专用的 SRAM 结构，而是动态地重新利用末级缓存 (LLC) 的一小部分来存储跟踪元数据。 START 利用了这样的观察结果：虽然内存包含数百万行，但典型的工作负载在 64 毫秒的刷新周期内仅触及一小部分行。因此，按需分配跟踪条目可显着减少存储空间。如果应用程序不访问内存中的许多行，则 START 不会保留任何 LLC 容量。否则，START 根据需要动态使用 1-way、2-way 或 8-way 缓存集。 START 平均消耗 9.4% 的 LLC 容量来存储元数据，这比在 LLC 中为内存中的每一行专用一个计数器低 5 倍。我们还提出了 START-M，一种用于大内存系统的内存映射 START。我们的设计仅需要 4KB SRAM 用于新添加的结构，即使在 T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf> 小于 100 时，其性能也能达到理想化跟踪的 1% 以内。

papers.title: Stellar: Energy-Efficient and Low-Latency SNN Algorithm and Hardware Co-Design with Spatiotemporal Computation.
papers.abstract: The brain-inspired Spiking Neural Network (SNN) has great potential to reduce energy consumption in AI applications. However, the state-of-the-art SNN algorithms focus on high accuracy and large sparsity by constructing complex neuron models with sparse spike generation, leading to low energy efficiency and high latency. The state-of-the-art SNN hardware designs are hard to exploit high data reuse and parallel processing dataflows due to the irregularity and time-dependency of the spikes. To address the above issues, in this work we propose STELLAR, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework exploiting rich spatiotemporal dynamics of the SNN for high energy efficiency and low latency while maintaining high accuracy. Firstly, based on the Few Spikes (FS) neuron, we propose few spikes backpropagation (FSBP) and its training flow with strong hardware awareness to adaptively train the deep SNN for a short time window and few spikes. The resulting sparse SNN enjoys rapid inference with few synaptic operations and competitive accuracy. Secondly, we propose a dedicated SNN architecture and spatiotemporal Row Stationary (stRS) dataflow to exploit large sparsity brought by the proposed algorithm for highly parallel and energy -efficient computation. Several techniques have been proposed to boost energy efficiency and speedup while maintaining accuracy, including the window-based parallel processing technique and the spatiotemporal encoding-based computation architecture. The experimental results show that 1) on the algorithm level, STELLAR outperforms the state-of-the-art SNN models with significantly fewer spikes and shorter time window on both static and neuromorphic datasets with higher or comparable accuracy; 2) on the architecture level, compared with several SOTA SNN hardware designs, STELLAR achieves up to 8.1 × energy efficiency and 7.1 × speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 受大脑启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）在降低人工智能应用中的能耗方面具有巨大潜力。然而，最先进的 SNN 算法通过构建具有稀疏尖峰生成的复杂神经元模型来关注高精度和大稀疏性，从而导致低能量效率和高延迟。由于尖峰的不规则性和时间依赖性，最先进的 SNN 硬件设计很难利用高数据重用和并行处理数据流。为了解决上述问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了 STELLAR，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，利用 SNN 丰富的时空动态来实现高能效和低延迟，同时保持高精度。首先，基于少尖峰（FS）神经元，我们提出少尖峰反向传播（FSBP）及其具有强大硬件意识的训练流程，以自适应地训练短时间窗口和少尖峰的深度 SNN。由此产生的稀疏 SNN 具有快速推理、很少的突触操作和具有竞争力的准确性。其次，我们提出了专用的 SNN 架构和时空行固定（stRS）数据流，以利用所提出的算法带来的大稀疏性进行高度并行和节能计算。人们提出了几种技术来提高能源效率和加速，同时保持精度，包括基于窗口的并行处理技术和基于时空编码的计算架构。实验结果表明：1）在算法层面，STELLAR 优于最先进的 SNN 模型，在静态和神经形态数据集上具有显着更少的尖峰和更短的时间窗口，并且具有更高或相当的精度； 2）在架构层面，与几种SOTA SNN硬件设计相比，STELLAR实现了高达8.1×的能效和7.1×的加速比。

papers.title: StreamPIM: Streaming Matrix Computation in Racetrack Memory.
papers.abstract: Racetrack memory (RM) techniques have become promising solutions to resolve the memory wall issue as they increase memory density, reduce energy consumption and are capable of building processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures. RM can place arithmetic logic units in or near its memory arrays to process tasks offloaded by the host. While there already exist multiple studies of processing in RM, these solutions, unfortunately, suffer from data transfer overheads imposed by the loose coupling of the memory core and the computation units. To address this issue, we propose StreamPIM, a new processing-in-RM architecture, which tightly couples the memory core and the computation units. Specifically, StreamPIM directly constructs a matrix processor from domain-wall nanowires without the usage of CMOS-based computation units. It also designs a domainwall nanowire-based bus, which can eliminate electromagnetic conversion. StreamPIM further optimizes the performance by leveraging RM internal parallelism. Our evaluation results show that StreamPIM achieves 39.1 × higher performance and saves 58.4 × energy consumption, compared with the traditional computing platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 赛道内存 (RM) 技术已成为解决内存墙问题的有前景的解决方案，因为它们提高了内存密度、降低了能耗并能够构建内存中处理 (PIM) 架构。 RM 可以将算术逻辑单元放置在其内存阵列中或附近，以处理主机卸载的任务。虽然已经存在多项关于 RM 处理的研究，但不幸的是，这些解决方案受到内存核心和计算单元的松散耦合所带来的数据传输开销的影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 StreamPIM，一种新的 RM 处理架构，它将内存核心和计算单元紧密耦合。具体来说，StreamPIM 直接从畴壁纳米线构建矩阵处理器，而不使用基于 CMOS 的计算单元。它还设计了一种基于畴壁纳米线的总线，可以消除电磁转换。 StreamPIM 通过利用 RM 内部并行性进一步优化性能。我们的评估结果表明，与传统计算平台相比，StreamPIM 实现了 39.1 倍的性能提升，并节省了 58.4 倍的能耗。

papers.title: Supporting Secure Multi-GPU Computing with Dynamic and Batched Metadata Management.
papers.abstract: With growing problem sizes for GPU computing, multi-GPU systems with fine-grained memory sharing have emerged to improve the current coarse-grained unified memory support based on page migration. Such multi-GPU systems with shared memory pose a new challenge in securing CPU-GPU and inter-GPU communications, as the cost of secure data transfers adds a significant performance overhead. There are two overheads of secure communication in multi-GPU systems: First, extra overhead is added to generate one-time pads (OTPs) for authenticated encryption. Second, the security metadata such as MACs and counters passed along with encrypted data consume precious network bandwidth. This study investigates the performance impact of secure communication in multi-GPU systems and evaluates the prior CPU-oriented OTP precomputation schemes adapted for multi-GPU systems. Our investigation identifies the challenge with the limited OTP buffers for inter-GPU communication and the opportunity to reduce traffic for security meta-data with bursty communications in GPUs. Based on the analysis, this paper proposes a new dynamic OTP buffer allocation technique, which adjusts the buffer assignment for each source-destination pair to reflect the communication patterns. To address the bandwidth problem by extra security metadata, the study employs a dynamic batching scheme to transfer only a single set of metadata for each batched group of data responses. The proposed design constantly tracks the communication pattern from each GPU, periodically adjusts the allocated buffer size, and dynamically forms batches of data transfers. Our evaluation shows that in a 16-GPU system, the proposed scheme can improve the performance by 13.2 % and 17.5 % on average from the prior cached and private schemes, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着GPU计算问题规模的不断扩大，细粒度内存共享的多GPU系统应运而生，以改善当前基于页面迁移的粗粒度统一内存支持。这种具有共享内存的多 GPU 系统对保护 CPU-GPU 和 GPU 间通信的安全提出了新的挑战，因为安全数据传输的成本会显着增加性能开销。多 GPU 系统中的安全通信有两个开销：首先，会添加额外的开销来生成用于验证加密的一次性密码本 (OTP)。其次，与加密数据一起传递的安全元数据（例如 MAC 和计数器）会消耗宝贵的网络带宽。本研究调查了多 GPU 系统中安全通信的性能影响，并评估了适用于多 GPU 系统的现有面向 CPU 的 OTP 预计算方案。我们的调查发现了 GPU 间通信的 OTP 缓冲区有限所面临的挑战，以及通过 GPU 中的突发通信减少安全元数据流量的机会。基于分析，本文提出了一种新的动态 OTP 缓冲区分配技术，该技术调整每个源-目标对的缓冲区分配以反映通信模式。为了通过额外的安全元数据解决带宽问题，该研究采用动态批处理方案，为每个批处理的数据响应组仅传输一组元数据。所提出的设计不断跟踪每个 GPU 的通信模式，定期调整分配的缓冲区大小，并动态形成批量数据传输。我们的评估表明，在 16-GPU 系统中，所提出的方案可以比之前的缓存方案和私有方案平均分别提高 13.2% 和 17.5% 的性能。

papers.title: TALCO: Tiling Genome Sequence Alignment Using Convergence of Traceback Pointers.
papers.abstract: Pairwise sequence alignment is one of the most fundamental and computationally intensive steps in genome analysis. With the improving costs and throughput of third-generation sequencing technologies and the growing availability of whole-genome datasets, longer alignments are becoming more common in the field of bioinformatics. However, the high memory demands of long alignments create significant obstacles to hardware acceleration. Banding techniques allow recovering high-quality alignments with lower memory, but they also require more memory for long alignments than what is typically available on-chip in hardware accelerators. Recently, tiling-based hardware accelerators have made remarkable strides in accelerating sequence alignment, achieving three to four orders of magnitude improvement in alignment throughput over software tools without any restrictions on alignment length. However, it is crucial to note that existing tiling heuristics can cause the alignment quality to degrade, which is a critical concern for the wider adoption of accelerators in the field of bioinformatics. To address this issue, this paper describes TALCO - a novel method for tiling long sequence alignments, that, similar to prior tiling techniques, maintains a constant memory footprint during the acceleration step independent of alignment length. However, unlike previous techniques, TALCO also ensures optimal alignments under banding constraints. TALCO does this by leveraging the convergence of traceback paths beyond a tile to a single point on the boundary of that tile - a strategy that generalizes well to a broad set of sequence alignment algorithms. We demonstrate the advantages of TALCO by applying it to two different and widely-used banded sequence alignment algorithms, X-Drop and WFA-Adapt. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a tiling technique is being applied to a non-classical algorithm for sequence alignment, such as WFA-Adapt. The TALCO tiling strategy is beneficial to both software and hardware. When implemented in software, the TALCO strategy reduces the memory requirements for X-Drop and WFA-Adapt algorithms by up to 39 × and 57 ×, respectively, and when implemented as ASIC accelerator, it provides up to 1,900 × and 2,000 × improvement in alignment throughput/watt over CPU baselines implementing the same algorithms. Compared to state-of-the-art GPU and ASIC baselines implementing tiling heuristics, TALCO provides up to 50 × and 1.1 × improvement in alignment throughput, respectively, while also maintaining a higher alignment quality. Code availability: https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/TALCO.
papers.abstract_zh: 成对序列比对是基因组分析中最基本且计算密集的步骤之一。随着第三代测序技术的成本和通量的提高以及全基因组数据集的可用性不断增加，更长的比对在生物信息学领域变得越来越普遍。然而，长对齐的高内存需求对硬件加速造成了重大障碍。分段技术允许使用较低的内存恢复高质量的对齐，但与硬件加速器中通常可用的片上内存相比，它们也需要更多的内存来进行长对齐。最近，基于平铺的硬件加速器在加速序列比对方面取得了显着的进步，与软件工具相比，比对吞吐量提高了三到四个数量级，且对比对长度没有任何限制。然而，值得注意的是，现有的平铺启发式方法可能会导致比对质量下降，这是生物信息学领域更广泛采用加速器的一个关键问题。为了解决这个问题，本文介绍了 TALCO——一种用于平铺长序列比对的新方法，该方法与之前的平铺技术类似，在加速步骤期间保持恒定的内存占用，与比对长度无关。然而，与以前的技术不同，TALCO 还可以确保在条带约束下实现最佳对齐。 TALCO 通过利用从图块到该图块边界上的单个点的回溯路径的收敛来实现这一点 - 这种策略可以很好地推广到广泛的序列比对算法。我们通过将 TALCO 应用于两种不同且广泛使用的带状序列比对算法 X-Drop 和 WFA-Adapt 来展示 TALCO 的优势。据我们所知，这是第一次将平铺技术应用于非经典序列比对算法，例如 WFA-Adapt。 TALCO 平铺策略对软件和硬件都有好处。在软件中实施时，TALCO 策略可将 X-Drop 和 WFA-Adapt 算法的内存需求分别降低多达 39 倍和 57 倍，而当作为 ASIC 加速器实施时，与实施相同算法的 CPU 基线相比，它可将对齐吞吐量/瓦特提高高达 1,900 倍和 2,000 倍。与实现平铺启发式的最先进的 GPU 和 ASIC 基线相比，TALCO 的对齐吞吐量分别提高了 50 倍和 1.1 倍，同时还保持了更高的对齐质量。代码可用性：https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/TALCO。

papers.title: Tessel: Boosting Distributed Execution of Large DNN Models via Flexible Schedule Search.
papers.abstract: Increasingly complex and diverse deep neural network (DNN) models necessitate distributing the execution across multiple devices for training and inference tasks, and also require carefully planned schedules for performance. However, existing practices often rely on predefined schedules that may not fully exploit the benefits of emerging diverse model-aware operator placement strategies. Handcrafting high-efficiency schedules can be challenging due to the large and varying schedule space. This paper presents Tessel, an automated system that searches for efficient schedules for distributed DNN training and inference for diverse operator placement strategies. To reduce search costs, Tessel leverages the insight that the most efficient schedules often exhibit repetitive pattern (repetend) across different data inputs. This leads to a two-phase approach: repetend construction and schedule completion. By exploring schedules for various operator placement strategies, Tessel significantly improves both training and inference performance. Experiments with representative DNN models demonstrate that Tessel achieves up to 5.5 x training performance speedup and up to 38 % inference latency reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 日益复杂和多样化的深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型需要在多个设备上分配执行以进行训练和推理任务，并且还需要仔细规划性能时间表。然而，现有的实践通常依赖于预定义的时间表，而这些时间表可能无法充分利用新兴的多样化模型感知操作员放置策略的优势。由于日程空间大且变化多端，手工制定高效率的日程可能具有挑战性。本文介绍了 Tessel，这是一个自动化系统，可以为分布式 DNN 训练和推理寻找有效的调度，以实现不同的算子放置策略。为了降低搜索成本，Tessel 利用了这样的见解：最高效的计划通常会在不同的数据输入中表现出重复模式 (repetend)。这导致了一个两阶段的方法：重复施工和按计划完成。通过探索各种算子放置策略的时间表，Tessel 显着提高了训练和推理性能。对代表性 DNN 模型的实验表明，Tessel 实现了高达 5.5 倍的训练性能加速和高达 38% 的推理延迟减少。

papers.title: TinyTS: Memory-Efficient TinyML Model Compiler Framework on Microcontrollers.
papers.abstract: Deploying deep neural network (DNN) models on Microcontroller Units (MCUs) is typically limited by the tightness of the SRAM memory budget. Previously, machine learning system frameworks often allocated tensor memory layer-wise, but this will result in out-of-memory exceptions when a DNN model includes a large tensor. Patch-based inference, another past solution, reduces peak SRAM memory usage by dividing a tensor into small patches and storing one small patch at a time. However, executing these overlapping small patches requires significantly more time to complete the inference and is undesirable for MCUs. We resolve these problems by developing a novel DNN model compiler: TinyTS. In the TinyTS, our tensor partition method creates a tensor-splitting model that eliminates the redundant computation observed in the patch-based inference. Furthermore, the TinyTS memory planner significantly reduces peak SRAM memory usage by releasing the memory space of unused split tensors for other ready split tensors early before the completion of the entire tensor. Finally, TinyTS presents different optimization techniques to eliminate the metadata storage and runtime overhead when executing multiple fine-grained split tensors. Using the TensorFlow Lite for Microcontroller (TFLM) framework as a baseline, we tested the effectiveness of TinyTS. We found that TinyTS reduces the peak SRAM memory usage of 9 TinyML models up to 5.92X over the baseline. TinyTS also achieves a geometric mean of 8.83X speedup over the patch-based inference. In resolving the two key issues when deploying DNN models on MCUs, TinyTS substantially boosts memory usage efficiency for TinyML applications. The source code of TinyTS can be obtained from https://github.com/nycu-caslab/TinyTS
papers.abstract_zh: 在微控制器单元 (MCU) 上部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型通常受到 SRAM 内存预算紧张的限制。此前，机器学习系统框架通常会逐层分配张量内存，但当 DNN 模型包含较大张量时，这会导致内存不足的异常。基于补丁的推理是另一种过去的解决方案，它通过将张量划分为小补丁并一次存储一个小补丁来减少峰值 SRAM 内存使用量。然而，执行这些重叠的小补丁需要更多的时间来完成推理，这对于 MCU 来说是不可取的。我们通过开发一种新颖的 DNN 模型编译器来解决这些问题：TinyTS。在 TinyTS 中，我们的张量分割方法创建了一个张量分割模型，消除了基于补丁的推理中观察到的冗余计算。此外，TinyTS 内存规划器通过在整个张量完成之前尽早释放未使用的分割张量的内存空间以用于其他就绪的分割张量，显着降低了峰值 SRAM 内存使用量。最后，TinyTS 提出了不同的优化技术，以消除执行多个细粒度分割张量时的元数据存储和运行时开销。使用 TensorFlow Lite for Microcontroller (TFLM) 框架作为基准，我们测试了 TinyTS 的有效性。我们发现 TinyTS 将 9 个 TinyML 模型的峰值 SRAM 内存使用量降低了基线的 5.92 倍。 TinyTS 还比基于补丁的推理实现了 8.83 倍的几何平均加速。 TinyTS解决了在MCU上部署DNN模型时的两个关键问题，极大地提高了TinyML应用程序的内存使用效率。 TinyTS的源代码可以从https://github.com/nycu-caslab/TinyTS获取

papers.title: Uncovering and Exploiting AMD Speculative Memory Access Predictors for Fun and Profit.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive investigation into the security vulnerabilities associated with speculative memory access on AMD processors. Firstly, employing novel reverse engineering techniques, our study uncovers two key predictors, namely the Predictive Store Forwarding Predictor (PSFP) and the Speculative Store Bypass Predictor (SSBP), along with elucidating their internal structures and state machine designs. Secondly, our research empirically confirms that these predictors can be deliberately manipulated and altered during transient execution, resulting in secret leakage across security domains. Leveraging these discoveries, we propose innovative attacks targeting these predictors, including an out-of-place variant of Spectre-STL and an entirely new form of Spectre attack named Spectre-CTL. Finally, we establish experimentally that enabling Speculative Store Bypass Disable alleviates the vulnerabilities. However, this comes at the expense of significant performance degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文对 AMD 处理器上与推测内存访问相关的安全漏洞进行了全面调查。首先，我们的研究采用新颖的逆向工程技术，揭示了两个关键的预测器，即预测存储转发预测器（PSFP）和推测存储旁路预测器（SSBP），并阐明了它们的内部结构和状态机设计。其次，我们的研究凭经验证实，这些预测变量可以在瞬时执行期间被故意操纵和改变，从而导致跨安全域的秘密泄漏。利用这些发现，我们提出了针对这些预测因子的创新攻击，包括 Spectre-STL 的异位变体和名为 Spectre-CTL 的全新形式的 Spectre 攻击。最后，我们通过实验确定启用推测存储绕过禁用可以缓解漏洞。然而，这是以性能显着下降为代价的。

papers.title: Unleashing the Potential of PIM: Accelerating Large Batched Inference of Transformer-Based Generative Models.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based generative models, such as GPT, summarize an input sequence by generating key/value (KV) matrices through attention and generate the corresponding output sequence by utilizing these matrices once per token of the sequence. Both input and output sequences tend to get longer, which improves the understanding of contexts and conversation quality. These models are also typically batched for inference to improve the serving throughput. All these trends enable the models' weights to be reused effectively, increasing the relative importance of sequence generation, especially in processing KV matrices through attention. We identify that the conventional computing platforms (e.g., GPUs) are not efficient at handling this attention part for inference because each request generates different KV matrices, it has a low operation per byte ratio regardless of the batch size, and the aggregate size of the KV matrices can even surpass that of the entire model weights. This motivates us to propose AttAcc, which exploits the fact that the KV matrices are written once during summarization but used many times (proportional to the output sequence length), each multiplied by the embedding vector corresponding to an output token. The volume of data entering/leaving AttAcc could be more than orders of magnitude smaller than what should be read internally for attention. We design AttAcc with multiple processing-in-memory devices, each multiplying the embedding vector with the portion of the KV matrices within the devices, saving external (inter-device) bandwidth and energy consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的生成模型（例如 GPT）通过注意力生成键/值（KV）矩阵来总结输入序列，并通过序列中的每个标记使用这些矩阵一次来生成相应的输出序列。输入和输出序列往往会变得更长，这可以提高对上下文的理解和对话质量。这些模型通常还进行批处理以进行推理，以提高服务吞吐量。所有这些趋势使得模型的权重能够被有效地重用，增加了序列生成的相对重要性，特别是在通过注意力处理 KV 矩阵时。我们发现传统的计算平台（例如 GPU）在处理推理中的注意力部分时效率不高，因为每个请求都会生成不同的 KV 矩阵，无论批量大小如何，它的每字节操作率都很低，并且 KV 矩阵的聚合大小甚至可以超过整个模型权重的大小。这促使我们提出 AttAcc，它利用了 KV 矩阵在汇总过程中写入一次但使用多次（与输出序列长度成比例）的事实，每次乘以对应于输出标记的嵌入向量。进入/离开 AttAcc 的数据量可能比应内部读取以引起注意的数据量小多个数量级。我们设计的 AttAcc 具有多个内存处理设备，每个设备将嵌入向量与设备内的 KV 矩阵部分相乘，从而节省外部（设备间）带宽和能耗。

papers.title: Ursa: Lightweight Resource Management for Cloud-Native Microservices.
papers.abstract: Resource management for cloud-native microservices has attracted a lot of recent attention. Previous work has shown that machine learning (ML)-driven approaches out-perform traditional techniques, such as autoscaling, in terms of both SLA maintenance and resource efficiency. However, ML-driven approaches also face challenges including lengthy data collection processes and limited scalability. We present Ursa, a lightweight resource management system for cloud-native microservices that addresses these challenges. Ursa uses an analytical model that decomposes the end-to-end SLA into per-service SLA, and maps per-service SLA to individual resource allocations per microservice tier. To speed up the exploration process and avoid prolonged SLA violations, Ursa explores each microservice individually, and swiftly stops exploration if latency exceeds its SLA. We evaluate Ursa on a set of representative and end-to-end microservice topologies, including a social network, media service and video processing pipeline, each consisting of multiple classes and priorities of requests with different SLAs, and compare it against two representative ML-driven systems, Sinan and Firm. Compared to these ML-driven approaches, Ursa provides significant advantages: It shortens the data collection process by more than 128 ×, and its control plane is 43 × faster than ML-driven approaches. At the same time, Ursa does not sacrifice resource efficiency or SLAs. During online deployment, Ursa reduces the SLA violation rate by 9.0% up to 49.9%, and reduces CPU allocation by up to 86.2% compared to ML-driven approaches
papers.abstract_zh: 云原生微服务的资源管理最近引起了很多关注。之前的研究表明，机器学习 (ML) 驱动的方法在 SLA 维护和资源效率方面均优于自动扩展等传统技术。然而，机器学习驱动的方法也面临挑战，包括冗长的数据收集过程和有限的可扩展性。我们推出了 Ursa，这是一个用于云原生微服务的轻量级资源管理系统，可以解决这些挑战。 Ursa 使用分析模型将端到端 SLA 分解为每服务 SLA，并将每服务 SLA 映射到每个微服务层的单独资源分配。为了加快探索过程并避免长时间违反 SLA，Ursa 单独探索每个微服务，并在延迟超过其 SLA 时迅速停止探索。我们在一组代表性的端到端微服务拓扑上评估 Ursa，包括社交网络、媒体服务和视频处理管道，每个拓扑都包含具有不同 SLA 的多个类别和优先级的请求，并将其与两个代表性的 ML 驱动系统 Sinan 和 Firm 进行比较。与这些 ML 驱动的方法相比，Ursa 具有显着的优势：它将数据收集过程缩短了 128 倍以上，并且其控制平面比 ML 驱动的方法快 43 倍。同时，Ursa 不会牺牲资源效率或 SLA。在线部署过程中，与 ML 驱动的方法相比，Ursa 将 SLA 违规率降低了 9.0% 高达 49.9%，并减少了 CPU 分配高达 86.2%

papers.title: Usas: A Sustainable Continuous-Learning' Framework for Edge Servers.
papers.abstract: Edge servers have recently become very popular for performing localized analytics, especially on video, as they reduce data traffic and protect privacy. However, due to their resource constraints, these servers often employ compressed models, which are typically prone to data drift. Consequently, for edge servers to provide cloud-comparable quality, they must also perform continuous learning to mitigate this drift. However, at expected deployment scales, performing continuous training on every edge server is not sustainable due to their aggregate power demands on grid supply and associated sustainability footprints. To address these challenges, we propose Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as,´ an approach combining algorithmic adjustments, hardware-software co-design, and morphable acceleration hardware to enable the training of workloads on these edge servers to be powered by renewable, but intermittent, solar power that can sustainably scale alongside data sources. Our evaluation of Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as on a real-world´ traffic dataset indicates that our continuous learning approach simultaneously improves both accuracy and efficiency: Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as´ offers a 4.96% greater mean accuracy than prior approaches while our morphable accelerator that adapts to solar variance can save up to {234.95kWH, 2.63MWH}/year/edge-server compared to a {DNN accelerator, data center scale GPU}, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 边缘服务器最近在执行本地化分析（尤其是视频分析）方面变得非常流行，因为它们可以减少数据流量并保护隐私。然而，由于资源限制，这些服务器通常采用压缩模型，这通常容易出现数据漂移。因此，为了使边缘服务器提供与云相当的质量，它们还必须执行持续学习以减轻这种漂移。然而，在预期的部署规模下，由于对电网供应的总电力需求和相关的可持续性足迹，在每台边缘服务器上执行连续训练是不可持续的。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种将算法调整、硬件-软件协同设计和可变形加速硬件相结合的方法，使这些边缘服务器上的工作负载训练能够由可再生但间歇性的太阳能供电，与数据源一起可持续扩展。我们对 Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf> 的评估表明，我们的持续学习方法同时提高了准确性和效率：Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">。</inf>as´ 的平均准确度比之前的方法提高了 4.96%，而我们适应太阳变化的可变形加速器与分别为{DNN 加速器、数据中心规模 GPU}。

papers.title: WASP: Exploiting GPU Pipeline Parallelism with Hardware-Accelerated Automatic Warp Specialization.
papers.abstract: Graphics processing units (GPUs) are an important class of parallel processors that offer high compute throughput and memory bandwidth. GPUs are used in a variety of important computing domains, such as machine learning, high performance computing, sparse linear algebra, autonomous vehicles, and robotics. However, some applications from these domains can underperform due to sensitivity to memory latency and bandwidth. Some of this sensitivity can be reduced by better overlapping memory access with compute. Current GPUs often leverage pipeline parallelism in the form of warp specialization to enable better overlap. However, current warp specialization support on GPUs is limited in three ways. First, warp specialization is a complex and manual program transformation that is out of reach for many applications and developers. Second, it is limited to coarse-grained transfers between global memory and the shared memory scratchpad (SMEM); fine-grained memory access patterns are not well supported. Finally, the GPU hardware is unaware of the pipeline parallelism expressed by the programmer, and is unable to take advantage of this information to make better decisions at runtime. In this paper we introduce WASP, hardware and compiler support for warp specialization that addresses these limitations. WASP enables fine-grained streaming and gather memory access patterns through the use of warp-level register file queues and hardware-accelerated address generation. Explicit warp to pipeline stage naming enables the GPU to be aware of pipeline parallelism, which WASP capitalizes on by designing pipeline-aware warp mapping, register allocation, and scheduling. Finally, we design and implement a compiler that can automatically generate warp specialized kernels, reducing programmer burden. Overall, we find that runtime performance can be improved on a variety of important applications by an average of 47% over a modern GPU baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 是一类重要的并行处理器，可提供高计算吞吐量和内存带宽。 GPU 用于各种重要的计算领域，例如机器学习、高性能计算、稀疏线性代数、自动驾驶车辆和机器人。然而，由于对内存延迟和带宽的敏感性，这些领域的一些应用程序可能表现不佳。通过更好地重叠内存访问和计算可以降低这种敏感性。当前的 GPU 通常以扭曲专门化的形式利用管道并行性来实现更好的重叠。然而，当前 GPU 上的扭曲专业化支持在三个方面受到限制。首先，warp 专业化是一种复杂且手动的程序转换，对于许多应用程序和开发人员来说是遥不可及的。其次，它仅限于全局内存和共享内存暂存器（SMEM）之间的粗粒度传输；细粒度的内存访问模式没有得到很好的支持。最后，GPU 硬件不知道程序员表达的管道并行性，并且无法利用此信息在运行时做出更好的决策。在本文中，我们介绍了 WASP、对 warp 专业化的硬件和编译器支持，以解决这些限制。 WASP 通过使用扭曲级寄存器文件队列和硬件加速地址生成来实现细粒度流并收集内存访问模式。显式扭曲到管道阶段命名使 GPU 能够了解管道并行性，WASP 通过设计管道感知扭曲映射、寄存器分配和调度来利用这一点。最后，我们设计并实现了一个编译器，可以自动生成warp专用内核，减轻程序员的负担。总体而言，我们发现各种重要应用程序的运行时性能比现代 GPU 基准平均提高了 47%。

papers.title: A Pulse Generation Framework with Augmented Program-aware Basis Gates and Criticality Analysis.
papers.abstract: Near-term intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices are subject to considerable noise and short coherence time. Consequently, it is critical to minimize circuit execution latency and improve fidelity. Traditionally, each basis gate of a transpiled circuit is decoded into a fixed episode of the device control pulses. Recent studies investigate the merged pulse generation method for customized gates through quantum optimal control (QOC). In this work, we propose PAQOC, a novel QOC framework that can (i) exploit an augmented program-aware (APA) basis gate set for the tradeoff between compilation time and circuit performance, (ii) prune the search space based on a criticality-centric analytical model and experiment observations we learned from 150 benchmarks. Evaluations using seventeen applications show that PAQOC can achieve an average 54% reduction of the circuit latency, on average 43% reduction in compilation overhead, and a 1.27× improvement in fidelity. PAQOC is available on GitHub<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>.
papers.abstract_zh: 近期中尺度量子（NISQ）设备会受到相当大的噪声和较短的相干时间的影响。因此，最小化电路执行延迟并提高保真度至关重要。传统上，转译电路的每个基门被解码为设备控制脉冲的固定片段。最近的研究研究了通过量子最优控制（QOC）定制门的合并脉冲生成方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PAQOC，一种新颖的 QOC 框架，它可以（i）利用增强程序感知（APA）基础门集来权衡编译时间和电路性能，（ii）基于以关键性为中心的分析模型和我们从 150 个基准测试中学到的实验观察结果来修剪搜索空间。使用 17 个应用程序进行的评估表明，PAQOC 可以实现电路延迟平均减少 54%、编译开销平均减少 43%、保真度提高 1.27 倍。 PAQOC 可在 GitHub<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 上获取。

papers.title: A Scalable Methodology for Designing Efficient Interconnection Network of Chiplets.
papers.abstract: The Chiplet methodology can accelerate VLSI system development and provide better flexibility. However, it is not easy to build interconnection networks across multiple chiplets and maintain high-performance deadlock-free routing in systems of various hierarchical topologies. In particular, most on-chiplet networks are based on flat topologies such as 2D-mesh, which are inflexible and insufficient for large-scale multi-chiplet systems.To take full advantage of the multi-chiplet architecture and advanced packaging, we propose an interconnection method that can flexibly establish high-radix interconnection networks from typical 2D-mesh-NoC-based chiplets. A minus-first-based deadlock-free adaptive routing algorithm and a safe/unsafe flow control policy are introduced for these multi-chiplet interconnection networks. Additionally, a general approach network interleaving is used to balance the communication bandwidth within and between chiplets.We evaluate different architectures and traffic patterns on a cycle-accurate C++ simulator. Compared with traditional adaptive routing in 2D-mesh, our methodology can significantly improve network performance in various cases. The more chiplets there are, the more effective the method is. For 64 4×4-2D-mesh-based chiplets, The maximum injection rate increase is up to 2×, and the average latency reduction is up to 45%.
papers.abstract_zh: Chiplet方法可以加速VLSI系统开发并提供更好的灵活性。然而，在各种分层拓扑的系统中构建跨多个chiplet的互连网络并维持高性能的无死锁路由并不容易。特别是，大多数片上网络都是基于2D-mesh等扁平拓扑，这对于大规模多chiplet系统来说不够灵活且不足。为了充分利用多chiplet架构和先进封装，我们提出了一种互连方法，可以从典型的基于2D-mesh-NoC的chiplet灵活地建立高基数互连网络。针对这些多chiplet互连网络引入了基于负优先的无死锁自适应路由算法和安全/不安全流量控制策略。此外，网络交错的通用方法用于平衡小芯片内部和小芯片之间的通信带宽。我们在周期精确的 C++ 模拟器上评估不同的架构和流量模式。与二维网格中传统的自适应路由相比，我们的方法可以在各种情况下显着提高网络性能。小芯片越多，该方法就越有效。对于 64 个基于 4×4-2D 网格的 Chiplet，最大注入速率提升高达 2 倍，平均延迟降低高达 45%。
