papers.title: A Storage-Effective BTB Organization for Servers.
papers.abstract: Many contemporary applications feature multi-megabyte instruction footprints that overwhelm the capacity of branch target buffers (BTB) and instruction caches (L1-I), causing frequent front-end stalls that inevitably hurt performance. BTB capacity is crucial for performance as a sufficiently large BTB enables the front-end to accurately resolve the upcoming execution path and steer instruction fetch appropriately. Moreover, it also enables highly effective fetch-directed instruction prefetching that can eliminate a large portion L1-I misses. For these reasons, commercial processors allocate vast amounts of storage capacity to BTBs.This work aims to reduce BTB storage requirements by optimizing the organization of BTB entries. Our key insight is that storing branch target offsets, instead of full or compressed targets, can drastically reduce BTB storage cost as the vast majority of dynamic branches have short offsets requiring just a handful of bits to encode. Based on this insight, we size the ways of a set associative BTB to hold different number of target offset bits such that each way stores offsets within a particular range. Doing so enables a dramatic reduction in storage for target addresses. Our final design, called BTB-X, uses an 8-way set associative BTB with differently sized ways that enables it to track about 2.24x more branches than a conventional BTB and 1.3x more branches than a storage-optimized state-of-the-art BTB organization, called PDede, with the same storage budget.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多当代应用程序都具有多兆字节的指令占用空间，这超出了分支目标缓冲区 (BTB) 和指令缓存 (L1-I) 的容量，导致频繁的前端停顿，从而不可避免地损害性能。 BTB 容量对于性能至关重要，因为足够大的 BTB 使前端能够准确解析即将到来的执行路径并适当引导指令获取。此外，它还支持高效的直接取指指令预取，可以消除大部分 L1-I 缺失。由于这些原因，商用处理器为 BTB 分配了大量的存储容量。本工作旨在通过优化 BTB 条目的组织来降低 BTB 存储需求。我们的主要见解是，存储分支目标偏移量，而不是完整或压缩目标，可以大大降低 BTB 存储成本，因为绝大多数动态分支具有短偏移量，只需要少数位进行编码。基于这一见解，我们调整了一组关联 BTB 的路数以保存不同数量的目标偏移位，以便每种路都存储特定范围内的偏移量。这样做可以大大减少目标地址的存储空间。我们的最终设计称为 BTB-X，使用具有不同大小路的 8 路组关联 BTB，使其能够在相同的存储预算下跟踪比传统 BTB 多大约 2.24 倍的分支，比存储优化的最先进的 BTB 组织（称为 PDede）多跟踪 1.3 倍的分支。

papers.title: A Systematic Study of DDR4 DRAM Faults in the Field.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a study of DDR4 DRAM faults in a large fleet of commodity servers, covering several billion memory device-hours of data. The goal of this study is to understand faults in DDR4 DRAM devices to measure the efficacy of existing hardware resilience techniques and aid in designing more resilient systems for future large-scale systems.The study has several key findings about the fault characteristics of DDR4 DRAMs and adds several novel insights about system reliability to the existing literature. Specifically, the data show sixteen unique fault modes in the DDR4 DRAM under study, including several that have not been previously reported. Over 45% of the faults that occurred affected multiple DRAM bits. The time-to-failure characteristics of faults internal to the DRAM die differ from those external to the DRAM die. We also examine faults from multiple DRAM vendors, finding that fault rates vary by more than 1.34x among vendors.Finally, we use the data to compare chipkill ECC and an ECC that covers a DDR5 "bounded fault." Given the fault rates in this data, a bounded fault ECC increases the rate of faults that cause uncorrectable errors by up to 5.71 FIT per DRAM device compared to chipkill ECC.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了对大量商用服务器中 DDR4 DRAM 故障的研究，涵盖数十亿内存设备小时的数据。本研究的目标是了解 DDR4 DRAM 设备中的故障，以衡量现有硬件弹性技术的有效性，并帮助为未来的大型系统设计更具弹性的系统。该研究得出了有关 DDR4 DRAM 故障特征的几项关键发现，并为现有文献添加了一些有关系统可靠性的新颖见解。具体来说，数据显示了正在研究的 DDR4 DRAM 中的 16 种独特故障模式，其中包括一些之前未报道过的故障模式。超过 45% 的故障影响多个 DRAM 位。 DRAM 芯片内部故障的故障时间特性与 DRAM 芯片外部故障的故障时间特性不同。我们还检查了多个 DRAM 供应商的故障，发现供应商之间的故障率相差超过 1.34 倍。最后，我们使用这些数据来比较 Chipkill ECC 和覆盖 DDR5“有限故障”的 ECC。考虑到此数据中的故障率，与 Chipkill ECC 相比，有界故障 ECC 会导致每个 DRAM 设备导致不可纠正错误的故障率增加高达 5.71 FIT。

papers.title: AB-ORAM: Constructing Adjustable Buckets for Space Reduction in Ring ORAM.
papers.abstract: Ring ORAM (Oblivious RAM) is a secure primitive that mitigates the large performance degradation of ORAM through reduced online memory bandwidth demand, i.e., the number of memory accesses at servicing a real memory request. Ring ORAM requires 4× or more of the protected data space to enable the optimization and thus presents high capacity pressure on modern memory systems. While recent studies strive to reduce its space consumption through bucket compaction, the large space consumption remains a major design challenge for Ring ORAM.In this paper, we propose AB-ORAM to reduce the space capacity demand in Ring ORAM. AB-ORAM identifies two inefficient use of memory space in Ring ORAM: (i) accessed blocks hold useless data until the next reshuffle operation; and (ii) large buckets provide a diminishing performance benefit for tree levels close to the leaves. AB-ORAM then proposes two schemes to exploit the optimization opportunities, respectively. Specifically, it reclaims accessed blocks early by allocating them to buckets that need a reshuffle; and shrinks the bucket size for tree level close to the leaves for a better space/performance trade-off. We evaluate the proposed AB-ORAM design and compare it to the state-of-the-art. Our results show that AB-ORAM achieves an average of 36% space reduction over the state-of-the-art while introducing very low performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: Ring ORAM（Oblivious RAM）是一种安全原语，它通过减少在线内存带宽需求（即服务实际内存请求时的内存访问次数）来缓解 ORAM 的大幅性能下降。 Ring ORAM 需要 4 倍或更多的受保护数据空间才能实现优化，因此对现代存储系统带来了很高的容量压力。虽然最近的研究努力通过桶压缩来减少其空间消耗，但大量的空间消耗仍然是Ring ORAM的主要设计挑战。在本文中，我们提出AB-ORAM来减少Ring ORAM的空间容量需求。 AB-ORAM identifies two inefficient use of memory space in Ring ORAM: (i) accessed blocks hold useless data until the next reshuffle operation; and (ii) large buckets provide a diminishing performance benefit for tree levels close to the leaves. AB-ORAM then proposes two schemes to exploit the optimization opportunities, respectively. Specifically, it reclaims accessed blocks early by allocating them to buckets that need a reshuffle; and shrinks the bucket size for tree level close to the leaves for a better space/performance trade-off. We evaluate the proposed AB-ORAM design and compare it to the state-of-the-art.我们的结果表明，AB-ORAM 与最先进的技术相比，平均减少了 36% 的空间，同时引入了非常低的性能开销。

papers.title: ACIC: Admission-Controlled Instruction Cache.
papers.abstract: The front end bottleneck in datacenter workloads has come under increased scrutiny, with the growing code footprint, involvement of numerous libraries and OS services, and the unpredictability in the instruction stream. Our examination of these workloads points to burstiness in accesses to instruction blocks, which has also been observed in data accesses [61]. Such burstiness is largely due to spatial and short-duration temporal localities, that LRU fails to recognize and optimize for, when a single cache caters to both forms of locality. Instead, we incorporate a small i-Filter as in previous works [29], [49] to separate spatial from temporal accesses. However, a simple separation does not suffice, and we additionally need to predict whether the block will continue to have temporal locality, after the burst of spatial locality. This combination of i-Filter and temporal locality predictor constitutes our Admission-Controlled Instruction Cache (ACIC). ACIC outperforms a number of state-of-the-art pollution reduction techniques (replacement algorithms, bypassing mechanisms, victim caches), providing 1.0223 speedup on the average over a baseline LRU based conventional i-cache (bridging over half of the gap between LRU and OPT) across several datacenter workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着代码占用量的不断增加、大量库和操作系统服务的参与以及指令流的不可预测性，数据中心工作负载中的前端瓶颈受到越来越多的审查。 Our examination of these workloads points to burstiness in accesses to instruction blocks, which has also been observed in data accesses [61].这种突发性很大程度上是由于空间和短时时间局部性造成的，当单个缓存满足两种形式的局部性时，LRU 无法识别和优化。 Instead, we incorporate a small i-Filter as in previous works [29], [49] to separate spatial from temporal accesses.然而，简单的分离是不够的，我们还需要预测在空间局部性爆发之后，块是否将继续具有时间局部性。 This combination of i-Filter and temporal locality predictor constitutes our Admission-Controlled Instruction Cache (ACIC). ACIC 的性能优于许多最先进的污染减少技术（替换算法、旁路机制、受害者缓存），在多个数据中心工作负载中，与基于 LRU 的基准传统 i-cache（弥补 LRU 和 OPT 之间一半以上的差距）平均提供 1.0223 的加速。

papers.title: Adrias: Interference-Aware Memory Orchestration for Disaggregated Cloud Infrastructures.
papers.abstract: Workload co-location has become the de-facto approach for hosting applications in Cloud environments, leading, however, to interference and fragmentation in shared resources of the system. To this end, hardware disaggregation is introduced as a novel paradigm, that allows fine-grained tailoring of cloud resources to the characteristics of the deployed applications. Towards the realization of hardware disaggregated clouds, novel orchestration frameworks must provide additional knobs to manage the increased scheduling complexity.We present Adrias, a memory orchestration framework for disaggregated cloud systems. Adrias exploits information from low-level performance events and applies deep learning techniques to effectively predict the system state and performance of arriving workloads on memory disaggregated systems, thus, driving cognitive scheduling between local and remote memory allocation modes. We evaluate Adrias on a state-of-art disaggregated testbed and show that it achieves 0.99 and 0.942 R<sup>2</sup> score for system state and application’s performance prediction on average respectively. Moreover, Adrias manages to effectively utilize disaggregated memory, by offloading almost 1/3 of deployed applications with less than 15% performance overhead compared to a conventional local memory scheduling, while clearly outperforms naive scheduling approaches (random and round-robin), by providing up to ×2 better performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 工作负载共置已成为云环境中托管应用程序的实际方法，但会导致系统共享资源的干扰和碎片化。为此，引入了硬件分解作为一种新颖的范例，允许根据已部署应用程序的特征对云资源进行细粒度的定制。为了实现硬件分解云，新颖的编排框架必须提供额外的旋钮来管理增加的调度复杂性。我们提出了 Adrias，一个用于分解云系统的内存编排框架。 Adrias 利用来自低级性能事件的信息，并应用深度学习技术来有效预测内存分类系统上到达的工作负载的系统状态和性能，从而推动本地和远程内存分配模式之间的认知调度。我们在最先进的分类测试平台上评估 Adrias，结果表明它的系统状态和应用程序性能预测平均分别达到 0.99 和 0.942 R<sup>2</sup> 分数。此外，与传统的本地内存调度相比，Adrias 能够以不到 15% 的性能开销卸载近 1/3 的已部署应用程序，从而有效地利用分解内存，同时通过提供高达 2 倍的更好性能，其性能明显优于简单的调度方法（随机和循环）。

papers.title: Ah-Q: Quantifying and Handling the Interference within a Datacenter from a System Perspective.
papers.abstract: Interference among applications frequently occurs in a datacenter and significantly influences the cost-efficiency and the user experience. However, it is challenging for us to quantify the exact intensity of the interference that occurred in the overall system of a datacenter, because there are many concurrent applications in a datacenter, and their type can be either latency-critical (LC) and best-effort (BE). To address this issue, we present the Ah-Q which includes a theory and a strategy.First, we propose the "system entropy" (E<inf>S</inf>) theory to holistically and analytically quantify the interference in a datacenter to address this vital issue. The interference is caused by the scarcity of resources or/and the irrationality of scheduling. As more appropriate scheduling can compensate for resource scarcity, we derive the concept of "resource equivalence" to quantify the effectiveness of a resource scheduling strategy. We evaluate different resource scheduling strategies to validate the correctness and effectiveness of the proposed theory.Moreover, using the theory to eliminate interference, we propose a new resource scheduling strategy; i.e., ARQ, which dynamically allocates the isolated resources and the shared resources to simultaneously harvest the benefits of isolation and sharing. Our results show that compared to the state-of-the-art strategies (PARTIES and CLITE), ARQ is more effective to reduce the tail latency of the LC applications and to increase the IPC of the BE applications. Compared with PARTIES and CLITE, ARQ increases the yield (the ratio of satisfactory LC applications) by 25% and 20%, respectively; when the load is low, ARQ increases IPC of BE applications by 63.8% and 37.1%, respectively; ARQ reduces E<inf>S</inf> by 36.4% and 33.3%, respectively. The effectiveness of ARQ has saved resources significantly to achieve the same satisfactory overall user experience.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心中应用程序之间的干扰频繁发生，严重影响成本效率和用户体验。然而，量化数据中心整个系统中发生的干扰的确切强度对我们来说是一个挑战，因为数据中心中有许多并发应用程序，并且它们的类型可以是延迟关键型（LC）和尽力而为型（BE）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了包括理论和策略的Ah-Q。首先，我们提出“系统熵”（E<inf>S</inf>）理论来全面、分析地量化数据中心中的干扰，以解决这一至关重要的问题。干扰是由资源稀缺或/和调度不合理引起的。由于更合适的调度可以弥补资源稀缺，因此我们推导出“资源等价”的概念来量化资源调度策略的有效性。我们对不同的资源调度策略进行了评估，验证了所提出理论的正确性和有效性。此外，利用该理论消除干扰，提出了一种新的资源调度策略；即ARQ，动态分配隔离资源和共享资源，同时获得隔离和共享的好处。我们的结果表明，与最先进的策略（PARTIES 和 CLITE）相比，ARQ 可以更有效地减少 LC 应用程序的尾部延迟并提高 BE 应用程序的 IPC。与PARTIES和CLITE相比，ARQ的良率（满意LC应用的比例）分别提高了25%和20%；低负载时，ARQ使BE应用的IPC分别提升63.8%和37.1%； ARQ 分别将 E<inf>S</inf> 降低了 36.4% 和 33.3%。 ARQ的有效性显着节省了资源，实现了同样令人满意的整体用户体验。

papers.title: Are Randomized Caches Truly Random? Formal Analysis of Randomized-Partitioned Caches.
papers.abstract: Cache based side-channel attacks exploit the fact that an adversary can setup the shared cache memory (the last level cache in modern systems) into a known state and detect any microarchitectural state changes made by the victim on the cache. Different mitigation techniques have been proposed in the literature that aims to mitigate these attacks by randomizing the address to cache location mappings. The security guarantees in these schemes are based on the degree of difficulty for an attacker to reliably determine the cache lines accessed by the victim within practical time settings. However, prior attacks have shown that newer and more improved algorithms can be envisaged that discover conflicting sets in the secured randomized caches. In this work, we first categorize different types of cache designs into four broad classes based on the extent of non-determinism and randomness of allocating an address in those caches. We then develop a mathematical framework to formally analyse the security implications of the randomized and partitioned cache designs in terms of collision probability, self-collision probability and size of the eviction set required to perform a successful eviction-based attack. We further empirically demonstrate set associative eviction on recently proposed randomization schemes called Mirage and Scattercache. Next, we propose two algorithms to generate efficient eviction set on these schemes and analytically evaluate the efficacy of our algorithms against the one proposed in the literature. Finally, we argue that mere randomization using a cryptographic primitive as used in popular schemes like Scattercache, CEASER-S, Mirage etc. does not provide the required randomness. Although the randomized-partitioned caches provide some resilience against eviction-set generation techniques, they are still vulnerable to eviction-based attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于缓存的侧通道攻击利用了这样一个事实：对手可以将共享缓存内存（现代系统中的最后一级缓存）设置为已知状态，并检测受害者在缓存上所做的任何微架构状态更改。文献中提出了不同的缓解技术，旨在通过随机化地址到缓存位置映射来缓解这些攻击。这些方案中的安全保证基于攻击者在实际时间设置内可靠地确定受害者访问的缓存行的难度。然而，先前的攻击表明，可以设想更新和更改进的算法来发现安全随机缓存中的冲突集。在这项工作中，我们首先根据这些缓存中分配地址的不确定性和随机性程度，将不同类型的缓存设计分为四大类。然后，我们开发一个数学框架，从冲突概率、自冲突概率和成功执行基于驱逐的攻击所需的驱逐集大小方面正式分析随机和分区缓存设计的安全含义。我们进一步凭经验证明了最近提出的称为 Mirage 和 Scattercache 的随机化方案的集合关联驱逐。接下来，我们提出两种算法来在这些方案上生成有效的驱逐集，并根据文献中提出的算法分析评估我们算法的有效性。最后，我们认为，仅使用 Scattercache、CEASER-S、Mirage 等流行方案中使用的加密原语进行随机化并不能提供所需的随机性。尽管随机分区缓存提供了一定的抵御驱逐集生成技术的能力，但它们仍然容易受到基于驱逐的攻击。

papers.title: AstriFlash A Flash-Based System for Online Services.
papers.abstract: Modern datacenters host datasets in DRAM to offer large-scale online services with tight tail-latency requirements. Unfortunately, as DRAM is expensive and increasingly difficult to scale, datacenter operators are forced to consider denser storage technologies. While modern flash-based storage exhibits μs-scale access latency, which is well within the tail-latency constraints of many online services, traditional demand paging abstraction used to manage memory and storage incurs high overheads and prohibits flash usage in online services. We introduce AstriFlash, a hardware-software co-design that tightly integrates flash and DRAM with ns-scale overheads. Our evaluation of server workloads with cycle-accurate full-system simulation shows that AstriFlash achieves 95% of a DRAM-only system’s throughput while maintaining the required 99th-percentile tail latency and reducing the memory cost by 20x.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心在 DRAM 中托管数据集，以提供具有严格尾延迟要求的大规模在线服务。不幸的是，由于 DRAM 价格昂贵且扩展越来越困难，数据中心运营商被迫考虑更密集的存储技术。虽然现代基于闪存的存储表现出微秒级的访问延迟，这完全在许多在线服务的尾延迟限制之内，但用于管理内存和存储的传统需求分页抽象会产生高开销，并禁止在线服务中使用闪存。我们推出 AstriFlash，这是一种软硬件协同设计，将闪存和 DRAM 紧密集成在一起，并具有 ns 级开销。我们通过周期精确的全系统模拟对服务器工作负载进行的评估表明，AstriFlash 实现了仅 DRAM 系统吞吐量的 95%，同时保持了所需的 99% 尾部延迟并将内存成本降低了 20 倍。

papers.title: AutoCAT: Reinforcement Learning for Automated Exploration of Cache-Timing Attacks.
papers.abstract: The aggressive performance optimizations in modern microprocessors can result in security vulnerabilities. For example, timing-based attacks in processor caches can steal secret keys or break randomization. So far, finding cache-timing vulnerabilities is mostly performed by human experts, which is inefficient and laborious. There is a need for automatic tools that can explore vulnerabilities given that unreported vulnerabilities leave the systems at risk.In this paper, we propose AutoCAT, an automated exploration framework that finds cache timing-channel attack sequences using reinforcement learning (RL). Specifically, AutoCAT formulates the cache timing-channel attack as a guessing game between an attack program and a victim program holding a secret. This guessing game can thus be solved via modern deep RL techniques. AutoCAT can explore attacks in various cache configurations without knowing design details and under different attack and victim program configurations. AutoCAT can also find attacks to bypass certain detection and defense mechanisms. In particular, AutoCAT discovered StealthyStreamline, a new attack that is able to bypass performance counter-based detection and has up to a 71% higher information leakage rate than the state-of-the-art LRU-based attacks on real processors. AutoCAT is the first of its kind in using RL for crafting microarchitectural timing-channel attack sequences and can accelerate cache timing-channel exploration for secure microprocessor designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代微处理器中积极的性能优化可能会导致安全漏洞。例如，处理器缓存中基于计时的攻击可以窃取密钥或破坏随机化。到目前为止，查找缓存定时漏洞主要由人类专家来完成，效率低且费力。鉴于未报告的漏洞使系统面临风险，因此需要能够探索漏洞的自动工具。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoCAT，一种自动探索框架，可使用强化学习 (RL) 查找缓存定时通道攻击序列。具体来说，AutoCAT 将缓存定时通道攻击表述为攻击程序和持有秘密的受害者程序之间的猜谜游戏。因此，这个猜谜游戏可以通过现代深度强化学习技术来解决。 AutoCAT 可以在不了解设计细节的情况下以及在不同的攻击和受害者程序配置下探索各种缓存配置中的攻击。 AutoCAT 还可以发现绕过某些检测和防御机制的攻击。特别是，AutoCAT 发现了 StealthyStreamline，这是一种新的攻击，能够绕过基于性能计数器的检测，并且与针对真实处理器的最先进的基于 LRU 的攻击相比，信息泄漏率高出 71%。 AutoCAT 是同类产品中第一个使用 RL 来制作微架构定时通道攻击序列的产品，并且可以加速安全微处理器设计的缓存定时通道探索。

papers.title: AVGI: Microarchitecture-Driven, Fast and Accurate Vulnerability Assessment.
papers.abstract: We propose AVGI, a new Statistical Fault Injection (SFI)-based methodology, which delivers orders of magnitude faster assessment of the Architectural Vulnerability Factor (AVF) of a microprocessor chip, while retaining the high accuracy of SFI. The proposed methodology is based on three key insights about the way that faults traverse complex out-of-order microarchitectures: (1) the distribution of the different ways that hardware faults manifest at the software (i.e., the first effects of faults to the software layer) is relatively uniform across workloads, (2) the final effects of faults in a specific hardware structure (i.e., their effect on the program execution) is relatively uniform for different workloads and depends on the distribution of the above fault manifestations, and (3) the majority of first manifestations occur in certain timeframe from the fault occurrence, which is significantly shorter than the complete execution of the workload, and depends on the type of hardware structure. Based on these insights, the proposed AVGI methodology accurately estimates the complete cross-layer vulnerability (i.e., AVF) for every hardware structure in fine granularity (SDCs and Crashes). Our experimental analysis shows that preserving high levels of accuracy, the proposed AVF assessment methodology is up to 337x and 440x faster than an accelerated exhaustive SFI, for two different microarchitectures of 64-bit Armv8 and 32-bit Armv7 CPU models, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AVGI，这是一种基于统计故障注入 (SFI) 的新方法，可将微处理器芯片的架构漏洞因子 (AVF) 的评估速度提高几个数量级，同时保留 SFI 的高精度。所提出的方法基于关于故障穿越复杂无序微体系结构的方式的三个关键见解：（1）硬件故障在软件上表现的不同方式的分布（即故障对软件层的第一个影响）在工作负载中相对均匀，（2）特定硬件结构中的故障的最终影响（即它们对程序执行的影响）对于不同的工作负载来说相对均匀，并且取决于上述故障表现的分布， (3)大多数首次表现发生在故障发生后的某个时间范围内，该时间范围明显短于工作负载的完整执行，并且取决于硬件结构的类型。基于这些见解，所提出的 AVGI 方法以细粒度（SDC 和崩溃）准确估计每个硬件结构的完整跨层漏洞（即 AVF）。我们的实验分析表明，在保持高精度的情况下，对于 64 位 Armv8 和 32 位 Armv7 CPU 模型的两种不同微架构，所提出的 AVF 评估方法分别比加速穷举 SFI 快 337 倍和 440 倍。

papers.title: Baryon: Efficient Hybrid Memory Management with Compression and Sub-Blocking.
papers.abstract: Hybrid memory systems are able to achieve both high performance and large capacity when combining fast commodity DDR memories with larger but slower non-volatile memories in a heterogeneous way. However, it is critical to best utilize the limited fast memory capacity and slow memory bandwidth in such systems to gain the maximum efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid memory design, Baryon, that leverages both memory compression and data sub-blocking techniques to improve the utilization of fast memory capacity and slow memory bandwidth, with only moderate metadata overheads and management complexity. Baryon reserves a small fast memory area to efficiently manage and stabilize the irregular and frequently varying data layouts resulted from compression and sub-blocking, and selectively commits only stable blocks to the rest fast memory space. It also adopts a novel dual-format metadata scheme to support flexible address remapping under such complex data layouts with low storage cost. Baryon is completely transparent to software, and works with both cache and flat schemes of hybrid memories. Our evaluation shows Baryon achieves up to 1.68× and on average 1.27× performance improvements over state-of-the-art designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 当以异构方式将快速商用 DDR 存储器与更大但更慢的非易失性存储器相结合时，混合存储器系统能够实现高性能和大容量。然而，充分利用此类系统中有限的快速内存容量和慢速内存带宽以获得最大效率至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合内存设计 Baryon，它利用内存压缩和数据子块技术来提高快速内存容量和慢速内存带宽的利用率，并且仅具有适度的元数据开销和管理复杂性。 Baryon 保留一个小的快速内存区域，以有效地管理和稳定因压缩和分块而导致的不规则且频繁变化的数据布局，并有选择地仅将稳定的块提交到其余的快速内存空间。它还采用新颖的双格式元数据方案，以低存储成本支持在如此复杂的数据布局下灵活的地址重新映射。 Baryon 对软件完全透明，并且可与混合存储器的高速缓存和平面方案一起使用。我们的评估显示，与最先进的设计相比，Baryon 的性能提升高达 1.68 倍，平均提升 1.27 倍。

papers.title: BM-Store: A Transparent and High-performance Local Storage Architecture for Bare-metal Clouds Enabling Large-scale Deployment.
papers.abstract: Bare-metal instances are crucial for high-value, mission-critical applications on the cloud. Tenants exclusively use these dedicated hardware resources. Local virtualized disks are essential for bare-metal instances to provide flexible and high-performance storage resources. Traditionally tenants can choose polling-based software virtualization techniques, but they consume too many valuable host CPU cores and suffer from performance degradation. Cloud vendors are hard to deploy existing hardware-assisted local storage solutions in bare-metal instances due to no access to the host OS to install customized drivers. Moreover, cloud vendors have difficulties managing and maintaining the local storage devices in bare-metal instances because hardware resources and host operating systems are completely utilized by tenants, then it will impact the availability of storage devices.This paper presents our design and experience with BM-Store, a novel high-performance hardware-assisted virtual local storage architecture for bare-metal clouds. BM-Store is transparent to the host that tenants are unaware of the underlying hardware architecture. Therefore, it can be deployed on a large scale in cloud vendors. BM-Store consists of two components: an FPGA-based BMS-Engine and an ARM-based BMS-Controller. The BMS-Engine accelerates the I/O path to enable high-performance virtual storage independent of disk devices without consuming any CPU resource on the host. The BMS-Controller is responsible for resource management and maintenance to achieve flexible and high available local storage. The results of the extensive experiments show that BM-Store can achieve near-native performance, which only introduces about 3 µs extra latency and average 4.0% throughput overhead to native disks. Compared to SPDK vhost, BM-Store achieves an average bandwidth improvement of 15.7% in microbenchmark and a maximum throughput enhancement of 13.4% in real-world applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 裸机实例对于云上的高价值、关键任务应用程序至关重要。租户独占使用这些专用硬件资源。本地虚拟化磁盘对于裸金属实例提供灵活、高性能的存储资源至关重要。传统上，租户可以选择基于轮询的软件虚拟化技术，但它们会消耗太多宝贵的主机CPU核心，并且会出现性能下降的问题。由于无法访问主机操作系统来安装定制驱动程序，云供应商很难在裸机实例中部署现有的硬件辅助本地存储解决方案。此外，由于硬件资源和主机操作系统完全被租户利用，云供应商在管理和维护裸机实例中的本地存储设备方面存在困难，这将影响存储设备的可用性。本文介绍了我们对BM-Store的设计和经验，BM-Store是一种新型的高性能硬件辅助裸机云虚拟本地存储架构。 BM-Store对主机透明，租户不知道底层硬件架构。因此可以在云厂商中大规模部署。 BM-Store 由两个组件组成：基于 FPGA 的 BMS 引擎和基于 ARM 的 BMS 控制器。 BMS-Engine加速I/O路径，实现独立于磁盘设备的高性能虚拟存储，而不消耗主机上的任何CPU资源。 BMS控制器负责资源管理和维护，实现灵活、高可用的本地存储。大量实验的结果表明，BM-Store 可以实现接近本机的性能，仅会给本机磁盘带来约 3 µs 的额外延迟和平均 4.0% 的吞吐量开销。与 SPDK vhost 相比，BM-Store 在微基准测试中平均带宽提高了 15.7%，在实际应用中最大吞吐量提高了 13.4%。

papers.title: CARE: A Concurrency-Aware Enhanced Lightweight Cache Management Framework.
papers.abstract: Improving cache performance is a lasting research topic. While utilizing data locality to enhance cache performance becomes more and more difficult, data access concurrency provides a new opportunity for cache performance optimization. In this work, we propose a novel concurrency-aware cache management framework that outperforms state-of-the-art locality-only cache management schemes. First, we investigate the merit of data access concurrency and pinpoint that reducing the miss rate may not necessarily lead to better overall performance. Next, we introduce the pure miss contribution (PMC) metric, a lightweight and versatile concurrency-aware indicator, to accurately measure the cost of each outstanding miss access by considering data concurrency. Then, we present CARE, a dynamic adjustable, concurrency-aware, low-overhead cache management framework with the help of the PMC metric. We evaluate CARE with extensive experiments across different application domains and show significant performance gains with the consideration of data concurrency. In a 4-core system, CARE improves IPC by 10.3% over LRU replacement. In 8 and 16-core systems where more concurrent data accesses exist, CARE outperforms LRU by 13.0% and 17.1%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 提高缓存性能是一个持久的研究课题。在利用数据局部性来提升缓存性能变得越来越困难的同时，数据访问并发性为缓存性能优化提供了新的机会。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的并发感知缓存管理框架，其性能优于最先进的仅局部缓存管理方案。首先，我们研究了数据访问并发性的优点，并指出降低丢失率不一定会带来更好的整体性能。接下来，我们引入纯粹未命中贡献（PMC）指标，这是一个轻量级且通用的并发感知指标，通过考虑数据并发性来准确衡量每个未完成未命中访问的成本。然后，我们在 PMC 指标的帮助下提出了 CARE，一个动态可调、并发感知、低开销的缓存管理框架。我们通过跨不同应用领域的广泛实验来评估 CARE，并在考虑数据并发性的情况下显示出显着的性能提升。在 4 核系统中，CARE 比 LRU 替换提高了 10.3% 的 IPC。在存在更多并发数据访问的 8 核和 16 核系统中，CARE 的性能分别优于 LRU 13.0% 和 17.1%。

papers.title: CEGMA: Coordinated Elastic Graph Matching Acceleration for Graph Matching Networks.
papers.abstract: The recently proposed Graph Matching Network models (GMNs) effectively improve the inference accuracy of graph similarity analysis tasks. GMNs often take graph pairs as input, embed nodes features, and match nodes between graphs for similarity analysis. While GMNs deliver high inference accuracy, the all-to-all node matching stage in GMNs introduces quadratic computing complexity with excessive memory accesses, resulting in significant computing and memory overhead that cannot be handled by existing approaches. In this paper, we propose the Coordinated Elastic Graph Matching Accelerator (CEGMA), a software and hardware co-design accelerator to address the challenges of GMNs. Specifically, by exploiting duplicate subgraphs in the input graphs, we develop an elastic matching filter to significantly reduce the quadratic computing overhead. By exploring the substantial data reuses oriented from accessing node features, we propose a cross-graph coordinator that fuses cross-graph similarity computing with intra-graph computing to enhance data locality. Experimental results show that, on average, CEGMA achieves 353× and 6.5× speedups in GMN computing compared to state-of-the-art GPU implementation and GNN accelerators, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近提出的图匹配网络模型（GMN）有效提高了图相似性分析任务的推理精度。 GMN 通常以图对作为输入，嵌入节点特征，并在图之间匹配节点进行相似性分析。虽然 GMN 提供了很高的推理精度，但 GMN 中的所有节点匹配阶段引入了二次计算复杂性和过多的内存访问，导致现有方法无法处理的大量计算和内存开销。在本文中，我们提出了协调弹性图匹配加速器（CEGMA），这是一种软件和硬件协同设计加速器，旨在解决 GMN 的挑战。具体来说，通过利用输入图中的重复子图，我们开发了一种弹性匹配滤波器，以显着减少二次计算开销。通过探索面向访问节点特征的大量数据重用，我们提出了一种跨图协调器，它将跨图相似性计算与图内计算融合以增强数据局部性。实验结果表明，与最先进的 GPU 实现和 GNN 加速器相比，CEGMA 在 GMN 计算中平均实现了 353 倍和 6.5 倍的加速。

papers.title: Chimera: An Analytical Optimizing Framework for Effective Compute-intensive Operators Fusion.
papers.abstract: Machine learning models with various tensor operators are becoming ubiquitous in recent years. There are two types of operators in machine learning: compute-intensive operators (e.g., GEMM and convolution) and memory-intensive operators (e.g., ReLU and softmax). In emerging machine learning models, compute-intensive operators are usually organized in a chain structure. With the continual specialization of hardware, the gap between computing performance and memory bandwidth has become more prominent. Consequently, the implementations of many compute-intensive operator chains are bounded by memory bandwidth, and generating fused kernels to improve locality for these compute-intensive operators becomes necessary. But in existing machine learning compilers, there lack both precise analysis and efficient optimization for compute-intensive operator chains on different accelerators. As a result, they usually produce sub-optimal performance for these operator chains.In this paper, we propose Chimera, an optimizing framework that can efficiently improve the locality of compute-intensive operator chains on different hardware accelerators. In Chimera, each compute-intensive operator is composed of a series of computation blocks. To generate efficient fused kernels for the operator chains, optimizations for both inter-block and intra-block are required. For inter-block optimization, Chimera decides the optimized block execution order by minimizing the data movement volume among blocks using an analytical model. For intra-block optimization, Chimera uses unified replaceable micro kernels to apply hardware-specific optimizations for different accelerators. Finally, Chimera generates fused kernels for compute-intensive operator chains. Evaluation of batch GEMM chains and convolution chains on CPU, GPU, and NPU shows that Chimera achieves up to 2.87×, 2.29×, and 2.39× speedups to hand-tuned libraries. Compared to state-of-the-art compilers, the speedups are up to 2.29×, 1.64×, and 1.14× for CPU, GPU, and NPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，具有各种张量算子的机器学习模型变得无处不在。机器学习中有两种类型的算子：计算密集型算子（例如 GEMM 和卷积）和内存密集型算子（例如 ReLU 和 softmax）。在新兴的机器学习模型中，计算密集型算子通常以链式结构组织。随着硬件的不断专业化，计算性能和内存带宽之间的差距变得更加突出。因此，许多计算密集型运算符链的实现都受到内存带宽的限制，因此有必要生成融合内核来改善这些计算密集型运算符的局部性。但现有的机器学习编译器缺乏对不同加速器上的计算密集型算子链的精确分析和高效优化。因此，它们通常会为这些算子链带来次优的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 Chimera，一种优化框架，可以有效地提高计算密集型算子链在不同硬件加速器上的局部性。在 Chimera 中，每个计算密集型运算符都由一系列计算块组成。为了为算子链生成高效的融合内核，需要对块间和块内进行优化。对于块间优化，Chimera 通过使用分析模型最小化块之间的数据移动量来决定优化的块执行顺序。对于块内优化，Chimera 使用统一的可替换微内核来针对不同的加速器应用特定于硬件的优化。最后，Chimera 为计算密集型算子链生成融合内核。对 CPU、GPU 和 NPU 上的批量 GEMM 链和卷积链的评估表明，Chimera 比手动调整的库实现了高达 2.87 倍、2.29 倍和 2.39 倍的加速。与最先进的编译器相比，CPU、GPU 和 NPU 的加速比分别高达 2.29 倍、1.64 倍和 1.14 倍。

papers.title: CHOPPER: A Compiler Infrastructure for Programmable Bit-serial SIMD Processing Using Memory in DRAM.
papers.abstract: Increasing interests in Bit-serial SIMD Processing-Using-DRAM (PUD) architectures amplify the needs for a compiler to automate code generation, credited to their ultra-wide SIMD width and reduction of data movements. The state-of-the-art Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures (1) only provide assembly SIMD programming interfaces, which heavily saddles with programmers to exploit the ultra-wide SIMD width on these architectures; and (2) encapsulate 1-bit operations into multi-bit abstractions, which incurs a granularity mismatch and restricts the optimization space to minimize data movements.We present CHOPPER, a new compiler infrastructure to make Bit-serial SIMD PUD more programmable and efficient. For the better programmability, the design of CHOPPER (1) exploits bit-slicing compilers to enable automatic memory allocation and code generation, from naturally-expressive codes (i.e. similar to Parallel Haskell) into the "SIMD-Within-A-Register"-style codes; and (2) introduces a new abstraction called "Virtual Code Emitter", to make Bit-serial SIMD PUD architecture exploit Memory-Level Parallelism (i.e. Bank or Subarray) more effectively. For the better efficiency, we propose three novel optimizations for CHOPPER to better exploit the potentials of Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures, which (1) minimize the amount of intra-subarray data movements; and (2) mitigate the overheads of spilling data outside Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. These optimizations can greatly improve the overall efficiency of Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We also discuss (1) the limitations of the current CHOPPER; and (2) the potentials of CHOPPER for other types of Processing-In-Memory architectures.We evaluate CHOPPER by hosting it on three state-of-the-art Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We compare CHOPPER-generated codes against the state-of-the-art hands-tuned codes for Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We highlight that, averaged across 16 real-world workloads from 4 PUD-friendly application domains, CHOPPER achieves (A) 1.20X, 1.29X and 1.26X speedup when data can fit within DRAM subarrays; and (B) 12.61X, 9.05X and 9.81X speedup when data need to spill to the secondary storage, on Ambit [50], ELP2IM [56] and SIMDRAM [22], compared with hands-tuned codes using the state-of-the-art methodology [22] for Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. These performance benefits also accompany with a great reduction of Lines-of-Codes (LoC) in CHOPPER (i.e. by 4.3X less LoCs for hands-tuning a single subarray, and >10<sup>3</sup>X less for hands-tuning all subarrays in a rank). We also perform breakdown and sensitivity studies of CHOPPER, to better understand its source benefits and examine its robustness under various architectural features.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们对使用 DRAM 进行位串行 SIMD 处理 (PUD) 架构的兴趣日益浓厚，因此加大了对编译器自动生成代码的需求，这要归功于其超宽 SIMD 宽度和数据移动的减少。最先进的位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构 (1) 仅提供汇编 SIMD 编程接口，这给程序员在这些架构上利用超宽 SIMD 宽度带来了沉重负担； (2) 将 1 位操作封装成多位抽象，这会导致粒度不匹配并限制优化空间以最大限度地减少数据移动。我们提出了 CHOPPER，一种新的编译器基础架构，使位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 更加可编程和高效。为了更好的可编程性，CHOPPER (1) 的设计利用位切片编译器来实现自动内存分配和代码生成，从自然表达的代码（即类似于 Parallel Haskell）到“SIMD-Within-A-Register”风格的代码； (2) 引入了一种称为“虚拟代码发射器”的新抽象，以使位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构更有效地利用内存级并行性（即 Bank 或 Subarray）。为了提高效率，我们对 CHOPPER 提出了三种新颖的优化，以更好地利用位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的潜力，其中（1）最大限度地减少子阵列内数据移动的数量； (2) 减轻在位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构之外溢出数据的开销。这些优化可以极大地提高位串行SIMD PUD​​架构的整体效率。我们还讨论了（1）当前CHOPPER的局限性； (2) CHOPPER 对于其他类型的内存处理架构的潜力。我们通过将 CHOPPER 托管在三个最先进的位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构上来评估 CHOPPER。我们将 CHOPPER 生成的代码与位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的最先进的手动调整代码进行比较。我们强调，根据来自 4 个 PUD 友好应用程序域的 16 个实际工作负载的平均值，当数据可以容纳在 DRAM 子阵列中时，CHOPPER 实现了 (A) 1.20 倍、1.29 倍和 1.26 倍的加速； (B) 当数据需要溢出到辅助存储时，在 Ambit [50]、ELP2IM [56] 和 SIMDRAM [22] 上，与使用针对位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的最先进方法 [22] 进行手动调整的代码相比，速度提高了 12.61 倍、9.05 倍和 9.81 倍。这些性能优势还伴随着 CHOPPER 中代码行数 (LoC) 的大幅减少（即手动调整单个子阵列的 LoC 减少 4.3 倍，手动调整队列中所有子阵列的 LoC 减少 > 10<sup>3</sup>X）。我们还对 CHOPPER 进行故障和敏感性研究，以更好地了解其源优势并检查其在各种架构特征下的稳健性。

papers.title: Co-Designed Architectures for Modular Superconducting Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: Noisy, Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) computers have reached the point where they can show the potential for quantum advantage over classical computing. Unfortunately, NISQ machines introduce sufficient noise that even for moderate size quantum circuits the results can be unreliable. We propose a collaboratively designed superconducting quantum computer using a Superconducting Nonlinear Asymmetric Inductive eLement (SNAIL) modulator. The SNAIL modulator is designed by considering both the ideal fundamental qubit gate operation while maximizing the qubit coupling capabilities. First, the SNAIL natively implements $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ gates realized through proportionally scaled pulse lengths. This naturally includes $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $, which provides an advantage over CNOT as a basis gate. Second, the SNAIL enables high-degree couplings that allow rich and highly parallel qubit connection topologies without suffering from frequency crowding. Building on our previously demonstrated SNAIL-based quantum state router we propose a quantum 4-ary tree and a hypercube inspired corral built from interconnected quantum modules. We compare their advantage in data movement based on necessary SWAP gates to the traditional lattice and heavy-hex lattice used in latest commercial quantum computers. We demonstrate the co-design advantage of our SNAIL-based machine with $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $ basis gates and rich topologies against CNOT/heavy-hex and FSIM/lattice for 16-20 qubit and extrapolated designs circa 80 qubit architectures. We compare total circuit time and total gate count to understand fidelity for systems dominated by decoherence and control imperfections, respectively. Finally, we provide a gate duration sensitivity study on further decreasing the SNAIL pulse length to realize $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ qubit systems to reduce decoherence times.
papers.abstract_zh: 嘈杂的中规模量子（NISQ）计算机已经达到了可以显示出相对于经典计算的量子优势潜力的程度。不幸的是，NISQ 机器引入了足够的噪声，即使对于中等大小的量子电路，结果也可能不可靠。我们提出了一种使用超导非线性不对称感应元件（SNAIL）调制器协作设计的超导量子计算机。 SNAIL 调制器的设计既考虑了理想的基本量子位门操作，同时又最大化了量子位耦合能力。首先，SNAIL 本身实现了通过按比例缩放脉冲长度实现的 $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ 门。这自然包括 $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $，它比 CNOT 作为基础门具有优势。其次，SNAIL 可实现高度耦合，从而允许丰富且高度并行的量子位连接拓扑，而不会受到频率拥挤的影响。在我们之前演示的基于 SNAIL 的量子状态路由器的基础上，我们提出了一种量子四元树和一个由互连量子模块构建的超立方体启发的畜栏。我们将它们基于必要的交换门的数据移动优势与最新商用量子计算机中使用的传统晶格和重型六角晶格进行比较。我们展示了基于 SNAIL 的机器的协同设计优势，该机器具有 $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $ 基础门和针对 CNOT/heavy-hex 和 FSIM/lattice 的丰富拓扑，适用于 16-20 量子位和大约 80 量子位架构的外推设计。我们比较总电路时间和总门数，以分别了解由退相干和控制缺陷主导的系统的保真度。最后，我们提供了门持续时间敏感性研究，进一步减少 SNAIL 脉冲长度，以实现 $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ 量子位系统，从而减少退相干时间。

papers.title: Compression-Aware and Performance-Efficient Insertion Policies for Long-Lasting Hybrid LLCs.
papers.abstract: Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies can potentially replace large SRAM memories such as the last-level cache (LLC). However, despite recent advances, NVMs suffer from higher write latency and limited write endurance. Recently, NVM-SRAM hybrid LLCs are proposed to combine the best of both worlds. Several policies have been proposed to improve the performance and lifetime of hybrid LLCs by intelligently steering the incoming LLC blocks into either the SRAM or NVM part, regarding the cache behavior of the LLC blocks and the SRAM/NVM device properties. However, these policies neither consider compressing the contents of the cache block nor using partially worn-out NVM cache blocks.This paper proposes new insertion policies for byte-level fault-tolerant hybrid LLCs that collaboratively optimize for lifetime and performance. Specifically, we leverage data compression to utilize partially defective NVM cache entries, thereby improving the LLC hit rate. The key to our approach is to guide the insertion policy by both the reuse properties of the block and the size resulting from its compression. A block is inserted in NVM only if it is a read-reuse block or its compressed size is lower than a threshold. It will be inserted in SRAM if the block is a write-reuse or its compressed size is greater than the threshold. We use set-dueling to tune the compression threshold at runtime. This compression threshold provides a knob to control the NVM write rate and, together with a rule-based mechanism, allows balancing performance and lifetime.Overall, our evaluation shows that, with affordable hardware overheads, the proposed schemes can nearly reach the performance of an SRAM cache with the same associativity while improving lifetime by 17× compared to a hybrid NVM-unaware LLC. Our proposed scheme outperforms the state-of-the-art insertion policies by 9% while achieving a comparative lifetime. The rule-based mechanism shows that by compromising, for instance, 1.1% and 1.9% performance, the NVM lifetime can be further increased by 28% and 44%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术有可能取代末级缓存 (LLC) 等大型 SRAM 存储器。然而，尽管最近取得了进展，NVM 仍面临着较高的写入延迟和有限的写入耐久性。最近，NVM-SRAM 混合 LLC 被提议结合两者的优点。人们提出了一些策略，通过根据 LLC 块的缓存行为和 SRAM/NVM 器件属性，将传入的 LLC 块智能地引导到 SRAM 或 NVM 部分，来提高混合 LLC 的性能和使用寿命。然而，这些策略既没有考虑压缩缓存块的内容，也没有使用部分磨损的 NVM 缓存块。本文提出了字节级容错混合 LLC 的新插入策略，可协同优化寿命和性能。具体来说，我们利用数据压缩来利用部分有缺陷的 NVM 缓存条目，从而提高 LLC 命中率。我们方法的关键是通过块的重用属性和其压缩产生的大小来指导插入策略。仅当块是读重用块或其压缩大小低于阈值时，才会将块插入到 NVM 中。如果该块是可写重用的或其压缩大小大于阈值，则它将被插入到 SRAM 中。我们使用 set- dueling 来调整运行时的压缩阈值。该压缩阈值提供了控制 NVM 写入速率的旋钮，并与基于规则的机制一起实现了性能和寿命的平衡。总体而言，我们的评估表明，在可承受的硬件开销的情况下，所提出的方案几乎可以达到具有相同关联性的 SRAM 缓存的性能，同时与混合 NVM-unaware LLC 相比，寿命提高了 17 倍。我们提出的方案比最先进的插入策略高出 9%，同时实现了相对寿命。基于规则的机制表明，通过牺牲例如 1.1% 和 1.9% 的性能，NVM 寿命可以分别进一步增加 28% 和 44%。

papers.title: CTA: Hardware-Software Co-design for Compressed Token Attention Mechanism.
papers.abstract: The attention mechanism is becoming an integral part of modern neural networks, bringing breakthroughs to Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications and even Computer Vision (CV) applications. Unfortunately, the superiority of attention mechanism comes from its ability to model relations between any two positions in long sequence, which incurs high inference overhead. For state-of-the-art AI workloads such as Bert or GPT-2, attention mechanism is reported to account up to 50% of the inference overhead. Previous works seek to alleviate this performance bottleneck by removing useless relations for each position and accelerate position-specific operations. However their attempts require selecting from a sequence of relations once for each position, which is essentially frequent on-the-fly pruning and breaks the inherent parallelism in attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose CTA, an algorithm-architecture co-designed solution that can substantially reduce theoretic complexity of attention mechanism, enabling significant speedup and energy saving. Inspired by the fact that the feature sequence encoded by attention mechanism contain a large number of semantic feature repetition, we propose a novel approximation scheme that can efficiently remove that repetition, only calculating attention among necessary features thus reducing computation complexity quadratically. To utilize this algorithmic bonus and empower high performance attention mechanism inference, we devise specialized architecture to efficiently support the proposed approximation scheme. Extensive experiments show that, on average, CTA achieves 27.7× speedup, 634.0× energy savings with no accuracy loss, and 44.2× speedup, 950.0× energy savings with around 1% accuracy loss over Nvidia V100-SXM2 GPU. Also, CTA achieves 22.8× speedup, 479.6× energy savings over ELSA accelerator+GPU system.
papers.abstract_zh: 注意力机制正在成为现代神经网络不可或缺的一部分，为自然语言处理（NLP）应用甚至计算机视觉（CV）应用带来突破。不幸的是，注意力机制的优越性来自于它能够对长序列中任意两个位置之间的关系进行建模，这会带来很高的推理开销。据报道，对于 Bert 或 GPT-2 等最先进的人工智能工作负载，注意力机制占推理开销的比例高达 50%。以前的工作试图通过消除每个位置的无用关系并加速特定于位置的操作来缓解这种性能瓶颈。然而，他们的尝试需要为每个位置从一系列关系中进行一次选择，这本质上是频繁的动态剪枝，并且打破了注意力机制固有的并行性。在本文中，我们提出了 CTA，一种算法架构共同设计的解决方案，可以大大降低注意力机制的理论复杂性，从而实现显着的加速和节能。受注意力机制编码的特征序列包含大量语义特征重复这一事实的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的近似方案，可以有效地消除重复，仅在必要的特征之间计算注意力，从而成倍地降低计算复杂度。为了利用这种算法优势并赋予高性能注意机制推理能力，我们设计了专门的架构来有效支持所提出的近似方案。大量实验表明，与 Nvidia V100-SXM2 GPU 相比，CTA 平均加速 27.7 倍，节能 634.0 倍，且没有精度损失；相比 Nvidia V100-SXM2 GPU，平均加速 44.2 倍，节能 950.0 倍，精度损失约 1%。此外，与 ELSA 加速器+GPU 系统相比，CTA 实现了 22.8 倍加速、479.6 倍节能。

papers.title: D-Shield: Enabling Processor-side Encryption and Integrity Verification for Secure NVMe Drives.
papers.abstract: Ensuring the confidentiality and integrity of data stored in storage disks is essential to protect users’ sensitive and private data. Recent developments of hardware-based attacks have motivated the need to secure storage data not only at rest but also in transit. Unfortunately, existing techniques such as software-based disk encryption and hardware-based self-encrypting disks fail to offer such comprehensive protection in today’s adversarial settings. With the advances of NVMe SSDs promising ultralow I/O latencies and high parallelism, architecting a storage subsystem that ensures the security of data storage in fast disks without adversely sacrificing their performance is critical.In this paper, we present D-Shield, a processor-side secure framework to holistically protect NVMe storage data confidentiality and integrity with low overheads. D-Shield integrates a novel DMA Interception Engine that allows the processor to perform security metadata maintenance and data protection without any modification to the NVMe protocol and NVMe disks. We further propose optimized D-Shield schemes that minimize decryption/re-encryption overheads for data transfer crossing security domains and utilize efficient in-memory caching of storage metadata to further boost system performance. We implement D-Shield prototypes and evaluate their efficacy using a set of synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Our results show that D-Shield can introduce up to 17× speedup for I/O intensive workloads compared to software-based protection schemes. For server-class database and graph applications, D-Shield achieves up to 96% higher throughput over software-based encryption and integrity checking mechanisms, while providing strong security guarantee against off-chip storage attacks. Meanwhile, D-Shield shows only 6% overhead on effective performance on real-world workloads and has modest in-storage metadata overhead and on-chip hardware cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 确保存储磁盘中存储的数据的机密性和完整性对​​于保护用户的敏感和私人数据至关重要。基于硬件的攻击的最新发展促使人们需要保护静态和传输中的存储数据。不幸的是，基于软件的磁盘加密和基于硬件的自加密磁盘等现有技术无法在当今的对抗环境中提供如此全面的保护。随着 NVMe SSD 的进步，有望实现超低 I/O 延迟和高并行性，构建一个存储子系统来确保快速磁盘中数据存储的安全性，同时又不会不利地牺牲其性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 D-Shield，这是一种处理器端安全框架，可以以较低的开销全面保护 NVMe 存储数据的机密性和完整性。 D-Shield集成了新颖的DMA拦截引擎，允许处理器执行安全元数据维护和数据保护，而无需对NVMe协议和NVMe磁盘进行任何修改。我们进一步提出优化的 D-Shield 方案，最大限度地减少跨安全域数据传输的解密/重新加密开销，并利用存储元数据的高效内存缓存来进一步提高系统性能。我们实施 D-Shield 原型并使用一组综合和现实基准评估其功效。我们的结果表明，与基于软件的保护方案相比，D-Shield 可为 I/O 密集型工作负载带来高达 17 倍的加速。对于服务器级数据库和图形应用程序，D-Shield 的吞吐量比基于软件的加密和完整性检查机制高出 96%，同时提供针对片外存储攻击的强大安全保证。与此同时，D-Shield 在实际工作负载的有效性能方面仅显示 6% 的开销，并且存储内元数据开销和片上硬件成本适中。

papers.title: Dalorex: A Data-Local Program Execution and Architecture for Memory-bound Applications.
papers.abstract: Applications with low data reuse and frequent irregular memory accesses, such as graph or sparse linear algebra workloads, fail to scale well due to memory bottlenecks and poor core utilization. While prior work with prefetching, decoupling, or pipelining can mitigate memory latency and improve core utilization, memory bottlenecks persist due to limited off-chip bandwidth. Approaches doing processing in-memory (PIM) with Hybrid Memory Cube (HMC) overcome bandwidth limitations but fail to achieve high core utilization due to poor task scheduling and synchronization overheads. Moreover, the high memory-per-core ratio available with HMC limits strong scaling.We introduce Dalorex, a hardware-software co-design that achieves high parallelism and energy efficiency, demonstrating strong scaling with >16,000 cores when processing graph and sparse linear algebra workloads. Over the prior work in PIM, both using 256 cores, Dalorex improves performance and energy consumption by two orders of magnitude through (1) a tile-based distributed-memory architecture where each processing tile holds an equal amount of data, and all memory operations are local; (2) a task-based parallel programming model where tasks are executed by the processing unit that is co-located with the target data; (3) a network design optimized for irregular traffic, where all communication is one-way, and messages do not contain routing metadata; (4) novel traffic-aware task scheduling hardware that maintains high core utilization; and (5) a data-placement strategy that improves work balance.This work proposes architectural and software innovations to provide the greatest scalability to date for running graph algorithms while still being programmable for other domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据重用率低和频繁的不规则内存访问的应用程序（例如图形或稀疏线性代数工作负载）由于内存瓶颈和核心利用率低而无法很好地扩展。虽然之前的预取、解耦或流水线工作可以减轻内存延迟并提高核心利用率，但由于片外带宽有限，内存瓶颈仍然存在。使用混合内存立方体 (HMC) 进行内存处理 (PIM) 的方法克服了带宽限制，但由于任务调度和同步开销不佳而无法实现高核心利用率。此外，HMC 提供的高内存每核比率限制了强大的扩展能力。我们引入了 Dalorex，这是一种硬件-软件协同设计，可实现高并行性和能源效率，在处理图形和稀疏线性代数工作负载时展示了超过 16,000 个内核的强大扩展能力。与之前的 PIM 工作（均使用 256 个内核）相比，Dalorex 通过以下方式将性能和能耗提高了两个数量级：(1) 基于图块的分布式内存架构，其中每个处理图块保存等量的数据，并且所有内存操作都是本地的； (2)基于任务的并行编程模型，其中任务由与目标数据位于同一位置的处理单元执行； (3) 针对不规则流量优化的网络设计，其中所有通信都是单向的，并且消息不包含路由元数据； (4)新颖的流量感知任务调度硬件，保持高核心利用率； (5) 改善工作平衡的数据放置策略。这项工作提出了架构和软件创新，为运行图算法提供迄今为止最大的可扩展性，同时仍然可以为其他领域编程。

papers.title: DeFiNES: Enabling Fast Exploration of the Depth-first Scheduling Space for DNN Accelerators through Analytical Modeling.
papers.abstract: DNN workloads can be scheduled onto DNN accelerators in many different ways: from layer-by-layer scheduling to cross-layer depth-first scheduling (a.k.a. layer fusion, or cascaded execution). This results in a very broad scheduling space, with each schedule leading to varying hardware (HW) costs in terms of energy and latency. To rapidly explore this vast space for a wide variety of hardware architectures, analytical cost models are crucial to estimate scheduling effects on the HW level. However, state-of-the-art cost models are lacking support for exploring the complete depth-first scheduling space, for instance focusing only on activations while ignoring weights, or modeling only DRAM accesses while overlooking on-chip data movements. These limitations prevent researchers from systematically and accurately understanding the depth-first scheduling space.After formalizing this design space, this work proposes a unified modeling framework, DeFiNES, for layer-by-layer and depth-first scheduling to fill in the gaps. DeFiNES enables analytically estimating the hardware cost for possible schedules in terms of both energy and latency, while considering data access at every memory level. This is done for each schedule and HW architecture under study by optimally choosing the active part of the memory hierarchy per unique combination of operand, layer, and feature map tile. The hardware costs are estimated, taking into account both data computation and data copy phases. The analytical cost model is validated against measured data from a taped-out depth-first DNN accelerator, DepFiN, showing good modeling accuracy at the end-to-end neural network level. A comparison with generalized state-of-the-art demonstrates up to 10× better solutions found with DeFiNES.
papers.abstract_zh: DNN 工作负载可以通过多种不同的方式调度到 DNN 加速器上：从逐层调度到跨层深度优先调度（也称为层融合或级联执行）。这导致了非常广泛的调度空间，每个调度都会导致不同的硬件 (HW) 成本（在能源和延迟方面）。为了快速探索各种硬件架构的广阔空间，分析成本模型对于估计硬件级别的调度效果至关重要。然而，最先进的成本模型缺乏对探索完整深度优先调度空间的支持，例如仅关注激活而忽略权重，或者仅对 DRAM 访问进行建模而忽略片上数据移动。这些限制阻碍了研究人员系统、准确地理解深度优先调度空间。在形式化这个设计空间后，本文提出了一个统一的建模框架 DeFiNES，用于逐层和深度优先调度，以填补空白。 DeFiNES 能够在能源和延迟方面分析估计可能的调度的硬件成本，同时考虑每个内存级别的数据访问。这是通过根据操作数、层和特征图块的独特组合来最佳选择存储器层次结构的活动部分来针对所研究的每个调度和硬件架构来完成的。估计硬件成本时会考虑数据计算和数据复制阶段。分析成本模型根据来自流片的深度优先 DNN 加速器 DepFiN 的测量数据进行了验证，显示出端到端神经网络级别的良好建模准确性。与一般最先进技术的比较表明，使用 DeFiNES 发现的解决方案好达 10 倍。

papers.title: DIMM-Link: Enabling Efficient Inter-DIMM Communication for Near-Memory Processing.
papers.abstract: DIMM-based near-memory processing architectures (DIMM-NMP) have received growing interest from both academia and industry. They have the advantages of large memory capacity, low manufacturing cost, high flexibility, compatible form factor, etc. However, inter-DIMM communication (IDC) has become a critical obstacle for generic DIMM-NMP architectures because it involves costly forwarding transactions through the host CPU. Recent research has demonstrated that, for many applications, the overhead induced by IDC may even offset the performance and energy benefits of near-memory processing.To tackle this problem, we propose DIMM-Link, which enables high-performance IDC in DIMM-NMP architectures and supports seamless integration with existing host memory systems. It adopts bidirectional external data links to connect DIMMs, via which point-to-point communication and inter-DIMM broadcast are efficiently supported in a packet-routing way. We present the full-stack design of DIMM-Link, including the hardware architecture, interconnect protocol, system organization, routing mechanisms, optimization strategies, etc. Comprehensive experiments on typical data-intensive tasks demonstrate that the DIMM-Link-equipped NMP system can achieve a 5.93× average speedup over the 16-core CPU baseline. Compared to other IDC methods, DIMM-Link outperforms MCN, AIM, and ABC-DIMM by 2.42×, 1.87×, and 1.77×, respectively. More importantly, DIMM-Link fully considers the implementation feasibility and system integration constraints, which are critical for designing NMP architectures based on modern DDR4/DDR5 DIMMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 DIMM 的近内存处理架构 (DIMM-NMP) 越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。它们具有内存容量大、制造成本低、灵活性高、外形兼容等优点。然而，DIMM 间通信 (IDC) 已成为通用 DIMM-NMP 架构的关键障碍，因为它涉及通过主机 CPU 转发事务的成本高昂。最近的研究表明，对于许多应用程序来说，IDC 带来的开销甚至可能抵消近内存处理的性能和能源优势。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DIMM-Link，它可以在 DIMM-NMP 架构中实现高性能 IDC，并支持与现有主机内存系统的无缝集成。它采用双向外部数据链路连接 DIMM，通过数据包路由方式有效支持点对点通信和 DIMM 间广播。我们展示了 DIMM-Link 的全栈设计，包括硬件架构、互连协议、系统组织、路由机制、优化策略等。对典型数据密集型任务的综合实验表明，配备 DIMM-Link 的 NMP 系统可以在 16 核 CPU 基准的基础上实现 5.93 倍的平均加速。与其他 IDC 方法相比，DIMM-Link 的性能分别优于 MCN、AIM 和 ABC-DIMM 2.42 倍、1.87 倍和 1.77 倍。更重要的是，DIMM-Link充分考虑了实施可行性和系统集成约束，这对于设计基于现代DDR4/DDR5 DIMM的NMP架构至关重要。

papers.title: Duet: Creating Harmony between Processors and Embedded FPGAs.
papers.abstract: The demise of Moore’s Law has led to the rise of hardware acceleration. However, the focus on accelerating stable algorithms in their entirety neglects the abundant fine-grained acceleration opportunities available in broader domains and squanders host processors’ compute power.This paper presents Duet, a scalable, manycore-FPGA architecture that promotes embedded FPGAs (eFPGA) to be equal peers with processors through non-intrusive, bi-directionally cache-coherent integration. In contrast to existing CPU-FPGA hybrid systems in which the processors play a supportive role, Duet unleashes the full potential of both the processors and the eFPGAs with two classes of post-fabrication enhancements: fine-grained acceleration, which partitions an application into small tasks and offloads the frequently-invoked, compute-intensive ones onto various small accelerators, leveraging the processors to handle dynamic control flow and less accelerable tasks; hardware augmentation, which employs eFPGA-emulated hardware widgets to improve processor efficiency or mitigate software overheads in certain execution models.An RTL-level implementation of Duet is developed to evaluate the architecture with high fidelity. Experiments using synthetic benchmarks show that Duet can reduce the processor-accelerator communication latency by up to 82% and increase the bandwidth by up to 9.5x. The RTL implementation is further evaluated with seven application benchmarks, achieving 1.5-24.9x speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 摩尔定律的消亡导致了硬件加速的兴起。然而，对整体加速稳定算法的关注忽略了更广泛领域中丰富的细粒度加速机会，并且浪费了主机处理器的计算能力。本文介绍了 Duet，一种可扩展的众核 FPGA 架构，它通过非侵入式、双向缓存一致性集成，促进嵌入式 FPGA (eFPGA) 与处理器平等。与处理器发挥支持作用的现有 CPU-FPGA 混合系统相比，Duet 通过两类制造后增强功能释放了处理器和 eFPGA 的全部潜力：细粒度加速，将应用程序划分为小任务，并将频繁调用的计算密集型任务卸载到各种小型加速器上，利用处理器处理动态控制流和加速程度较低的任务；硬件增强，它采用 eFPGA 模拟的硬件小部件来提高处理器效率或减轻某些执行模型中的软件开销。开发了 Duet 的 RTL 级实现来评估高保真度的架构。使用综合基准测试的实验表明，Duet 可以将处理器加速器通信延迟减少高达 82%，并将带宽增加高达 9.5 倍。 RTL 实现通过七个应用程序基准进行了进一步评估，实现了 1.5-24.9 倍的加速。

papers.title: Efficient Distributed Secure Memory with Migratable Merkle Tree.
papers.abstract: Hardware-assisted enclaves with memory encryption have been widely adopted in the prevailing architectures, e.g., Intel SGX/TDX, AMD SEV, ARM CCA, etc. However, existing enclave designs fall short in supporting efficient cooperation among cross-node enclaves (i.e., multi-machines) because the range of hardware memory protection is within a single node. A naive approach is to leverage cryptography at the application level and transfer data between nodes through secure channels (e.g., SSL). However, it incurs orders of magnitude costs due to expensive encryption/decryption, especially for distributed applications with large data transfer, e.g., MapReduce and graph computing. A secure and efficient mechanism of distributed secure memory is necessary but still missing.This paper proposes Migratable Merkle Tree (MMT), a design enabling efficient distributed secure memory to support distributed confidential computing. MMT sets up an integrity forest for distributed memory on multiple nodes. It allows an enclave to securely delegate an MMT closure, which contains both data and metadata of a subtree, to a remote enclave. By reusing the memory encryption mechanisms of existing enclaves, our design achieves secure data transfer without software re-encryption. We have implemented a prototype of MMT and a trusted firmware for management, and further applied MMT to real-world distributed applications. The evaluation results show that compared with existing systems using the AES-NI instruction, MMT can achieve up to 13x speedup on data transferring, and gain 12%~58% improvement on the end-to-end performance of MapReduce and PageRank.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有内存加密功能的硬件辅助Enclave已广泛应用于主流架构中，例如Intel SGX/TDX、AMD SEV、ARM CCA等。然而，由于硬件内存保护的范围在单个节点内，现有的Enclave设计在支持跨节点Enclave（即多机）之间的高效协作方面存在不足。一种简单的方法是在应用程序级别利用加密技术并通过安全通道（例如 SSL）在节点之间传输数据。然而，由于昂贵的加密/解密，它会带来数个数量级的成本，特别是对于具有大量数据传输的分布式应用程序，例如MapReduce和图计算。一种安全高效的分布式安全内存机制是必要的，但仍然缺乏。本文提出了可迁移默克尔树(MMT)，一种使高效分布式安全内存支持分布式机密计算的设计。 MMT为多个节点上的分布式内存建立了完整性森林。它允许 enclave 将包含子树的数据和元数据的 MMT 闭包安全地委托给远程 enclave。通过重用现有 enclave 的内存加密机制，我们的设计无需软件重新加密即可实现安全数据传输。我们已经实现了MMT的原型和用于管理的可信固件，并将MMT进一步应用到现实世界的分布式应用程序中。评估结果表明，与现有使用AES-NI指令的系统相比，MMT可以实现高达13倍的数据传输加速，并且MapReduce和PageRank的端到端性能提高12%~58%。

papers.title: Efficient Supernet Training Using Path Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Compared to conventional neural networks, training a supernet for Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is very time consuming. Although current works have demonstrated that parallel computing can significantly speed up the training process, almost all of their parallelism still follow the conventional data- and model-based paradigms, which actually face performance issues in both computation and inter-node communication of the supernet training. To further improve the performance of current methods, we discover the unique path-parallelism that exists in supernet training, and proposed a novel training approach designed specifically for supernet. In detail, we focus on analyzing path correlations between subnets in a supernet and exploiting effective path-merging methods to reduce redundant computations and communications raised by concurrent subnets. Moreover, we also try to combine the proposed path parallelism with traditional intra-subnet parallelism to perform multi-level parallelization to further optimize the parallel performance. We present the detailed design and implementation of our method, and our experimental results show that our proposed approach can achieve up to 3.2x end-to-end speedup over conventional parallel training solutions, and 1.46x–5.78x speedup compared to the state-of-art supernet training frameworks.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统的神经网络相比，训练神经架构搜索（NAS）超级网络非常耗时。尽管当前的工作已经证明并行计算可以显着加快训练过程，但几乎所有的并行性仍然遵循传统的基于数据和模型的范式，这实际上面临着超网训练的计算和节点间通信的性能问题。为了进一步提高当前方法的性能，我们发现了超网训练中存在的独特路径并行性，并提出了一种专门为超网设计的新颖的训练方法。具体来说，我们专注于分析超级网中子网之间的路径相关性，并利用有效的路径合并方法来减少并发子网引起的冗余计算和通信。此外，我们还尝试将所提出的路径并行性与传统的子网内并行性相结合来执行多级并行化，以进一步优化并行性能。我们展示了我们方法的详细设计和实现，我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以实现比传统并行训练解决方案高达 3.2 倍的端到端加速，与最先进的超网训练框架相比实现 1.46 倍至 5.78 倍的加速。

papers.title: eNODE: Energy-Efficient and Low-Latency Edge Inference and Training of Neural ODEs.
papers.abstract: Neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) provide better modeling performance with smaller amount of model parameters in many tasks by embedding neural networks (NNs) in ordinary differential equations (ODEs). They have been shown to outperform in representing continuous-time data and learning dynamic systems, and are promising for on-device inference and training. However, an edge device is limited by area and energy budget, and real-time operations have a tight latency requirement. State-of-the-art NN accelerators are not optimized for the area- and power-hungry memory storage and access for NODE inference and training, and lack the flexibility to incorporate dynamic latency reduction techniques. We present eNODE by architecture-algorithm co-design to achieve efficient and fast inference and training of NODEs. eNODE adopts compact-size depth-first integration and depth-first training for higher energy efficiency. Through function reuse, packetized processing and a unified NN core design, the efficiency of eNODE’s depth-first processing is further enhanced. We propose algorithm innovations, including slope-adaptive stepsize search and priority processing with early stop, to substantially shorten the latency. A hardware prototype is synthesized in a 28 nm CMOS technology for evaluation and benchmarking. eNODE demonstrates up to 6.59× better energy efficiency, 2.38× higher speed, and better area scalability over a SIMD ASIC baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过将神经网络 (NN) 嵌入到常微分方程 (ODE) 中，神经常微分方程 (NODE) 在许多任务中以更少量的模型参数提供更好的建模性能。它们已被证明在表示连续时间数据和学习动态系统方面表现出色，并且在设备上推理和训练方面很有前景。然而，边缘设备受到面积和能源预算的限制，并且实时操作具有严格的延迟要求。最先进的神经网络加速器并未针对节点推理和训练所需的面积和功耗较高的内存存储和访问进行优化，并且缺乏整合动态延迟减少技术的灵活性。我们通过架构-算法协同设计提出了eNODE，以实现高效、快速的节点推理和训练。 eNODE采用紧凑尺寸的深度优先集成和深度优先训练，以实现更高的能效。通过功能复用、分包处理和统一的神经网络核心设计，进一步提升了eNODE深度优先处理的效率。我们提出了算法创新，包括斜率自适应步长搜索和提前停止的优先处理，以大幅缩短延迟。采用 28 nm CMOS 技术合成硬件原型，用于评估和基准测试。与 SIMD ASIC 基准相比，eNODE 的能源效率提高了 6.59 倍，速度提高了 2.38 倍，并且面积可扩展性更好。

papers.title: ESD: An ECC-assisted and Selective Deduplication for Encrypted Non-Volatile Main Memory.
papers.abstract: Reducing write data to encrypted Non-Volatile Main Memory (NVMM) can directly improve NVMM’s endurance, performance, and energy efficiency. However, existing works that straightforwardly apply inline deduplication on encrypted NVMM can significantly lead to system performance degradation due to high computing, memory footprint, and index-lookup overhead to generate, store, and query the cryptographic hash (fingerprint). This paper proposes ESD, an ECC-assisted and Selective Deduplication for encrypted NVMM by exploiting both the device characteristics (ECC mechanism) and the workload characteristics (content locality). First, ESD utilizes the ECC information associated with each cache line evicted from the Last-Level Cache (LLC) as the fingerprint to identify data similarity and avoids the costly hash calculating overhead on the non-duplicate cache lines. Second, ESD leverages selective deduplication to exploit the content locality within cache lines by only storing the fingerprints with high reference counts in the memory cache to reduce the memory space overhead and avoid fingerprints NVMM_lookup operations. The experimental results show that ESD can significantly speed up the writes by up to 3.4x, 4.3x, and 2.6x, speed up the reads by up to 5.3x, 5.0x, and 2.0x, and reduce the energy consumption by up to 96.3%, 96.2%, and 56.6% than Baseline, Dedup SHA1, and DeWrite, respectively. Meanwhile, ESD also can significantly outperform other schemes in tail latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 减少对加密非易失性主存储器 (NVMM) 的写入数据可以直接提高 NVMM 的耐用性、性能和能效。然而，直接在加密 NVMM 上应用内联重复数据删除的现有工作可能会因生成、存储和查询加密哈希（指纹）所需的高计算、内存占用和索引查找开销而显着导致系统性能下降。本文提出了 ESD，这是一种利用设备特性（ECC 机制）和工作负载特性（内容局部性）的加密 NVMM 的 ECC 辅助选择性重复数据删除技术。首先，ESD利用与从末级高速缓存(LLC)逐出的每个高速缓存行相关联的ECC信息作为指纹来识别数据相似性，并避免在非重复高速缓存行上进行昂贵的哈希计算开销。其次，ESD 利用选择性重复数据删除来利用缓存行内的内容局部性，仅将具有高引用计数的指纹存储在内存缓存中，以减少内存空间开销并避免指纹 NVMM_lookup 操作。实验结果表明，与Baseline、Dedup SHA1和DeWrite相比，ESD可分别将写入速度显着提高3.4倍、4.3倍和2.6倍，读取速度分别提高5.3倍、5.0倍和2.0倍，能耗降低高达96.3%、96.2%和56.6%。同时，ESD 在尾延迟方面也可以显着优于其他方案。

papers.title: EVE: Ephemeral Vector Engines.
papers.abstract: There has been a resurgence of interest in vector architectures evident by recent adoption of vector extensions in mainstream instruction set architectures. Traditionally, vector engines leverage this abstraction by exploiting its inherent regularity to increase performance and efficiency. Recent work on SRAM-based compute-in-memory has shown promise in reducing the area overhead of these engines. In this work, we propose ephemeral vector engines (EVE) where we leverage SRAM-based compute-in-memory techniquesas well as bit-peripheral computations to facilitate efficient vector execution. EVE uses a novel approach of bit-hybrid execution, striking a balance between throughput and latency. Evaluated on the Rodinia and RiVEC benchmark suites, EVE achieves almost 8× speed-up compared to an out-of-order processor and 4.59× compared to an integrated vector unit. EVE achieves speed-ups comparable to an aggressive decoupled vector unit and increases the area-normalized performance by over 2 ×. By repurposing SRAM arrays in the L2 cache to create ephemeral vector execution units, EVE is able to efficiently achieve high performance while incurring as little as 11.7% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近主流指令集架构中采用了向量扩展，这表明人们对向量架构的兴趣重新燃起。传统上，矢量引擎通过利用其固有的规律性来利用这种抽象来提高性能和效率。最近关于基于 SRAM 的内存计算的研究显示出在减少这些引擎的面积开销方面的前景。在这项工作中，我们提出了临时向量引擎（EVE），其中我们利用基于 SRAM 的内存计算技术以及位外围计算来促进高效的向量执行。 EVE 采用了一种新颖的位混合执行方法，在吞吐量和延迟之间取得了平衡。在 Rodinia 和 RiVEC 基准套件上进行评估，EVE 与乱序处理器相比实现了近 8 倍的加速，与集成矢量单元相比实现了 4.59 倍的加速。 EVE 实现了与激进的解耦矢量单元相当的加速，并将面积归一化性能提高了 2 倍以上。通过重新利用 L2 缓存中的 SRAM 阵列来创建临时向量执行单元，EVE 能够有效地实现高性能，同时产生低至 11.7% 的面积开销。

papers.title: FAB: An FPGA-based Accelerator for Bootstrappable Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) offers protection to private data on third-party cloud servers by allowing computations on the data in encrypted form. To support general-purpose encrypted computations, all existing FHE schemes require an expensive operation known as "bootstrapping". Unfortunately, the computation cost and the memory bandwidth required for bootstrapping add significant overhead to FHE-based computations, limiting the practical use of FHE.In this work, we propose FAB, an FPGA-based accelerator for bootstrappable FHE. Prior FPGA-based FHE accelerators have proposed hardware acceleration of basic FHE primitives for impractical parameter sets without support for bootstrapping. FAB, for the first time ever, accelerates bootstrapping (along with basic FHE primitives) on an FPGA for a secure and practical parameter set. The key contribution of this work is the architecture of a balanced FAB design, which is not memory bound. In our design, we leverage recent algorithms for bootstrapping while being cognizant of the compute and memory constraints of our FPGA. In addition, we use a minimal number of functional units for computing, operate at a low frequency, leverage high data rates to and from main memory, utilize the limited on-chip memory effectively, and perform careful operation scheduling.We evaluate FAB using a single Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA and by scaling it to a multi-FPGA system consisting of eight such FPGAs. For bootstrapping a fully-packed ciphertext, while operating at 300MHz, FAB outperforms existing state-of-the-art CPU and GPU implementations by 213× and 1.5× respectively. Our target FHE application is training a logistic regression model over encrypted data. For logistic regression model training scaled to 8 FPGAs on the cloud, FAB outperforms a CPU and GPU by 456× and 9.5× respectively, providing practical performance at a fraction of the ASIC design cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密 (FHE) 通过允许以加密形式对数据进行计算，为第三方云服务器上的私有数据提供保护。为了支持通用加密计算，所有现有的 FHE 方案都需要称为“引导”的昂贵操作。不幸的是，引导所需的计算成本和内存带宽给基于 FHE 的计算增加了大量开销，限制了 FHE 的实际使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FAB，一种基于 FPGA 的可引导 FHE 加速器。先前基于 FPGA 的 FHE 加速器已提出对基本 FHE 原语进行硬件加速，以处理不切实际的参数集，而不支持引导。 FAB 有史以来第一次加速了 FPGA 上的自举（以及基本的 FHE 原语），以获得安全实用的参数集。这项工作的关键贡献是平衡 FAB 设计的架构，它不受内存限制。在我们的设计中，我们利用最新的引导算法，同时认识到 FPGA 的计算和内存限制。此外，我们使用最少数量的功能单元进行计算，以较低的频率运行，利用主存储器的高数据速率，有效地利用有限的片上存储器，并执行仔细的操作调度。我们使用单个 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 评估 FAB，并将其扩展到由八个此类 FPGA 组成的多 FPGA 系统。为了引导完全打包的密文，在 300MHz 下运行时，FAB 的性能分别比现有最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 实现高出 213 倍和 1.5 倍。我们的目标 FHE 应用程序是在加密数据上训练逻辑回归模型。对于云上扩展到 8 个 FPGA 的逻辑回归模型训练，FAB 的性能分别比 CPU 和 GPU 高 456 倍和 9.5 倍，以一小部分 ASIC 设计成本提供实用性能。

papers.title: FinePack: Transparently Improving the Efficiency of Fine-Grained Transfers in Multi-GPU Systems.
papers.abstract: Recent studies have shown that using fine-grained peer-to-peer (P2P) stores to communicate among devices in multi-GPU systems is a promising path to achieve strong performance scaling. In many irregular applications, such as graph algorithms and sparse linear algebra, small sub-cache line (4-32B) stores arise naturally when using the P2P paradigm. This is particularly problematic in multi-GPU systems because inter-GPU interconnects are optimized for bulk transfers rather than small operations. As a consequence, application developers either resort to complex programming techniques to work around this small transfer inefficiency or fall back to bulk inter-GPU DMA transfers that have limited performance scalability. We propose FinePack, a set of limited I/O interconnect and GPU hardware enhancements that enable small peer-to-peer stores to achieve interconnect efficiency that rivals bulk transfers while maintaining the simplicity of a peer-to-peer memory access programming model. Exploiting the GPU’s weak memory model, FinePack dynamically coalesces and compresses small writes into a larger I/O message that reduces link-level protocol overhead. FinePack is fully transparent to software and requires no changes to the GPU’s virtual memory system. We evaluate FinePack on a system comprising 4 Volta GPUs on a PCIe 4.0 interconnect to show FinePack improves interconnect efficiency for small peer-to-peer stores by 3×. This results in 4-GPU strong scaling performance 1.4× better than traditional DMA based multi-GPU programming and comes within 71% of the maximum achievable strong scaling performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，使用细粒度的点对点 (P2P) 存储在多 GPU 系统中的设备之间进行通信是实现强大性能扩展的一条有前途的途径。在许多不规则应用中，例如图算法和稀疏线性代数，使用 P2P 范例时自然会出现小型子缓存行（4-32B）存储。这在多 GPU 系统中尤其成问题，因为 GPU 间互连针对批量传输而不是小型操作进行了优化。因此，应用程序开发人员要么诉诸复杂的编程技术来解决这种传输效率低下的问题，要么退回到性能可扩展性有限的批量 GPU 间 DMA 传输。我们提出 FinePack，这是一组有限的 I/O 互连和 GPU 硬件增强功能，使小型对等存储能够实现与批量传输相媲美的互连效率，同时保持对等内存访问编程模型的简单性。 FinePack 利用 GPU 的弱内存模型，动态地将小写入合并并压缩为更大的 I/O 消息，从而减少链路级协议开销。 FinePack 对软件完全透明，无需更改 GPU 的虚拟内存系统。我们在 PCIe 4.0 互连上包含 4 个 Volta GPU 的系统上评估 FinePack，结果表明 FinePack 将小型点对点存储的互连效率提高了 3 倍。这使得 4-GPU 强扩展性能比传统的基于 DMA 的多 GPU 编程好 1.4 倍，并且在可实现的最大强扩展性能的 71% 以内。

papers.title: FlowGNN: A Dataflow Architecture for Real-Time Workload-Agnostic Graph Neural Network Inference.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have recently exploded in popularity thanks to their broad applicability to graph-related problems such as quantum chemistry, drug discovery, and high energy physics. However, meeting demand for novel GNN models and fast inference simultaneously is challenging due to the gap between developing efficient accelerators and the rapid creation of new GNN models. Prior art focuses on accelerating specific classes of GNNs, such as Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN), but lacks generality to support a wide range of existing or new GNN models. Furthermore, most works rely on graph pre-processing to exploit data locality, making them unsuitable for real-time applications. To address these limitations, in this work, we propose a generic dataflow architecture for GNN acceleration, named FlowGNN, which is generalizable to the majority of message-passing GNNs. The contributions are three-fold. First, we propose a novel and scalable dataflow architecture, which generally supports a wide range of GNN models with message-passing mechanism. The architecture features a configurable dataflow optimized for simultaneous computation of node embedding, edge embedding, and message passing, which is generally applicable to all models. We also propose a rich library of model-specific components. Second, we deliver ultra-fast real-time GNN inference without any graph pre-processing, making it agnostic to dynamically changing graph structures. Third, we verify our architecture on the Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA board and measure the on-board end-to-end performance. We achieve a speed-up of up to 24–254× against CPU (6226R) and 1.3–477× against GPU (A6000) (with batch sizes 1 through 1024); we also outperform the SOTA GNN accelerator I-GCN by 1.26× speedup and 1.55× energy efficiency over four datasets. Our implementation code and on-board measurement are publicly available on GitHub.<sup>1</sup>
papers.abstract_zh: 由于图神经网络（GNN）在量子化学、药物发现和高能物理等图相关问题上的广泛适用性，图神经网络（GNN）最近迅速普及。然而，由于开发高效加速器和快速创建新 GNN 模型之间存在差距，同时满足新型 GNN 模型和快速推理的需求具有挑战性。现有技术专注于加速特定类别的 GNN，例如图卷积网络 (GCN)，但缺乏支持各种现有或新的 GNN 模型的通用性。此外，大多数工作依赖于图预处理来利用数据局部性，这使得它们不适合实时应用程序。为了解决这些限制，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于 GNN 加速的通用数据流架构，名为 FlowGNN，它可推广到大多数消息传递 GNN。贡献有三倍。首先，我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的数据流架构，该架构通常支持具有消息传递机制的各种 GNN 模型。该架构具有针对节点嵌入、边缘嵌入和消息传递的同时计算进行优化的可配置数据流，通常适用于所有模型。我们还提出了丰富的特定于模型的组件库。其次，我们提供超快的实时 GNN 推理，无需任何图形预处理，使其与动态变化的图形结构无关。第三，我们在 Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA 板上验证我们的架构并测量板载端到端性能。我们针对 CPU (6226R) 实现了高达 24-254 倍的加速，针对 GPU (A6000) 实现了高达 1.3-477 倍的加速（批量大小为 1 到 1024）；我们还在四个数据集上超越了 SOTA GNN 加速器 I-GCN 1.26 倍的加速比和 1.55 倍的能源效率。我们的实现代码和板载测量可在 GitHub 上公开获取。<sup>1</sup>

papers.title: FxHENN: FPGA-based acceleration framework for homomorphic encrypted CNN inference.
papers.abstract: Fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) is a promising data privacy solution for machine learning, which allows the inference to be performed with encrypted data. However, it typically leads to 5-6 orders of magnitude higher computation and storage overhead. This paper proposes the first full-fledged FPGA acceleration framework for FHE-based convolution neural network (HE-CNN) inference. We then design parameterized HE operation modules with intra- and inter- HE-CNN layer resource management based on FPGA high-level synthesis (HLS) design flow. With sophisticated resource and performance modeling of the HE operation modules, the proposed FxHENN framework automatically performs design space exploration to determine the optimized resource provisioning and generates the accelerator circuit for a given HE-CNN model on a target FPGA device. Compared with the state-of-the-art CPU-based HE-CNN inference solution, FxHENN achieves up to 13.49X speedup of inference latency, and 1187.12X energy efficiency. Meanwhile, given this is the first attempt in the literature on FPGA acceleration of fullfledged non-interactive HE-CNN inference, our results obtained on low-power FPGA devices demonstrate HE-CNN inference for edge and embedded computing is practical.
papers.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密（FHE）是一种很有前景的机器学习数据隐私解决方案，它允许使用加密数据进行推理。然而，它通常会导致计算和存储开销增加 5-6 个数量级。本文提出了第一个用于基于 FHE 的卷积神经网络 (HE-CNN) 推理的成熟 FPGA 加速框架。然后，我们基于 FPGA 高级综合 (HLS) 设计流程设计具有 HE-CNN 层内和层间资源管理的参数化 HE 操作模块。通过 HE 操作模块的复杂资源和性能建模，所提出的 FxHENN 框架自动执行设计空间探索，以确定优化的资源配置，并为目标 FPGA 器件上的给定 HE-CNN 模型生成加速器电路。与最先进的基于 CPU 的 HE-CNN 推理解决方案相比，FxHENN 的推理延迟速度提高了 13.49 倍，能效提高了 1187.12 倍。同时，鉴于这是关于 FPGA 加速成熟的非交互式 HE-CNN 推理的文献中的首次尝试，我们在低功耗 FPGA 设备上获得的结果证明 HE-CNN 推理对于边缘和嵌入式计算是实用的。

papers.title: GROW: A Row-Stationary Sparse-Dense GEMM Accelerator for Memory-Efficient Graph Convolutional Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) have emerged as a key technology in various application domains where the input data is relational. A unique property of GCNs is that its two primary execution stages, aggregation and combination, exhibit drastically different dataflows. Consequently, prior GCN accelerators tackle this research space by casting the aggregation and combination stages as a series of sparse-dense matrix multiplication. However, prior work frequently suffers from inefficient data movements, leaving significant performance left on the table. We present GROW, a GCN accelerator based on Gustavson’s algorithm to architect a row-wise product based sparse-dense GEMM accelerator. GROW co-designs the software/ hardware that strikes a balance in locality and parallelism for GCNs, reducing the average memory traffic by 2×, and achieving an average 2.8× and 2.3× improvement in performance and energy-efficiency, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 图卷积神经网络（GCN）已成为各种输入数据相关的应用领域的关键技术。 GCN 的一个独特属性是它的两个主要执行阶段（聚合和组合）表现出截然不同的数据流。因此，之前的 GCN 加速器通过将聚合和组合阶段转换为一系列稀疏-密集矩阵乘法来解决这一研究领域。然而，之前的工作经常遭受低效的数据移动，从而导致显着的性能问题。我们提出了 GROW，一种基于 Gustavson 算法的 GCN 加速器，用于构建基于行乘积的稀疏密集 GEMM 加速器。 GROW 共同设计了 GCN 局部性和并行性之间的平衡软硬件，平均内存流量降低了 2 倍，性能和能效分别平均提高了 2.8 倍和 2.3 倍。

papers.title: HeatViT: Hardware-Efficient Adaptive Token Pruning for Vision Transformers.
papers.abstract: While vision transformers (ViTs) have continuously achieved new milestones in the field of computer vision, their sophisticated network architectures with high computation and memory costs have impeded their deployment on resource-limited edge devices. In this paper, we propose a hardware-efficient image-adaptive token pruning framework called HeatViT for efficient yet accurate ViT acceleration on embedded FPGAs. Based on the inherent computational patterns in ViTs, we first adopt an effective, hardware-efficient, and learnable head-evaluation token selector, which can be progressively inserted before transformer blocks to dynamically identify and consolidate the non-informative tokens from input images. Moreover, we implement the token selector on hardware by adding miniature control logic to heavily reuse existing hardware components built for the backbone ViT. To improve the hardware efficiency, we further employ 8-bit fixed-point quantization and propose polynomial approximations with regularization effect on quantization error for the frequently used nonlinear functions in ViTs. Compared to existing ViT pruning studies, under the similar computation cost, HeatViT can achieve 0.7% ~ 8.9% higher accuracy; while under the similar model accuracy, HeatViT can achieve more than 28.4% ~ 65.3% computation reduction, for various widely used ViTs, including DeiT-T, DeiT-S, DeiT-B, LV-ViT-S, and LV-ViT-M, on the ImageNet dataset. Compared to the baseline hardware accelerator, our implementations of HeatViT on the Xilinx ZCU102 FPGA achieve 3.46×~4.89× speedup with a trivial resource utilization overhead of 8%~11% more DSPs and 5%~8% more LUTs.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然视觉转换器（ViT）在计算机视觉领域不断取得新的里程碑，但其复杂的网络架构以及高计算和内存成本阻碍了它们在资源有限的边缘设备上的部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 HeatViT 的硬件高效图像自适应令牌修剪框架，用于在嵌入式 FPGA 上实现高效而准确的 ViT 加速。基于 ViT 固有的计算模式，我们首先采用有效、硬件高效且可学习的头部评估标记选择器，它可以逐步插入到转换器块之前，以动态识别和合并输入图像中的非信息性标记。此外，我们通过添加微型控制逻辑来在硬件上实现令牌选择器，以大量重用为主干 ViT 构建的现有硬件组件。为了提高硬件效率，我们进一步采用8位定点量化，并针对ViT中常用的非线性函数提出对量化误差具有正则化作用的多项式近似。与现有的 ViT 剪枝研究相比，在相似的计算成本下，HeatViT 可以实现高 0.7% ~ 8.9% 的精度；而在类似的模型精度下，对于 ImageNet 数据集上各种广泛使用的 ViT，包括 DeiT-T、DeiT-S、DeiT-B、LV-ViT-S 和 LV-ViT-M，HeatViT 可以实现超过 28.4% ~ 65.3% 的计算减少。与基准硬件加速器相比，我们在 Xilinx ZCU102 FPGA 上实现的 HeatViT 实现了 3.46×~4.89× 的加速，而 DSP 的资源利用率开销却增加了 8%~11%，LUT 增加了 5%~8%。
