papers.title: High Performance and Power Efficient Accelerator for Cloud Inference.
papers.abstract: Facing the growing complexity of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), high-performance and power-efficient AI accelerators are desired to provide effective and affordable cloud inference services. We introduce our flagship product, i.e., the Cloudblazer i20 accelerator, which integrates the innovated Deep Thinking Unit (DTU 2.0). The design is driven by requests drawn from various AI inference applications and insights learned from our previous products. With careful tradeoffs in hardware-software co-design, Cloudblazer i20 delivers impressive performance and energy efficiency while maintaining acceptable hardware costs and software complexity/flexibility. To tackle computation- and data-intensive workloads, DTU 2.0 integrates powerful vector/matrix engines and a large-capacity multi-level memory hierarchy with high bandwidth. It supports comprehensive data flow and synchronization patterns to fully exploit parallelism in computation/memory access within or among concurrent tasks. Moreover, it enables sparse data compression/decompression, data broadcasting, repeated data transfer, and kernel code prefetching to optimize bandwidth utilization and reduce data access overheads. To utilize the underlying hardware and simplify the development of customized DNNs/operators, the software stack enables automatic optimizations (such as operator fusion and data flow tuning) and provides diverse programming interfaces for developers. Lastly, the energy consumption is optimized through dynamic power integrity and efficiency management, eliminating integrity risks and energy wastes. Based on the performance requirement, developers also can assign their workloads with the entire or partial hardware resources accordingly. Evaluated with 10 representative DNN models widely adopted in various domains, Cloudblazer i20 outperforms Nvidia T4 and A10 GPUs with a geometric mean of 2.22x and 1.16x in performance and 1.04x and 1.17x in energy efficiency, respectively. The improvements demonstrate the effectiveness of Cloudblazer i20’s design that emphasizes performance, efficiency, and flexibility.
papers.abstract_zh: 面对日益复杂的深度神经网络（DNN），需要高性能和低功耗的人工智能加速器来提供有效且经济实惠的云推理服务。我们推出我们的旗舰产品Cloudblazer i20加速器，它集成了创新的深度思考单元（DTU 2.0）。该设计是根据各种人工智能推理应用程序的请求以及从我们以前的产品中学到的见解来驱动的。通过在硬件-软件协同设计方面进行仔细权衡，Cloudblazer i20 提供了令人印象深刻的性能和能源效率，同时保持了可接受的硬件成本和软件复杂性/灵活性。为了解决计算和数据密集型工作负载，DTU 2.0 集成了强大的矢量/矩阵引擎和大容量、高带宽的多级内存层次结构。它支持全面的数据流和同步模式，以充分利用并发任务内或之间的计算/内存访问的并行性。此外，它还支持稀疏数据压缩/解压缩、数据广播、重复数据传输和内核代码预取，以优化带宽利用率并减少数据访问开销。为了利用底层硬件并简化定制 DNN/算子的开发，软件堆栈支持自动优化（例如算子融合和数据流调整），并为开发人员提供多样化的编程接口。最后，通过动态电源完整性和效率管理优化能源消耗，消除完整性风险和能源浪费。根据性能需求，开发人员还可以相应地分配全部或部分硬件资源来分配其工作负载。通过对各个领域广泛采用的 10 个代表性 DNN 模型进行评估，Cloudblazer i20 的性能优于 Nvidia T4 和 A10 GPU，性能几何平均值分别为 2.22 倍和 1.16 倍，能效几何平均值分别为 1.04 倍和 1.17 倍。这些改进证明了 Cloudblazer i20 强调性能、效率和灵活性的设计的有效性。

papers.title: HIRAC: A Hierarchical Accelerator with Sorting-based Packing for SpGEMMs in DNN Applications.
papers.abstract: The state-of-the-art deep neural network (DNN) models use pruning to avoid over-fitting and reduce the number of parameters. In order to improve storage and computational efficiency, only nonzero elements are stored, and their locations are encoded into a sparse format. Sparse General Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) is the kernel computation of DNN-based applications. One challenge of computing SpGEMM is to avoid multiplying zero elements while keeping hardware utilization high in hardware accelerators that consist of processing element (PE) arrays. Prior work tackling this challenge typically requires complex interconnection networks, which adds high area and energy costs.This work proposes a HW/SW co-design architecture to compute SpGEMM efficiently without requiring complex interconnection networks. A novel fast packing algorithm, SorPack, is proposed to convert a sparse matrix into a dense matrix that increases PE utilization. The key idea is to sort columns and rows inside each submatrix based on the number of nonzero elements. The goal is to keep the partial sums that need to be added together close to each other, hence can be added locally and avoid the use of complex interconnection networks. In addition, a new tile-based hierarchical architecture, HIRAC, is proposed to provide a scalable system that maximizes the parallelism of the PEs. The HIRAC architecture consists of a novel PE array design and interconnection network tailored for DNN applications. The SorPack algorithm complements the HIRAC to further improve hardware utilization and overall system performance. Based on the evaluation results, HIRAC achieves an average of 3.2× speedup on a single layer of DNN as compared to the state-of-the-art sparse DNN accelerator SIGMA. In addition, HIRAC has a 9.5% area reduction and a 32% power reduction as compared to SIGMA. An end-to-end evaluation on a DNN model shows an 8.2× runtime reduction over the TPU.
papers.abstract_zh: The state-of-the-art deep neural network (DNN) models use pruning to avoid over-fitting and reduce the number of parameters.为了提高存储和计算效率，仅存储非零元素，并将它们的位置编码为稀疏格式。 Sparse General Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) is the kernel computation of DNN-based applications.计算 SpGEMM 的一项挑战是避免乘以零元素，同时在由处理元素 (PE) 阵列组成的硬件加速器中保持较高的硬件利用率。先前应对这一挑战的工作通常需要复杂的互连网络，这会增加较高的面积和能源成本。这项工作提出了一种硬件/软件协同设计架构，可以在不需要复杂互连网络的情况下高效计算 SpGEMM。 A novel fast packing algorithm, SorPack, is proposed to convert a sparse matrix into a dense matrix that increases PE utilization. The key idea is to sort columns and rows inside each submatrix based on the number of nonzero elements.目标是保持需要相加的部分和彼此接近，因此可以在本地相加并避免使用复杂的互连网络。此外，还提出了一种新的基于分片的分层架构 HIRAC，以提供可最大化 PE 并行性的可扩展系统。 The HIRAC architecture consists of a novel PE array design and interconnection network tailored for DNN applications. The SorPack algorithm complements the HIRAC to further improve hardware utilization and overall system performance.根据评估结果，与最先进的稀疏 DNN 加速器 SIGMA 相比，HIRAC 在单层 DNN 上平均实现 3.2 倍的加速。 In addition, HIRAC has a 9.5% area reduction and a 32% power reduction as compared to SIGMA. An end-to-end evaluation on a DNN model shows an 8.2× runtime reduction over the TPU.

papers.title: HoPP: Hardware-Software Co-Designed Page Prefetching for Disaggregated Memory.
papers.abstract: Memory disaggregation is a promising direction to mitigate memory contention in datacenters. To make memory disaggregation practical, prior efforts expose remote memory to applications transparently via virtual memory subsystem’s swapping interface. However, due to the semantic gap between OS and applications – OS cannot know the memory accessing sequences of an application but via page faults. This approach has two limitations. First, it learns little from page faults’ access history, which leads to sub-optimal prefetching predictions. Second, a page fault can still occur even if there is a prefetch-hit which leads to a large kernel overhead.To address such limitations, our key insight is to decouple the address capturing from page faults by collecting full memory access traces in the memory controller. Using this idea, we build <monospace>HoPP</monospace> – a hardware-software co-designed prefetching framework. <monospace>HoPP</monospace> adds hardware modules to the memory controller to feed sufficient hot pages to OS in real-time, which has three benefits in <monospace>HoPP</monospace>’s software design: 1) it improves existing prefetching algorithms with simple revamps, also offers more insights to build better policies; 2) the prefetch algorithm can run as a separate data path alongside the normal remote data path via page faults, potentially hiding the swap latency from applications, and enabling fine-grained control over prefetching behaviors; 3) the prefetch-hit overhead can be eliminated by early page table entry (PTE) injection, i.e., inject PTE for the prefetched page as soon as it returns. We implemented a proof-of-concept prototype using commodity servers along with a hardware-based memory tracking tool called <monospace>HMTT</monospace> to emulate a modified memory controller. Results show that compared to Fastswap and Leap, <monospace>HoPP</monospace>-optimized prefetching algorithm achieves over 90% accuracy and coverage, which leads to up to 59% completion time improvement for various datacenter applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存分解是缓解数据中心内存争用的一个有前途的方向。为了使内存分解切实可行，先前的努力通过虚拟内存子系统的交换接口将远程内存透明地公开给应用程序。然而，由于操作系统和应用程序之间的语义差距，操作系统只能通过页面错误才能知道应用程序的内存访问顺序。这种方法有两个限制。首先，它从页面错误的访问历史中学到的东西很少，这导致了次优的预取预测。其次，即使存在预取命中，页面错误仍然可能发生，这会导致大量的内核开销。为了解决这些限制，我们的关键见解是通过收集内存控制器中的完整内存访问跟踪来将地址捕获与页面错误解耦。利用这个想法，我们构建了<monospace>HoPP</monospace>——一个软硬件共同设计的预取框架。 <monospace>HoPP</monospace> 在内存控制器中添加了硬件模块，以实时向操作系统提供足够的热页，这对 <monospace>HoPP</monospace> 的软件设计有三个好处：1）它通过简单的修改改进了现有的预取算法，还提供了更多见解来构建更好的策略； 2) 预取算法可以通过页面错误作为单独的数据路径与正常的远程数据路径一起运行，从而可能对应用程序隐藏交换延迟，并实现对预取行为的细粒度控制； 3）预取命中开销可以通过早期页表项（PTE）注入来消除，即预取页一返回就注入PTE。我们使用商品服务器以及名为 <monospace>HMTT</monospace> 的基于硬件的内存跟踪工具来模拟修改后的内存控制器，从而实现了概念验证原型。结果表明，与 Fastswap 和 Leap 相比，<monospace>HoPP</monospace> 优化的预取算法实现了超过 90% 的准确率和覆盖率，从而使各种数据中心应用程序的完成时间缩短了 59%。

papers.title: HyQSAT: A Hybrid Approach for 3-SAT Problems by Integrating Quantum Annealer with CDCL.
papers.abstract: Propositional satisfiability problem (SAT) is represented in a conjunctive normal form with multiple clauses, which is an important non-deterministic polynomial-time (NP) complete problem that plays a major role in various applications including artificial intelligence, graph colouring, and circuit analysis. Quantum annealing (QA) is a promising methodology for solving complex SAT problems by exploiting the parallelism of quantum entanglement, where the SAT variables are embedded to the qubits. However, the long embedding time fundamentally limits existing QA-based methods, leading to inefficient hardware implementation and poor scalability.In this paper, we propose HyQSAT, a hybrid approach that integrates QA with the classical Conflict-Driven Clause Learning (CDCL) algorithm to enable end-to-end acceleration for solving SAT problems. Instead of embedding all clauses to QA hardware, we quantitatively estimate the conflict frequency of clauses and apply breadth-first traversal to choose their embedding order. We also consider the hardware topology to maximize the utilization of physical qubits in embedding to QA hardware. Besides, we adjust the embedding coefficients to improve the computation accuracy under qubit noise. Finally, we present how to interpret the satisfaction probability based on QA energy distribution and use this information to guide the CDCL search. Our experiments demonstrate that HyQSAT can effectively support larger-scale SAT problems that are beyond the capability of existing QA approaches, achieve up to 12.62X end-to-end speedup using D-Wave 2000Q compared to the classic CDCL algorithm on Intel E5 CPU, and considerably reduce the QA embedding time from 17.2s to 15.7µs compared to the D-Wave Minorminer algorithm [11].
papers.abstract_zh: 命题可满足性问题（SAT）以具有多个子句的合取范式表示，是一个重要的非确定性多项式时间（NP）完全问题，在人工智能、图形着色和电路分析等各种应用中发挥着重要作用。量子退火 (QA) 是一种很有前途的方法，它通过利用量子纠缠的并行性来解决复杂的 SAT 问题，其中 SAT 变量嵌入到量子位中。然而，较长的嵌入时间从根本上限制了现有基于 QA 的方法，导致硬件实现效率低下且可扩展性差。在本文中，我们提出了 HyQSAT，这是一种将 QA 与经典冲突驱动子句学习（CDCL）算法相结合的混合方法，能够实现解决 SAT 问题的端到端加速。我们不是将所有子句嵌入到 QA 硬件中，而是定量估计子句的冲突频率并应用广度优先遍历来选择它们的嵌入顺序。我们还考虑硬件拓扑，以最大限度地利用嵌入到 QA 硬件中的物理量子位。此外，我们调整嵌入系数以提高量子位噪声下的计算精度。最后，我们提出如何基于 QA 能量分布解释满意概率，并使用此信息来指导 CDCL 搜索。我们的实验表明，HyQSAT 可以有效地支持超出现有 QA 方法能力的更大规模 SAT 问题，与 Intel E5 CPU 上的经典 CDCL 算法相比，使用 D-Wave 2000Q 实现高达 12.62 倍的端到端加速，并且与 D-Wave Minorminer 算法相比，将 QA 嵌入时间从 17.2 秒大幅减少到 15.7 秒 [11]。

papers.title: iCache: An Importance-Sampling-Informed Cache for Accelerating I/O-Bound DNN Model Training.
papers.abstract: Fetching a large amount of DNN training data from storage systems incurs long I/O latency and fetch stalls of GPUs. Importance sampling in DNN training can reduce the amount of data computing on GPUs while maintaining a similar model accuracy. However, existing DNN training frameworks do not have a cache layer that reduces the number of data fetches and manages cached items according to sample importance, resulting in unnecessary data fetches, poor cache hit ratios, and random I/Os when importance sampling is used.In this paper, we design a new importance-sampling-informed cache, namely, iCache, to accelerate I/O bound DNN training jobs. iCache only fetches parts of samples instead of all samples in the dataset. The cache is partitioned into two regions: H-cache and L-cache, which store samples of high importance and low importance respectively. Rather than using recency or frequency, we manage data items in H-cache according to their corresponding sample importance. When there is a cache miss in L-cache, we use sample substitutability and dynamic packaging to improve the cache hit ratio and reduce the number of random I/Os. When multiple concurrent jobs access the same datasets in H-cache, we design a model to assign the relative importance values to cached samples to avoid cache thrashing, which may happen when there is no coordination among the concurrent training jobs. Our experimental results show that iCache has a negligible impact on training accuracy and speeds up the DNN training time by up to 2.0× compared to the state-of-the-art caching systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 从存储系统获取大量 DNN 训练数据会导致较长的 I/O 延迟和 GPU 的获取停顿。 DNN 训练中的重要性采样可以减少 GPU 上的数据计算量，同时保持相似的模型精度。然而，现有的 DNN 训练框架没有缓存层来减少数据获取次数并根据样本重要性管理缓存项，导致使用重要性采样时出现不必要的数据获取、较差的缓存命中率和随机 I/O。在本文中，我们设计了一种新的重要性采样通知缓存，即 iCache，以加速 I/O 绑定的 DNN 训练作业。 iCache 仅获取数据集中的部分样本，而不是所有样本。缓存分为两个区域：H-cache 和 L-cache，分别存储高重要性和低重要性的样本。我们不使用新近度或频率，而是根据相应的样本重要性来管理 H-cache 中的数据项。当L-cache出现缓存未命中时，我们利用样本可替换性和动态打包来提高缓存命中率并减少随机I/O次数。当多个并发作业访问 H-cache 中的相同数据集时，我们设计了一个模型，为缓存的样本分配相对重要性值，以避免缓存抖动，这种情况在并发训练作业之间没有协调时可能会发生。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的缓存系统相比，iCache 对训练精度的影响可以忽略不计，并且将 DNN 训练时间加快了 2.0 倍。

papers.title: INCA: Input-stationary Dataflow at Outside-the-box Thinking about Deep Learning Accelerators.
papers.abstract: This paper first presents an input-stationary (IS) implemented crossbar accelerator (INCA), supporting inference and training for deep neural networks (DNNs). Processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerators for DNNs have been actively researched, specifically, with resistive random-access memory (RRAM), due to RRAM’s computing and memorizing capabilities and device merits. To the best of our knowledge, all previous PIM accelerators have saved weights into RRAMs and inputs (activations) into conventional memories—it naturally forms weight-stationary (WS) dataflow. WS has generally been considered the most optimized choice for high parallelism and data reuse. How-ever, WS-based PIM accelerators show fundamental limitations: first, remaining high dependency on DRAM and buffers for fetching and saving inputs (activations); second, a remarkable number of extra RRAMs for transposed weights and additional computational intermediates in training; third, coarse-grained arrays demanding high-bit analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) and introducing poor utilization in depthwise and pointwise convolution; last, degraded accuracy due to its sensitivity to weights which are affected by RRAM’s nonideality. On the other hand, we observe that IS dataflow, where RRAMs retain inputs (activations), can effectively address the limitations of WS, because of low dependency by only loading weights, no need for extra RRAMs, feasibility of fine-grained accelerator design, and less impact of input (activation) variance on accuracy. But IS dataflow is hardly achievable by the existing crossbar structure because it is difficult to implement kernel sliding and preserve the high parallelism. To support kernel movement, we constitute a cell structure with two-transistor-one-RRAM (2T1R). Based on the 2T1R cell, we design a novel three-dimensional (3D) architecture for high parallelism in batch training. Our experiment results prove the potential of INCA. Compared to the WS accelerator, INCA achieves up to 20.6× and 260× energy efficiency improvement in inference and training, respectively; 4.8× (inference) and 18.6× (training) speedup as well. While accuracy in WS drops to 15% in our high-noise simulation, INCA presents an even more robust result as 86% accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文首先提出了一种输入平稳 (IS) 实现的交叉加速器 (INCA)，支持深度神经网络 (DNN) 的推理和训练。由于 RRAM 的计算和存储能力以及器件优点，DNN 的内存处理 (PIM) 加速器得到了积极的研究，特别是电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM)。据我们所知，所有以前的 PIM 加速器都将权重保存到 RRAM 中，并将输入（激活）保存到传统存储器中 - 它自然形成权重平稳 (WS) 数据流。 WS 通常被认为是高并行性和数据重用的最优化选择。然而，基于 WS 的 PIM 加速器显示出根本的局限性：首先，仍然高度依赖 DRAM 和缓冲区来获取和保存输入（激活）；其次，大量额外的 RRAM 用于转置权重和训练中的额外计算中间体；第三，粗粒度阵列需要高位模数转换器（ADC），并且在深度和逐点卷积方面利用率较差；最后，由于 RRAM 的非理想性影响其对权重的敏感性，因此降低了精度。另一方面，我们观察到，RRAM 保留输入（激活）的 IS 数据流可以有效解决 WS 的局限性，因为仅加载权重的依赖性较低，不需要额外的 RRAM，细粒度加速器设计的可行性以及输入（激活）方差对精度的影响较小。但现有的crossbar结构很难实现IS数据流，因为难以实现内核滑动并保持高并行性。为了支持内核运动，我们用二晶体管一RRAM（2T1R）构成了单元结构。基于 2T1R 单元，我们设计了一种新颖的三维 (3D) 架构，用于批量训练中的高并行性。我们的实验结果证明了 INCA 的潜力。与WS加速器相比，INCA在推理和训练方面分别实现了高达20.6倍和260倍的能效提升； 4.8×（推理）和 18.6×（训练）加速。虽然在我们的高噪声模拟中 WS 的准确度下降至 15%，但 INCA 提供了更可靠的结果，准确度为 86%。

papers.title: ISOSceles: Accelerating Sparse CNNs through Inter-Layer Pipelining.
papers.abstract: Sparse CNNs dramatically reduce computation and storage costs over dense ones. But sparsity also makes CNNs more data-intensive, as each value is reused fewer times. Thus, current sparse CNN accelerators, which process one layer at a time, are bottlenecked by memory traffic.We present ISOSceles, a new sparse CNN accelerator that dramatically reduces data movement through inter-layer pipelining: overlapping the execution of consecutive layers so that a layer’s output activations are quickly consumed by the next layer without spilling them off-chip. Pipelining greatly increases reuse, but it is challenging to implement with existing approaches, which are limited to dense CNNs. ISOSceles relies on a novel input-stationary output-stationary (IS-OS) dataflow that consumes inputs and produces outputs in the same order, greatly reducing intermediate sizes over existing dataflows. ISOSceles implements IS-OS efficiently and leverages time-multiplexing and dynamic scheduling to pipeline multiple layers despite the large variations in work that sparsity induces.On a wide range of sparse CNNs, ISOSceles outperforms a state-of-the-art accelerator by gmean 4.3× (up to 6.7×), and reduces traffic by 4.7× (up to 8.5×) while using less area.
papers.abstract_zh: 与密集 CNN 相比，稀疏 CNN 极大地降低了计算和存储成本。但稀疏性也使得 CNN 的数据更加密集，因为每个值的重用次数更少。因此，当前一次处理一层的稀疏 CNN 加速器受到内存流量的瓶颈。我们推出了 ISOSceles，一种新的稀疏 CNN 加速器，它通过层间流水线显着减少数据移动：重叠连续层的执行，以便一层的输出激活快速被下一层消耗，而不会溢出到芯片外。流水线极大地增加了重用，但使用现有方法实施具有挑战性，这些方法仅限于密集的 CNN。 ISOSceles relies on a novel input-stationary output-stationary (IS-OS) dataflow that consumes inputs and produces outputs in the same order, greatly reducing intermediate sizes over existing dataflows. ISOSceles 有效地实现了 IS-OS，并利用时间复用和动态调度来管道多层，尽管稀疏性会导致工作变化很大。在各种稀疏 CNN 上，ISOSceles 的性能比最先进的加速器高出 gmean 4.3×（高达 6.7×），并在使用更少面积的同时将流量减少了 4.7×（高达 8.5×）。

papers.title: Know Your Enemy To Save Cloud Energy: Energy-Performance Characterization of Machine Learning Serving.
papers.abstract: The proportion of machine learning (ML) inference in modern cloud workloads is rapidly increasing, and graphic processing units (GPUs) are the most preferred computational accelerators for it. The massively parallel computing capability of GPUs is well-suited to the inference workloads but consumes more power than conventional CPUs. Therefore, GPU servers contribute significantly to the total power consumption of a data center. However, despite their heavy power consumption, GPU power management in cloud-scale has not yet been actively researched. In this paper, we reveal three findings about energy efficiency of ML inference clusters in the cloud. ❶ GPUs of different architectures have comparative advantages in energy efficiency to each other for a set of ML models. ❷ The energy efficiency of a GPU set may significantly vary depending on the number of active GPUs and their clock frequencies even when producing the same level of throughput. ❸ The service level objective(SLO)-blind dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) driver of commercial GPUs maintain an immoderately high clock frequency. Based on these implications, we propose a hierarchical GPU resource management approach for cloud-scale inference services. The proposed approach consists of energy-aware cluster allocation, intra-cluster node scaling, intra-node GPU scaling and GPU clock scaling schemes considering the inference service architecture hierarchy. We evaluated our approach with its prototype implementation and cloud-scale simulation. The evaluation with real-world traces showed that the proposed schemes can save up to 28.3% of the cloud-scale energy consumption when serving five ML models with 105 servers having three different kinds of GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 推理在现代云工作负载中的比例正在迅速增加，而图形处理单元 (GPU) 是其最受青睐的计算加速器。 GPU 的大规模并行计算能力非常适合推理工作负载，但比传统 CPU 消耗更多电量。因此，GPU 服务器对数据中心的总功耗贡献很大。然而，尽管功耗很大，但云规模的 GPU 电源管理尚未得到积极研究。在本文中，我们揭示了有关云中机器学习推理集群能源效率的三项发现。 ❶ 对于一组ML模型，不同架构的GPU在能源效率方面具有比较优势。 ❷ 即使产生相同水平的吞吐量，GPU 组的能源效率也可能会根据活动 GPU 的数量及其时钟频率而显着变化。 ❸ 商用 GPU 的服务级别目标 (SLO)——盲目动态电压和频率缩放 (DVFS) 驱动程序保持极高的时钟频率。基于这些影响，我们提出了一种用于云规模推理服务的分层 GPU 资源管理方法。所提出的方法包括考虑推理服务架构层次结构的能量感知集群分配、集群内节点扩展、节点内 GPU 扩展和 GPU 时钟扩展方案。我们通过原型实现和云规模模拟评估了我们的方法。真实世界跟踪评估表明，当使用 105 台具有三种不同 GPU 的服务器服务 5 个 ML 模型时，所提出的方案可以节省高达 28.3% 的云规模能耗。

papers.title: KRISP: Enabling Kernel-wise RIght-sizing for Spatial Partitioned GPU Inference Servers.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) inference workloads present significantly different challenges than ML training workloads. Typically, inference workloads are shorter running and under-utilize GPU resources. To overcome this, co-locating multiple instances of a model has been proposed to improve the utilization of GPUs. Co-located models share the GPU through GPU spatial partitioning facilities, such as Nvidia’s MPS, MIG, or AMD’s CU Masking API. Existing spatially partitioned inference servers create model-wise partitions by "right-sizing" based on a model’s latency tolerance to restricting resources. We show that model-wise right-sizing is under-utilized due to varying resource restriction tolerance of individual kernels within an inference pass.We propose Kernel-wise Right-sizing for Spatial Partitioned GPU Inference Servers (KRISP) to enable kernel-wise right-sizing of spatial partitions at the granularity of individual kernels. We demonstrate that KRISP can support a greater level of concurrently running inference models compared to existing spatially partitioned inference servers. KRISP improves overall throughput by 2x when compared with an isolated inference (1.22x vs prior works) and reduce energy per inference by 33%.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 推理工作负载所面临的挑战与 ML 训练工作负载截然不同。通常，推理工作负载的运行时间较短且 GPU 资源利用率不足。为了克服这个问题，有人提出将模型的多个实例放在一起来提高 GPU 的利用率。共置模型通过 GPU 空间分区工具共享 GPU，例如 Nvidia 的 MPS、MIG 或 AMD 的 CU Masking API。现有的空间分区推理服务器通过基于模型对限制资源的延迟容忍度“调整大小”来创建模型分区。我们表明，由于推理过程中各个内核的资源限制容忍度不同，模型明智的大小调整并未得到充分利用。我们提出了空间分区 GPU 推理服务器 (KRISP) 的内核大小调整，以实现在单个内核的粒度上对空间分区进行内核大小调整。我们证明，与现有的空间分区推理服务器相比，KRISP 可以支持更高级别的并发运行推理模型。与孤立推理相比，KRISP 将整体吞吐量提高了 2 倍（与之前的工作相比为 1.22 倍），并将每次推理的能耗降低了 33%。

papers.title: Leveraging Domain Information for the Efficient Automated Design of Deep Learning Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Deep learning accelerators are important tools for feeding the growing demand for deep learning applications. The automated design of such accelerators—which is important for reducing development costs—can be viewed as a search over a vast and complex design space that consists of all possible accelerators and all the possible software that could run on them. Unfortunately, this search is complicated by the existence of many ordinal and categorical values, which are critical to explore for the ultimate design but are not handled well by existing search techniques.This paper presents a technique for efficiently searching this space by injecting domain information—in this case information about hardware/software (HW/SW) co-design—into the automated search process. Specifically, this paper introduces a novel Bayesian optimization framework called daBO (domain-aware BO) that accepts domain information as input, including those describing ordinal and categorical values.This paper also introduces Spotlight, a design tool based on daBO, and this paper empirically shows that Spotlight produces accelerator designs and software schedules that are orders of magnitude better than those created by the state-of-the-art. For example, for the ResNet-50 deep learning model, Spotlight produces a HW/SW configuration that reduces delay by 135× over the configuration produced by ConfuciuX, a state-of-the-art HW/SW co-design tool, and Spotlight reduces energy-delay product (EDP) by 44× over an Eyeriss-like accelerator, which is an edge-scale hand-designed accelerator. In the realm of cloud-scale accelerators, Spotlight reduces the EDP of a scaled-up Eyeriss-like accelerator by 23×. Our evaluation shows that Spotlight benefits from the efficiency of daBO, which allows Spotlight to identify accelerator designs and software schedules that prior work cannot identify.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习加速器是满足深度学习应用不断增长的需求的重要工具。此类加速器的自动化设计对于降低开发成本非常重要，可以被视为对庞大而复杂的设计空间的搜索，该空间由所有可能的加速器以及可以在其上运行的所有可能的软件组成。不幸的是，这种搜索由于存在许多序数和分类值而变得复杂，这些值对于探索最终设计至关重要，但现有的搜索技术无法很好地处理。本文提出了一种通过将域信息（在本例中为有关硬件/软件 (HW/SW) 协同设计的信息）注入自动搜索过程来有效搜索该空间的技术。具体来说，本文介绍了一种名为 daBO（领域感知 BO）的新型贝叶斯优化框架，该框架接受领域信息作为输入，包括描述序数值和分类值的信息。本文还介绍了基于 daBO 的设计工具 Spotlight，本文根据经验表明，Spotlight 生成的加速器设计和软件调度比最先进的加速器设计和软件调度要好几个数量级。例如，对于 ResNet-50 深度学习模型，Spotlight 生成的硬件/软件配置比最先进的硬件/软件协同设计工具 ConfuciuX 生成的配置减少了 135 倍的延迟，并且与类似 Eyeriss 的加速器（一种边缘规模手工设计的加速器）相比，Spotlight 将能量延迟积 (EDP) 减少了 44 倍。在云规模加速器领域，Spotlight 将扩大的类似 Eyeriss 的加速器的 EDP 降低了 23 倍。我们的评估表明，Spotlight 受益于 daBO 的效率，这使得 Spotlight 能够识别先前工作无法识别的加速器设计和软件时间表。

papers.title: LightTrader: A Standalone High-Frequency Trading System with Deep Learning Inference Accelerators and Proactive Scheduler.
papers.abstract: Recent research shows that artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms can dramatically improve the profitability of high-frequency trading (HFT) with accurate market prediction, overcoming the limitation of conventional latency-oriented approaches. However, it is challenging to integrate the computationally intensive AI algorithm into the existing trading pipeline due to its excessively long latency and insufficient throughput, necessitating a breakthrough in hardware. Furthermore, harsh HFT environments such as bursty data traffic and stringent power constraint make it even more difficult to achieve system-level performance without missing crucial market signals.In this paper, we present LightTrader, the world’s first AI-enabled HFT system that incorporates an FPGA and custom AI accelerators for short-latency-high-throughput trading systems. Leveraging the computing power of brand-new AI accelerators fabricated in TSMC’s 7nm FinFET technology, LightTrader optimizes the tick-to-trade latency and response rate for stock market data. The AI accelerators, adopting Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array (CGRA) architecture, which maximizes the hardware utilization from the flexible dataflow architecture, achieve a throughput of 16 TFLOPS and 64 TOPS. In addition, we propose both workload scheduling and dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) scheduling algorithms to find an optimal offloading strategy under bursty market data traffic and limited power condition. Finally, we build a reliable and rerunnable simulation framework that can back-test the historical market data, such as Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME), to evaluate the LightTrader system. We thoroughly explore the performance of LightTrader when the number of AI accelerators, power conditions, and complexity of deep neural network models change. As a result, LightTrader achieves 13.92× and 7.28× speed-up of AI algorithm processing compared to existing GPU-based, FPGA-based systems, respectively. LightTrader with multiple AI accelerators achieves up to 99.5% response rates, while LightTrader with the proposed workload scheduling and DVFS scheduling algorithm relieves the miss rate from 17.1% to 23.1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，人工智能（AI）算法可以通过准确的市场预测显着提高高频交易（HFT）的盈利能力，克服传统的以延迟为导向的方法的局限性。然而，由于计算密集型人工智能算法的延迟过长和吞吐量不足，将计算密集型人工智能算法集成到现有的交易管道中具有挑战性，需要在硬件上进行突破。此外，突发数据流量和严格的功耗限制等恶劣的高频交易环境使得在不丢失关键市场信号的情况下实现系统级性能变得更加困难。在本文中，我们提出了 LightTrader，这是世界上第一个支持人工智能的高频交易系统，它结合了 FPGA 和定制人工智能加速器，用于短延迟高吞吐量的交易系统。利用台积电 7nm FinFET 技术制造的全新人工智能加速器的计算能力，LightTrader 优化了股票市场数据的交易延迟和响应率。 AI加速器采用粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）架构，最大限度地提高灵活数据流架构的硬件利用率，实现16 TFLOPS和64 TOPS的吞吐量。此外，我们提出了工作负载调度和动态电压和频率缩放（DVFS）调度算法，以在突发市场数据流量和有限功率条件下找到最佳卸载策略。最后，我们构建了一个可靠且可重复运行的模拟框架，可以回测历史市场数据，例如芝加哥商品交易所（CME），以评估 LightTrader 系统。我们深入探讨了当 AI 加速器的数量、功耗条件和深度神经网络模型的复杂性发生变化时 LightTrader 的性能。因此，与现有基于 GPU 和 FPGA 的系统相比，LightTrader 的 AI 算法处理速度分别提高了 13.92 倍和 7.28 倍。具有多个 AI 加速器的 LightTrader 实现了高达 99.5% 的响应率，而采用所提出的工作负载调度和 DVFS 调度算法的 LightTrader 将失误率从 17.1% 降低到 23.1%。

papers.title: Logical/Physical Topology-Aware Collective Communication in Deep Learning Training.
papers.abstract: Training is an important aspect of deep learning to enable network models to be deployed. To scale training, multiple GPUs are commonly used with data parallelism to exploit the additional GPU compute and memory capacity. However, one challenge in scalability is the collective communication between GPUs. In this work, we propose to accelerate the AllReduce collective. AllReduce communication is often based on a logical topology (e.g., ring or tree algorithms) that is mapped to a physical topology or the physical connectivity between the nodes. In this work, we propose a logical/physical topology-aware collective communication that we refer to as C-Cube architecture – Chaining Collective Communication with Computation. C-Cube exploits the opportunity to overlap or chain different phases of collective communication as well as forward computation in a tree algorithm AllReduce. We exploit the communication pattern in a logical tree topology to overlap the different phases of communication. Since ordering is maintained in the tree collective algorithm, we propose gradient queuing to enable chaining of communication with forward computation to accelerate overall performance while having no impact on training accuracy. We also exploit the physical topology characteristics to further improve the performance, including proposing detour connections for collective communication while leveraging the additional connectivity to enable a double-tree C-Cube implementation. We implement a C-Cube proof-of-concept on a real system (8-GPU NVIDIA DGX-1) and show C-Cube results in performance improvement in communication performance compared to non-overlapped tree algorithms as well as overall performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 训练是深度学习的一个重要方面，可以部署网络模型。为了扩展训练，通常将多个 GPU 与数据并行结合使用，以利用额外的 GPU 计算和内存容量。然而，可扩展性方面的一大挑战是 GPU 之间的集体通信。在这项工作中，我们建议加速 AllReduce 集体。 AllReduce 通信通常基于映射到物理拓扑或节点之间的物理连接的逻辑拓扑（例如环或树算法）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种逻辑/物理拓扑感知的集体通信，我们将其称为 C-Cube 架构——将集体通信与计算链接起来。 C-Cube 利用重叠或链接集体通信的不同阶段以及树算法 AllReduce 中的前向计算的机会。我们利用逻辑树拓扑中的通信模式来重叠通信的不同阶段。由于排序是在树集体算法中维护的，因此我们提出梯度排队，以实现与前向计算的通信链接，从而加速整体性能，同时不影响训练准确性。我们还利用物理拓扑特征来进一步提高性能，包括建议集体通信的绕行连接，同时利用额外的连接来实现双树 C-Cube 实现。我们在真实系统（8-GPU NVIDIA DGX-1）上实施了 C-Cube 概念验证，并展示了与非重叠树算法相比，C-Cube 在通信性能以及整体性能方面的性能改进。

papers.title: Market Mechanism-Based User-in-the-Loop Scalable Power Oversubscription for HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: Significant power consumption is one of the major challenges for current and future high-performance computing (HPC) systems. All the while, HPC systems generally remain power underutilized, making them a great candidate for applying power oversubscription to reclaim unused capacity. However, an oversubscribed HPC system may occasionally get overloaded. In this paper, we propose MPR (Market-based Power Reduction), a scalable market-based approach where users actively participate in reducing the HPC system’s power consumption to mitigate overloads. In MPR, HPC users bid to supply, in exchange for incentives, the resource reduction required for handling the overloads. Using several real-world trace-based simulations, we extensively evaluate MPR and show that, by participating in MPR, users always receive more rewards than the cost of performance loss. At the same time, the HPC manager enjoys orders of magnitude more resource gain than her incentive payoff to the users. We also demonstrate the real-world effectiveness of MPR on a prototype system.
papers.abstract_zh: 巨大的功耗是当前和未来高性能计算 (HPC) 系统面临的主要挑战之一。一直以来，HPC 系统通常都保持着电力未充分利用的状态，这使得它们成为应用电力超额认购来回收未使用容量的绝佳选择。然而，超额订阅的 HPC 系统有时可能会过载。在本文中，我们提出了 MPR（基于市场的功耗降低），这是一种可扩展的基于市场的方法，用户可以积极参与降低 HPC 系统的功耗以减轻过载。在 MPR 中，HPC 用户竞标提供处理过载所需的资源减少量，以换取激励。使用几个基于现实世界跟踪的模拟，我们广泛评估了 MPR 并表明，通过参与 MPR，用户总是获得比性能损失成本更多的奖励。与此同时，HPC 经理所获得的资源收益比她给用户的激励回报高出几个数量级。我们还在原型系统上展示了 MPR 的实际有效性。

papers.title: Memory-Efficient Hashed Page Tables.
papers.abstract: Conventional radix-tree page tables have scalability challenges, as address translation following a TLB miss potentially requires multiple memory accesses in sequence. An alternative is hashed page tables (HPTs) where, conceptually, address translation needs only one memory access. Traditionally, HPTs have been shunned due to high costs of handling conflicts and other limitations. However, recent advances have made HPTs compelling. Still, a major issue in HPT designs is their requirement for substantial contiguous physical memory.This paper addresses this problem. To minimize HPTs’ contiguous memory needs, it introduces the Logical to Physical (L2P) Table and the use of Dynamically-Changing Chunk Sizes. These techniques break down the HPT into discontiguous physical-memory chunks. In addition, the paper also introduces two techniques that minimize HPTs’ total memory needs and, indirectly, reduce the memory contiguity requirements. These techniques are In-place Page Table Resizing and Per-way Resizing. We call our complete design Memory-Efficient HPTs (ME-HPTs). Compared to state-of-the-art HPTs, ME-HPTs: (i) reduce the contiguous memory allocation needs by 92% on average, and (ii) improve the performance by 8.9% on average. For the two most demanding workloads, the contiguous memory requirements decrease from 64MB to 1MB. In addition, compared to state-of-the-art radix-tree page tables, ME-HPTs achieve an average speedup of 1.23× (without huge pages) and 1.28× (with huge pages).
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的基数树页表存在可扩展性挑战，因为 TLB 未命中后的地址转换可能需要按顺序进行多次内存访问。另一种选择是散列页表 (HPT)，从概念上讲，地址转换只需要一次内存访问。传统上，由于处理冲突的成本高昂和其他限制，HPT 一直被回避。然而，最近的进展使得 HPT 引人注目。尽管如此，HPT 设计中的一个主要问题是它们需要大量连续的物理内存。本文解决了这个问题。为了最大限度地减少 HPT 的连续内存需求，它引入了逻辑到物理 (L2P) 表以及动态更改块大小的使用。这些技术将 HPT 分解为不连续的物理内存块。此外，本文还介绍了两种技术，可以最大限度地减少 HPT 的总内存需求，并间接降低内存连续性要求。这些技术是就地页表大小调整和每路大小调整。我们将我们的完整设计称为内存高效 HPT (ME-HPT)。与最先进的 HPT 相比，ME-HPT：(i) 连续内存分配需求平均减少 92%，(ii) 性能平均提高 8.9%。对于两个要求最高的工作负载，连续内存要求从 64MB 减少到 1MB。此外，与最先进的基数树页表相比，ME-HPT 的平均加速比为 1.23 倍（无大页）和 1.28 倍（有大页）。

papers.title: MERCURY: Accelerating DNN Training By Exploiting Input Similarity.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are computationally intensive to train. It consists of a large number of multidimensional dot products between many weights and input vectors. However, there can be significant similarities among input vectors. If one input vector is similar to another, its computations with the weights are similar to those of the other and, therefore, can be skipped by reusing the already-computed results. We propose a novel scheme, called MERCURY, to exploit input similarity during DNN training in a hardware accelerator. MERCURY uses Random Projection with Quantization (RPQ) to convert an input vector to a bit sequence, called Signature. A cache (MCACHE) stores signatures of recent input vectors along with the computed results. If the Signature of a new input vector matches that of an already existing vector in the MCACHE, the two vectors are found to have similarities. Therefore, the already-computed result is reused for the new vector. To the best of our knowledge, MERCURY is the first work that exploits input similarity using RPQ for accelerating DNN training in hardware. The paper presents a detailed design, workflow, and implementation of the MERCURY. Our experimental evaluation with twelve different deep learning models shows that MERCURY saves a significant number of computations and speeds up the model training by an average of 1.97× with an accuracy similar to the baseline system.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的训练计算量很大。它由许多权重和输入向量之间的大量多维点积组成。然而，输入向量之间可能存在显着的相似性。如果一个输入向量与另一个输入向量相似，则其权重计算与另一个输入向量的计算相似，因此可以通过重用已计算的结果来跳过。我们提出了一种名为 MERCURY 的新颖方案，用于在硬件加速器中的 DNN 训练期间利用输入相似性。 MERCURY 使用量化随机投影 (RPQ) 将输入向量转换为位序列，称为签名。缓存 (MCACHE) 存储最近输入向量的签名以及计算结果。如果新输入向量的签名与 MCACHE 中现有向量的签名匹配，则发现这两个向量具有相似性。因此，已经计算的结果被重新用于新向量。据我们所知，MERCURY 是第一个使用 RPQ 来利用输入相似性来加速硬件中的 DNN 训练的工作。本文介绍了 MERCURY 的详细设计、工作流程和实现。我们对 12 种不同深度学习模型的实验评估表明，MERCURY 节省了大量计算量，并将模型训练速度平均提高了 1.97 倍，准确率与基线系统相似。

papers.title: MGC: Multiple-Gray-Code for 3D NAND Flash based High-Density SSDs.
papers.abstract: QLC (4-bit-per-cell) and more-bit-per-cell 3D NAND flash memories are increasingly adopted in large storage systems. While achieving significant cost reduction, these memories face degraded performance and reliability issues. The industry has adopted two-step programming (TSP), rather than one-step programming, to perform fine-granularity program control and choose gray-code encoding, as well as LDPC (Low-Density Parity-Check Code) for error correction. Different flash manufacturers often integrate different gray-codes in their products, which exhibit different performance and reliability characteristics. Unfortunately, a fixed gray-code encoding design lacks the ability to meet the dynamic read and program performance requirements at both application and device levels.In this paper, we propose MGC, a multiple-gray-code encoding strategy, that adaptively chooses the best gray-code to meet the optimization goals at runtime. In particular, MGC first extracts the performance and reliability requirements based on application-level access patterns and detects the reliability degree of SSD. It then determines the appropriate gray-code to encode the data, either from host/user application or due to garbage collection, before writing the pages to the flash memory. MGC is integrated in FTL (flash translation layer) and enhances the flash controller to enable runtime gray-code arbitration. We evaluate the proposed MGC scheme. The results show that MGC achieves better performance and lifetime guarantee compared with state-of-the-arts and introduces little overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: QLC（每单元 4 位）和每单元更多位 3D NAND 闪存越来越多地在大型存储系统中采用。在显着降低成本的同时，这些存储器面临着性能和可靠性下降的问题。业界已采用两步编程（TSP）而非一步编程来进行细粒度的程序控制，并选择格雷码编码以及LDPC（低密度奇偶校验码）进行纠错。不同的闪存制造商通常在其产品中集成不同的格雷码，从而表现出不同的性能和可靠性特征。不幸的是，固定格雷码编码设计缺乏满足应用程序和设备级别的动态读取和程序性能要求的能力。在本文中，我们提出了MGC，一种多格雷码编码策略，它自适应地选择最佳格雷码来满足运行时的优化目标。具体来说，MGC首先根据应用级访问模式提取性能和可靠性需求，并检测SSD的可靠性程度。然后，在将页面写入闪存之前，它会确定适当的格雷码来对来自主机/用户应用程序或由于垃圾收集的数据进行编码。 MGC 集成在 FTL（闪存翻译层）中，并增强闪存控制器以启用运行时格雷码仲裁。我们评估了所提出的 MGC 方案。结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，MGC 实现了更好的性能和生命周期保证，并且引入的开销很小。

papers.title: Mitigating GPU Core Partitioning Performance Effects.
papers.abstract: Modern GPU Streaming Multiprocessors (SMs) have several warp schedulers, execution units, and register file banks. To reduce area and energy-consumption, recent generations divide SMs into sub-cores. Each sub-core contains a distinct warp scheduler, register file, and execution units, sharing L1 memory and scratchpad resources with sub-cores in the same SM. Although partitioning the SM into sub-cores decreases the area and energy demands of larger SMs, it comes at a performance cost. Warps assigned to the SM have access to a fraction of the SM’s resources, resulting in contention and imbalance issues. In this paper, we examine the effect SM sub-division has on performance and propose novel mechanisms to mitigate the negative impacts. We identify four orthogonal effects caused by sub-dividing SMs and demonstrate that two of these effects have a significant impact on performance in practice. Based on these findings, we propose register-bank-aware warp scheduling to avoid bank conflicts that arise when instruction operands are placed in the limited number of register file banks available to each sub-core, and randomly hashed sub-core assignment to mitigate imbalance issues. Our intelligent scheduling mechanisms result in an average 11.2% speedup across a diverse set of applications capturing 81% of the performance lost to SM sub-division.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 GPU 流多处理器 (SM) 具有多个 warp 调度程序、执行单元和寄存器文件库。为了减少面积和能源消耗，最近几代将 SM 划分为子核心。每个子核都包含不同的warp调度程序、寄存器文件和执行单元，与同一SM中的子核共享L1内存和暂存器资源。尽管将 SM 划分为子核可以减少较大 SM 的面积和能量需求，但它会降低性能。分配给 SM 的 Warps 可以访问 SM 的一小部分资源，从而导致争用和不平衡问题。在本文中，我们研究了 SM 细分对性能的影响，并提出了减轻负面影响的新机制。我们确定了细分 SM 引起的四种正交效应，并证明其中两种效应对实践中的性能具有重大影响。基于这些发现，我们提出寄存器组感知扭曲调度，以避免当指令操作数放置在每个子核可用的有限数量的寄存器文件组中时出现的组冲突，并提出随机散列子核分配以减轻不平衡问题。我们的智能调度机制使各种应用程序平均加速 11.2%，捕获了 SM 细分性能损失的 81%。

papers.title: Mix-GEMM: An efficient HW-SW Architecture for Mixed-Precision Quantized Deep Neural Networks Inference on Edge Devices.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference based on quantized narrow-precision integer data represents a promising research direction toward efficient deep learning computations on edge and mobile devices. On one side, recent progress of Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) frameworks aimed at improving the accuracy of extremely quantized DNNs allows achieving results close to Floating-Point 32 (FP32), and provides high flexibility concerning the data sizes selection. Unfortunately, current Central Processing Unit (CPU) architectures and Instruction Set Architectures (ISAs) targeting resource-constrained devices present limitations on the range of data sizes supported to compute DNN kernels.This paper presents Mix-GEMM, a hardware-software co-designed architecture capable of efficiently computing quantized DNN convolutional kernels based on byte and sub-byte data sizes. Mix-GEMM accelerates General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM), representing the core kernel of DNNs, supporting all data size combinations from 8- to 2-bit, including mixed-precision computations, and featuring performance that scale with the decreasing of the computational data sizes. Our experimental evaluation, performed on representative quantized Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), shows that a RISC-V based edge System-on-Chip (SoC) integrating Mix-GEMM achieves up to 1.3 TOPS/W in energy efficiency, and up to 13.6 GOPS in throughput, gaining from 5.3× to 15.1× in performance over the OpenBLAS GEMM frameworks running on a commercial RISC-V based edge processor. By performing synthesis and Place and Route (PnR) of the enhanced SoC in Global Foundries 22nm FDX technology, we show that Mix-GEMM only accounts for 1% of the overall area consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于量化窄精度整数数据的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理代表了在边缘和移动设备上进行高效深度学习计算的一个有前景的研究方向。一方面，量化感知训练 (QAT) 框架的最新进展旨在提高极度量化的 DNN 的准确性，可以实现接近浮点 32 (FP32) 的结果，并在数据大小选择方面提供高度灵活性。不幸的是，当前针对资源受限设备的中央处理单元 (CPU) 架构和指令集架构 (ISA) 对计算 DNN 内核所支持的数据大小范围存在限制。本文提出了 Mix-GEMM，这是一种软硬件协同设计的架构，能够根据字节和子字节数据大小高效计算量化的 DNN 卷积内核。 Mix-GEMM 可加速通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM)，代表 DNN 的核心内核，支持从 8 位到 2 位的所有数据大小组合，包括混合精度计算，并具有随着计算数据大小的减小而扩展的性能。我们在代表性量化卷积神经网络 (CNN) 上进行的实验评估表明，集成 Mix-GEMM 的基于 RISC-V 的边缘片上系统 (SoC) 可实现高达 1.3 TOPS/W 的能效和高达 13.6 GOPS 的吞吐量，与运行在基于商用 RISC-V 的边缘处理器上的 OpenBLAS GEMM 框架相比，性能提高了 5.3 倍至 15.1 倍。通过对 Global Foundries 22nm FDX 技术中的增强型 SoC 进行综合和布局布线 (PnR)，我们发现 Mix-GEMM 仅占总面积消耗的 1%。

papers.title: MoCA: Memory-Centric, Adaptive Execution for Multi-Tenant Deep Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Driven by the wide adoption of deep neural networks (DNNs) across different application domains, multi-tenancy execution, where multiple DNNs are deployed simultaneously on the same hardware, has been proposed to satisfy the latency requirements of different applications while improving the overall system utilization. However, multi-tenancy execution could lead to undesired system-level resource contention, causing quality-of-service (QoS) degradation for latency-critical applications.To address this challenge, we propose MoCA<sup>1</sup>, an adaptive multi-tenancy system for DNN accelerators. Unlike existing solutions that focus on compute resource partition, MoCA dynamically manages shared memory resources of co-located applications to meet their QoS targets. Specifically, MoCA leverages the regularities in both DNN operators and accelerators to dynamically modulate memory access rates based on their latency targets and user-defined priorities so that co-located applications get the resources they demand without significantly starving their co-runners. We demonstrate that MoCA improves the satisfaction rate of the service level agreement (SLA) up to 3.9× (1.8× average), system throughput by 2.3× (1.7× average), and fairness by 1.3× (1.2× average), compared to prior work.
papers.abstract_zh: 在不同应用领域广泛采用深度神经网络（DNN）的推动下，多租户执行（即在同一硬件上同时部署多个 DNN）被提出，以满足不同应用程序的延迟要求，同时提高整体系统利用率。然而，多租户执行可能会导致不必要的系统级资源争用，从而导致延迟关键型应用程序的服务质量 (QoS) 下降。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 MoCA<sup>1</sup>，这是一种用于 DNN 加速器的自适应多租户系统。与专注于计算资源分区的现有解决方案不同，MoCA 动态管理共置应用程序的共享内存资源，以满足其 QoS 目标。具体来说，MoCA 利用 DNN 运算符和加速器中的规律，根据延迟目标和用户定义的优先级动态调整内存访问速率，以便协同定位的应用程序获得所需的资源，而不会严重影响其协同运行者的资源。我们证明，与之前的工作相比，MoCA 将服务水平协议 (SLA) 的满意度提高了 3.9 倍（平均 1.8 倍），系统吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍（平均 1.7 倍），公平性提高了 1.3 倍（平均 1.2 倍）。

papers.title: MPress: Democratizing Billion-Scale Model Training on Multi-GPU Servers via Memory-Saving Inter-Operator Parallelism.
papers.abstract: It remains challenging to train billion-scale DNN models on a single modern multi-GPU server due to the GPU memory wall. Unfortunately, existing memory-saving techniques such as GPU-CPU swap, recomputation, and ZeRO-Series come at the price of extra computation, communication overhead, or limited memory reduction.We present MPress, a new single-server multi-GPU system that breaks the GPU memory wall of billion-scale model training while minimizing extra cost. MPress first discusses the trade-offs of various memory-saving techniques and offers a holistic solution, which alternatively chooses the inter-operator parallelism with low cross-GPU communication traffics, and combines with recomputation and swap, to balance training performance and sustained model sizes. Additionally, MPress employs a novel, fast D2D swap technique, which simultaneously utilizes multiple high-bandwidth NVLink to swap tensors to light-load GPUs, based on a key observation that inter-operator parallel training may result in imbalanced GPU memory utilization and spare memory space from least used devices plus the high-end interconnects among them have the opportunity to support low-overhead swapping. Finally, we integrate MPress with PipeDream and DAPPLE, two representative inter-operator parallel training systems. Experimental results with two popular DNN models, Bert, and GPT, on two modern GPU servers from the DGX-1 and DGX-2 generation, equipped with 8 V100 or A100 cards, respectively, demonstrate that MPress significantly improves the training throughput over ZeRO-Series with the identical memory reduction, while being able to train larger models than the recomputation baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 GPU 内存墙的原因，在单个现代多 GPU 服务器上训练数十亿规模的 DNN 模型仍然具有挑战性。不幸的是，现有的内存节省技术（例如 GPU-CPU 交换、重新计算和 ZeRO 系列）是以额外计算、通信开销或有限内存减少为代价的。我们推出了 MPress，这是一种新的单服务器多 GPU 系统，它打破了十亿级模型训练的 GPU 内存墙，同时最大限度地减少了额外成本。 MPress 首先讨论了各种节省内存技术的权衡，并提供了一个整体解决方案，即选择具有低跨 GPU 通信流量的操作间并行性，并结合重新计算和交换，以平衡训练性能和持续模型大小。此外，MPress 采用了一种新颖、快速的 D2D 交换技术，该技术同时利用多个高带宽 NVLink 将张量交换到轻负载 GPU，基于一个关键观察结果，即操作员间并行训练可能会导致 GPU 内存利用率不平衡，并且来自最少使用的设备的备用内存空间加上它们之间的高端互连有机会支持低开销交换。最后，我们将 MPress 与 PipeDream 和 DAPPLE 这两个代表性的操作员间并行训练系统集成。在 DGX-1 和 DGX-2 代的两台现代 GPU 服务器（分别配备 8 个 V100 或 A100 卡）上使用两种流行的 DNN 模型 Bert 和 GPT 进行的实验结果表明，在相同的内存减少量下，MPress 显着提高了 ZeRO 系列的训练吞吐量，同时能够训练比重新计算基线更大的模型。

papers.title: Multi-Granularity Shadow Paging with NVM Write Optimization for Crash-Consistent Memory-Mapped I/O.
papers.abstract: The complex software stack has become the performance bottleneck of the system with high-speed Non-Volatile Memory (NVM). Memory-mapped I/O (MMIO) could avoid the long-stack overhead by bypassing the kernel, but the performance is limited by existing crash-resilient mechanisms. We propose a Multi-Granularity Shadow Paging (MGSP) strategy, which smartly utilizes the redo and undo logs as shadow logs to provide a light-weight crash-resilient mechanism for MMIO. In addition, a multi-granularity strategy is designed to provide high-performance updating and locking for reducing runtime overhead, where strong consistency is preserved with a lockfree metadata log. Experimental results show that the proposed MGSP achieves 1.1 ~ 4.21× performance improvement with write and 2.56 ~ 3.76× improvement with multi-threads write compared with the underlying file system. For SQLite, MGSP can improve the database performance by 29.4% for Mobibench and 36.5% for TPCC, on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 复杂的软件堆栈已成为高速非易失性存储器（NVM）系统的性能瓶颈。内存映射 I/O (MMIO) 可以通过绕过内核来避免长堆栈开销，但性能受到现有崩溃恢复机制的限制。我们提出了一种多粒度影子分页（MGSP）策略，它巧妙地利用重做和撤消日志作为影子日志，为 MMIO 提供轻量级的崩溃弹性机制。此外，多粒度策略旨在提供高性能更新和锁定，以减少运行时开销，其中通过无锁元数据日志保持强一致性。实验结果表明，与底层文件系统相比，所提出的MGSP在写入方面实现了1.1~4.21倍的性能提升，在多线程写入方面实现了2.56~3.76倍的性能提升。对于 SQLite，MGSP 可以将 Mobibench 的数据库性能平均提高 29.4%，将 TPCC 的数据库性能平均提高 36.5%。

papers.title: NOMAD: Enabling Non-blocking OS-managed DRAM Cache via Tag-Data Decoupling.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a DRAM cache architecture that provides near-ideal access time and non-blocking miss handling. Previous DRAM cache (DC) designs are classified into two categories, HW-based and OS-managed schemes. Hardware-based designs implement non-blocking caches that can handle multiple DC misses using MSHRs, but they have drawbacks in metadata management since storing tags in on-package DRAM significantly increases the effective cycle time of DC accesses. In contrast, OS-managed schemes utilize PTEs for storing tags and caching them in TLBs, which can achieve ideal DC access time. However, they implement blocking caches that stall application threads on misses until cache fills are completed. To overcome the limitations of both HW-based and OS-managed schemes, this paper introduces a DRAM cache architecture named Non-blocking OS-managed DRAM cache (NOMAD). Unlike conventional caches that guarantee the presence of data on tag hits, NOMAD decouples tag and data management to enable non-blocking miss handling in an OS-managed DRAM cache. The front-end OS routines of NOMAD manage DC tags using PTEs and TLBs, and its back-end hardware handles data management in the DRAM cache. On a DC miss, the OS updates a tag, offloads a cache-fill command to the back-end, and immediately resumes an application thread without waiting for the cache fill to complete. Instead, the back-end hardware handles the cache fill without blocking the application thread. By decoupling tag and data management in NOMAD, a tag hit does not necessarily guarantee the presence of data in the DRAM cache. The back-end traces which DC lines are still in transfers and checks if the demanded part of a cache line has been transferred yet for every DC access. Notably, this back-end procedure does not require an OS intervention, thereby implementing a non-blocking DRAM cache. Experiment results show that NOMAD reduces application stall cycles by 76.1% and improves IPC by 16.7% over a state-of-the-art OS-managed scheme.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种 DRAM 缓存架构，该架构提供近乎理想的访问时间和非阻塞未命中处理。以前的 DRAM 缓存 (DC) 设计分为两类：基于硬件的方案和操作系统管理的方案。基于硬件的设计实现了非阻塞缓存，可以使用 MSHR 处理多个 DC 未命中，但它们在元数据管理方面存在缺陷，因为将标签存储在封装内 DRAM 中会显着增加 DC 访问的有效周期时间。 In contrast, OS-managed schemes utilize PTEs for storing tags and caching them in TLBs, which can achieve ideal DC access time.然而，它们实现了阻塞缓存，在未命中时停止应用程序线程，直到缓存填充完成。为了克服基于硬件和操作系统管理方案的局限性，本文引入了一种称为非阻塞操作系统管理 DRAM 缓存（NOMAD）的 DRAM 缓存架构。与保证标签命中时数据存在的传统缓存不同，NOMAD 将标签和数据管理解耦，以在操作系统管理的 DRAM 缓存中实现非阻塞未命中处理。 NOMAD 的前端操作系统例程使用 PTE 和 TLB 管理 DC 标签，其后端硬件处理 DRAM 缓存中的数据管理。当 DC 未命中时，操作系统会更新标签，将缓存填充命令卸载到后端，并立即恢复应用程序线程，而无需等待缓存填充完成。相反，后端硬件会在不阻塞应用程序线程的情况下处理缓存填充。通过在 NOMAD 中解耦标签和数据管理，标签命中并不一定保证 DRAM 缓存中存在数据。后端跟踪哪些 DC 线仍在传输中，并检查每次 DC 访问时缓存线的所需部分是否已传输。值得注意的是，该后端过程不需要操作系统干预，从而实现非阻塞 DRAM 缓存。实验结果表明，与最先进的操作系统管理方案相比，NOMAD 将应用程序停顿周期减少了 76.1%，并将 IPC 提高了 16.7%。

papers.title: NvWa: Enhancing Sequence Alignment Accelerator Throughput via Hardware Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Sequence alignment is the most time-consuming step in the genome analysis pipeline. Since sequence alignment generally follows the seed-and-extension paradigm, prior proposed hardware accelerators either opt to accelerate the seeding phase or the seed-extension phase. However, the diversity of each sequence in the alignment workflow leads to the pipeline stall or bubbles, which finally results in a decreased throughput for the end-to-end sequence alignment.In this paper, we propose NvWa, which is a hardware scheduling accelerator for sequence alignment. To solve the diversity problem, we propose three novel scheduling mechanisms and corresponding architecture, which target the seeding phase, the seed-extension phase, and the interaction between the two phases, respectively. For the seeding phase, we propose a Seeding Scheduler to schedule all idle seeding units in only one cycle. For the seed-extension phase, the Extension Scheduler can achieve both lower latency and higher parallelism when facing seed-extension tasks with different scales. Between the two phases, an efficient Coordinator caches and dispatches seeding hits to optimal and sub-optimal seed-extension units. Furthermore, to avoid algorithmic obsolescence for the new sequence technologies, we propose a loosely coupled design, which decouples the data path and the control scheduling path. Experimental results show that NvWa can achieve 493×, 200×, 12.11×, 2.30× speedup and 14.21×, 5.60×, 4.34×, 5.85× energy reduction when compared with a 16-thread CPU baseline, an NVIDIA A100 GPU, and two state-of-the-art accelerators, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 序列比对是基因组分析流程中最耗时的步骤。由于序列比对通常遵循种子和扩展范例，因此先前提出的硬件加速器要么选择加速种子阶段，要么选择加速种子扩展阶段。然而，对齐工作流程中每个序列的多样性会导致管道停顿或气泡，最终导致端到端序列对齐的吞吐量下降。在本文中，我们提出了NvWa，它是一种用于序列对齐的硬件调度加速器。为了解决多样性问题，我们提出了三种新颖的调度机制和相应的架构，分别针对种子阶段、种子扩展阶段以及两个阶段之间的交互。对于播种阶段，我们提出了一种播种调度程序，仅在一个周期内调度所有空闲的播种单元。对于种子扩展阶段，扩展调度器在面对不同规模的种子扩展任务时可以实现更低的延迟和更高的并行性。在这两个阶段之间，高效的协调器会缓存种子命中并将其分派给最佳和次优种子扩展单元。此外，为了避免新序列技术的算法过时，我们提出了一种松耦合的设计，它将数据路径和控制调度路径解耦。实验结果表明，与 16 线程 CPU 基准、NVIDIA A100 GPU 和两个最先进的加速器相比，NvWa 分别可以实现 493×、200×、12.11×、2.30× 的加速和 14.21×、5.60×、4.34×、5.85× 的能耗降低。

papers.title: On Consistency for Bulk-Bitwise Processing-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures allow software to explicitly initiate computation in the memory. This effectively makes PIM operations a new class of memory operations, alongside standard memory operations (e.g., load, store). For software correctness, it is crucial to have ordering rules for a PIM operation with other PIM operations and other memory operations, i.e., a consistency model that takes into account PIM operations is vital. To the best of our knowledge, little attention to PIM operation consistency has been given in existing works. In this paper, we focus on a specific PIM approach, named bulk-bitwise PIM. In bulk-bitwise PIM, large bitwise operations are performed directly and stored in the memory array. We show that previous solutions for the related topic of maintaining coherency of bulk-bitwise PIM have broken the host native consistency model and prevent any guaranteed correctness. As a solution, we propose and evaluate four consistency models for bulk-bitwise PIM, from strict to relaxed. Our designs also preserve coherency between PIM and the host processor. Evaluating the proposed designs’ performance with a gem5 simulation, using the YCSB short-range scan benchmark and TPC-H queries, shows that the run time overhead of guaranteeing correctness is at most 6%, and in many cases the run time is even improved. The hardware overhead of our design is less than 0.22%.
papers.abstract_zh: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures allow software to explicitly initiate computation in the memory. This effectively makes PIM operations a new class of memory operations, alongside standard memory operations (e.g., load, store).对于软件正确性来说，PIM 操作与其他 PIM 操作和其他内存操作的排序规则至关重要，即考虑 PIM 操作的一致性模型至关重要。 To the best of our knowledge, little attention to PIM operation consistency has been given in existing works. In this paper, we focus on a specific PIM approach, named bulk-bitwise PIM. In bulk-bitwise PIM, large bitwise operations are performed directly and stored in the memory array.我们表明，先前针对维护批量按位 PIM 一致性的相关主题的解决方案已经破坏了主机本机一致性模型并阻止了任何保证的正确性。 As a solution, we propose and evaluate four consistency models for bulk-bitwise PIM, from strict to relaxed. Our designs also preserve coherency between PIM and the host processor.使用 YCSB 短程扫描基准和 TPC-H 查询，通过 gem5 模拟评估所提出的设计的性能，结果表明保证正确性的运行时间开销最多为 6%，并且在许多情况下运行时间甚至得到了改善。 The hardware overhead of our design is less than 0.22%.

papers.title: OptimStore: In-Storage Optimization of Large Scale DNNs with On-Die Processing.
papers.abstract: Training deep neural network (DNN) models is a resource-intensive, iterative process. For this reason, nowadays, complex optimizers like Adam are widely adopted as it increases the speed and efficiency of training. These optimizers, however, employ additional variables and raise the memory demand 2× to 3× of model parameters, worsening the memory capacity bottleneck. Moreover, as the size of DNN models is projected to grow even further, it is not practical to assume that the future models will fit in accelerator memory. This has triggered various efforts to offload models to flash-based storage. However, when the model, especially the optimizer, is offloaded to flash, the limited I/O bandwidth severely slows down the overall training process. To this end, we present OptimStore, a solid-state drive (SSD) system with on-die processing (ODP) architectures for gradient descent-based machine learning models. OptimStore accelerates the training process of such large-scale models by processing model optimization in the storage device, specifically inside the flash dies. ODP capability of OptimStore eliminates the heavy data movement over external interconnect and internal flash channels. Overall, OptimStore achieves, on average, a 2.8× speedup and a 3.6× improved energy efficiency in the weight update stage over baseline SSD offloading.
papers.abstract_zh: 训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型是一个资源密集型的迭代过程。因此，如今像 Adam 这样的复杂优化器被广泛采用，因为它提高了训练的速度和效率。然而，这些优化器采用了额外的变量，并将模型参数的内存需求提高了 2 倍到 3 倍，从而加剧了内存容量瓶颈。此外，由于 DNN 模型的规模预计将进一步增长，假设未来的模型将适合加速器内存是不切实际的。这引发了各种将模型卸载到基于闪存的存储的努力。然而，当模型（尤其是优化器）被卸载到闪存时，有限的 I/O 带宽会严重减慢整个训练过程。为此，我们推出了 OptimStore，这是一种固态驱动器 (SSD) 系统，具有片上处理 (ODP) 架构，适用于基于梯度下降的机器学习模型。 OptimStore 通过在存储设备（特别是闪存芯片内部）中处理模型优化来加速此类大型模型的训练过程。 OptimStore 的 ODP 功能消除了外部互连和内部闪存通道上的大量数据移动。总体而言，与基准 SSD 卸载相比，OptimStore 在权重更新阶段平均实现了 2.8 倍的加速和 3.6 倍的能源效率提高。

papers.title: ParallelNN: A Parallel Octree-based Nearest Neighbor Search Accelerator for 3D Point Clouds.
papers.abstract: As Light Detection And Ranging (LiDAR) increasingly becomes an essential component in robotic navigation and autonomous driving, the processing of high throughput 3D point clouds in real time is widely required. This work considers the point cloud k-Nearest Neighbor (kNN) search, which is an important 3D processing kernel. Although applying fine-grained parallelism optimization on internal processing, e.g., using multiple workers, has demonstrated high efficiency, previous accelerators with DDR external memory are fundamentally limited by the external bandwidth bottleneck. To break this bottleneck, this work proposes a highly parallel architecture, namely ParallelNN, for highly efficient kNN search processing of high throughput point clouds. First, we optimize the multichannel cache based on High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) and on-chip memory to provide large external bandwidth. Then, a novel parallel depth-first octree construction algorithm is proposed and mapped onto multiple construction branches with trace-coded construction queues, which can regularize random accesses and perform multi-branch octree construction efficiently. Furthermore, in the search stage, we present algorithm-architecture co-optimization, including parallel keyframe-based scheduling and multi-branch flexible search engines, to provide conflict-free access and maximum reuse opportunities for reference points, which achieves more than 27.0× speedup compared with baseline architectures. We prototype ParallelNN on Virtex HBM FPGA and perform extensive benchmarking on the KITTI dataset. The results demonstrate that ParallelNN achieves up to 107.7× and 12.1× speedup over CPU and GPU implementations, while being more energy efficient, e.g., outperforming CPU and GPU implementations by 73.6× and 31.1×, respectively. Besides, with the proposed algorithm-architecture co-optimization, ParallelNN achieves 11.4× speedup over state-of-the-art architecture. Moreover, ParallelNN is configurable and can be easily generalized to similar octree-based applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 日益成为机器人导航和自动驾驶的重要组成部分，人们广泛需要实时处理高吞吐量的 3D 点云。这项工作考虑了点云 k 最近邻 (kNN) 搜索，这是一个重要的 3D 处理内核。尽管在内部处理上应用细粒度并行优化（例如使用多个工作线程）已经证明了高效率，但以前具有 DDR 外部存储器的加速器从根本上受到外部带宽瓶颈的限制。为了打破这个瓶颈，这项工作提出了一种高度并行的架构，即ParallelNN，用于高吞吐量点云的高效kNN搜索处理。首先，我们优化基于高带宽内存（HBM）和片上内存的多通道缓存，以提供大的外部带宽。然后，提出了一种新颖的并行深度优先八叉树构造算法，并将其映射到具有跟踪编码构造队列的多个构造分支上，该算法可以规范随机访问并有效地执行多分支八叉树构造。此外，在搜索阶段，我们提出了算法架构协同优化，包括基于并行关键帧的调度和多分支灵活搜索引擎，以提供无冲突访问和参考点的最大重用机会，与基线架构相比，实现了超过 27.0 倍的加速。我们在 Virtex HBM FPGA 上构建 ParallelNN 原型，并在 KITTI 数据集上执行广泛的基准测试。结果表明，ParallelNN 比 CPU 和 GPU 实现实现了高达 107.7 倍和 12.1 倍的加速，同时更加节能，例如，分别比 CPU 和 GPU 实现高出 73.6 倍和 31.1 倍。此外，通过所提出的算法架构协同优化，ParallelNN 比最先进的架构实现了 11.4 倍的加速。此外，ParallelNN 是可配置的，并且可以轻松推广到类似的基于八叉树的应用程序。

papers.title: Phloem: Automatic Acceleration of Irregular Applications with Fine-Grain Pipeline Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Irregular applications are increasingly common in diverse domains, like graph analytics and sparse linear algebra. Accelerating these applications is challenging because of their unpredictable data reuse and control flow. Recent work has proposed hardware support for fine-grain pipeline parallelism, hiding long latencies by decoupling irregular applications into pipeline stages. However, this prior work requires programmers to manually decouple applications. This tedious and error-prone process limits the usefulness of such architectural support.We address this problem with Phloem, a compiler that automatically discovers and exploits pipeline parallelism in irregular applications. Prior compilers for pipeline parallelism target regular applications, which contain simple pipeline stages with known latencies and fixed buffering needs. Designing Phloem to target irregular applications, where these properties do not hold, requires treating their unique challenges as first-class considerations throughout its design. Phloem breaks down this complex transformation into a series of simple passes that together encode the insights that have been previously applied by hand, producing code that targets architectures with support for queue-based communication.We evaluate Phloem by generating efficient pipelines on a variety of irregular applications. Phloem’s contributions improve performance by 1.7× on average, approaching (and sometimes exceeding) the performance of manually optimized pipeline-parallel code. These results show that, for the first time, automatic parallelization for irregular applications is not only feasible, but also profitable.
papers.abstract_zh: 不规则应用在不同领域中越来越常见，例如图分析和稀疏线性代数。由于数据重用和控制流程不可预测，加速这些应用程序具有挑战性。最近的工作提出了对细粒度管道并行性的硬件支持，通过将不规则应用程序解耦到管道阶段来隐藏长延迟。然而，这项先前的工作需要程序员手动解耦应用程序。这个繁琐且容易出错的过程限制了此类架构支持的实用性。我们使用 Phloem 来解决这个问题，Phloem 是一个编译器，可以自动发现和利用不规则应用程序中的管道并行性。先前的管道并行编译器针对常规应用程序，其中包含具有已知延迟和固定缓冲需求的简单管道阶段。设计韧皮部以针对不规则应用（这些特性不具备），需要在整个设计过程中将其独特的挑战作为首要考虑因素。韧皮部将这种复杂的转换分解为一系列简单的过程，这些简单的过程一起对之前手动应用的见解进行编码，生成针对支持基于队列的通信的架构的代码。我们通过在各种不规则应用程序上生成高效的管道来评估韧皮部。 Phloem 的贡献平均将性能提高了 1.7 倍，接近（有时甚至超过）手动优化的管道并行代码的性能。这些结果首次表明，不规则应用程序的自动并行化不仅是可行的，而且是有利可图的。

papers.title: PhotoFourier: A Photonic Joint Transform Correlator-Based Neural Network Accelerator.
papers.abstract: The last few years have seen a lot of work to address the challenge of low-latency and high-throughput convolutional neural network inference. Integrated photonics has the potential to dramatically accelerate neural networks because of its low-latency nature. Combined with the concept of Joint Transform Correlator (JTC), the computationally expensive convolution functions can be computed instantaneously (time of flight of light) with almost no cost. This ‘free’ convolution computation provides the theoretical basis of the proposed PhotoFourier JTC-based CNN accelerator. PhotoFourier addresses a myriad of challenges posed by on-chip photonic computing in the Fourier domain including 1D lenses and high-cost optoelectronic conversions. The proposed PhotoFourier accelerator achieves more than 28× better energy-delay product compared to state-of-art photonic neural network accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们为解决低延迟和高吞吐量卷积神经网络推理的挑战做了很多工作。由于其低延迟特性，集成光子学有可能显着加速神经网络。结合联合变换相关器（JTC）的概念，计算量大的卷积函数可以在几乎没有成本的情况下即时计算（光的飞行时间）。这种“免费”卷积计算为所提出的基于 PhotoFourier JTC 的 CNN 加速器提供了理论基础。 PhotoFourier 解决了傅里叶域中片上光子计算带来的众多挑战，包括一维透镜和高成本光电转换。与最先进的光子神经网络加速器相比，所提出的 PhotoFourier 加速器的能量延迟积提高了 28 倍以上。

papers.title: Plutus: Bandwidth-Efficient Memory Security for GPUs.
papers.abstract: Graphic-Processing Units (GPUs) are increasingly used in systems where security is a critical design requirement. Such systems include cloud computing, safety-critical systems, and edge devices, where sensitive data is processed or/and generated. Thus, the ability to reduce the attack surface while achieving high performance is of utmost importance. However, adding security features to GPUs comes at the expense of high-performance overheads due to the extra memory bandwidth required to handle security metadata. In particular, memory authentication metadata (e.g., authentication tags) along with encryption counters can lead to significant performance overheads due to the memory bandwidth used to fetch the metadata. Such metadata can lead to more than 200% extra bandwidth usage for irregular access patterns.In this work, we propose a novel design, Plutus, which enables low-overhead secure GPU memory. Plutus has three key ideas. The first is to leverage value locality to reduce authentication metadata. Our observation is that a large percentage of memory accesses could be verified without the need to bring the authentication tags. Specifically, through comparing decrypted blocks against known/verified values, we can with high confidence guarantee that no tampering occurred. Our analysis shows that the probability of the decryption of a tampered (and/or replayed) block leading to a known value is extremely low, in fact, lower than the collision probability in the most secure hash functions. Second, based on the observation that many GPU workloads have limited numbers of dirty block evictions, Plutus proposes a second layer of compact counters to reduce the memory traffic due to both the encryption counters and integrity tree. Third, by exploring the interesting tradeoff between the integrity tree organization vs. metadata fetch granularity, Plutus uses smaller block sizes for security metadata caches to optimize the number of security metadata memory requests. Based on our evaluation, Plutus can improve the GPU throughput by 16.86% (up to 58.38%) and reduce the memory bandwidth usage of secure memory by 48.14% (up to 80.30%).
papers.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 越来越多地用于安全性是关键设计要求的系统中。此类系统包括云计算、安全关键系统和边缘设备，在其中处理或/和生成敏感数据。因此，在实现高性能的同时减少攻击面的能力至关重要。然而，向 GPU 添加安全功能会以牺牲高性能开销为代价，因为处理安全元数据需要额外的内存带宽。特别是，由于用于获取元数据的内存带宽，内存认证元数据（例如，认证标签）以及加密计数器可能会导致显着的性能开销。对于不规则的访问模式，此类元数据可能会导致超过 200% 的额外带宽使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的设计 Plutus，它支持低开销的安全 GPU 内存。普利拓斯有三个关键想法。第一个是利用值局部性来减少身份验证元数据。我们的观察是，很大一部分内存访问可以在不需要携带身份验证标签的情况下得到验证。具体来说，通过将解密的块与已知/验证的值进行比较，我们可以高度可信地保证没有发生篡改。我们的分析表明，解密被篡改（和/或重放）的块得到已知值的概率极低，事实上，低于最安全的哈希函数中的冲突概率。其次，根据对许多 GPU 工作负载的脏块驱逐数量有限的观察，Plutus 提出了第二层紧凑计数器，以减少加密计数器和完整性树带来的内存流量。第三，通过探索完整性树组织与元数据获取粒度之间有趣的权衡，Plutus 使用较小的块大小进行安全元数据缓存，以优化安全元数据内存请求的数量。根据我们的评估，Plutus 可以将 GPU 吞吐量提高 16.86%（最高可达 58.38%），并将安全内存的内存带宽使用率降低 48.14%（最高可达 80.30%）。

papers.title: Poseidon: Practical Homomorphic Encryption Accelerator.
papers.abstract: With the development of the important solution for privacy computing, the explosion of data size and computing intensity in Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has brought enormous challenges to the hardware design. In this paper, we propose a practical FHE accelerator - "Poseidon", which focuses on improving the hardware resource and bandwidth consumption. Poseidon supports complex FHE operations like Bootstrapping, Keyswitch, Rotation and so on, under limited FPGA resources. It refines these operations by abstracting five key operators: Modular Addition (MA), Modular Multiplication (MM), Number Theoretic Transformation (NTT), Automorphsim and Shared Barret Reduction (SBT). These operators are combined and reused to implement higher-level FHE operations. To utilize the FPGA resources more efficiently and improve the parallelism, we adopt the radix-based NTT algorithm and propose HFAuto, an optimized automorphism implementation suitable for FPGA. Then, we design the hardware accelerator based on the optimized key operators and HBM to maximize computational efficiency. We evaluate Poseidon with four domain-specific FHE benchmarks on Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA. Empirical results show that the efficient reuse of the operator cores and on-chip storage enables superior performance compared with the state-of-the-art GPU, FPGA and accelerator ASICs. We highlight the following results: (1) up to 370× speedup over CPU for the basic operations of FHE; (2) up to 1300×/52× speedup over CPU and the FPGA solution for the key operators; (3) up to 10.6×/8.7× speedup over GPU and the ASIC solution for the FHE benchmark.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着隐私计算这一重要解决方案的发展，全同态加密（FHE）中数据规模和计算强度的爆炸性增长给硬件设计带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的FHE加速器——“Poseidon”，其重点是改善硬件资源和带宽消耗。 Poseidon 在有限的 FPGA 资源下支持复杂的 FHE 操作，如 Bootstrapping、Keyswitch、Rotation 等。它通过抽象五个关键运算符来细化这些操作：模加法 (MA)、模乘法 (MM)、数论变换 (NTT)、自同构和共享 Barret 约简 (SBT)。这些算子被组合并重用以实现更高级别的FHE操作。为了更有效地利用FPGA资源并提高并行性，我们采用基于基数的NTT算法并提出了HFAuto，一种适合FPGA的优化自同构实现。然后，我们基于优化的关键算子和HBM设计硬件加速器，以最大限度地提高计算效率。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 上使用四个特定领域的 FHE 基准测试来评估 Poseidon。实证结果表明，与最先进的 GPU、FPGA 和加速器 ASIC 相比，算子内核和片上存储的有效重用可实现卓越的性能。我们强调以下结果：（1）FHE 的基本操作比 CPU 加速高达 370 倍； (2) 比CPU和关键算子的FPGA解决方案加速高达1300×/52×； (3) 与 FHE 基准测试的 GPU 和 ASIC 解决方案相比，加速高达 10.6×/8.7×。

papers.title: Post0-VR: Enabling Universal Realistic Rendering for Modern VR via Exploiting Architectural Similarity and Data Sharing.
papers.abstract: To provide users with a fully immersive environment, VR post-processing, which adds numerous realistic effects on the frame after rendering, plays a key role in modern VR systems. Current post-processing is processed separately from normal rendering by the graphics processing unit (GPU). As a result, the GPU needs to first render a high-resolution frame and then add the post-processing effects within a very short time frame. Our in-depth experimental results on commercial VR products demonstrate that the post-processing in VR applications extends the VR frame time by approximately 2X on average. Furthermore, the ever-increasing resolution requirements of modern VR significantly increase the workloads for post-processing in the execution pipeline. This long delay causes VR real-time execution to frequently miss the critical frame-time deadline, thus hurting users’ quality of experience.Based on the analysis of VR post-processing workflow and its common realistic effects, we observe that post-processing shares the same hardware pipeline with normal rendering, and even reuses the intermediate data produced by normal rendering. To fully utilize this hardware-level similarity and capture the data locality, we propose a novel universal realistic rendering architecture for VR, named Post0-VR, which eliminates post-processing by directly merging the common realistic effects into the normal rendering process. Based on our newly proposed VR architecture design, we further propose a dynamic accuracy adjustment method to simplify the normal rendering without hurting users’ perception. The evaluation results on real-world applications demonstrate that Post0-VR can support different types of realistic effects while significantly improving the overall VR rendering performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了给用户提供完全沉浸式的环境，VR 后处理在渲染后的帧上添加大量逼真的效果，在现代 VR 系统中发挥着关键作用。当前的后处理是由图形处理单元（GPU）与正常渲染分开处理的。因此，GPU需要首先渲染高分辨率的帧，然后在很短的时间内添加后处理效果。我们对商业 VR 产品的深入实验结果表明，VR 应用中的后处理将 VR 帧时间平均延长了约 2 倍。此外，现代 VR 不断提高的分辨率要求显着增加了执行管道中后处理的工作负载。这种长时间的延迟导致VR实时执行经常错过关键的帧时间期限，从而损害用户的体验质量。通过对VR后处理工作流程及其常见现实效果的分析，我们观察到后处理与正常渲染共享相同的硬件管线，甚至重用正常渲染产生的中间数据。为了充分利用这种硬件级的相似性并捕获数据局部性，我们提出了一种新颖的 VR 通用逼真渲染架构，名为 Post0-VR，它通过直接将常见的逼真效果合并到正常渲染过程中来消除后处理。基于我们新提出的 VR 架构设计，我们进一步提出了一种动态精度调整方法，以简化正常渲染而不损害用户的感知。实际应用的评估结果表明，Post0-VR可以支持不同类型的逼真效果，同时显着提高整体VR渲染性能。

papers.title: Rambda: RDMA-driven Acceleration Framework for Memory-intensive µs-scale Datacenter Applications.
papers.abstract: Responding to the "datacenter tax" and "killer microseconds" problems for memory-intensive datacenter applications, diverse solutions including Smart NIC-based ones have been proposed. Nonetheless, they often suffer from high overhead of communications over network and/or PCIe links. To tackle the limitations of the current solutions, this paper proposes RAMBDA, a holistic network and architecture co-design solution that leverages current RDMA and emerging cache-coherent off-chip interconnect technologies. Specifically, RAMBDA consists of four hardware and software components: (1) unified abstraction of inter- and intra-machine communications synergistically managed by one-sided RDMA write and cache-coherent memory write; (2) efficient notification of requests to accelerators assisted by cache coherence; (3) cache-coherent accelerator architecture directly interacting with NIC; and (4) adaptive device-to-host data transfer for modern server memory systems comprising both DRAM and NVM exploiting state-of-the-art features in CPUs and PCIe. We prototype RAMBDA with a commercial system and evaluate three popular datacenter applications: (1) in-memory key-value store, (2) chain replication-based distributed transaction system, and (3) deep learning recommendation model inference. The evaluation shows that RAMBDA provides 30.1~69.1% lower latency, 0.2~2.5× throughput, and ~ 3× higher energy efficiency than the current state-of-the-art solutions, including Smart NIC. For those cases where Rambda performs poorly, we also envision future architecture to improve it.
papers.abstract_zh: 针对内存密集型数据中心应用的“数据中心税”和“杀手微秒”问题，人们提出了包括基于智能网卡的解决方案在内的多种解决方案。尽管如此，它们经常遭受网络和/或 PCIe 链路通信的高开销。为了解决当前解决方案的局限性，本文提出了 RAMBDA，这是一种整体网络和架构协同设计解决方案，利用当前的 RDMA 和新兴的缓存一致性片外互连技术。具体来说，RAMBDA由四个硬件和软件组件组成：（1）机器间和机器内通信的统一抽象，由单侧RDMA写入和缓存一致性内存写入协同管理； (2) 在缓存一致性的辅助下，向加速器有效通知请求； (3)直接与NIC交互的缓存一致性加速器架构； (4) 适用于现代服务器内存系统的自适应设备到主机数据传输，该系统包括 DRAM 和 NVM，利用 CPU 和 PCIe 中的最先进功能。我们使用商业系统对 RAMBDA 进行原型设计，并评估三种流行的数据中心应用程序：（1）内存中键值存储，（2）基于链复制的分布式事务系统，以及（3）深度学习推荐模型推理。评估表明，与当前最先进的解决方案（包括智能网卡）相比，RAMBDA 的延迟降低了 30.1~69.1%，吞吐量提高了 0.2~2.5 倍，能源效率提高了约 3 倍。对于那些 Rambda 表现不佳的情况，我们还设想未来的架构来改进它。

papers.title: Realizing Extreme Endurance Through Fault-aware Wear Leveling and Improved Tolerance.
papers.abstract: Phase-change memory (PCM) and resistive memory (RRAM) are promising alternatives to traditional memory technologies. However, both PCM and RRAM suffer from limited write endurance. Wear-leveling (WL) techniques are essential to extend the lifetime of these memories before experiencing endurance faults. Beyond the additional usage afforded by WL, row-sparing and focused error correction can extend the lifetime further after wear faults appear. Unfortunately, the need for extended WL techniques continues to become more pressing as scaling exacerbates process variation. Similarly, scaling causes challenges such as more severe noise and crosstalk to traditional DRAM.In this paper, we propose novel fault-aware WL schemes to allocate write frequencies according to the strength of the rows and handle the imbalance of writes in columns. We use runtime detection schemes to identify weak rows and protect them prior to wear out. In particular, row-level WL, aka RETROFIT, leverages the spare rows provided for redundancy to be used strategically to guard against early cell wear out. RETROFIT is compatible with error correction schemes that guarantee to mitigate hard faults and error-correcting codes (ECC). Rather than discard retired rows, when any spare row completely replaces a retired row, we retarget the retired row to assist with column sparing. It becomes a group of Page Protecting Pointers (PPPs), which utilizes otherwise discarded error correction potential to further enhance the leveling ability of RETROFIT. To relieve column-level imbalance, we apply idle error correction bits before they are used to reduce average bit flips. The evaluation demonstrates that RETROFIT and enhanced RETROFIT with the PPPs improve lifetime by as much as 0.64× and 5.4× in the average case, respectively, over state-of-the-art row-level method while also reducing area overhead. In the worst-case scenario, these improvements further increase to 2.6× and 16.0×. Combined with the proposed column-level WL, enhanced RETROFIT realizes an overall 1.5× memory lifetime improvement over the perfectly uniform wear-leveling with equal storage overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 相变存储器 (PCM) 和电阻存储器 (RRAM) 是传统存储器技术的有前途的替代品。然而，PCM 和 RRAM 的写入耐久性都有限。磨损均衡 (WL) 技术对于在出现耐久性故障之前延长这些存储器的使用寿命至关重要。除了 WL 提供的额外使用之外，行备用和集中纠错还可以在出现磨损故障后进一步延长使用寿命。不幸的是，随着尺寸缩小加剧了工艺变化，对扩展 WL 技术的需求变得更加迫切。同样，缩放会给传统 DRAM 带来更严重的噪声和串扰等挑战。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的故障感知 WL 方案，根据行的强度分配写入频率并处理列中写入的不平衡。我们使用运行时检测方案来识别薄弱行并在磨损之前对其进行保护。特别是，行级 WL（又名 RETROFIT）利用为冗余提供的备用行来战略性地使用以防止早期单元磨损。 RETROFIT 与保证减少硬故障和纠错码 (ECC) 的纠错方案兼容。当任何备用行完全替换退休行时，我们不会丢弃退休行，而是重新定位退休行以协助列备用。它变成了一组页面保护指针（PPP），利用否则被丢弃的纠错潜力来进一步增强RETROFIT的调平能力。为了缓解列级不平衡，我们在使用空闲纠错位之前应用它们来减少平均位翻转。评估表明，与最先进的行级方法相比，使用 PPP 进行的 RETROFIT 和增强型 RETROFIT 在平均情况下分别将寿命延长了 0.64 倍和 5.4 倍，同时还减少了面积开销。在最坏的情况下，这些改进进一步增加到 2.6 倍和 16.0 倍。与建议的列级 WL 相结合，增强型 RETROFIT 与具有相同存储开销的完美均匀磨损均衡相比，整体内存寿命提高了 1.5 倍。

papers.title: Reconciling Selective Logging and Hardware Persistent Memory Transaction.
papers.abstract: Log creation, maintenance, and its persist ordering are known to be performance bottlenecks for durable transactions on persistent memory. Existing hardware persistent memory transactions overlook an important opportunity for improving performance: some persistent data is algorithmically redundant such that it can be recovered from other data, removing the need for logging such data. The paper presents an ISA extension that enables selective logging for hardware persistent memory transactions for the first time. The ISA extension features two novel components: fine-grain logging and lazy persistency. Fine-grain logging allows hardware to log updates on data in the granularity of words without lengthening the critical path of data accesses. Lazy persistency allows updated data to remain in the cache after the transaction commits. Together, the new hardware persistent memory transaction outperforms the state-of-the-art hardware counterpart by 1.8× on average.
