CAMA is holistically optimized with the following major contributions: (1) a 16 × 256 8-transistor (8T) CAM array for state matching, replacing the 256 × 256 6T SRAM array or two 16×256 6T SRAM banks in state-of-the-art (SOTA) designs; (2) a novel encoding scheme that enables content searching within 8T SRAMs and adapts to different applications; (3) a reconfigurable and scalable architecture that improves efficiency on all tested benchmarks, without losing support for any NFA that’s compatible with SOTA designs; (4) an optimization framework that automates the choice of encoding schemes and maps a given NFA to the proposed hardware.Two versions of CAMA, one optimized for energy (CAMA-E) and the other for throughput (CAMA-T), are comprehensively evaluated in a 28nm CMOS process, and across 21 real-world and synthetic benchmarks. CAMA-E achieves 2.1×, 2.8 ×, and 2.04× lower energy than CA, 2-stride Impala, and eAP. CAMA-T shows 2.68×, 3.87× and 2.62 × higher average compute density than 2-stride Impala, CA, and eAP. Both versions reduce the chip area required for the largest tested benchmark by 2.48× over CA, 1.91× over 2-stride Impala, and 1.78× over eAP.
papers.abstract_zh: 加速有限自动机处理对于推进模式匹配、数据挖掘、生物信息学、入侵检测和机器学习中的实时分析至关重要。最近利用 SRAM 和 DRAM 的内存自动机加速器比传统数字设计取得了令人兴奋的改进。然而，所有最先进 (SOTA) 设计所使用的状态转换的位向量表示仅在处理最坏情况的完全随机模式时才是最佳的，而在运行大多数现实世界基准测试时会浪费大量内存和能量。我们提出了 CAMA，一种支持内容寻址内存 (CAM) 的自动机加速器，用于处理同质非确定性有限自动机 (NFA)。完全不同的状态表示方案以及共同设计的新颖电路和数据编码方案，大大减少了大多数现实 NFA 的能源、内存和芯片面积。 CAMA 进行了整体优化，主要贡献如下：(1) 用于状态匹配的 16 × 256 8 晶体管 (8T) CAM 阵列，取代了最先进 (SOTA) 设计中的 256 × 256 6T SRAM 阵列或两个 16×256 6T SRAM 组； (2)新颖的编码方案，可在8T SRAM内进行内容搜索并适应不同的应用； (3) 可重新配置和可扩展的架构，可提高所有测试基准的效率，同时不会失去对任何与 SOTA 设计兼容的 NFA 的支持； (4) 一个优化框架，可自动选择编码方案并将给定的 NFA 映射到建议的硬件。CAMA 的两个版本，一个针对能量优化 (CAMA-E)，另一个针对吞吐量优化 (CAMA-T)，在 28nm CMOS 工艺中以及 21 个真实世界和综合基准测试中进行了全面评估。 CAMA-E 的能量比 CA、2-stride Impala 和 eAP 低 2.1 倍、2.8 倍和 2.04 倍。 CAMA-T 的平均计算密度比 2-stride Impala、CA 和 eAP 高 2.68 倍、3.87 倍和 2.62 倍。两个版本都将最大测试基准所需的芯片面积减少了 2.48 倍，比 CA 减少了 2.48 倍，比 2-stride Impala 减少了 1.91 倍，比 eAP 减少了 1.78 倍。

papers.title: CANDLES: Channel-Aware Novel Dataflow-Microarchitecture Co-Design for Low Energy Sparse Neural Network Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Several deep neural network (DNN) accelerators have been designed to exploit the sparsity exhibited by DNN activations and weights. State-of-the-art sparse accelerators can be described as either Pixel-first or Channel-first accelerators, each with its unique dataflow and compression format aiding its dataflow. The former expends significant energy updating neuron partial sums, while the latter expends significant energy in handling the index metadata. This work introduces a novel microarchitecture and dataflow that reconciles these trade-offs by adopting a Pixel-first compression and Channel-first dataflow. The proposed microarchitecture has a simpler index-generation logic combined with an accumulator buffer hierarchy and crossbar with low wiring overhead. The compression format and dataflow promote high temporal locality in neuron updates, further lowering energy. Finally, we introduce work partitions across processing elements that naturally lead to load balance without offline analysis. Compared to four state-of-the-art baselines, the proposed architecture, CANDLES, significantly outperforms three and matches the performance of the fourth. In terms of energy, CANDLES is between 2.5× and 5.6× more energy-efficient than these four baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 一些深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器的设计目的是利用 DNN 激活和权重所表现出的稀疏性。最先进的稀疏加速器可以被描述为像素优先或通道优先加速器，每个加速器都有其独特的数据流和压缩格式来帮助其数据流。前者花费大量能量更新神经元部分和，而后者花费大量能量来处理索引元数据。这项工作引入了一种新颖的微架构和数据流，通过采用像素优先压缩和通道优先数据流来协调这些权衡。所提出的微体系结构具有更简单的索引生成逻辑，与累加器缓冲区层次结构和接线开销较低的交叉开关相结合。压缩格式和数据流促进神经元更新的高时间局部性，进一步降低能量。最后，我们引入了跨处理元素的工作分区，这自然会导致负载平衡，而无需离线分析。与四个最先进的基准相比，所提出的架构 CANDLES 的性能显着优于三个基准，并与第四个基准的性能相匹配。在能源方面，CANDLES 的能源效率比这四个基准高 2.5 倍到 5.6 倍。

papers.title: Compiler-Driven Simulation of Reconfigurable Hardware Accelerators.
papers.abstract: As customized accelerator design has become increasingly popular to keep up with the demand for high performance computing, it poses challenges for modern simulator design to adapt to such a large variety of accelerators. Existing simulators tend to two extremes: low-level and general approaches, such as RTL simulation, that can model any hardware but require substantial effort and long execution times; and higher-level application-specific models that can be much faster and easier to use but require one-off engineering effort.This work proposes a compiler-driven simulation workflow that can model configurable hardware accelerator. The key idea is to separate structure representation from simulation by developing an intermediate language that can flexibly represent a wide variety of hardware constructs. We design the Event Queue (EQueue) dialect of MLIR, a dialect that can model arbitrary hardware accelerators with explicit data movement and distributed event-based control; we also implement a generic simulation engine to model EQueue programs with hybrid MLIR dialects representing different abstraction levels. We demonstrate two case studies of EQueue-implemented accelerators: the systolic array of convolution and SIMD processors in a modern FPGA. In the former we show EQueue simulation is as accurate as a state-of-the-art simulator, while offering higher extensibility and lower iteration cost via compiler passes. In the latter we demonstrate our simulation flow can guide designer efficiently improve their design using visualizable simulation outputs.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了满足高性能计算的需求，定制加速器设计变得越来越流行，这对现代模拟器设计适应如此多样化的加速器提出了挑战。现有的模拟器往往走向两个极端：低级和通用方法，例如 RTL 模拟，可以对任何硬件进行建模，但需要大量工作和较长的执行时间；以及更高级别的特定于应用程序的模型，这些模型可以更快、更容易使用，但需要一次性的工程工作。这项工作提出了一种编译器驱动的仿真工作流程，可以对可配置的硬件加速器进行建模。关键思想是通过开发一种可以灵活表示各种硬件构造的中间语言，将结构表示与仿真分开。我们设计了 MLIR 的事件队列（EQueue）方言，该方言可以通过显式数据移动和基于分布式事件的控制来建模任意硬件加速器；我们还实现了一个通用模拟引擎，以使用代表不同抽象级别的混合 MLIR 方言对 EQueue 程序进行建模。我们演示了 EQueue 实现的加速器的两个案例研究：现代 FPGA 中的卷积和 SIMD 处理器的脉动阵列。在前者中，我们展示了 EQueue 模拟与最先进的模拟器一样准确，同时通过编译器通道提供更高的可扩展性和更低的迭代成本。在后者中，我们展示了我们的仿真流程可以指导设计人员使用可视化的仿真输出有效地改进他们的设计。

papers.title: CoopMC: Algorithm-Architecture Co-Optimization for Markov Chain Monte Carlo Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Bayesian machine learning is useful for applications that may make high-risk decisions with limited, noisy, or unlabeled data, as it provides great data efficiency and uncertainty estimation. Building on previous efforts, this work presents CoopMC, an algorithm-architecture co-optimization for developing more efficient MCMC-based Bayesian inference accelerators. CoopMC utilizes dynamic normalization (DyNorm), LUT-based exponential kernels (TableExp), and log-domain kernel fusion (LogFusion) to reduce computational precision and shrink ALU area by 7.5× without noticeable reduction in model performance. Also, a Tree-based Gibbs sampler (TreeSampler) improves hardware runtime from $\mathcal{O}$(N) to $\mathcal{O}$(log(N)), an 8.7× speedup, and yields 1.9× better area efficiency than the existing state-of-the-art Gibbs sampling architecture. These methods have been tested on 10 diverse workloads using 3 different types of Bayesian models, demonstrating applicability to many Bayesian algorithms. In an end-to-end case study, these optimizations achieve a 33% logic area reduction, 62% power reduction, and 1.53× speedup over previous state-of-the-art end-to-end MCMC accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 贝叶斯机器学习对于可能使用有限的、嘈杂的或未标记的数据做出高风险决策的应用程序非常有用，因为它提供了出色的数据效率和不确定性估计。在之前的工作基础上，这项工作提出了 CoopMC，一种算法架构协同优化，用于开发更高效的基于 MCMC 的贝叶斯推理加速器。 CoopMC 利用动态归一化 (DyNorm)、基于 LUT 的指数核 (TableExp) 和对数域核融合 (LogFusion) 来降低计算精度并将 ALU 面积缩小 7.5 倍，而不会明显降低模型性能。此外，基于树的吉布斯采样器 (TreeSampler) 将硬件运行时间从 $\mathcal{O}$(N) 提高到 $\mathcal{O}$(log(N))，加速比现有最先进的吉布斯采样架构提高 8.7 倍，面积效率提高 1.9 倍。这些方法已使用 3 种不同类型的贝叶斯模型在 10 种不同的工作负载上进行了测试，证明了对许多贝叶斯算法的适用性。在端到端案例研究中，与之前最先进的端到端 MCMC 加速器相比，这些优化实现了 33% 的逻辑面积减少、62% 的功耗降低和 1.53 倍的加速。

papers.title: Cottage: Coordinated Time Budget Assignment for Latency, Quality and Power Optimization in Web Search.
papers.abstract: Most CPU power management techniques for web search assume that the time budget for a query is given a priori. However, determining the time budget on a per query granularity is challenging, because a difficult trade-off between the search latency, quality and power consumption has to be made. In this paper, we present Cottage, a coordinated time budget assignment framework between the aggregator and Index Serving Nodes (ISNs), which employs two distinct distributed search latency and quality predictors. The prediction results are integrated at a centralized optimizer for selecting the proper search time budget, while cutting off slow and low quality ISNs. Cottage also accelerates slow ISNs that have a high quality contribution, thus improving search quality. The implementation results on the Solr search engine show that Cottage outperforms state-of-the-art approaches with a 54% latency reduction and 41.3% less consumed power. In addition, the P@10 search quality with Cottage can still be as good as 0.947.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数用于 Web 搜索的 CPU 电源管理技术都假设查询的时间预算是先验的。然而，确定每个查询粒度的时间预算具有挑战性，因为必须在搜索延迟、质量和功耗之间进行艰难的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 Cottage，这是聚合器和索引服务节点 (ISN) 之间的协调时间预算分配框架，它采用两个不同的分布式搜索延迟和质量预测器。预测结果集成在一个集中优化器中，用于选择适当的搜索时间预算，同时切断缓慢且低质量的 ISN。 Cottage 还可以加速具有高质量贡献的缓慢 ISN，从而提高搜索质量。 Solr 搜索引擎上的实施结果表明，Cottage 的性能优于最先进的方法，延迟减少了 54%，功耗减少了 41.3%。此外，Cottage的P@10搜索质量仍然可以达到0.947。

papers.title: DarkGates: A Hybrid Power-Gating Architecture to Mitigate the Performance Impact of Dark-Silicon in High Performance Processors.
papers.abstract: To reduce the leakage power of inactive (dark) silicon components, modern processor systems shut-off these components' power supply using low-leakage transistors, called power-gates. Unfortunately, power-gates increase the system's power-delivery impedance and voltage guardband, limiting the system's maximum attainable voltage (i.e., V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf>) and, thus, the CPU core's maximum attainable frequency (i.e., F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf>). As a result, systems that are performance constrained by the CPU frequency (i.e., F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf> -constrained), such as high-end desktops, suffer significant performance loss due to power-gates.To mitigate this performance loss, we propose DarkGates, a hybrid system architecture that increases the performance of F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf> -constrained systems while fulfilling their power efficiency requirements. DarkGates is based on three key techniques: i) bypassing on-chip power-gates using package-level resources (called bypass mode), ii) extending power management firmware to support operation either in bypass mode or normal mode, and iii) introducing deeper idle power states.We implement DarkGates on an Intel Skylake microprocessor for client devices and evaluate it using a wide variety of workloads. On a real 4-core Skylake system with integrated graphics, DarkGates improves the average performance of SPEC CPU2006 workloads across all thermal design power (TDP) levels (35W–91W) between 4.2% and 5.3%. DarkGates maintains the performance of 3DMark workloads for desktop systems with TDP greater than 45W while for a 35W-TDP (the lowest TDP) desktop it experiences only a 2% degradation. In addition, DarkGates fulfills the requirements of the ENERGY STAR and the Intel Ready Mode energy efficiency benchmarks of desktop systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减少非活动（暗）硅组件的泄漏功率，现代处理器系统使用称为功率门的低泄漏晶体管来关闭这些组件的电源。不幸的是，电源门增加了系统的供电阻抗和电压保护带，限制了系统可达到的最大电压（即 V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf>），从而限制了 CPU 内核可达到的最大频率（即 F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf>）。因此，性能受 CPU 频率限制的系统（即 F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf> -constrained），例如高端台式机，会因电源门而遭受显着的性能损失。为了减轻这种性能损失，我们建议DarkGates 是一种混合系统架构，可提高 F<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">max</inf> 约束系统的性能，同时满足其功效要求。 DarkGates 基于三项关键技术：i) 使用封装级资源绕过片上电源门（称为旁路模式），ii) 扩展电源管理固件以支持旁路模式或正常模式下的操作，以及 iii) 引入更深层次的空闲电源状态。我们在客户端设备的 Intel Skylake 微处理器上实现 DarkGates，并使用各种工作负载对其进行评估。在具有集成显卡的真正 4 核 Skylake 系统上，DarkGates 将所有热设计功耗 (TDP) 级别（35W–91W）的 SPEC CPU2006 工作负载的平均性能提高了 4.2% 到 5.3%。对于 TDP 大于 45W 的桌面系统，DarkGates 保持了 3DMark 工作负载的性能，而对于 35W-TDP（最低 TDP）桌面，其性能仅下降了 2%。此外，DarkGates 满足桌面系统能源之星和英特尔就绪模式能效基准的要求。

papers.title: Delegated Replies: Alleviating Network Clogging in Heterogeneous Architectures.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous architectures with latency-sensitive CPU cores and bandwidth-intensive accelerators are attractive as they deliver high performance at favorable cost. These architectures typically have significantly more compute cores than memory nodes. The many bandwidth-intensive accelerators hence overwhelm the few memory nodes, resulting in suboptimal accelerator performance — as their bandwidth needs are not met — and poor CPU performance — because memory node blocking creates high latencies. We call this phenomenon network clogging. Since network clogging is a widespread issue in heterogeneous architectures, we first investigate if existing state-of-the-art approaches can address it. We find that the most effective prior approach, called Realistic Probing (RP), is suboptimal because it searches the local caches of other cores for missing data.We propose Delegated Replies which lets memory nodes speculatively delegate the responsibility of replying to last-level cache hits to the private cache that last accessed the requested cache block, hence avoiding the search that fundamentally limits RP. Moreover, Delegated Replies uses the (typically) under-utilized request network for delegation; it is the reply network links of the memory nodes that commonly clog because replies include complete cache blocks in addition to metadata. We evaluate Delegated Replies in the context of heterogeneous architectures with latency-sensitive CPU cores and bandwidth-intensive GPU cores and find that it improves GPU (CPU) performance by 14.2% (5.2%) and 25.7% (8.8%) on average compared to RP and our baseline, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有延迟敏感型 CPU 内核和带宽密集型加速器的异构架构非常有吸引力，因为它们能够以优惠的成本提供高性能。这些架构通常具有比内存节点多得多的计算核心。因此，许多带宽密集型加速器压垮了少数内存节点，导致加速器性能不佳（因为带宽需求未得到满足）和 CPU 性能较差（因为内存节点阻塞会产生高延迟）。我们把这种现象称为网络堵塞。由于网络堵塞是异构架构中的一个普遍问题，我们首先研究现有最先进的方法是否可以解决它。我们发现最有效的先前方法，即现实探测（RP），并不是最理想的，因为它会搜索其他核心的本地缓存以查找丢失的数据。我们提出了委托回复，它允许内存节点推测性地将回复最后一级缓存命中的责任委托给最后访问所请求缓存块的私有缓存，从而避免从根本上限制 RP 的搜索。此外，委派回复使用（通常）未充分利用的请求网络进行委派；通常会堵塞的是内存节点的回复网络链接，因为除了元数据之外，回复还包括完整的缓存块。我们在具有延迟敏感型 CPU 核心和带宽密集型 GPU 核心的异构架构环境中评估委托回复，发现与 RP 和我们的基准相比，它的 GPU (CPU) 性能平均分别提高了 14.2% (5.2%) 和 25.7% (8.8%)。

papers.title: Detecting Qubit-coupling Faults in Ion-trap Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: Ion-trap quantum computers offer a large number of possible qubit couplings, each of which requires individual calibration and can be misconfigured. To enhance the duty cycle of an ion trap, we develop a strategy that diagnoses individual miscalibrated couplings using only log-many tests. This strategy is validated on a commercial ion-trap quantum computer, where we illustrate the process of debugging faulty quantum gates. Our methodology provides a scalable pathway towards fault detections on a larger scale ion-trap quantum computers, confirmed by simulations up to 32 qubits.
papers.abstract_zh: 离子阱量子计算机提供大量可能的量子位耦合，每个耦合都需要单独校准并且可能会被错误配置。为了提高离子阱的占空比，我们开发了一种策略，仅使用对数测试来诊断单个错误校准的耦合。该策略在商用离子阱量子计算机上得到了验证，我们在其中说明了调试有缺陷的量子门的过程。我们的方法提供了一种在更大规模离子阱量子计算机上进行故障检测的可扩展途径，并通过高达 32 个量子位的模拟得到证实。

papers.title: DigiQ: A Scalable Digital Controller for Quantum Computers Using SFQ Logic.
papers.abstract: The control of cryogenic qubits in today’s super-conducting quantum computer prototypes presents significant scalability challenges due to the massive costs of generating/routing the analog control signals that need to be sent from a classical controller at room temperature to the quantum chip inside the dilution refrigerator. Thus, researchers in industry and academia have focused on designing in-fridge classical controllers in order to mitigate these challenges. Due to the maturity of CMOS logic, many industrial efforts (Microsoft, Intel) have focused on Cryo-CMOS as a near-term solution to design in-fridge classical controllers. Meanwhile, Supercon-ducting Single Flux Quantum (SFQ) is an alternative, less mature classical logic family proposed for large-scale in-fridge controllers. SFQ logic has the potential to maximize scalability thanks to its ultra-high speed and very low power consumption. However, architecture design for SFQ logic poses challenges due to its unconventional pulse-driven nature and lack of dense memory and logic. Thus, research at the architecture level is essential to guide architects to design SFQ-based classical controllers for large-scale quantum machines.In this paper, we present DigiQ, the first system-level design of a Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ)-friendly SFQ-based classical controller. We perform a design space exploration of SFQ-based controllers and co-design the quantum gate decompositions and SFQ-based implementation of those decompositions to find an optimal SFQ-friendly design point that trades area and power for latency and control while ensuring good quantum algorithmic performance. Our co-design results in a single instruction, multiple data (SIMD) controller architecture, which has high scalability, but imposes new challenges on the calibration of control pulses. We present software-level solutions to address these challenges, which if unaddressed would degrade quantum circuit fidelity given the imperfections of qubit hardware.To validate and characterize DigiQ, we first implement it using hardware description languages and synthesize it using state-of-the-art/validated SFQ synthesis tools. Our synthesis results show that DigiQ can operate within the tight power and area budget of dilution refrigerators at >42,000-qubit scales. Second, we confirm the effectiveness of DigiQ in running quantum algorithms by modeling the execution time and fidelity of a variety of NISQ applications. We hope that the promising results of this paper motivate experimentalists to further explore SFQ-based quantum controllers to realize large-scale quantum machines with maximized scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今超导量子计算机原型中的低温量子位的控制面临着巨大的可扩展性挑战，因为生成/路由模拟控制信号需要从室温下的经典控制器发送到稀释冰箱内的量子芯片，成本高昂。因此，工业界和学术界的研究人员一直致力于设计冰箱内经典控制器，以缓解这些挑战。由于 CMOS 逻辑的成熟，许多行业努力（微软、英特尔）都将 Cryo-CMOS 视为设计冰箱内经典控制器的近期解决方案。同时，超导单通量量子（SFQ）是为大规模冰箱内控制器提出的另一种不太成熟的经典逻辑系列。 SFQ 逻辑凭借其超高速和极低的功耗，具有最大限度提高可扩展性的潜力。然而，由于 SFQ 逻辑的非传统脉冲驱动特性以及缺乏密集存储器和逻辑，其架构设计面临着挑战。因此，架构层面的研究对于指导架构师为大规模量子机设计基于 SFQ 的经典控制器至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 DigiQ，这是第一个对噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）友好的基于 SFQ 的经典控制器的系统级设计。我们对基于 SFQ 的控制器进行设计空间探索，并共同设计量子门分解和这些分解的基于 SFQ 的实现，以找到最佳的 SFQ 友好设计点，以面积和功率换取延迟和控制，同时确保良好的量子算法性能。我们的协同设计产生了单指令、多数据（SIMD）控制器架构，该架构具有高可扩展性，但对控制脉冲的校准提出了新的挑战。我们提出软件级解决方案来应对这些挑战，考虑到量子比特硬件的缺陷，如果不解决这些问题，就会降低量子电路的保真度。为了验证和表征 DigiQ，我们首先使用硬件描述语言来实现它，并使用最先进的/经过验证的 SFQ 综合工具来综合它。我们的综合结果表明，DigiQ 可以在 >42,000 量子位规模的稀释制冷机的紧张功率和面积预算内运行。其次，我们通过对各种 NISQ 应用程序的执行时间和保真度进行建模来确认 DigiQ 在运行量子算法方面的有效性。我们希望本文的有希望的结果能够激励实验者进一步探索基于 SFQ 的量子控制器，以实现具有最大可扩展性的大规模量子机器。

papers.title: Direct Spatial Implementation of Sparse Matrix Multipliers for Reservoir Computing.
papers.abstract: Reservoir computing is a nascent sub-field of machine learning which relies on the recurrent multiplication of a very large, sparse, fixed matrix. We argue that direct spatial implementation of these fixed matrices minimizes the work performed in the computation, and allows for significant reduction in latency and power through constant propagation and logic minimization. Bit-serial arithmetic enables massive static matrices to be implemented. We present the structure of our bit-serial matrix multiplier, and evaluate using canonical signed digit representation to further reduce logic utilization. We have implemented these matrices on a large FPGA and provide a cost model that is simple and extensible. These FPGA implementations, on average, reduce latency by 50x up to 86x versus GPU libraries. Comparing against a recent sparse DNN accelerator, we measure a 4.1x to 47x reduction in latency depending on matrix dimension and sparsity.
papers.abstract_zh: 油藏计算是机器学习的一个新兴子领域，它依赖于一个非常大、稀疏、固定矩阵的循环乘法。我们认为，这些固定矩阵的直接空间实现最大限度地减少了计算中执行的工作，并通过不断的传播和逻辑最小化来显着减少延迟和功耗。位串行算术可以实现大量静态矩阵。我们展示了位串行矩阵乘法器的结构，并使用规范的有符号数字表示进行评估，以进一步减少逻辑利用率。我们在大型 FPGA 上实现了这些矩阵，并提供了简单且可扩展的成本模型。与 GPU 库相比，这些 FPGA 实现平均可将延迟减少 50 倍至 86 倍。与最近的稀疏 DNN 加速器相比，我们测量到延迟减少了 4.1 倍到 47 倍，具体取决于矩阵维度和稀疏性。

papers.title: DPrime+DAbort: A High-Precision and Timer-Free Directory-Based Side-Channel Attack in Non-Inclusive Cache Hierarchies using Intel TSX.
papers.abstract: Recent CPUs have begun to adopt non-inclusive cache hierarchies for more effective cache utilization. Non-inclusive cache hierarchies have an additional advantage in that they eliminate the vulnerability to cache-based side-channel attacks. In addition, precise timers are often disabled or added with noise to defeat timer-based side-channel attacks. With the combination of such countermeasures, existing cache- and directory-based side-channel attacks can robustly be defeated on commodity systems.In this work, we discover the vulnerability caused by the undocumented interactions between the coherence directories and Intel TSX transactions in latest Intel CPUs with non-inclusive cache hierarchies. Guided by the observation, we propose a high-precision and timer-free directory attack called DPrime+DAbort in non-inclusive cache hierarchies using Intel TSX, which nullifies the aforementioned countermeasures. Our quantitative evaluation conducted on real systems equipped with latest Intel CPUs in three different generations demonstrates the practicality of the DPrime+DAbort attack in that it can be used to attack cryptographic and genomesequencing applications. We also discuss potential countermeasures and evaluate the feasibility of an Intel TSX-based countermeasure against the DPrime+DAbort attack.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的 CPU 已开始采用非包含式缓存层次结构，以更有效地利用缓存。非包含式缓存层次结构还有一个额外的优点，即它们消除了基于缓存的旁道攻击的漏洞。此外，精确定时器经常被禁用或添加噪声以击败基于定时器的旁道攻击。通过结合这些对策，现有的基于缓存和目录的侧通道攻击可以在商品系统上被稳健地击败。在这项工作中，我们发现了由具有非包容性缓存层次结构的最新 Intel CPU 中的一致性目录和 Intel TSX 事务之间未记录的交互引起的漏洞。在观察的指导下，我们提出了一种使用 Intel TSX 的非包含缓存层次结构中的高精度、无定时器目录攻击，称为 DPrime+DAbort，这使上述对策无效。我们对配备三个不同代的最新英特尔 CPU 的真实系统进行的定量评估证明了 DPrime+DAbort 攻击的实用性，因为它可用于攻击加密和基因组测序应用程序。我们还讨论了潜在的对策并评估了针对 DPrime+DAbort 攻击的基于 Intel TSX 的对策的可行性。

papers.title: DR-STRaNGe: End-to-End System Design for DRAM-based True Random Number Generators.
papers.abstract: Random number generation is an important task in a wide variety of critical applications including cryptographic algorithms, scientific simulations, and industrial testing tools. True Random Number Generators (TRNGs) produce cryptographically-secure truly random data by sampling a physical entropy source that typically requires custom hardware and suffers from long latency. To enable high-bandwidth and low-latency TRNGs on widely-available commodity devices, recent works propose hardware TRNGs that generate random numbers using commodity DRAM as an entropy source. Although prior works demonstrate promising TRNG mechanisms using DRAM, practical integration of such mechanisms into real systems poses various challenges.We identify three key challenges for using DRAM-based TRNGs in current systems: (1) generating random numbers with DRAM-based TRNGs can degrade overall system performance by slowing down concurrently-running applications due to the interference between RNG and regular memory operations in the memory controller (i.e., RNG interference), (2) this RNG interference can degrade system fairness by causing unfair prioritization of applications that intensively use random numbers (i.e., RNG applications), and (3) RNG applications can experience significant slowdown due to the high latency of DRAM-based TRNGs.To address these challenges, we propose DR-STRaNGe, an end-to-end system design for DRAM-based TRNGs that (1) reduces the RNG interference by separating RNG requests from regular memory requests in the memory controller, (2) improves fairness across applications with an RNG-aware memory request scheduler, and (3) hides the large TRNG latencies using a random number buffering mechanism combined with a new DRAM idleness predictor that accurately identifies idle DRAM periods.We evaluate DR-STRaNGe using a comprehensive set of 186 multi-programmed workloads. Compared to an RNG-oblivious baseline system, DR-STRaNGe improves the performance of non-RNG and RNG applications on average by 17.9% and 25.1%, respectively. DR-STRaNGe improves system fairness by 32.1% on average when generating random numbers at a 5 Gb/s throughput. DR-STRaNGe reduces energy consumption by 21% compared to the RNG-oblivious baseline design by reducing the time spent for RNG and non-RNG memory accesses by 15.8%.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机数生成是加密算法、科学模拟和工业测试工具等各种关键应用中的一项重要任务。真随机数生成器 (TRNG) 通过对物理熵源进行采样来生成加密安全的真正随机数据，该物理熵源通常需要定制硬件并存在较长的延迟。为了在广泛使用的商品设备上实现高带宽和低延迟的 TRNG，最近的工作提出了使用商品 DRAM 作为熵源来生成随机数的硬件 TRNG。尽管先前的工作展示了使用 DRAM 的有前途的 TRNG 机制，但将此类机制实际集成到实际系统中提出了各种挑战。我们确定了在当前系统中使用基于 DRAM 的 TRNG 的三个关键挑战：(1) 由于内存控制器中的 RNG 和常规内存操作之间的干扰（即 RNG 干扰），使用基于 DRAM 的 TRNG 生成随机数可能会减慢并发运行的应用程序，从而降低整体系统性能，(2) 这种 RNG 干扰可能会导致不公平，从而降低系统公平性。密集使用随机数的应用程序（即 RNG 应用程序）的优先级，以及 (3) 由于基于 DRAM 的 TRNG 的高延迟，RNG 应用程序可能会出现显着的速度下降。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 DR-STRaNGe，这是一种基于 DRAM 的 TRNG 的端到端系统设计，它 (1) 通过将 RNG 请求与内存控制器中的常规内存请求分开来减少 RNG 干扰，(2) 使用 RNG 感知内存提高应用程序之间的公平性请求调度程序，(3) 使用随机数缓冲机制结合新的 DRAM 空闲预测器来隐藏较大的 TRNG 延迟，该预测器可以准确识别空闲 DRAM 周期。我们使用一组全面的 186 个多编程工作负载来评估 DR-STRaNGe。与忽略 RNG 的基线系统相比，DR-STRaNGe 将非 RNG 和 RNG 应用程序的性能平均分别提高了 17.9% 和 25.1%。在以 5 Gb/s 吞吐量生成随机数时，DR-STRaNGe 平均将系统公平性提高了 32.1%。与忽略 RNG 的基线设计相比，DR-STRaNGe 将 RNG 和非 RNG 内存访问所花费的时间减少了 15.8%，从而将能耗降低了 21%。

papers.title: DRIPS: Dynamic Rebalancing of Pipelined Streaming Applications on CGRAs.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays (CGRAs) provide higher flexibility than application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) and higher efficiency than fine-grained reconfigurable devices such as Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). However, CGRAs are generally designed to support offloading of a single kernel. While the CGRA design, based on communicating functional units, appears to naturally suit data streaming applications composed of multiple cooperating kernels, current approaches only statically partition the resources across application kernels. However, emerging streaming applications at the edge (scientific instruments, sensor networks, network processing) perform much more than digital signal processing and often are data and input dependent. This leads to extremely variable kernel execution times, severely impacting the throughput of the entire pipeline if resources are only statically allocated. Therefore, in this paper, we propose DRIPS — a novel CGRA architecture that can dynamically rebalance the pipeline of data-dependent streaming applications. We present a unified compiler framework to facilitate the mapping of a given streaming application onto the DRIPS CGRA architecture. The experimental results show that DRIPS achieves an average throughput improvement of 1.46× across a set of representative applications over a statically partitioned solution. The additional area overhead to enable dynamic rebalancing consumes 16.34% of the entire area for a 5×5 CGRA prototype.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 提供比专用集成电路 (ASIC) 更高的灵活性，比现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等细粒度可重构器件提供更高的效率。然而，CGRA 通常被设计为支持单个内核的卸载。虽然基于通信功能单元的 CGRA 设计似乎自然适合由多个协作内核组成的数据流应用程序，但当前的方法仅跨应用程序内核静态地划分资源。然而，新兴的边缘流应用程序（科学仪器、传感器网络、网络处理）的性能远不止数字信号处理，而且通常依赖于数据和输入。这会导致内核执行时间变化极大，如果仅静态分配资源，则会严重影响整个管道的吞吐量。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 DRIPS——一种新颖的 CGRA 架构，可以动态地重新平衡数据依赖的流应用程序的管道。我们提出了一个统一的编译器框架，以方便将给定的流应用程序映射到 DRIPS CGRA 架构上。实验结果表明，与静态分区解决方案相比，DRIPS 在一组代表性应用程序中的平均吞吐量提高了 1.46 倍。对于 5×5 CGRA 原型，用于实现动态重新平衡的额外面积开销消耗了整个面积的 16.34%。

papers.title: Effective Mimicry of Belady's MIN Policy.
papers.abstract: The past decade has seen the rise of highly successful cache replacement policies that are based on binary prediction. For example, the Hawkeye policy learns whether lines loaded by a given PC are Cache Friendly (likely to remain in the cache if Belady’s MIN policy had been used) or Cache Averse (likely to be evicted by Belady’s MIN policy). In this paper, we instead present a cache replacement policy that is based on multiclass prediction, which allows it to directly mimic Belady’s MIN policy in a surprisingly simple and effective way. Our policy uses a PC-based predictor to learn each cache line’s reuse distance; it then evicts lines based on their predicted time of reuse. We show that our use of multiclass prediction is more effective than binary prediction because it allows for a finer-grained ordering of cache lines during eviction and because it is more robust to prediction errors.Our empirical results show that our new policy, which we refer to as Mockingjay, outperforms the previous state-of-the-art on both single-core and multi-core platforms and both with and without a prefetcher. For example, with no prefetcher, on a mix of 100 multi-core workloads from the SPEC 2006, SPEC 2017, and GAP benchmark suites, Mockingjay sees an average improvement over LRU of 15.2%, compared to 7.6% for SHiP and 12.9% for Hawkeye. On a single-core platform, Mockingjay’s improvement over LRU is 5.7%, which approaches the 6.0% improvement of Belady MIN’s unrealizable policy. On a single-core platform (with a prefetcher) running the high-MPKI CVP workloads, Mockingjay’s improvement over LRU is 20.1%, compared to 13.4% for Hawkeye.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，基于二进制预测的非常成功的缓存替换策略不断兴起。例如，Hawkeye 策略了解给定 PC 加载的行是否是缓存友好型（如果使用了 Belady 的 MIN 策略，则可能保留在缓存中）还是缓存厌恶型（可能会被 Belady 的 MIN 策略驱逐）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多类预测的缓存替换策略，这使得它能够以一种令人惊讶的简单有效的方式直接模仿 Belady 的 MIN 策略。我们的策略使用基于 PC 的预测器来了解每个缓存行的重用距离；然后，它根据预测的重用时间驱逐线路。我们证明，我们使用多类预测比二进制预测更有效，因为它允许在驱逐期间对缓存行进行更细粒度的排序，并且对预测错误更稳健。我们的实证结果表明，我们的新策略（我们称为 Mockingjay）在单核和多核平台以及带和不带预取器的情况下都优于以前的最先进策略。例如，在没有预取器的情况下，在来自 SPEC 2006、SPEC 2017 和 GAP 基准套件的 100 个多核工作负载的混合上，Mockingjay 发现相对于 LRU 的平均改进为 15.2%，而 SHiP 为 7.6%，Hawkeye 为 12.9%。在单核平台上，Mockingjay 相对于 LRU 的改进为 5.7%，接近 Belady MIN 不可实现策略 6.0% 的改进。在运行高 MPKI CVP 工作负载的单核平台（带有预取器）上，Mockingjay 相对于 LRU 的改进为 20.1%，而 Hawkeye 为 13.4%。

papers.title: Efficient Bad Block Management with Cluster Similarity.
papers.abstract: Process variation in the 3D flash memory architecture raises the difficulty of bad block management. Since the error characteristics vary among different blocks, it is difficult for the existing P/E cycle-based bad block management policies to decide a suitable cycle threshold. This increases the possibility of data loss and decreases the SSD’s lifetime. In this work, we characterize the 3D flash memory and observe spatial correlation among flash blocks in the aspect of error behaviors. This phenomenon is referred to as cluster similarity. A novel cluster-based bad block management policy is proposed, which treats the failure of a block as an indicator of near-future failures of its neighboring blocks. Moreover, we provide quantitative methods to enable judicious selection of the cluster size to meet the desired tradeoff between the SSD lifetime and reliability. Compared with the commonly-used cycle-based bad block management policy, our cluster-based management policy has a lifetime improvement of 2x with comparable failure rates. And with comparable lifetime, the failure rate of the cycle-based policy is 9x higher than our method. To alleviate the I/O performance impact caused by the cluster retirement, we proposes a critical-block first reallocation scheduling. Our experiments show up to two times improvement of the 95th percentile latency compared to the naive scheduling of cluster reallocation.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D闪存架构中的工艺变化增加了坏块管理的难度。由于不同块的错误特征不同，现有的基于P/E周期的坏块管理策略很难确定合适的周期阈值。这会增加数据丢失的可能性并缩短 SSD 的使用寿命。在这项工作中，我们描述了 3D 闪存的特征，并观察闪存块之间在错误行为方面的空间相关性。这种现象称为聚类相似性。提出了一种新颖的基于集群的坏块管理策略，该策略将块的故障视为其相邻块近期故障的指标。此外，我们还提供定量方法来明智地选择簇大小，以满足 SSD 寿命和可靠性之间所需的权衡。与常用的基于周期的坏块管理策略相比，我们的基于集群的管理策略在故障率相当的情况下，寿命提高了 2 倍。在相当的生命周期内，基于周期的策略的失败率比我们的方法高 9 倍。为了减轻集群退役对 I/O 性能的影响，我们提出了关键块优先重新分配调度。我们的实验表明，与集群重新分配的简单调度相比，第 95 个百分点的延迟提高了两倍。

papers.title: Enabling Efficient Large-Scale Deep Learning Training with Cache Coherent Disaggregated Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: Modern deep learning (DL) training is memory-consuming, constrained by the memory capacity of each computation component and cross-device communication bandwidth. In response to such constraints, current approaches include increasing parallelism in distributed training and optimizing inter-device communication. However, model parameter communication is becoming a key performance bottleneck in distributed DL training. To improve parameter communication performance, we propose COARSE, a disaggregated memory extension for distributed DL training. COARSE is built on modern cache-coherent interconnect (CCI) protocols and MPI-like collective communication for synchronization, to allow low-latency and parallel access to training data and model parameters shared among worker GPUs. To enable high bandwidth transfers between GPUs and the disaggregated memory system, we propose a decentralized parameter communication scheme to decouple and localize parameter synchronization traffic. Furthermore, we propose dynamic tensor routing and partitioning to fully utilize the non-uniform serial bus bandwidth varied across different cloud computing systems. Finally, we design a deadlock avoidance and dual synchronization to ensure high-performance parameter synchronization. Our evaluation shows that COARSE achieves up to 48.3% faster DL training compared to the state-of-the-art MPI AllReduce communication.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代深度学习 (DL) 训练非常消耗内存，受到每个计算组件的内存容量和跨设备通信带宽的限制。为了应对这些限制，当前的方法包括增加分布式训练的并行性和优化设备间通信。然而，模型参数通信正在成为分布式深度学习训练的关键性能瓶颈。为了提高参数通信性能，我们提出了 COARSE，一种用于分布式深度学习训练的分解内存扩展。 COARSE 基于现代缓存一致性互连 (CCI) 协议和类似 MPI 的同步集体通信而构建，允许低延迟、并行访问工作 GPU 之间共享的训练数据和模型参数。为了实现 GPU 和分解内存系统之间的高带宽传输，我们提出了一种去中心化参数通信方案来解耦和本地化参数同步流量。此外，我们提出动态张量路由和分区，以充分利用不同云计算系统中不同的非均匀串行总线带宽。最后，我们设计了死锁避免和双同步以确保高性能的参数同步。我们的评估表明，与最先进的 MPI AllReduce 通信相比，COARSE 的深度学习训练速度提高了 48.3%。

papers.title: Enabling High-Quality Uncertainty Quantification in a PIM Designed for Bayesian Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification measures the prediction uncertainty of a neural network facing out-of-training-distribution samples. Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) can provide high-quality uncertainty quantification by introducing specific noise to the weights during inference. To accelerate BNN inference, ReRAM processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture is a competitive solution to provide both high-efficient computing and in-situ noise generation at the same time. However, there normally exists a huge gap between the generated noise in PIM hardware and that required by a BNN model. We demonstrate that the quality of uncertainty quantification is substantially degraded due to this gap. To solve this problem, we propose a holistic framework called W2W-PIM. We first introduce an efficient method to generate noise in ReRAM PIM design according to the demand of a BNN model. In addition, the PIM architecture is carefully modified to enable the noise generation and evaluate uncertainty quality. Moreover, a calibration unit is further introduced to reduce the noise gap caused by imperfection of the noise model. Comprehensive evaluation results demonstrate that W2W-PIM framework can achieve high-quality uncertainty quantification and high energy-efficiency at the same time.
papers.abstract_zh: 不确定性量化衡量神经网络面对训练分布外样本的预测不确定性。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 可以通过在推理过程中向权重引入特定噪声来提供高质量的不确定性量化。为了加速 BNN 推理，ReRAM 内存处理 (PIM) 架构是一种具有竞争力的解决方案，可以同时提供高效计算和原位噪声生成。然而，PIM 硬件生成的噪声与 BNN 模型所需的噪声之间通常存在巨大差距。我们证明，由于这种差距，不确定性量化的质量大幅下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 W2W-PIM 的整体框架。我们首先根据 BNN 模型的需求，介绍一种在 ReRAM PIM 设计中产生噪声的有效方法。此外，PIM 架构经过精心修改，可生成噪声并评估不确定性质量。此外，还引入了校准单元，以减少由于噪声模型不完善而导致的噪声间隙。综合评价结果表明，W2W-PIM框架能够同时实现高质量的不确定性量化和高能效。

papers.title: Exploiting Inter-block Entropy to Enhance the Compressibility of Blocks with Diverse Data.
papers.abstract: As higher memory bandwidth is required for data-intensive environments, memory compression can be a simple but effective solution to increase memory bandwidth. However, previous intra-block compression techniques do not provide sufficient bandwidth improvement owing to the incompressibility of blocks with diverse data while previous inter-block compression techniques suffer from huge additional memory access overheads or low compression coverages. To overcome the limitations of the previous intra-and inter-block compression techniques, we leverage both the naturally observed low-entropy among blocks and the artificially generated low-entropy resulting from our optimization techniques. Based on these two low-entropies, we propose an Entropy-based Pattern Compression (EPC), which generates an inter-block pattern from the same low-entropy region in numerous blocks and then compresses these blocks by using the selected pattern. Our evaluations show that EPC achieves up to 13% (3% on average) higher speedup and 13% (4% on average) DRAM energy consumption reduction with 160x (20x on average) fewer patterns(groups) compared to the state-of-the-art inter-block compression technique.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于数据密集型环境需要更高的内存带宽，内存压缩是增加内存带宽的简单但有效的解决方案。然而，由于具有不同数据的块的不可压缩性，先前的块内压缩技术不能提供足够的带宽改进，而先前的块间压缩技术则遭受巨大的额外存储器访问开销或低压缩覆盖率。为了克服先前块内和块间压缩技术的局限性，我们利用块间自然观察到的低熵和由我们的优化技术产生的人工生成的低熵。基于这两个低熵，我们提出了一种基于熵的模式压缩（EPC），它从多个块中的相同低熵区域生成块间模式，然后使用所选模式压缩这些块。我们的评估表明，与最先进的块间压缩技术相比，EPC 可实现高达 13%（平均 3%）的加速提升和 13%（平均 4%）的 DRAM 能耗降低，同时模式（组）减少 160 倍（平均 20 倍）。

papers.title: FAST: DNN Training Under Variable Precision Block Floating Point with Stochastic Rounding.
papers.abstract: Block Floating Point (BFP) can efficiently support quantization for Deep Neural Network (DNN) training by providing a wide dynamic range via a shared exponent across a group of values. In this paper, we propose a Fast First, Accurate Second Training (FAST) system for DNNs, where the weights, activations, and gradients are represented in BFP. FAST supports matrix multiplication with variable precision BFP input operands, enabling incremental increases in DNN precision throughout training. By increasing the BFP precision across both training iterations and DNN layers, FAST can greatly shorten the training time while reducing overall hardware resource usage. Our FAST Multipler-Accumulator (fMAC) supports dot product computations under multiple BFP precisions. We validate our FAST system on multiple DNNs with different datasets, demonstrating a 2-6× speedup in training on a single-chip platform over prior work based on mixed-precision or block floating point number systems while achieving similar performance in validation accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 块浮点 (BFP) 可以通过一组值的共享指数提供广泛的动态范围，从而有效地支持深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的量化。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 DNN 的快速第一、准确第二训练 (FAST) 系统，其中权重、激活和梯度以 BFP 表示。 FAST 支持具有可变精度 BFP 输入操作数的矩阵乘法，从而能够在整个训练过程中逐步提高 DNN 精度。通过提高训练迭代和 DNN 层的 BFP 精度，FAST 可以大大缩短训练时间，同时减少总体硬件资源使用。我们的 FAST 乘法累加器 (fMAC) 支持多种 BFP 精度下的点积计算。我们在具有不同数据集的多个 DNN 上验证了我们的 FAST 系统，与之前基于混合精度或块浮点数系统的工作相比，在单芯片平台上的训练速度提高了 2-6 倍，同时在验证精度方面实现了类似的性能。

papers.title: FastTrackNoC: A NoC with FastTrack Router Datapaths.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces FastTrackNoC, a Network-on-Chip (NoC) router architecture that reduces packet latency by bypassing its switch traversal (ST) stage. It is based on the observation that there is a bias in the direction a flit takes through a router, e.g., in a 2D mesh network, non-turning hops are preferred, especially when dimension order routing is used. FastTrackNoC capitalizes on this observation and adds to a 2D mesh router a fast-track path between the head of a single input virtual channel (VC) buffer and its most popular, opposite output. This allows non-turning flits to bypass ST logic, i.e., buffer-, input-and output multiplexing, when the required router resources are available. FastTrackNoC combines ST bypassing with existing techniques for reducing latency, namely, allocation bypassing, precomputed routing, and lookahead control signaling to allow at best incoming flits to proceed directly to link traversal (LT). Moreover, it is applied to a Dual Data Rate (DDR) router in order to maximize network throughput. Post place and route results in 28nm show the following: compared to previous DDR NoCs, FastTrackNoC offers 13-32% lower average packet latency; compared to previous multi-VC Single Data Rate (SDR) NoCs, FastTrackNoC reduces latency by 10-40% and achieves 18-21% higher throughput, and compared to single-channel SDR NoC offers up to 50% higher throughput and similar latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 FastTrackNoC，这是一种片上网络 (NoC) 路由器架构，可通过绕过交换机遍历 (ST) 阶段来减少数据包延迟。它基于这样的观察：flit 通过路由器的方向存在偏差，例如，在 2D 网状网络中，首选非转向跳，特别是在使用维度顺序路由时。 FastTrackNoC 利用这一观察结果，向 2D 网状路由器添加了单输入虚拟通道 (VC) 缓冲区的头部与其最流行的相反输出之间的快速通道路径。当所需的路由器资源可用时，这允许非旋转 flits 绕过 ST 逻辑，即缓冲区、输入和输出复用。 FastTrackNoC 将 ST 旁路与减少延迟的现有技术相结合，即分配旁路、预计算路由和前瞻控制信令，以允许传入的 flits 直接进行链路遍历 (LT)。此外，它还应用于双数据速率（DDR）路由器，以最大限度地提高网络吞吐量。 28nm 的布局布线后结果显示：与之前的 DDR NoC 相比，FastTrackNoC 的平均数据包延迟降低了 13-32%；与之前的多 VC 单数据速率 (SDR) NoC 相比，FastTrackNoC 将延迟降低了 10-40%，吞吐量提高了 18-21%，与单通道 SDR NoC 相比，吞吐量提高了 50%，但延迟时间相似。

papers.title: Filesystem Encryption or Direct-Access for NVM Filesystems? Let's Have Both!
papers.abstract: Emerging Non-Volatile Memories (NVMs) are promising candidates to build ultra-low idle power memory and storage devices in future computing systems. Unlike DRAM, NVMs do not require frequent refresh operations, and they can retain data after crashes and power loss. With such features, NVM memory modules can be used partly as a conventional memory to host memory pages and partly as file storage to host filesystems and persistent data. Most importantly, and unlike current storage technologies, NVMs can be directly attached to the memory bus and accessed through conventional load/store operations.As NVMs feature ultra-low access latency, it is necessary to minimize software overheads for accessing files to enable the full potential. In legacy storage devices, e.g., Flash and Harddisk drives, access latency dominates the software overheads. However, emerging NVMs’ performance can be burdened by the software overheads since memory access latency is minimal. Modern Operating Systems (OSes) allow direct-access (DAX) for NVM-hosted files through direct load/store operations by eliminating intermediate software layers. Unfortunately, we observe that such a direction ignores filesystem encryption and renders most of the current filesystem encryption implementations inapplicable to future NVM systems. In this paper, we propose a novel hardware/software co-design architecture that enables transparent filesystem encryption without sacrificing the direct-access feature of files in emerging NVMs with minimal change in OS and memory controller. Our proposed model incurs a negligible overall slowdown of 3.8% for workloads representative of real-world applications, while software-based encryption can incur as high as 5x slowdown for some applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 是在未来计算系统中构建超低空闲功耗存储器和存储设备的有希望的候选者。与 DRAM 不同，NVM 不需要频繁的刷新操作，并且可以在崩溃和断电后保留数据。凭借这些功能，NVM 内存模块可以部分用作传统内存来托管内存页，部分用作文件存储来托管文件系统和持久数据。最重要的是，与当前的存储技术不同，NVM 可以直接连接到内存总线，并通过传统的加载/存储操作进行访问。由于 NVM 具有超低访问延迟的特点，因此有必要最大限度地减少访问文件的软件开销，以充分发挥其潜力。在传统存储设备（例如闪存和硬盘驱动器）中，访问延迟在软件开销中占主导地位。然而，由于内存访问延迟极小，新兴 NVM 的性能可能会受到软件开销的影响。现代操作系统 (OS) 消除了中间软件层，允许通过直接加载/存储操作直接访问 (DAX) NVM 托管的文件。不幸的是，我们观察到这样的方向忽略了文件系统加密，并使当前的大多数文件系统加密实现不适用于未来的 NVM 系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件/软件协同设计架构，该架构能够实现透明的文件系统加密，而不会牺牲新兴 NVM 中文件的直接访问功能，并且对操作系统和内存控制器的更改最小。对于代表实际应用程序的工作负载，我们提出的模型会导致 3.8% 的总体减速，可以忽略不计，而对于某些应用程序，基于软件的加密可能会导致高达 5 倍的减速。

papers.title: GBDI: Going Beyond Base-Delta-Immediate Compression with Global Bases.
papers.abstract: Memory bandwidth is limiting performance for many emerging applications. While compression techniques can unlock a higher memory bandwidth, prior art offers only modestly better bandwidth. This paper contributes with a new compression method – Global Base Delta Immediate compression (GBDI) – that offers substantially higher memory bandwidth by, unlike prior art, selecting base values across memory blocks. GBDI uses a novel clustering algorithm through data analysis in the background. The presented accelerator infrastructure offers low area overhead and latency. This paper shows that GBDI offers a compression ratio of 2.3×, and yields 1.5× higher bandwidth and 1.1× higher performance compared with a baseline without compression support, on average, for SPEC2017 benchmarks requiring medium to high memory bandwidth.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存带宽限制了许多新兴应用程序的性能。虽然压缩技术可以释放更高的存储器带宽，但现有技术仅提供稍微更好的带宽。本文贡献了一种新的压缩方法——全局基本增量立即压缩（GBDI）——与现有技术不同，该方法通过跨内存块选择基值来提供更高的内存带宽。 GBDI 通过在后台进行数据分析，使用一种新颖的聚类算法。所提出的加速器基础设施提供较低的区域开销和延迟。本文表明，对于需要中到高内存带宽的 SPEC2017 基准测试，GBDI 平均提供 2.3 倍的压缩比，与没有压缩支持的基准相比，带宽高出 1.5 倍，性能高出 1.1 倍。

papers.title: GCoD: Graph Convolutional Network Acceleration via Dedicated Algorithm and Accelerator Co-Design.
papers.abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have emerged as the state-of-the-art graph learning model. However, it can be notoriously challenging to inference GCNs over large graph datasets, limiting their application to large real-world graphs and hindering the exploration of deeper and more sophisticated GCN graphs. This is because real-world graphs can be extremely large and sparse. Furthermore, the node degree of GCNs tends to follow the power-law distribution and therefore have highly irregular adjacency matrices, resulting in prohibitive inefficiencies in both data processing and movement and thus substantially limiting the achievable GCN acceleration efficiency. To this end, this paper proposes a GCN algorithm and accelerator Co-Design framework dubbed GCoD which can largely alleviate the aforementioned GCN irregularity and boost GCNs’ inference efficiency. Specifically, on the algorithm level, GCoD integrates a split and conquer GCN training strategy that polarizes the graphs to be either denser or sparser in local neighborhoods without compromising the model accuracy, resulting in graph adjacency matrices that (mostly) have merely two levels of workload and enjoys largely enhanced regularity and thus ease of acceleration. On the hardware level, we further develop a dedicated two-pronged accelerator with a separated engine to process each of the aforementioned denser and sparser workloads, further boosting the overall utilization and acceleration efficiency. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that our GCoD consistently reduces the number of off-chip accesses, leading to speedups 15286×, 294×, 7.8×, and 2.5× as compared to CPUs, GPUs, and prior-art GCN accelerators including HyGCN and AWB-GCN, respectively, while maintaining or even improving the task accuracy. Additionally, we visualize GCoD trained graph adjacency matrices for a better understanding of its advantages.
papers.abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）已成为最先进的图学习模型。然而，众所周知，在大型图数据集上推断 GCN 非常具有挑战性，限制了它们在大型现实世界图上的应用，并阻碍了对更深、更复杂的 GCN 图的探索。这是因为现实世界的图表可能非常大且稀疏。此外，GCN 的节点度往往遵循幂律分布，因此具有高度不规则的邻接矩阵，导致数据处理和移动效率极低，从而大大限制了可实现的 GCN 加速效率。为此，本文提出了一种名为 GCoD 的 GCN 算法和加速器协同设计框架，可以很大程度上缓解上述 GCN 的不规则性并提高 GCN 的推理效率。具体来说，在算法层面，GCoD 集成了分而治之的 GCN 训练策略，在不影响模型精度的情况下，将图在局部邻域中极化为更密集或更稀疏，从而产生图邻接矩阵（大部分）仅具有两个级别的工作负载，并且具有大大增强的正则性，因此易于加速。在硬件层面，我们进一步开发了专用的双管齐下的加速器，具有独立的引擎来处理上述密集和稀疏的工作负载，进一步提高整体利用率和加速效率。大量实验和消融研究证实，我们的 GCoD 持续减少了片外访问次数，与 CPU、GPU 和包括 HyGCN 和 AWB-GCN 在内的现有技术 GCN 加速器相比，速度分别提高了 15286×、294×、7.8× 和 2.5×，同时保持甚至提高了任务精度。此外，我们将 GCoD 训练的图邻接矩阵可视化，以便更好地理解其优势。

papers.title: GPU Subwarp Interleaving.
papers.abstract: Raytracing applications have naturally high thread divergence, low warp occupancy and are limited by memory latency. In this paper, we present an architectural enhancement called Subwarp Interleaving that exploits thread divergence to hide pipeline stalls in divergent sections of low warp occupancy workloads. Subwarp Interleaving allows for fine-grained interleaved execution of diverged paths within a warp with the goal of increasing hardware utilization and reducing warp latency. However, notwithstanding the promise shown by early microbenchmark studies and an average performance upside of 6.3% (up to 20%) on a simulator across a suite of raytradng application traces, the Subwarp Interleaving design feature has shortcomings that preclude its near-term implementation. This paper introduces the reader to the challenges of raytradng and discusses a novel micro-architectural approach that, on paper, addresses many of the challenges. A thorough analysis of the idea on a production simulator reveals that the high-level motivating statistics are optimistic, and second-order effects, along with other architectural sharp edges, limit the idea’s potential. We identify Subwarp Interleaving’s primary limiters for an NVIDIA Tbring-like architecture, and we outline the conditions under which the approach could be more effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 光线追踪应用程序天生具有高线程发散性、低扭曲占用率，并且受到内存延迟的限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Subwarp Interleaving 的架构增强功能，它利用线程发散来隐藏低 warp 占用工作负载的发散部分中的管道停顿。 Subwarp Interleaving 允许对 warp 内的分叉路径进行细粒度交错执行，目的是提高硬件利用率并减少 warp 延迟。然而，尽管早期的微基准研究显示出良好的前景，并且在一套光线追踪应用程序跟踪的模拟器上平均性能提升 6.3%（高达 20%），但 Subwarp Interleaving 设计功能仍存在缺点，无法在近期实现。本文向读者介绍了光线追踪的挑战，并讨论了一种新颖的微架构方法，该方法在纸面上解决了许多挑战。在生产模拟器上对这个想法进行彻底分析表明，高级激励统计数据是乐观的，而二阶效应以及其他架构的尖锐边缘限制了该想法的潜力。我们确定了 Subwarp Interleaving 对类似 NVIDIA Tbring 架构的主要限制因素，并概述了该方法可以更有效的条件。

papers.title: Griffin: Rethinking Sparse Optimization for Deep Learning Architectures.
papers.abstract: This paper examines the design space trade-offs of DNNs accelerators aiming to achieve competitive performance and efficiency metrics for all four combinations of dense or sparse activation/weight tensors. To do so, we systematically examine the overheads of supporting sparsity on top of an optimized dense core. These overheads are modeled based on parameters that indicate how a multiplier can borrow a nonzero operation from the neighboring multipliers or future cycles. As a result of this exploration, we identify a few promising designs that perform better than prior work. Our findings suggest that even the best design targeting dual sparsity yields a 20%-30% drop in power efficiency when performing on single sparse models, i.e., those with only sparse weight or sparse activation tensors. We found that one can reuse resources of the same core to maintain high performance and efficiency when running single sparsity or dense models. We call this hybrid architecture Griffin. Griffin is 1.2, 3.0, 3.1, and 1.4x more power-efficient than state-of-the-art sparse architectures, for dense, weight-only sparse, activation-only sparse, and dual sparse models, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文研究了 DNN 加速器的设计空间权衡，旨在为密集或稀疏激活/权重张量的所有四种组合实现有竞争力的性能和效率指标。为此，我们系统地检查了在优化的密集核心之上支持稀疏性的开销。这些开销是根据指示乘法器如何从相邻乘法器或未来周期借用非零运算的参数来建模的。作为这次探索的结果，我们发现了一些有前途的设计，它们的性能比以前的工作更好。我们的研究结果表明，即使是针对双稀疏性的最佳设计，在单个稀疏模型（即仅具有稀疏权重或稀疏激活张量的模型）上执行时，功率效率也会下降 20%-30%。我们发现，在运行单一稀疏或密集模型时，可以重用同一核心的资源来保持高性能和效率。我们将这种混合架构称为 Griffin。对于密集、仅权值稀疏、仅激活稀疏和对偶稀疏模型，Griffin 的能效分别比最先进的稀疏架构高 1.2、3.0、3.1 和 1.4 倍。

papers.title: Hardware-Accelerated Hypergraph Processing with Chain-Driven Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Beyond ordinary graphs, hypergraphs are a graph representation to flexibly express complex multilateral relationships between entities. Hypergraph processing can be used to solve many real-world problems, e.g., machine learning, VLSI design, and image retrieval. Existing hypergraph processing systems handle a hypergraph in order of its hyperedge and vertex indices. This makes processing hypergraphs on generalpurpose architectures suffer significantly from excessive offchip memory accesses, most of which however are redundant in frequently accessing overlapped hyperedges and vertices, but the index-ordered scheduling destroys this potential locality.In this paper, we propose a novel Generate-Load-Apply (GLA) execution model to improve locality in hypergraph processing. The key insight of GLA is to use a concept of chain to characterize the overlapped feature of a hypergraph, exposing data reuse opportunities missed in existing hypergraph systems. The precondition of driving GLA model is to generate expected chains on the fly, but the software solution is so expensive that its overheads may outweigh the benefits achieved from the chain-driven scheduling. We further present ChGraph, the first hardware-accelerated hypergraph processing engine near each core. ChGraph is specialized in accelerating the chain generation and the chain-guided data loading (to hide memory access latency) while the general-purpose cores are responsible only for handling the apply operations of GLA. We evaluate ChGraph against a state-of-the-art hypergraph processing system Hygra on six hypergraph algorithms using five large real-world hypergraphs. Results on a simulated 16core system show that ChGraph reduces the number of offchip memory accesses by up to 4.56× and achieves up to 4.73× speedup while introducing only 0.26% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 除了普通图之外，超图是一种灵活表达实体之间复杂多边关系的图表示形式。超图处理可用于解决许多现实世界的问题，例如机器学习、VLSI 设计和图像检索。现有的超图处理系统按照超边和顶点索引的顺序处理超图。这使得通用架构上的处理超图受到过多的片外内存访问的严重影响，然而，其中大多数在频繁访问重叠的超边和顶点时是多余的，但索引排序调度破坏了这种潜在的局部性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成-加载-应用（GLA）执行模型来改善超图处理中的局部性。 GLA 的关键见解是使用链的概念来表征超图的重叠特征，揭示现有超图系统中错过的数据重用机会。驱动GLA模型的前提是动态生成预期的链，但软件解决方案非常昂贵，其开销可能超过链驱动调度所带来的好处。我们进一步介绍了 ChGraph，这是第一个靠近每个核心的硬件加速超图处理引擎。 ChGraph 专门用于加速链生成和链引导数据加载（以隐藏内存访问延迟），而通用内核仅负责处理 GLA 的应用操作。我们使用五个大型现实世界超图，在六种超图算法上针对最先进的超图处理系统 Hygra 来评估 ChGraph。模拟 16 核系统的结果表明，ChGraph 将片外存储器访问次数减少了高达 4.56 倍，并实现了高达 4.73 倍的加速，同时仅引入了 0.26% 的面积开销。

papers.title: HD-CPS: Hardware-assisted Drift-aware Concurrent Priority Scheduler for Shared Memory Multicores.
papers.abstract: Efficiently exploiting parallelism remains a challenging problem in multicore processors. For many algorithms, executing tasks in some priority order results in a work-efficient execution. However, searching high-priority tasks requires communication that hampers performance. A concurrent priority scheduler (CPS) selects high-priority tasks and schedules them on different cores. Modern CPS designs offer various strategies to select high-priority tasks at low communication cost for improved performance. However, they do not explicitly track the priority of tasks and cannot adjust task distribution if the cores are processing low-priority tasks. Moreover, they cannot estimate the right amount of communication required to select high-priority tasks. This paper critically observes that the cores’ priority drift can be quantified and used for better performance. A novel CPS design, HD-CPS is proposed to use priority as a signal to optimize drift and communication at runtime. Furthermore, compute-intensive task transfer and processing aspects of the CPS are offloaded to per-core local hardware at a low cost to enhance performance. HD-CPS is shown to consistently improve performance over several state-of-the-art software-based and hardware-assisted CPS designs. With hardware-assist, it approaches near-linear performance scaling as a function of core counts for large shared-memory multicores.
papers.abstract_zh: 有效利用并行性仍然是多核处理器中的一个具有挑战性的问题。对于许多算法来说，以某种优先级顺序执行任务可以实现高效的执行。然而，搜索高优先级任务需要进行通信，这会影响性能。并发优先级调度程序（CPS）选择高优先级任务并将它们调度到不同的内核上。现代 CPS 设计提供了各种策略来以低通信成本选择高优先级任务，从而提高性能。但是，它们不会显式跟踪任务的优先级，并且如果内核正在处理低优先级任务，则无法调整任务分配。此外，他们无法估计选择高优先级任务所需的适当通信量。本文批判性地指出，核心的优先级漂移可以量化并用于获得更好的性能。 HD-CPS 是一种新颖的 CPS 设计，旨在使用优先级作为信号来优化运行时的漂移和通信。此外，CPS 的计算密集型任务传输和处理方面以低成本卸载到每核本地硬件，以提高性能。与多种最先进的基于软件和硬件辅助的 CPS 设计相比，HD-CPS 已被证明能够持续提高性能。借助硬件辅助，它可以根据大型共享内存多核的核心数量实现近线性性能扩展。

papers.title: Hercules: Heterogeneity-Aware Inference Serving for At-Scale Personalized Recommendation.
papers.abstract: Personalized recommendation is an important class of deep-learning applications that powers a large collection of internet services and consumes a considerable amount of datacenter resources. As the scale of production-grade recommendation systems continues to grow, optimizing their serving performance and efficiency in a heterogeneous datacenter is important and can translate into infrastructure capacity saving. In this paper, we propose Hercules, an optimized framework for personalized recommendation inference serving that targets diverse industry-representative models and cloud-scale heterogeneous systems. Hercules performs a two-stage optimization procedure — offline profiling and online serving. The first stage searches the large under-explored task scheduling space with a gradient-based search algorithm achieving up to 9.0× latency-bounded throughput improvement on individual servers; it also identifies the optimal heterogeneous server architecture for each recommendation workload. The second stage performs heterogeneity-aware cluster provisioning to optimize resource mapping and allocation in response to fluctuating diurnal loads. The proposed cluster scheduler in Hercules achieves 47.7% cluster capacity saving and reduces the provisioned power by 23.7% over a state-of-the-art greedy scheduler.
papers.abstract_zh: 个性化推荐是一类重要的深度学习应用程序，它为大量互联网服务提供支持并消耗大量数据中心资源。随着生产级推荐系统规模的不断增长，优化异构数据中心的服务性能和效率非常重要，并且可以节省基础设施容量。在本文中，我们提出了 Hercules，这是一种针对不同行业代表性模型和云规模异构系统的个性化推荐推理服务的优化框架。 Hercules 执行两阶段优化过程 - 离线分析和在线服务。第一阶段使用基于梯度的搜索算法搜索尚未探索的大型任务调度空间，在单个服务器上实现高达 9.0 倍的延迟限制吞吐量改进；它还确定了每个推荐工作负载的最佳异构服务器架构。第二阶段执行异构感知集群配置，以优化资源映射和分配，以响应每日波动的负载。与最先进的贪婪调度程序相比，Hercules 中提出的集群调度程序实现了 47.7% 的集群容量节省，并将配置功率降低了 23.7%。

papers.title: HeteroGen: Automatic Synthesis of Heterogeneous Cache Coherence Protocols.
papers.abstract: We solve the two challenges architects face when designing heterogeneous processors with cache coherent shared memory. First, we develop an automated tool, called HeteroGen, for composing clusters of cores, each with its own coherence protocol. Second, we show that the output of HeteroGen adheres to a precisely defined memory consistency model that we call a compound consistency model. For a wide variety of protocols—including the MOESI variants, as well as those that are targeted towards Total Store Order and Release Consistency—we show that HeteroGen can correctly fuse them. To validate HeteroGen, we develop the first litmus tests for verifying that heterogeneous protocols satisfy compound consistency models. To understand the possible performance implications of automatic protocol generation, we compared against a publicly available manually-generated heterogeneous protocol. Our results show that performance is comparable.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们解决了架构师在设计具有缓存一致性共享内存的异构处理器时面临的两个挑战。首先，我们开发了一个名为 HeteroGen 的自动化工具，用于组成核心集群，每个核心都有自己的一致性协议。其次，我们表明 HeteroGen 的输出遵循精确定义的内存一致性模型，我们称之为复合一致性模型。对于各种协议（包括 MOESI 变体，以及针对总存储订单和发布一致性的协议），我们表明 HeteroGen 可以正确地融合它们。为了验证 HeteroGen，我们开发了第一个试金石来验证异构协议满足复合一致性模型。为了了解自动协议生成可能对性能产生的影响，我们与公开可用的手动生成的异构协议进行了比较。我们的结果表明性能具有可比性。

papers.title: HiPerRF: A Dual-Bit Dense Storage SFQ Register File.
papers.abstract: Single Flux Quantum (SFQ) superconducting technology provides significant power and performance benefits in the era of diminishing CMOS scaling. Recent advances in design tools and fabrication facilities have brought SFQ based computing to the forefront. One challenge faced by SFQ technology is to have a compact and robust on-chip memory, which can be used for implementing register files and cache memory. While dense memories are being investigated through the development of three-terminal devices such as Nanocryotrons, in this work, we build on a novel memory cell built using traditional Josephson junctions (JJs). In particular, we design a high capacity register file, called HiPerRF, that builds on a High Capacity Destructive ReadOut (HC-DRO) cell in SFQ technology. HC-DRO design can store up to three fluxon pulses, thereby providing the equivalent of 2-bit storage in a single cell. However, these cells provide only destructive readout capability, namely each value can be read only once. However, CPU register file contents are read multiple times in any program, and hence a destructive readout complicates register file design. HiPerRF provides the non-destructive property using a loopback write mechanism, thereby preserving the higher density of HC-DRO cells without compromising the multi-read demands of a register file. HiPerRF reduces the JJ count of the register file design, after accounting for all the peripheral access circuitry costs, by 56.1% and reduces the static power by 46.2%. Furthermore, HiPerRF reduces the JJ count by 16.3% even when considering an entire in-order RISC-V CPU core.
papers.abstract_zh: 单通量量子 (SFQ) 超导技术在 CMOS 尺寸缩小的时代提供了显着的功耗和性能优势。设计工具和制造设施的最新进展将基于 SFQ 的计算推向了前沿。 SFQ技术面临的一项挑战是拥有紧凑而强大的片上存储器，可用于实现寄存器文件和高速缓冲存储器。虽然通过开发纳米低温管等三端器件来研究密集存储器，但在这项工作中，我们建立了一种使用传统约瑟夫森结（JJ）构建的新型存储单元。特别是，我们设计了一个名为 HiPerRF 的高容量寄存器文件，它建立在 SFQ 技术中的高容量破坏性读出 (HC-DRO) 单元的基础上。 HC-DRO 设计可以存储多达三个 Fluxon 脉冲，从而在单个单元中提供相当于 2 位存储的功能。然而，这些单元仅提供破坏性读出能力，即每个值只能读取一次。然而，CPU寄存器文件内容在任何程序中都会被多次读取，因此破坏性读出使寄存器文件设计变得复杂。 HiPerRF 使用环回写入机制提供非破坏性特性，从而保留较高密度的 HC-DRO 单元，而不会影响寄存器文件的多次读取需求。在考虑所有外设访问电路成本后，HiPerRF 将寄存器文件设计的 JJ 数量减少了 56.1%，并将静态功耗降低了 46.2%。此外，即使考虑整个有序 RISC-V CPU 内核，HiPerRF 也将 JJ 数量减少了 16.3%。

papers.title: HyBP: Hybrid Isolation-Randomization Secure Branch Predictor.
papers.abstract: Recently exposed vulnerabilities reveal the necessity to improve the security of branch predictors. Branch predictors record history about the execution of different processes, and such information from different processes are stored in the same structure and thus accessible to each other. This leaves the attackers with the opportunities for malicious training and malicious perception. Physical or logical isolation mechanisms such as using dedicated tables and flushing during context-switch can provide security but incur non-trivial costs in space and/or execution time. Randomization mechanisms incurs the performance cost in a different way: those with higher securities add latency to the critical path of the pipeline, while the simpler alternatives leave vulnerabilities to more sophisticated attacks.This paper proposes HyBP, a practical hybrid protection and effective mechanism for building secure branch predictors. The design applies the physical isolation and randomization in the right component to achieve the best of both worlds. We propose to protect the smaller tables with physically isolation based on (thread, privilege) combination; and protect the large tables with randomization. Surprisingly, the physical isolation also significantly enhances the security of the last-level tables by naturally filtering out accesses, reducing the information flow to these bigger tables. As a result, key changes can happen less frequently and be performed conveniently at context switches. Moreover, we propose a latency hiding design for a strong cipher by precomputing the "code book" with a validated, cryptographically strong cipher. Overall, our design incurs a performance penalty of 0.5% compared to 5.1% of physical isolation under the default context switching interval in Linux.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近暴露的漏洞揭示了提高分支预测器安全性的必要性。分支预测器记录有关不同进程执行的历史记录，并且来自不同进程的此类信息存储在相同的结构中，因此可以相互访问。这给攻击者留下了恶意训练和恶意感知的机会。物理或逻辑隔离机制（例如在上下文切换期间使用专用表和刷新）可以提供安全性，但会在空间和/或执行时间方面产生不小的成本。随机化机制以不同的方式产生性能成本：具有较高安全性的机制会增加管道关键路径的延迟，而更简单的替代方案会为更复杂的攻击留下漏洞。本文提出了 HyBP，一种实用的混合保护和构建安全分支预测器的有效机制。该设计在正确的组件中应用了物理隔离和随机化，以实现两全其美。我们建议通过基于（线程、特权）组合的物理隔离来保护较小的表；并通过随机化保护大表。令人惊讶的是，物理隔离还通过自然过滤访问来显着增强最后一级表的安全性，减少流向这些较大表的信息流。因此，关键更改发生的频率会降低，并且可以在上下文切换时方便地执行。此外，我们提出了一种强密码的延迟隐藏设计，通过使用经过验证的、加密的强密码预先计算“密码本”。总体而言，与 Linux 中默认上下文切换间隔下的物理隔离 5.1% 的性能损失相比，我们的设计导致了 0.5% 的性能损失。

papers.title: Improving Locality of Irregular Updates with Hardware Assisted Propagation Blocking.
papers.abstract: Many application domains perform irregular memory updates. Irregular accesses lead to inefficient use of conventional cache hierarchies. To make better use of the cache, we focus on Propagation Blocking (PB), a software-based cache locality optimization initially designed for graph processing applications. We make two contributions in this work. First, we show that PB generalizes beyond graph processing applications to any application with unordered parallelism and irregular memory updates. Second, we identify the inefficiencies of a PB execution on conventional multicore processors and propose architecture support to further improve the performance gains from PB. Our proposed architecture, COBRA, optimizes the PB execution of a range of applications with irregular memory updates, offering speedups of up to 3.78x compared to PB (1.74x on average).
papers.abstract_zh: 许多应用程序域执行不规则的内存更新。不规则的访问导致传统缓存层次结构的使用效率低下。为了更好地利用缓存，我们重点关注传播阻塞（PB），这是一种基于软件的缓存局部性优化，最初是为图形处理应用程序设计的。我们在这项工作中做出了两项贡献。首先，我们证明 PB 可以推广到图形处理应用程序之外的任何具有无序并行性和不规则内存更新的应用程序。其次，我们确定了传统多核处理器上 PB 执行的低效率，并提出了架构支持以进一步提高 PB 的性能增益。我们提出的架构 COBRA 优化了一系列具有不规则内存更新的应用程序的 PB 执行，与 PB 相比，速度提升高达 3.78 倍（平均 1.74 倍）。

papers.title: IR-ORAM: Path Access Type Based Memory Intensity Reduction for Path-ORAM.
papers.abstract: Path ORAM is an effective ORAM (Oblivious RAM) primitive for protecting memory access patterns. Path ORAM converts each off-chip memory request from user program to tens to hundreds of memory accesses. While several schemes have been proposed to mitigate the total number of memory accesses, Path ORAM remains a highly memory intensive primitive that leads to large memory bandwidth occupation and performance degradation.In this paper, we propose IR-ORAM to reduce the memory intensity based on path access types in Path ORAM. Path accesses in Path ORAM, while being kept oblivious to ensure privacy protection, can be categorized to three types: paths for requested data blocks, paths for position map blocks, and dummy paths. We develop a set of techniques to reduce the memory intensity of each type while ensuring the obliviousness at the same time — we reduce the number of data blocks to access for each tree path, reduce the number of path accesses for position maps, and convert many dummy path accesses to early write-backs of dirty data in LLC. Our experimental results show that IR-ORAM achieves on average 42% performance improvement over the state-of-the-art while effectively enforcing the memory access obliviousness and the same level of security protection.
papers.abstract_zh: Path ORAM 是一种有效的 ORAM (Oblivious RAM) 原语，用于保护内存访问模式。路径 ORAM 将用户程序的每个片外存储器请求转换为数十到数百次存储器访问。虽然已经提出了几种方案来减少内存访问总数，但 Path ORAM 仍然是一种高度内存密集型原语，会导致大量内存带宽占用和性能下降。在本文中，我们提出 IR-ORAM 来根据 Path ORAM 中的路径访问类型来减少内存强度。 Path ORAM 中的路径访问虽然为了确保隐私保护而被忽视，但可以分为三种类型：请求数据块的路径、位置图块的路径和虚拟路径。我们开发了一套技术来减少每种类型的内存强度，同时确保遗忘性——我们减少每个树路径要访问的数据块数量，减少位置图的路径访问数量，并将许多虚拟路径访问转换为 LLC 中脏数据的早期写回。我们的实验结果表明，IR-ORAM 的性能比最先进的技术平均提高了 42%，同时有效地增强了内存访问的遗忘性和相同级别的安全保护。

papers.title: Leaky Frontends: Security Vulnerabilities in Processor Frontends.
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates new security threats due to the processor frontend in modern Intel processors. The root causes of the security threats are the multiple paths in the processor frontend that the micro-operations can take: through the Micro-Instruction Translation Engine (MITE), through the Decode Stream Buffer (DSB), also called the Micro-operation Cache, or through the Loop Stream Detector (LSD). Each path has its own unique timing and power signatures, which lead to the side- and covert-channel attacks presented in this work. Especially, the switching between the different paths leads to observable timing or power differences which, as this work demonstrates, could be exploited by attackers. Because of the different paths, the switching, and way the components are shared in the frontend between hardware threads, two separate threads are able to be mutually influenced and timing or power can reveal activity on the other thread. The security threats are not limited to multi-threading, and this work further demonstrates new ways for leaking execution information about SGX enclaves or a new in-domain Spectre variant in single-thread setting. Finally, this work demonstrates a new method for fingerprinting the microcode patches of the processor by analyzing the behavior of different paths in the frontend. The findings of this work highlight the security threats associated with the processor frontend and the need for deployment of defenses for the modern processor frontend.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文评估了现代英特尔处理器中的处理器前端带来的新安全威胁。安全威胁的根本原因是微操作在处理器前端可以采用的多条路径：通过微指令翻译引擎（MITE）、通过解码流缓冲区（DSB）（也称为微操作缓存）或通过循环流检测器（LSD）。每条路径都有其独特的时序和功率特征，这导致了本研究中提出的旁路和隐蔽通道攻击。特别是，不同路径之间的切换会导致可观察到的时序或功率差异，正如这项工作所证明的那样，这些差异可能会被攻击者利用。由于不同的路径、切换以及硬件线程之间在前端共享组件的方式，两个单独的线程能够相互影响，并且定时或功率可以揭示另一个线程上的活动。安全威胁不仅限于多线程，这项工作进一步展示了泄露 SGX enclave 执行信息的新方法或单线程设置中的新域内 Spectre 变体。最后，这项工作展示了一种通过分析前端不同路径的行为来对处理器的微代码补丁进行指纹识别的新方法。这项工作的结果强调了与处理器前端相关的安全威胁以及为现代处理器前端部署防御的必要性。

papers.title: LISA: Graph Neural Network based Portable Mapping on Spatial Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Spatial accelerators, such as Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRA), provide a promising pathway to scale the performance and power efficiency of computing systems. These accelerators depend on effective compilers to take advantage of the parallelism offered by the underlying architecture. Currently, the compilers are handcrafted for spatial accelerators, which is challenging from time to market perspective, especially with the rapid increase of diverse accelerators. In this paper, we present a portable compilation framework, called LISA, that can be tuned automatically to generate quality mapping for varied spatial accelerators. Our key contribution is to automatically identify the impact of the dataflow graph (DFG) structure characteristics (representing an application) on the mapping for a new accelerator. Towards this end, we abstract the DFG structure in graph attributes, use Graph Neural Network (GNN) to analyze the graph attributes, and identify the mapping impact for an accelerator architecture with an all-encompassing global view. Finally, we augment a simulated annealing-based mapping approach to take into account the impact of DFG structure in guiding the placement of the dataflow graph nodes and the routing of the dependencies on the accelerator. Our experimental evaluation concretely demonstrates the substantial benefit of our approach compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 空间加速器，例如粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA），为扩展计算系统的性能和功效提供了一条有前途的途径。这些加速器依赖于有效的编译器来利用底层架构提供的并行性。目前，编译器是为空间加速器手工制作的，从时间和市场角度来看，这都具有挑战性，特别是随着各种加速器的快速增加。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 LISA 的便携式编译框架，它可以自动调整以生成各种空间加速器的质量映射。我们的主要贡献是自动识别数据流图（DFG）结构特征（代表应用程序）对新加速器映射的影响。为此，我们抽象了图属性中的DFG结构，使用图神经网络（GNN）来分析图属性，并以全方位的全局视角识别加速器架构的映射影响。最后，我们增强了基于模拟退火的映射方法，以考虑 DFG 结构在指导数据流图节点的放置和加速器上的依赖项的路由方面的影响。我们的实验评估具体证明了我们的方法与最先进的解决方案相比的实质性优势。

papers.title: LoopPoint: Checkpoint-driven Sampled Simulation for Multi-threaded Applications.
papers.abstract: Generic multi-threaded sampled simulation has been a long-standing, challenging problem with the potential to help change how researchers study modern, complex computing systems. Yet, a practical solution for reducing complex multi-threaded applications into a representative sample has been elusive. Existing techniques either do not provide significant speedups to be useful (Time-based Sampling techniques can show less than a 10× speedup compared to a fully-detailed simulation) or apply only to particular synchronization types (BarrierPoint for barrier-based workloads). In addition, workload-specific solutions can be rigid with respect to region selection, which can limit the overall simulation speedup when regions are large. A solution is needed that both supports generic multi-threaded applications, no matter the synchronization primitives used, as well as allows for ease of deployment and fast evaluation.In this work, we aim to solve these challenges and propose a novel sampling technique for multi-threaded applications, called LoopPoint, that is both agnostic to the type of synchronization primitives used and scales by the similarity exhibited by the application. The proposed methodology combines several vital features, including (1) repeatable, up-front application analysis, (2) a novel clustering approach to take into account run-time parallelism, and (3) the use of loop-based simulation markers to divide the work into measurable chunks, even in the presence of spin-loops. LoopPoint identifies representative simulation regions that can be simulated in parallel to achieve speedups of up to 801× for the train input set of the multi-threaded SPEC CPU2017 benchmarks with an average simulation error of just 2.33%. For the ref inputs of CPU2017, we calculate the speedup with LoopPoint to be 11,587× on average (for parallel simulation), and up to 31,253×, demonstrating how the identification of application regularity and loops can lead to significant simulation improvements compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 通用多线程采样模拟一直是一个长期存在的、具有挑战性的问题，有可能帮助改变研究人员研究现代复杂计算系统的方式。然而，将复杂的多线程应用程序简化为代表性示例的实用解决方案一直难以实现。现有技术要么无法提供显着的加速（与完全详细的模拟相比，基于时间的采样技术可以显示出不到 10 倍的加速），要么仅适用于特定的同步类型（用于基于屏障的工作负载的 BarrierPoint）。此外，特定于工作负载的解决方案在区域选择方面可能很严格，这可能会在区域较大时限制整体模拟加速。需要一种解决方案，无论使用何种同步原语，都支持通用多线程应用程序，并且易于部署和快速评估。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决这些挑战，并提出一种名为 LoopPoint 的新型多线程应用程序采样技术，它既与所使用的同步原语的类型无关，又根据应用程序表现出的相似性进行扩展。所提出的方法结合了几个重要特征，包括（1）可重复的预先应用程序分析，（2）考虑运行时并行性的新颖聚类方法，以及（3）使用基于循环的模拟标记将工作划分为可测量的块，即使存在自旋循环。 LoopPoint 确定了可以并行模拟的代表性模拟区域，以便为多线程 SPEC CPU2017 基准测试的训练输入集实现高达 801 倍的加速，平均模拟误差仅为 2.33%。对于 CPU2017 的参考输入，我们计算出 LoopPoint 的加速比平均为 11,587 倍（对于并行仿真），最高可达 31,253 倍，展示了与最先进的解决方案相比，应用规律性和循环的识别如何带来显着的仿真改进。

papers.title: MAGMA: An Optimization Framework for Mapping Multiple DNNs on Multiple Accelerator Cores.
papers.abstract: As Deep Learning continues to drive a variety of applications in edge and cloud data centers, there is a growing trend towards building large accelerators with several sub-accelerator cores/chiplets. This work looks at the problem of supporting multi-tenancy on such accelerators. In particular, we focus on the problem of mapping jobs from several DNNs simultaneously on an accelerator. Given the extremely large search space, we formulate the search as an optimization problem and develop an optimization framework called M3E. In addition, we develop a specialized optimization algorithm called MAGMA with custom operators to enable structured sampleefficient exploration. We quantitatively compare MAGMA with several state-of-the-art methods, black-box optimization, and reinforcement learning methods across different accelerator settings (large/small accelerators) and different sub-accelerator configurations (homogeneous/heterogeneous), and observe MAGMA can consistently find better mappings.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习继续推动边缘和云数据中心的各种应用，构建具有多个子加速器核心/小芯片的大型加速器的趋势日益增长。这项工作着眼于在此类加速器上支持多租户的问题。我们特别关注在加速器上同时映射来自多个 DNN 的作业的问题。考虑到极大的搜索空间，我们将搜索表述为优化问题，并开发了一个称为 M3E 的优化框架。此外，我们还开发了一种名为 MAGMA 的专门优化算法，具有自定义运算符，可实现结构化样本高效探索。我们将 MAGMA 与几种最先进的方法、黑盒优化和强化学习方法在不同的加速器设置（大/小加速器）和不同的子加速器配置（同质/异质）上进行定量比较，并观察 MAGMA 能够一致地找到更好的映射。

papers.title: Mithril: Cooperative Row Hammer Protection on Commodity DRAM Leveraging Managed Refresh.
papers.abstract: Since its public introduction in the mid-2010s, the Row Hammer (RH) phenomenon has drawn significant attention from the research community due to its security implications. Although many RH-protection schemes have been proposed by processor vendors, DRAM manufacturers, and academia, they still have shortcomings. Solutions implemented in the memory controller (MC) incur increasingly higher costs due to their conservative design for the worst case in terms of the number of DRAM banks and RH threshold to support. Meanwhile, DRAM-side implementation either has a limited time margin for RH-protection measures or requires extensive modifications to the standard DRAM interface. Recently, a new command for RH-protection has been introduced in the DDR5/LPDDR5 standards, referred to as refresh management (RFM). RFM enables the separation of the tasks for RH-protection to both MC and DRAM by having the former generate an RFM command at a specific activation frequency and the latter take proper RH-protection measures within a given time window. Although promising, no existing study presents and analyzes RFM-based solutions for RH-protection. In this paper, we propose Mithril, the first RFM interface-compatible, DRAM-MC cooperative RH-protection scheme providing deterministic protection guarantees. Mithril has minimal energy overheads for common use cases without adversarial memory access patterns. We also introduce Mithril+, an optional extension to provide minimal performance overheads at the expense of a tiny modification to the MC, while utilizing existing DRAM commands.
papers.abstract_zh: 自 2010 年代中期公开推出以来，Row Hammer (RH) 现象因其安全影响而引起了研究界的高度关注。尽管处理器供应商、DRAM制造商和学术界已经提出了许多RH保护方案，但它们仍然存在缺陷。在内存控制器 (MC) 中实施的解决方案会产生越来越高的成本，因为它们在 DRAM 组数量和要支持的 RH 阈值方面针对最坏情况进行了保守设计。同时，DRAM 端的实施要么对 RH 保护措施的时间裕度有限，要么需要对标准 DRAM 接口进行大量修改。最近，DDR5/LPDDR5 标准中引入了一个新的 RH 保护命令，称为刷新管理 (RFM)。 RFM 可以将 RH 保护任务分离到 MC 和 DRAM，前者以特定激活频率生成 RFM 命令，后者在给定时间窗口内采取适当的 RH 保护措施。尽管前景广阔，但现有研究还没有提出和分析基于 RFM 的 RH 保护解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 Mithril，这是第一个兼容 RFM 接口、DRAM-MC 协作的 RH 保护方案，提供确定性保护保证。对于没有对抗性内存访问模式的常见用例，Mithril 的能源开销最小。我们还引入了 Mithril+，这是一种可选扩展，可在利用现有 DRAM 命令的同时，以对 MC 进行微小修改为代价提供最小的性能开销。

papers.title: MULTI-CLOCK: Dynamic Tiering for Hybrid Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of i-memory computing powered by data-intensive applications has increased demand for DRAM in servers. However, a DRAM-based system can be limiting for modern workloads because of its capacity, cost, and power consumption characteristics. Hybrid memory systems, which consist of different types of memory, such as DRAM and persistent memory, can help address many of these limitations. One promising direction that has been explored in the recent literature involves introducing persistent memory devices as a second memory tier that is directly exposed to the CPU. The resulting tiered memory design must address the fundamental challenge of placing the right data in the right memory tier at the right time while minimizing overhead. We present MULTI -CLOCK, an efficient, low-overhead hybrid memory system that relies on a unique page selection technique for tier placement. MULTl-CLOCK’s page selection captures both page access recency and frequency, and enables moving pages to appropriate tiers at the right time within hybrid memory systems. We implemented a Linux-based, NUMA-aware version of MULTI-CLOCK that is entirely transparent and backward compatible with any existing application. Our evaluation with diverse real-world applications such as graph processing and key-value stores shows that MULTI -CLOCK can improve the average throughput by as much as 352% when compared with several state-of-the-art techniques for tiered memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 由数据密集型应用程序驱动的内存计算的快速增长增加了服务器对 DRAM 的需求。然而，由于容量、成本和功耗特性，基于 DRAM 的系统可能会限制现代工作负载。混合内存系统由不同类型的内存（例如 DRAM 和持久内存）组成，可以帮助解决许多这些限制。最近文献中探索的一个有希望的方向涉及引入持久内存设备作为直接暴露给 CPU 的第二内存层。由此产生的分层内存设计必须解决基本挑战，即在正确的时间将正确的数据放置在正确的内存层中，同时最大限度地减少开销。我们推出了 MULTI-CLOCK，这是一种高效、低开销的混合内存系统，它依赖于独特的页面选择技术来进行层放置。 MULTl-CLOCK 的页面选择捕获页面访问新近度和频率，并能够在混合内存系统中的正确时间将页面移动到适当的层。我们实现了基于 Linux、NUMA 感知的 MULTI-CLOCK 版本，该版本完全透明且向后兼容任何现有应用程序。我们对图形处理和键值存储等各种实际应用程序的评估表明，与几种最先进的分层内存技术相比，MULTI-CLOCK 可以将平均吞吐量提高多达 352%。

papers.title: Near-Stream Computing: General and Transparent Near-Cache Acceleration.
