papers.abstract: Data movement and communication have become the primary bottlenecks in large multicore systems. The near-data computing paradigm provides a solution: move computation to where the data resides on-chip. Two challenges keep near-data computing from the mainstream: lack of programmer transparency and applicability. Programmer transparency requires providing sequential memory semantics with distributed computation, which requires burdensome coordination. Broad applicability requires support for combinations of address patterns (e.g. affine, indirect, multi-operand) and computation types (loads, stores, reductions, atomics).We find that streams – coarse grain memory access patterns – are a powerful ISA abstraction for near data offloading. Tracking data access at stream-granularity heavily reduces the burden of coordination for providing sequential semantics. Decomposing the problem using streams means that arbitrary combinations of address and computation patterns can be combined for broad generality.With this insight, we develop a paradigm called near-stream computing, comprising a compiler, CPU ISA extension, and a microarchitecture that facilitate programmer transparent computation offloading to shared caches. We evaluate our system on OpenMP kernels that stress broad addressing and compute behavior, and find that 46% of dynamic instructions can be offloaded to remote banks, reducing the network traffic by 76%. Overall it achieves 2.13× speedup over a state-of-the-art near-data computing technique, with a 1.90× energy efficiency gain.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据移动和通信已成为大型多核系统的主要瓶颈。近数据计算范式提供了一个解决方案：将计算转移到数据驻留在片上的位置。有两个挑战使近数据计算远离主流：缺乏程序员透明度和适用性。程序员透明度需要通过分布式计算提供顺序内存语义，这需要繁重的协调。广泛的适用性需要支持地址模式（例如仿射、间接、多操作数）和计算类型（加载、存储、缩减、原子）的组合。我们发现流（粗粒度内存访问模式）是近数据卸载的强大 ISA 抽象。以流粒度跟踪数据访问大大减轻了提供顺序语义的协调负担。使用流分解问题意味着可以组合地址和计算模式的任意组合以实现广泛的通用性。有了这种洞察力，我们开发了一种称为近流计算的范例，包括编译器、CPU ISA 扩展和微体系结构，有助于程序员透明地将计算卸载到共享缓存。我们在强调广泛寻址和计算行为的 OpenMP 内核上评估我们的系统，发现 46% 的动态指令可以卸载到远程库，从而将网络流量减少 76%。总体而言，它比最先进的近数据计算技术实现了 2.13 倍的加速，并具有 1.90 倍的能效增益。

papers.title: NeuroSync: A Scalable and Accurate Brain Simulator Using Safe and Efficient Speculation.
papers.abstract: To understand and mimic the working mechanism of the brain, neuroscientists rely on brain simulations that operate in a time-driven manner. The simulation involves evaluating how the neurons change their states over time and transferring spikes to the connected neurons through synapses. It also simulates learning by evaluating how the synapses change their weights according to the spiking activity of the neurons. To explore various behaviors of the brain and thus make great advances, neuroscientists need a methodology to support large-scale simulations in both an accurate and efficient manner. For accurate simulations, existing simulators adopt a time-precise simulation methodology where the simulator computes all the neuronal and the synaptic state changes in time order. Unfortunately, they suffer from significant underutilization and energy inefficiency as the simulator scales.In this paper, we present NeuroSync, a fast, energy-efficient, and scalable hardware-based accelerator for accurate brain simulations. The key idea is to adopt a speculative simulation methodology at a minimum overhead along with architectural support. NeuroSync achieves high efficiency using an optimal dataflow for the speculative simulations. At the same time, it ensures simulation accuracy by carefully designing a rollback and recovery mechanism to handle mis-speculations. To implement the methodology at a low cost, NeuroSync further proposes a speculation-optimal learning simulation method. Our evaluations show that 64-chip NeuroSync achieves 3.37× speedup and 3.81× higher energy efficiency with only 10.96% area overhead. The evaluations also show that NeuroSync is extremely scalable with higher speedup as the system scales.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了理解和模拟大脑的工作机制，神经科学家依靠以时间驱动的方式运行的大脑模拟。该模拟涉及评估神经元如何随时间改变其状态，并通过突触将尖峰传输到连接的神经元。它还通过评估突触如何根据神经元的尖峰活动改变其权重来模拟学习。为了探索大脑的各种行为并取得巨大进步，神经科学家需要一种方法来以准确和有效的方式支持大规模模拟。为了进行精确的模拟，现有的模拟器采用时间精确的模拟方法，其中模拟器按时间顺序计算所有神经元和突触状态的变化。不幸的是，随着模拟器规模的扩大，它们的利用率明显不足，能源效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuroSync，一种快速、节能且可扩展的基于硬件的加速器，用于精确的大脑模拟。关键思想是以最小的开销采用推测模拟方法以及架构支持。 NeuroSync 使用最佳数据流进行推测模拟，实现了高效率。同时，它通过精心设计回滚和恢复机制来处理错误推测，从而确保模拟精度。为了以低成本实现该方法，NeuroSync进一步提出了一种推测最优学习模拟方法。我们的评估显示，64 芯片 NeuroSync 实现了 3.37 倍的加速和 3.81 倍的能源效率，而面积开销仅为 10.96%。评估还表明，NeuroSync 具有极高的可扩展性，随着系统的扩展，加速速度也会更高。

papers.title: Not All SWAPs Have the Same Cost: A Case for Optimization-Aware Qubit Routing.
papers.abstract: Despite rapid advances in quantum computing technologies, the qubit connectivity limitation remains to be a critical challenge. Both near-term NISQ quantum computers and relatively long-term scalable quantum architectures do not offer full connectivity. As a result, quantum circuits may not be directly executed on quantum hardware, and a quantum compiler needs to perform qubit routing to make the circuit compatible with the device layout. During the qubit routing step, the compiler inserts SWAP gates and performs circuit transformations. Given the connectivity topology of the target hardware, there are typically multiple qubit routing candidates. The state-of-the-art compilers use a cost function to evaluate the number of SWAP gates for different routes and then select the one with the minimum number of SWAP gates. After qubit routing, the quantum compiler performs gate optimizations upon the circuit with the newly inserted SWAP gates.In this paper, we observe that the aforementioned qubit routing is not optimal, and qubit routing should not be independent on subsequent gate optimizations. We find that with the consideration of gate optimizations, not all of the SWAP gates have the same basis-gate cost. These insights lead to the development of our qubit routing algorithm, NASSC (Not All Swaps have the Same Cost). NASSC is the first algorithm that considers the subsequent optimizations during the routing step. Our optimization-aware qubit routing leads to better routing decisions and benefits subsequent optimizations. We also propose a new optimization-aware decomposition for the inserted SWAP gates. Our experiments show that the routing overhead compiled with our routing algorithm is reduced by up to 69.30% (21.30% on average) in the number of CNOT gates and up to 43.50% (7.61% on average) in the circuit depth compared with the state-of-the-art scheme, SABRE.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管量子计算技术取得了快速进步，但量子位连接限制仍然是一个严峻的挑战。近期的 NISQ 量子计算机和相对长期的可扩展量子架构都不提供完全连接。因此，量子电路可能无法直接在量子硬件上执行，并且量子编译器需要执行量子位路由以使电路与器件布局兼容。在量子位路由步骤中，编译器插入交换门并执行电路转换。给定目标硬件的连接拓扑，通常存在多个候选量子位路由。最先进的编译器使用成本函数来评估不同路由的 SWAP 门数量，然后选择 SWAP 门数量最少的一个。在量子位路由之后，量子编译器对新插入的交换门的电路进行门优化。在本文中，我们观察到上述量子位路由不是最优的，并且量子位路由不应该独立于后续的门优化。我们发现，考虑到门优化，并非所有的 SWAP 门都具有相同的基础门成本。这些见解促成了我们的量子位路由算法 NASSC（并非所有交换都具有相同成本）的开发。 NASSC 是第一个在路由步骤中考虑后续优化的算法。我们的优化感知量子位路由可以带来更好的路由决策，并有利于后续优化。我们还为插入的交换门提出了一种新的优化感知分解。我们的实验表明，与最先进的方案 SABRE 相比，使用我们的路由算法编译的路由开销在 CNOT 门的数量上减少了 69.30%（平均 21.30%），在电路深度上减少了 43.50%（平均 7.61%）。

papers.title: NVMExplorer: A Framework for Cross-Stack Comparisons of Embedded Non-Volatile Memories.
papers.abstract: The current computing landscape is dominated by data-intensive applications, making data movement one of the most prominent performance bottlenecks. With repeated off-chip memory access to DRAM driving up power, and SRAM technology scaling and leakage power limiting the efficiency of embedded memories, there is a need for new memory systems that can enable denser, more energy-efficient future on-chip storage. The actively expanding field of emerging, embeddable non-volatile memory (eNVM) technologies is providing many potential candidates to satisfy this need. However, eNVM cell technologies are in vastly different stages of development and introduce distinct trade-offs in terms of density, read, write, and reliability characteristics.We present NVMExplorer (http://nvmexplorer.seas.harvard.edu/): a cross-stack design space exploration framework to compare and evaluate future on-chip memory solutions with system constraints and application-level impacts in-the-loop. This work uses NVMExplorer to evaluate eNVM-based storage for a range of application and system contexts including machine learning on the edge, graph analytics, and general purpose cache. Additionally, NVMExplorer provides an interactive and easily navigable set of data visualizations, which allow users to quickly answer their specific questions regarding eNVMs, filter according to system and application constraints, and efficiently iterate and refine the design space.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的计算领域以数据密集型应用程序为主，这使得数据移动成为最突出的性能瓶颈之一。由于对 DRAM 的重复片外存储器访问会增加功耗，而 SRAM 技术的扩展和泄漏功耗限制了嵌入式存储器的效率，因此需要新的存储器系统来实现更密集、更节能的未来片上存储。新兴嵌入式非易失性存储器 (eNVM) 技术领域的积极扩展为满足这一需求提供了许多潜在的候选技术。然而，eNVM 单元技术处于截然不同的发展阶段，并在密度、读取、写入和可靠性特性方面引入了不同的权衡。我们推出了 NVMExplorer (http://nvmexplorer.seas.harvard.edu/)：一个跨堆栈设计空间探索框架，用于比较和评估未来片上存储器解决方案与系统约束和应用级环内影响。这项工作使用 NVMExplorer 来评估一系列应用程序和系统环境中基于 eNVM 的存储，包括边缘机器学习、图形分析和通用缓存。此外，NVMExplorer 还提供了一组交互式且易于导航的数据可视化，使用户能够快速回答有关 eNVM 的特定问题，根据系统和应用程序限制进行筛选，并有效地迭代和完善设计空间。

papers.title: Only Buffer When You Need To: Reducing On-chip GPU Traffic with Reconfigurable Local Atomic Buffers.
papers.abstract: In recent years, due to their wide availability and ease of programming, GPUs have emerged as the accelerator of choice for a wide variety of applications including graph analytics and machine learning training. These applications use atomics to update shared global variables. However, since GPUs do not efficiently support atomics, this limits scalability. We propose to use hardware-software co-design to address this bottleneck and improve scalability. At the software level, we leverage recently proposed extensions to the GPU memory consistency model to identify atomic updates where the ordering can be relaxed. For example, in these algorithms the updates are commutative. At the hardware level, we propose a buffering mechanism that extends the reconfigurable local SRAM per SM. By buffering partial updates of these atomics locally, our design increases reuse, reduces atomic serialization cost, and minimizes overhead. Thus, our mechanism alleviates the impact of global atomic updates and improves performance by 28%, energy by 19%, and network traffic by 19% on average and outperforms hLRC and PHI.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，由于其广泛的可用性和易于编程的特点，GPU 已成为各种应用（包括图形分析和机器学习训练）的首选加速器。这些应用程序使用原子来更新共享全局变量。然而，由于 GPU 不能有效地支持原子，这限制了可扩展性。我们建议使用硬件-软件协同设计来解决这个瓶颈并提高可扩展性。在软件层面，我们利用最近提出的 GPU 内存一致性模型扩展来识别可以放宽排序的原子更新。例如，在这些算法中，更新是可交换的。在硬件层面，我们提出了一种缓冲机制，可以扩展每个 SM 的可重新配置本地 SRAM。通过在本地缓冲这些原子的部分更新，我们的设计提高了重用性，降低了原子序列化成本，并最大限度地减少了开销。因此，我们的机制减轻了全局原子更新的影响，性能平均提高了 28%，能耗提高了 19%，网络流量平均提高了 19%，并且优于 hLRC 和 PHI。

papers.title: Parallel Time Batching: Systolic-Array Acceleration of Sparse Spiking Neural Computation.
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are brain- inspired computing models incorporating unique temporal dynamics and event-driven processing. Rich dynamics in both space and time offer great challenges and opportunities for efficient processing of sparse spatiotemporal data compared with conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). Specifically, the additional overheads for handling the added temporal dimension limit the computational capabilities of neuromorphic accelerators. Iterative processing at every time-point with sparse inputs in a temporally sequential manner not only degrades the utilization of the systolic array but also intensifies data movement.In this work, we propose a novel technique and architecture that significantly improve utilization and data movement while efficiently handling temporal sparsity of SNNs on systolic arrays. Unlike time-sequential processing in conventional SNN accelerators, we pack multiple time points into a single time window (TW) and process the computations induced by active synaptic inputs falling under several TWs in parallel, leading to the proposed parallel time batching. It allows weight reuse across multiple time points and enhances the utilization of the systolic array with reduced idling of processing elements, overcoming the irregularity of sparse firing activities. We optimize the granularity of time-domain processing, i.e., the TW size, which significantly impacts the data reuse and utilization. We further boost the utilization efficiency by simultaneously scheduling non-overlapping sparse spiking activities onto the array. The proposed architectures offer a unifying solution for general spiking neural networks with commonly exhibited temporal sparsity, a key challenge in hardware acceleration, delivering 248X energy-delay product (EDP) improvement on average compared to an SNN baseline for accelerating various networks. Compared to ANN based accelerators, our approach improves EDP by 47X on the CIFAR10 dataset.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是受大脑启发的计算模型，融合了独特的时间动态和事件驱动的处理。与传统的人工神经网络（ANN）相比，丰富的空间和时间动态为稀疏时空数据的高效处理提供了巨大的挑战和机遇。具体来说，处理增加的时间维度的额外开销限制了神经形态加速器的计算能力。以时间顺序方式在每个时间点使用稀疏输入进行迭代处理不仅会降低脉动阵列的利用率，还会加剧数据移动。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的技术和架构，可以显着提高利用率和数据移动，同时有效处理脉动阵列上 SNN 的时间稀疏性。与传统 SNN 加速器中的时序处理不同，我们将多个时间点打包到单个时间窗口 (TW) 中，并并行处理由多个 TW 下的活动突触输入引起的计算，从而产生所提出的并行时间批处理。它允许跨多个时间点重用，并通过减少处理元件的空闲来提高脉动阵列的利用率，克服稀疏发射活动的不规则性。我们优化了时域处理的粒度，即TW大小，这显着影响了数据的重用和利用率。我们通过同时将不重叠的稀疏尖峰活动调度到阵列上来进一步提高利用效率。所提出的架构为一般尖峰神经网络提供了统一的解决方案，该神经网络通常表现出时间稀疏性，这是硬件加速中的一个关键挑战，与用于加速各种网络的 SNN 基线相比，平均能量延迟积 (EDP) 提高了 248 倍。与基于 ANN 的加速器相比，我们的方法在 CIFAR10 数据集上将 EDP 提高了 47 倍。

papers.title: PIMCloud: QoS-Aware Resource Management of Latency-Critical Applications in Clouds with Processing-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: The slowdown of Moore’s Law, combined with advances in 3D stacking of logic and memory, have pushed architects to revisit the concept of processing-in-memory (PIM) to overcome the memory wall bottleneck. This PIM renaissance finds itself in a very different computing landscape from the one twenty years ago, as more and more computation shifts to the cloud. Most PIM architecture papers still focus on best-effort applications, while PIM’s impact on latency-critical cloud applications is not well understood.This paper explores how datacenters can exploit PIM architectures in the context of latency-critical applications. We adopt a general-purpose cloud server with HBM-based, 3D-stacked logic+memory modules, and study the impact of PIM on six diverse interactive cloud applications. We reveal the previously neglected opportunity that PIM presents to these services, and show the importance of properly managing PIM-related resources to meet the QoS targets of interactive services and maximize resource efficiency. Then, we present PIMCloud, a QoS-aware resource manager designed for cloud systems with PIM allowing colocation of multiple latency-critical and best-effort applications. We show that PIMCloud efficiently manages PIM resources: it (1) improves effective machine utilization by up to 70% and 85% (average 24% and 33%) under 2-app and 3-app mixes, compared to the best state-of-the-art manager; (2) helps latency-critical applications meet QoS; and (3) adapts to varying load patterns.
papers.abstract_zh: 摩尔定律的放缓，加上逻辑和内存 3D 堆叠的进步，促使架构师重新审视内存处理 (PIM) 的概念，以克服内存墙瓶颈。随着越来越多的计算转移到云端，PIM 的复兴发现自己处于一个与二十年前截然不同的计算环境中。大多数 PIM 架构论文仍然关注尽力而为的应用程序，而 PIM 对延迟关键型云应用程序的影响尚不清楚。本文探讨了数据中心如何在延迟关键型应用程序的环境中利用 PIM 架构。我们采用具有基于HBM、3D堆叠逻辑+内存模块的通用云服务器，并研究PIM对六种不同的交互式云应用程序的影响。我们揭示了 PIM 为这些服务提供的先前被忽视的机会，并展示了正确管理 PIM 相关资源以满足交互式服务的 QoS 目标并最大化资源效率的重要性。然后，我们推出 PIMCloud，这是一种 QoS 感知资源管理器，专为具有 PIM 的云系统而设计，允许托管多个延迟关键且尽力而为的应用程序。我们表明，PIMCloud 可以有效地管理 PIM 资源：(1) 与最先进的管理器相比，在 2 个应用程序和 3 个应用程序混合下，它 (1) 将有效机器利用率提高了高达 70% 和 85%（平均 24% 和 33%）； (2) 帮助延迟关键型应用满足 QoS 要求； (3) 适应不同的负载模式。

papers.title: Q-GPU: A Recipe of Optimizations for Quantum Circuit Simulation Using GPUs.
papers.abstract: In recent years, quantum computing has undergone significant developments and has established its supremacy in many application domains. While quantum hardware is accessible to the public through the cloud environment, a robust and efficient quantum circuit simulator is necessary to investigate the constraints and foster quantum computing development, such as quantum algorithm development and quantum device architecture exploration. In this paper, we observe that most of the publicly available quantum circuit simulators (e.g., QISKit from IBM, QDK from Microsoft, and Qsim-Cirq from Google) suffer from slow simulation and poor scalability when the number of qubits increases. To this end, we systematically investigate the deficiencies in quantum circuit simulation (QCS) and propose Q-GPU, a framework that leverages GPUs with comprehensive optimizations to allow efficient and scalable QCS. Specifically, Q-GPU features i) proactive state amplitude transfer, ii) zero state amplitude pruning, iii) delayed qubit involvement, and iv) lossless nonzero state amplitude compression. Experimental results across nine representative quantum circuits indicate that Q-GPU significantly reduces the execution time of the state-of-the-art GPU-based QCS by 71.89% (3.55× speedup). Q-GPU also outperforms the state-of-the-art OpenMP CPU implementation, the Google Qsim-Cirq simulator, and the Microsoft QDK simulator by 1.49×, 2.02×, and 10.82×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，量子计算取得了长足的发展，并在许多应用领域确立了其霸主地位。虽然公众可以通过云环境访问量子硬件，但需要强大且高效的量子电路模拟器来研究约束条件并促进量子计算的发展，例如量子算法开发和量子设备架构探索。在本文中，我们观察到，当量子比特数量增加时，大多数公开可用的量子电路模拟器（例如 IBM 的 QISKit、微软的 QDK 和 Google 的 Qsim-Cirq）都会出现模拟速度慢且可扩展性差的问题。为此，我们系统地研究了量子电路模拟（QCS）的缺陷，并提出了 Q-GPU，这是一个利用 GPU 进行全面优化的框架，以实现高效且可扩展的 QCS。具体来说，Q-GPU 具有以下特点：i) 主动状态幅度传输，ii) 零状态幅度修剪，iii) 延迟量子位参与，以及 iv) 无损非零状态幅度压缩。九个代表性量子电路的实验结果表明，Q-GPU 将最先进的基于 GPU 的 QCS 的执行时间显着减少了 71.89%（3.55 倍加速）。 Q-GPU 的性能还分别优于最先进的 OpenMP CPU 实现、Google Qsim-Cirq 模拟器和 Microsoft QDK 模拟器 1.49 倍、2.02 倍和 10.82 倍。

papers.title: QuantumNAS: Noise-Adaptive Search for Robust Quantum Circuits.
papers.abstract: Quantum noise is the key challenge in Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) computers. Previous work for mitigating noise has primarily focused on gate-level or pulse-level noise-adaptive compilation. However, limited research has explored a higher level of optimization by making the quantum circuits themselves resilient to noise.In this paper, we propose QuantumNAS, a comprehensive framework for noise-adaptive co-search of the variational circuit and qubit mapping. Variational quantum circuits are a promising approach for constructing quantum neural networks for machine learning and variational ansatzes for quantum simulation. However, finding the best variational circuit and its optimal parameters is challenging due to the large design space and parameter training cost. We propose to decouple the circuit search from parameter training by introducing a novel SuperCircuit. The SuperCircuit is constructed with multiple layers of pre-defined parameterized gates (e.g., U3 and CU3) and trained by iteratively sampling and updating the parameter subsets (SubCircuits) of it. It provides an accurate estimation of SubCircuits performance trained from scratch. Then we perform an evolutionary co-search of SubCircuit and its qubit mapping. The SubCircuit performance is estimated with parameters inherited from SuperCircuit and simulated with real device noise models. Finally, we perform iterative gate pruning and finetuning to remove redundant gates in a fine-grained manner.Extensively evaluated with 12 quantum machine learning (QML) and variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) benchmarks on 14 quantum computers, QuantumNAS significantly outperforms noise-unaware search, human, random, and existing noise-adaptive qubit mapping baselines. For QML tasks, QuantumNAS is the first to demonstrate over 95% 2-class, 85% 4-class, and 32% 10-class classification accuracy on real quantum computers. It also achieves the lowest eigenvalue for VQE tasks on H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>, H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O, LiH, CH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">4</inf>, BeH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> compared with UCCSD baselines. We also open-source the TorchQuantum library for fast training of parameterized quantum circuits to facilitate future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子噪声是噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 计算机的主要挑战。以前的降噪工作主要集中在门级或脉冲级噪声自适应编译。然而，有限的研究通过使量子电路本身具有抗噪声能力来探索更高水平的优化。在本文中，我们提出了 QuantumNAS，一种用于变分电路和量子位映射的噪声自适应协同搜索的综合框架。变分量子电路是构建用于机器学习的量子神经网络和用于量子模拟的变分分析的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于设计空间和参数训练成本较大，寻找最佳变分电路及其最佳参数具有挑战性。我们建议通过引入一种新颖的超级电路来将电路搜索与参数训练解耦。 SuperCircuit 由多层预定义参数化门（例如 U3 和 CU3）构成，并通过迭代采样和更新其参数子集（子电路）进行训练。它提供了对从头开始训练的子电路性能的准确估计。然后我们对 SubCircuit 及其量子位映射进行进化联合搜索。 SubCircuit 性能是使用从 SuperCircuit 继承的参数进行估计的，并使用真实器件噪声模型进行模拟。最后，我们执行迭代门修剪和微调，以细粒度的方式删除冗余门。在 14 台量子计算机上使用 12 个量子机器学习 (QML) 和变分量子本征求解器 (VQE) 基准进行了广泛评估，QuantumNAS 的性能显着优于无噪声搜索、人类、随机和现有的噪声自适应量子位映射基线。对于 QML 任务，QuantumNAS 率先在真实量子计算机上展示了超过 95% 的 2 类、85% 4 类和 32% 10 类分类精度。它还在 H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>、H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" 上实现了 VQE 任务的最低特征值xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O、LiH、CH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">4</inf>、BeH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> 与 UCCSD 基线相比。我们还开源了 TorchQuantum 库，用于快速训练参数化量子电路，以促进未来的研究。

papers.title: QULATIS: A Quantum Error Correction Methodology toward Lattice Surgery.
papers.abstract: Due to the high error rate of a qubit, detecting and correcting errors on it is essential for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). Surface code (SC) associated with its decoding algorithm is one of the most promising quantum error correction (QEC) methods because it has high fidelity and requires only nearest neighbor qubits connectivity. To realize FTQC, we need a decoder circuit capable of not only QEC in a 3-D lattice to deal with errors in measurement on ancillary qubits but also quantum operations on logically constructed qubits. Whereas several methods to perform logical operations on SC, such as lattice surgery (LS), are known, no practical decoders supporting them have been proposed yet.One of the most promising QC implementations today is made up of superconducting qubits that are located in a cryogenic environment. To reduce the hardware complexity of QC and latency of QEC, we are supposed to perform QEC in a cryogenic environment. Hence a power-efficient decoder is required due to the limited power budget inside a dilution refrigerator.In this paper, we propose an online-QEC algorithm that supports LS with a practical decoder circuit, as well as a new FTQC architecture. We design a key building block of the proposed architecture with a hybrid of SFQ- and Cryo-CMOS-based digital circuits and evaluate it with a SPICE-level simulation. Each logic element includes about 2400 Josephson junctions, and power consumption is estimated to be 2.07 μW when operating with a 2 GHz clock frequency. We evaluate the decoder performance by a quantum error simulator for an essential operation of LS with code distances up to 11, and it achieves a 0.6% accuracy threshold. In an LS-based architecture further supporting a magic-state distillation protocol, which is expected to run for near-term universal quantum computing, we evaluate the QEC performance and power consumption of the architecture and show that it is practical to be operated in 4-K temperature region of a dilution refrigerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于量子位的错误率很高，检测和纠正其错误对于容错量子计算（FTQC）至关重要。与其解码算法相关的表面码（SC）是最有前途的量子纠错（QEC）方法之一，因为它具有高保真度并且仅需要最近邻量子位连接。为了实现 FTQC，我们需要一个解码器电路，不仅能够在 3-D 晶格中进行 QEC，以处理辅助量子位的测量误差，而且能够对逻辑构造的量子位进行量子操作。尽管已知有几种在 SC 上执行逻辑运算的方法，例如晶格手术 (LS)，但尚未提出支持它们的实用解码器。当今最有前途的 QC 实现之一是由位于低温环境中的超导量子位组成。为了降低QC的硬件复杂性和QEC的延迟，我们应该在低温环境中执行QEC。因此，由于稀释冰箱内的功率预算有限，因此需要高能效的解码器。在本文中，我们提出了一种在线QEC算法，该算法通过实用的解码器电路以及新的FTQC架构来支持LS。我们利用基于 SFQ 和 Cryo-CMOS 的数字电路的混合设计了所提出架构的关键构建模块，并通过 SPICE 级仿真对其进行了评估。每个逻辑元件包括约 2400 个约瑟夫森结，在 2 GHz 时钟频率下工作时功耗估计为 2.07 μW。我们通过量子误差模拟器评估了代码距离高达 11 的 LS 基本操作的解码器性能，并且达到了 0.6% 的准确度阈值。在基于 LS 的架构中，进一步支持魔态蒸馏协议，预计将在近期通用量子计算中运行，我们评估了该架构的 QEC 性能和功耗，并表明在稀释制冷机的 4-K 温度范围内运行是可行的。

papers.title: Reducing Load Latency with Cache Level Prediction.
papers.abstract: High load latency that results from deep cache hierarchies and relatively slow main memory is an important limiter of single-thread performance. Data prefetch helps reduce this latency by fetching data up the hierarchy before it is requested by load instructions. However, data prefetching has shown to be imperfect in many situations. We propose cache-level prediction to complement prefetchers. Our method predicts which memory hierarchy level a load will access allowing the memory loads to start earlier, and thereby saves many cycles. The predictor provides high prediction accuracy at the cost of just one cycle added latency to L1 misses. Level prediction reduces the memory access latency by 20% on average, and provides speedup of 10.3% over a conventional baseline, and 6.1% over a boosted baseline on generic, graph, and HPC applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 深缓存层次结构和相对较慢的主内存导致的高负载延迟是单线程性能的重要限制因素。数据预取通过在加载指令请求数据之前沿层次结构提取数据来帮助减少延迟。然而，数据预取在许多情况下都是不完美的。我们提出缓存级预测来补充预取器。我们的方法预测加载将访问哪个内存层次结构级别，从而允许内存加载更早开始，从而节省许多周期。该预测器提供了较高的预测精度，但代价是仅在 L1 缺失中增加了一个周期的延迟。级别预测将内存访问延迟平均减少了 20%，与传统基准相比，加速速度提高了 10.3%，在通用、图形和 HPC 应用程序上，与增强基准相比，加速速度提高了 6.1%。

papers.title: ReGNN: A Redundancy-Eliminated Graph Neural Networks Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs), which extend conventional deep learning technologies to process graph-structured data, have shown its powerful graph representation learning ability. Existing typical GNNs utilize neighborhood message passing mechanism based on neural networks that updates target vertex representations by aggregating feature messages from neighboring source vertices. To accelerate the computations of GNNs, some customized accelerators, which follow the neighborhood aggregation computation pattern for each vertex, have been proposed. Through analysis, we observe that a naive implementation of the neighborhood aggregation results in redundant computations and communications.In this paper, we propose a novel redundancy-eliminated GNN accelerator, shortly termed as ReGNN. ReGNN is supported by an algorithm and architecture co-design. We first propose a dynamic redundancy-eliminated neighborhood message passing algorithm for GNNs. Then a novel architecture is designed to support the proposed algorithm and transform the redundancy elimination into performance improvement. ReGNN is also a configurable pipelined architecture that can be configured to support different GNN variants. In terms of the same computations, ReGNN provides the same accuracy as traditional GNNs. To the best of our knowledge, ReGNN is the first accelerator that can eliminate computation redundancy in GNNs. Our proposed ReGNN system gains an average of 9.1× speedup and 8.9× energy efficiency over state-of-the-art GNN accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）将传统的深度学习技术扩展到处理图结构数据，显示出其强大的图表示学习能力。现有的典型 GNN 利用基于神经网络的邻域消息传递机制，通过聚合来自邻近源顶点的特征消息来更新目标顶点表示。为了加速 GNN 的计算，一些定制的加速器被提出，它们遵循每个顶点的邻域聚合计算模式。通过分析，我们观察到邻域聚合的简单实现会导致冗余计算和通信。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型的冗余消除 GNN 加速器，简称为 ReGNN。 ReGNN 由算法和架构协同设计支持。我们首先提出了一种用于 GNN 的动态冗余消除邻域消息传递算法。然后设计了一种新颖的架构来支持所提出的算法，并将冗余消除转化为性能改进。 ReGNN 也是一种可配置的流水线架构，可以配置为支持不同的 GNN 变体。就相同的计算而言，ReGNN 提供与传统 GNN 相同的精度。据我们所知，ReGNN 是第一个可以消除 GNN 中计算冗余的加速器。我们提出的 ReGNN 系统比最先进的 GNN 加速器平均获得 9.1 倍的加速和 8.9 倍的能源效率。

papers.title: Reliability-Aware Runahead.
papers.abstract: Decreasing voltage levels and continued transistor scaling have drastically increased the chance of a processor bit encountering a soft error. We find that the microarchitecture state in an out-of-order core is vulnerable to soft errors especially while waiting for data to return from memory. The severity of the problem is further aggravated by the increasingly large size of microarchitecture state with every new processor generation. Prior solutions are ineffective as they incur too high overhead in terms of chip area, energy consumption and/or performance.In this paper, we make the observation that runahead execution, which was originally conceived to improve performance, also improves soft-error reliability as an unintended side effect. While the state-of-the-art runahead technique, Precise Runahead Execution (PRE), leads to substantial performance improvements, reliability is suboptimal still. We propose Reliability-Aware Runahead (RAR) which substantially improves soft-error reliability over the current state-of-the-art by rendering the microarchitecture state non-vulnerable during runahead execution and by initiating runahead execution early. Across a set of memory-intensive applications — the primary target for runahead execution — RAR improves the mean-time-to-failure (MTTF) by on average 4.8× (and up to 35.8×) relative to an out-of-order baseline while at the same time improving performance by 33.5% on average (and up to 2.6×). Across a broader set of compute- and memory-intensive benchmarks, RAR improves MTTF by on average 2.5× while at the same time improving performance by 11.9% on average. We explore the runahead design space and conclude that RAR is the only design point that improves both reliability and performance by such a significant margin. We find that RAR is more effective for increasingly large processor architectures, making RAR an effective microarchitecture technique for future high-reliability high-performance microprocessors.
papers.abstract_zh: 降低电压水平和持续缩小晶体管尺寸大大增加了处理器位遇到软错误的机会。我们发现，无序内核中的微架构状态很容易出现软错误，尤其是在等待数据从内存返回时。随着每一代新处理器的微架构状态尺寸越来越大，问题的严重性进一步加剧。先前的解决方案是无效的，因为它们在芯片面积、能耗和/或性能方面产生过高的开销。在本文中，我们观察到，最初旨在提高性能的预运行执行也提高了软错误可靠性，这是一种意想不到的副作用。虽然最先进的超前运行技术“精确超前运行”(PRE) 可带来显着的性能改进，但可靠性仍然不够理想。我们提出了可靠性感知运行先行（RAR），它通过使微架构状态在先行执行期间不易受到攻击并尽早启动先行执行，大大提高了当前最先进技术的软错误可靠性。在一组内存密集型应用程序（超前执行的主要目标）中，相对于乱序基线，RAR 将平均故障时间 (MTTF) 提高了 4.8 倍（最高可达 35.8 倍），同时将性能平均提高了 33.5%（最高可达 2.6 倍）。在更广泛的计算和内存密集型基准测试中，RAR 将 MTTF 平均提高了 2.5 倍，同时将性能平均提高了 11.9%。我们探索了超前运行设计空间并得出结论，RAR 是唯一能够大幅提高可靠性和性能的设计点。我们发现 RAR 对于日益大型的处理器架构更加有效，使得 RAR 成为未来高可靠性高性能微处理器的有效微架构技术。

papers.title: ReTail: Opting for Learning Simplicity to Enable QoS-Aware Power Management in the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Many cloud services have Quality-of-Service (QoS) requirements; most requests have to to complete within a given latency constraint. Recently, researchers have begun to investigate whether it is possible to meet QoS while attempting to save power on a per-request basis. Existing work shows that one can indeed hand-tune a request latency predictor offline for a particular cloud application, and consult it at runtime to modulate CPU voltage and frequency, resulting in substantial power savings.In this paper, we propose ReTail, an automated and general solution for request-level power management of latency-critical services with QoS constraints. We present a systematic process to select the features of any given application that best correlate with its request latency. ReTail uses these features to predict latency, and adjust CPU’s power consumption. ReTail’s predictor is trained fully at runtime. We show that unlike previous findings, simple techniques perform better than complex machine learning models, when using the right input features. For a web search engine, ReTail outperforms prior mechanisms based on complex hand-tuned predictors for that application domain. Furthermore, ReTail’s systematic approach also yields superior power savings across a diverse set of cloud applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多云服务都有服务质量 (QoS) 要求；大多数请求必须在给定的延迟限制内完成。最近，研究人员开始研究是否有可能在满足 QoS 的同时尝试根据每个请求节省电量。现有的工作表明，人们确实可以针对特定的云应用程序离线手动调整请求延迟预测器，并在运行时参考它来调节 CPU 电压和频率，从而节省大量功耗。在本文中，我们提出了 ReTail，这是一种自动化的通用解决方案，用于对具有 QoS 约束的延迟关键型服务进行请求级电源管理。我们提出了一个系统化的流程来选择任何给定应用程序与其请求延迟最相关的功能。 ReTail 使用这些功能来预测延迟并调整 CPU 的功耗。 ReTail 的预测器在运行时经过全面训练。我们表明，与之前的发现不同，当使用正确的输入特征时，简单的技术比复杂的机器学习模型表现更好。对于网络搜索引擎，ReTail 优于基于该应用程序领域的复杂手动调整预测器的现有机制。此外，ReTail 的系统方法还可以在各种云应用程序中实现卓越的节能效果。

papers.title: RM-SSD: In-Storage Computing for Large-Scale Recommendation Inference.
papers.abstract: To meet the strict service level agreement requirements of recommendation systems, the entire set of embeddings in recommendation systems needs to be loaded into the memory. However, as the model and dataset for production-scale recommendation systems scale up, the size of the embeddings is approaching the limit of memory capacity. Limited physical memory constrains the algorithms that can be trained and deployed, posing a severe challenge for deploying advanced recommendation systems. Recent studies offload the embedding lookups into SSDs, which targets the embedding-dominated recommendation models. This paper takes it one step further and proposes to offload the entire recommendation system into SSD with in-storage computing capability. The proposed SSD-side FPGA solution leverages a low-end FPGA to speed up both the embedding-dominated and MLP-dominated models with high resource efficiency. We evaluate the performance of the proposed solution with a prototype SSD. Results show that we can achieve 20-100× throughput improvement compared with the baseline SSD and 1.5-15× improvement compared with the state-of-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了满足推荐系统严格的服务水平协议要求，推荐系统中的整套嵌入需要加载到内存中。然而，随着生产规模推荐系统的模型和数据集的扩大，嵌入的大小正在接近内存容量的极限。有限的物理内存限制了可以训练和部署的算法，这对部署高级推荐系统提出了严峻的挑战。最近的研究将嵌入查找卸载到 SSD 中，其目标是嵌入主导的推荐模型。本文更进一步，提出将整个推荐系统卸载到具有存储内计算能力的SSD中。所提出的 SSD 端 FPGA 解决方案利用低端 FPGA 来加速嵌入主导和 MLP 主导的模型，并具有高资源效率。我们使用原型 SSD 评估所提出解决方案的性能。结果表明，与基准 SSD 相比，我们可以实现 20-100 倍的吞吐量改进，与最先进的技术相比，可以实现 1.5-15 倍的吞吐量改进。

papers.title: S2TA: Exploiting Structured Sparsity for Energy-Efficient Mobile CNN Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Exploiting sparsity is a key technique in accelerating quantized convolutional neural network (CNN) inference on mobile devices. Prior sparse CNN accelerators largely exploit unstructured sparsity and achieve significant speedups. Due to the unbounded, largely unpredictable sparsity patterns, however, exploiting unstructured sparsity requires complicated hardware design with significant energy and area overhead, which is particularly detrimental to mobile/IoT inference scenarios where energy and area efficiency are crucial.We propose to exploit structured sparsity, more specifically, Density Bound Block (DBB) sparsity for both weights and activations. DBB block tensors bound the maximum number of non-zeros per block. DBB thus exposes statically predictable sparsity patterns that enable lean sparsity-exploiting hardware and efficient memory access. We propose new hardware primitives to implement DBB sparsity for (static) weights and (dynamic) activations, respectively, with very low overheads.Building on top of the primitives, we describe S2TA, a systolic array-based CNN accelerator that exploits joint weight and activation DBB sparsity and new dimensions of data reuse unavailable on the traditional systolic array. S2TA in 16nm achieves more than 2× speedup and energy reduction compared to a strong baseline of a systolic array with zero-value clock gating, over five popular CNN benchmarks. Compared to two recent non-systolic sparse accelerators, Eyeriss v2 (65nm) and SparTen (45nm), S2TA in 65nm uses about 2.2× per and 3.1× less energy inference, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 利用稀疏性是加速移动设备上量化卷积神经网络 (CNN) 推理的关键技术。先前的稀疏 CNN 加速器主要利用非结构化稀疏性并实现显着的加速。然而，由于无界、很大程度上不可预测的稀疏性模式，利用非结构化稀疏性需要复杂的硬件设计，并具有大量的能量和面积开销，这对于能量和面积效率至关重要的移动/物联网推理场景尤其不利。我们建议利用结构化稀疏性，更具体地说，权重和激活的密度界限块（DBB）稀疏性。 DBB 块张量限制每个块非零的最大数量。因此，DBB 公开了静态可预测的稀疏模式，从而实现了精简的稀疏利用硬件和高效的内存访问。我们提出了新的硬件原语，以非常低的开销分别实现（静态）权重和（动态）激活的 DBB 稀疏性。在原语之上，我们描述了 S2TA，一种基于脉动阵列的 CNN 加速器，它利用联合权重和激活 DBB 稀疏性以及传统脉动阵列上无法实现的新数据重用维度。与具有零值时钟门控的脉动阵列的强大基线相比，16nm 的 S2TA 在五个流行的 CNN 基准测试中实现了超过 2 倍的加速和能耗降低。与最近的两款非收缩稀疏加速器 Eyeriss v2 (65nm) 和 SparTen (45nm) 相比，65nm 下的 S2TA 分别使用约 2.2 倍和 3.1 倍的能量推理。

papers.title: SafeGuard: Reducing the Security Risk from Row-Hammer via Low-Cost Integrity Protection.
papers.abstract: Row-Hammer (RH) is a DRAM data-disturbance failure that occurs when a row is activated frequently, which causes bit-flips in nearby rows. Row-Hammer is a significant security threat as an attacker can exploit the bit-flips to do privilege escalation and leak confidential data. While several solutions aim to mitigate RH, such solutions depend on the RH threshold and adversarial access patterns. Solutions developed for a given threshold become ineffective for newer devices with lower thresholds, and new attack patterns continue to break existing mitigations. Currently, there is no guaranteed solution for RH, which means that the system remains vulnerable to security threats even in the presence of RH mitigation.In this paper, we contend that simply relying on RH mitigation is insufficient to provide security in the presence of reducing threshold and motivated attackers. We propose SafeGuard, which equips the system with low-cost integrity protection as a defense against potential attacks that break the RH mitigation. As SafeGuard can detect arbitrary failures, it converts the problem of RH bit-flips from a security threat (silent consumption of corrupted data) to a reliability concern (detectable uncorrectable errors caused by integrity violation). We develop SafeGuard for systems that employ ECC modules and show that SafeGuard can provide strong detection to both SECDED (46-bit MAC per cache-line) and Chipkill (32-bit MAC per cache-line) while retaining the correction capability of conventional designs. SafeGuard avoids incurring any storage overheads in DRAM by simply reorganizing the ECC code to operate at a cache-line granularity (64 bytes) instead of a word granularity (8 bytes). Our evaluations show that SafeGuard has a negligible impact on both the system performance (0.7%) and the system reliability due to naturally occurring errors while still providing a strong defense against the security risk of RH by detecting arbitrary bit-flips.
papers.abstract_zh: 行锤击 (RH) 是一种 DRAM 数据干扰故障，当某行被频繁激活时会发生，导致附近行发生位翻转。 Row-Hammer 是一个重大的安全威胁，因为攻击者可以利用位翻转来进行权限升级并泄露机密数据。虽然多种解决方案旨在减轻 RH，但此类解决方案取决于 RH 阈值和对抗性访问模式。针对给定阈值开发的解决方案对于阈值较低的新设备来说变得无效，并且新的攻击模式继续破坏现有的缓解措施。目前，RH 还没有有保障的解决方案，这意味着即使存在 RH 缓解措施，系统仍然容易受到安全威胁。在本文中，我们认为，在存在门槛降低和有动机的攻击者的情况下，仅仅依靠 RH 缓解措施不足以提供安全性。我们提出了 SafeGuard，它为系统配备了低成本的完整性保护，以防御破坏 RH 缓解措施的潜在攻击。由于 SafeGuard 可以检测任意故障，因此它将 RH 位翻转问题从安全威胁（损坏数据的静默消耗）转变为可靠性问题（由完整性违规引起的可检测的不可纠正错误）。我们为采用 ECC 模块的系统开发了 SafeGuard，并表明 SafeGuard 可以为 SECDED（每个缓存行 46 位 MAC）和 Chipkill（每个缓存行 32 位 MAC）提供强大的检测，同时保留传统设计的纠正能力。 SafeGuard 通过简单地重新组织 ECC 代码以在缓存行粒度（64 字节）而不是字粒度（8 字节）上运行来避免在 DRAM 中产生任何存储开销。我们的评估表明，SafeGuard 由于自然发生的错误而对系统性能 (0.7%) 和系统可靠性的影响可以忽略不计，同时仍然通过检测任意位翻转来提供针对 RH 安全风险的强大防御。

papers.title: Saving PAM4 Bus Energy with SMOREs: Sparse Multi-level Opportunistic Restricted Encodings.
papers.abstract: Pulse Amplitude Modulation (PAM) uses multiple voltage levels as different data symbols, transferring multiple bits of data simultaneously, thereby enabling higher communication bandwidth without increased operating frequencies. However, dividing the voltage into more symbols leads to a smaller voltage difference between adjacent symbols, making the interface more vulnerable to crosstalk and power noise. GDDR6X adopts four-level symbols (PAM4) with Maximum Transition Avoidance (MTA) coding, which reduces the effects of crosstalk. However, current coding approaches can consume excess energy and produce excess power noise. This paper introduces novel energy reduction techniques for PAM interfaces, specifically demonstrating them for GDDR6X PAM4. Inspired by prior work on conventional single-ended I/O interfaces, we leverage the unused idle periods in DRAM channels between data transmissions to apply longer but more energy-efficient codes. To maximize the energy savings, we build multiple sparse encoding schemes to fit different sized gaps in the DRAM traffic. These sparse encodings can provide energy reductions of up to 52% when transferring 4-bit data using a 3-symbol sequence. We evaluate these coding techniques using an NVIDIA RTX 3090 baseline, a recent GPU which uses GDDR6X with PAM4 signaling. Our evaluation shows the opportunity for large energy savings at the DRAM I/O interface (28.2% on average) over many HPC/DL applications with minimal performance degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 脉冲幅度调制（PAM）使用多个电压电平作为不同的数据符号，同时传输多个数据位，从而在不增加工作频率的情况下实现更高的通信带宽。然而，将电压分成更多符号会导致相邻符号之间的电压差更小，从而使接口更容易受到串扰和电源噪声的影响。 GDDR6X采用四级符号（PAM4）和最大转移避免（MTA）编码，减少串扰的影响。然而，当前的编码方法会消耗过多的能量并产生过多的功率噪声。本文介绍了 PAM 接口的新型节能技术，特别针对 GDDR6X PAM4 进行了演示。受到传统单端 I/O 接口先前工作的启发，我们利用数据传输之间 DRAM 通道中未使用的空闲周期来应用更长但更节能的代码。为了最大限度地节省能源，我们构建了多种稀疏编码方案来适应 DRAM 流量中不同大小的间隙。当使用 3 符号序列传输 4 位数据时，这些稀疏编码可将能量降低高达 52%。我们使用 NVIDIA RTX 3090 基准（一种使用 GDDR6X 和 PAM4 信号传输的最新 GPU）来评估这些编码技术。我们的评估显示，与许多 HPC/DL 应用程序相比，DRAM I/O 接口有机会大幅节能（平均 28.2%），同时性能下降最小。

papers.title: ScalaGraph: A Scalable Accelerator for Massively Parallel Graph Processing.
papers.abstract: Graph processing is promising to extract valuable insights in graphs. Nowadays, emerging 3D-stacked memories and silicon technologies can provide over terabytes per second memory bandwidth and thousands of processing elements (PEs) to meet the high hardware demand of graph applications. However, this leap in hardware capability does not result in a huge increase but even a degradation sometimes in performance for graph processing. In this paper, we discover that the centralized on-chip memory hierarchy adopted in existing graph accelerators is the villain causing poor scalability due to its quadratic increase of hardware overheads with respect to the number of PEs.We present a novel distributed on-chip memory hierarchy by leveraging the network-on-chip (NoC) to enable massively parallel graph processing. We architect ScalaGraph, a brand new graph processing accelerator, to exploit this insight. ScalaGraph adopts a software-hardware co-design to minimize NoC communication overheads via an efficient row-oriented dataflow mapping and runtime aggregation. A specialized scheduling mechanism is also proposed to improve load imbalance. Our results on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card show that ScalaGraph on a modest configuration of 512 PEs achieves 2.2× and 3.2× speedups over a state-of-theart graph accelerator GraphDyns and a GPU-based graph system Gunrock, respectively. Moreover, ScalaGraph enables supporting at least 1,024 PEs with nearly linear performance scaling while GraphDyns fails to work.
papers.abstract_zh: 图处理有望从图中提取有价值的见解。如今，新兴的 3D 堆叠存储器和硅技术可以提供每秒超过 TB 的存储器带宽和数千个处理元件 (PE)，以满足图形应用程序的高硬件需求。然而，硬件能力的飞跃并没有带来巨大的提升，有时甚至会导致图处理性能的下降。在本文中，我们发现现有图形加速器中采用的集中式片上存储器层次结构是导致可扩展性较差的罪魁祸首，因为它的硬件开销相对于 PE 数量呈二次方增加。我们提出了一种新颖的分布式片上存储器层次结构，利用片上网络 (NoC) 来实现大规模并行图形处理。我们构建了 ScalaGraph，一个全新的图形处理加速器，来利用这种洞察力。 ScalaGraph 采用软硬件协同设计，通过高效的面向行的数据流映射和运行时聚合，最大限度地减少 NoC 通信开销。还提出了专门的调度机制来改善负载不平衡。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上的结果表明，在 512 个 PE 的适度配置上的 ScalaGraph 分别比最先进的图形加速器 GraphDyns 和基于 GPU 的图形系统 Gunrock 实现了 2.2 倍和 3.2 倍的加速。此外，ScalaGraph 能够以近乎线性的性能扩展支持至少 1,024 个 PE，而 GraphDyns 则无法工作。

papers.title: ScaleHLS: A New Scalable High-Level Synthesis Framework on Multi-Level Intermediate Representation.
papers.abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) has been widely adopted as it significantly improves the hardware design productivity and enables efficient design space exploration (DSE). Existing HLS tools are built using compiler infrastructures largely based on a single-level abstraction, such as LLVM. How-ever, as HLS designs typically come with intrinsic structural or functional hierarchies, different HLS optimization problems are often better solved with different levels of abstractions. This paper proposes ScaleHLS <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>, a new scalable and customizable HLS framework, on top of a multi-level compiler infrastructure called MLIR. ScaleHLS represents HLS designs at multiple representation levels and provides an HLS-dedicated analysis and transform library to solve the optimization problems at the suitable levels. Using this library, we provide a DSE engine to generate optimized HLS designs automatically. In addition, we develop an HLS C front-end and a C/C++ emission back-end to translate HLS designs into/from MLIR for enabling an end-to-end compilation flow. Experimental results show that, comparing to the baseline designs without manual directives insertion and code-rewriting, that are only optimized by Xilinx Vivado HLS, ScaleHLS improves the performances with amazing quality-of-results – up to 768.1× better on computation kernel level programs and up to 3825.0× better on neural network models.
papers.abstract_zh: 高级综合（HLS）已被广泛采用，因为它显着提高了硬件设计生产力并实现了高效的设计空间探索（DSE）。现有的 HLS 工具是使用主要基于单级抽象（例如 LLVM）的编译器基础架构构建的。然而，由于 HLS 设计通常具有内在的结构或功能层次结构，因此不同的 HLS 优化问题通常可以通过不同的抽象级别得到更好的解决。本文提出了 ScaleHLS <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>，这是一种新的可扩展和可定制的 HLS 框架，位于称为 MLIR 的多级编译器基础架构之上。 ScaleHLS代表多个表示级别的HLS设计，并提供HLS专用的分析和转换库来解决合适级别的优化问题。使用该库，我们提供了 DSE 引擎来自动生成优化的 HLS 设计。此外，我们还开发了 HLS C 前端和 C/C++ 发射后端，以将 HLS 设计转换为 MLIR 或从 MLIR 转换出来，从而实现端到端编译流程。实验结果表明，与没有手动指令插入和代码重写且仅通过 Xilinx Vivado HLS 优化的基线设计相比，ScaleHLS 提高了性能，结果质量令人惊叹 - 在计算内核级程序上提高了 768.1 倍，在神经网络模型上提高了 3825.0 倍。

papers.title: SecNDP: Secure Near-Data Processing with Untrusted Memory.
papers.abstract: Today’s data-intensive applications increasingly suffer from significant performance bottlenecks due to the limited memory bandwidth of the classical von Neumann architecture. Near-Data Processing (NDP) has been proposed to perform computation near memory or data storage to reduce data movement for improving performance and energy consumption. However, the untrusted NDP processing units (PUs) bring in new threats to workloads that are private and sensitive, such as private database queries and private machine learning inferences. Meanwhile, most existing secure hardware designs do not consider off-chip components trustworthy. Once data leaving the processor, they must be protected, e.g., via block cipher encryption. Unfortunately, current encryption schemes do not support computation over encrypted data stored in memory or storage, hindering the adoption of NDP techniques for sensitive workloads.In this paper, we propose SecNDP, a lightweight encryption and verification scheme for untrusted NDP devices to perform computation over ciphertext and verify the correctness of linear operations. Our encryption scheme leverages arithmetic secret sharing in secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC) to support operations over ciphertext, and uses counter-mode encryption to reduce the decryption latency. The security of the encryption and verification algorithm is formally proven. Compared with a non-NDP baseline, secure computation with SecNDP significantly reduces the memory bandwidth usage while providing security guarantees. We evaluate SecNDP for two workloads of distinct memory access patterns. In the setting of eight NDP units, we show a speedup up to 7.46× and energy savings of 18% over an unprotected non-NDP baseline, approaching the performance gain attained by native NDP without protection. Furthermore, SecNDP does not require any security assumption on NDP to hold, thus, using the same threat model as existing secure processors. SecNDP can be implemented without changing the NDP protocols and their inherent hardware design.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于经典冯诺依曼架构的内存带宽有限，当今的数据密集型应用程序越来越受到严重的性能瓶颈的影响。近数据处理（NDP）已被提议在内存或数据存储附近执行计算，以减少数据移动，从而提高性能和能耗。然而，不受信任的 NDP 处理单元 (PU) 给私有和敏感的工作负载带来了新的威胁，例如私有数据库查询和私有机器学习推理。同时，大多数现有的安全硬件设计并不认为片外组件值得信赖。一旦数据离开处理器，就必须对其进行保护，例如通过块密码加密。不幸的是，当前的加密方案不支持对存储在内存或存储中的加密数据进行计算，这阻碍了 NDP 技术在敏感工作负载中的采用。在本文中，我们提出了 SecNDP，一种轻量级的加密和验证方案，用于不可信的 NDP 设备对密文进行计算并验证线性运算的正确性。我们的加密方案利用安全多方计算（MPC）中的算术秘密共享来支持密文操作，并使用计数器模式加密来减少解密延迟。加密和验证算法的安全性得到形式化证明。与非NDP基线相比，SecNDP安全计算在提供安全保证的同时，显着降低了内存带宽的使用。我们针对两种不同内存访问模式的工作负载评估 SecNDP。在八个 NDP 单元的设置中，与未受保护的非 NDP 基准相比，我们的速度提升高达 7.46 倍，节能 18%，接近无保护的本机 NDP 所获得的性能增益。此外，SecNDP 不需要对 NDP 进行任何安全假设，因此使用与现有安全处理器相同的威胁模型。 SecNDP可以在不改变NDP协议及其固有硬件设计的情况下实现。

papers.title: SPACX: Silicon Photonics-based Scalable Chiplet Accelerator for DNN Inference.
papers.abstract: In pursuit of higher inference accuracy, deep neural network (DNN) models have significantly increased in complexity and size. To overcome the consequent computational challenges, scalable chiplet-based accelerators have been proposed. However, data communication using metallic-based interconnects in these chiplet-based DNN accelerators is becoming a primary obstacle to performance, energy efficiency, and scalability. The photonic interconnects can provide adequate data communication support due to some superior properties like low latency, high bandwidth and energy efficiency, and ease of broadcast communication. In this paper, we propose SPACX: a Silicon Photonics-based Chiplet ACcelerator for DNN inference applications. Specifically, SPACX includes a photonic network design that enables seamless single-chiplet and cross-chiplet broadcast communications, and a tailored dataflow that promotes data broadcast and maximizes parallelism. Furthermore, we explore the broadcast granularities of the photonic network and implications on system performance and energy efficiency. A flexible bandwidth allocation scheme is also proposed to dynamically adjust communication bandwidths for different types of data. Simulation results using several DNN models show that SPACX can achieve 78% and 75% reduction in execution time and energy, respectively, as compared to other state-of-the-art chiplet-based DNN accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了追求更高的推理精度，深度神经网络（DNN）模型的复杂性和规模显着增加。为了克服随之而来的计算挑战，人们提出了基于小芯片的可扩展加速器。然而，在这些基于小芯片的 DNN 加速器中使用基于金属的互连的数据通信正在成为性能、能源效率和可扩展性的主要障碍。由于低延迟、高带宽和能源效率以及易于广播通信等一些优越特性，光子互连可以提供足够的数据通信支持。在本文中，我们提出了 SPACX：一种用于 DNN 推理应用的基于硅光子的 Chiplet 加速器。具体来说，SPACX 包括可实现无缝单芯片和跨芯片广播通信的光子网络设计，以及可促进数据广播并最大化并行性的定制数据流。此外，我们还探讨了光子网络的广播粒度及其对系统性能和能源效率的影响。还提出了灵活的带宽分配方案，以动态调整不同类型数据的通信带宽。使用多个 DNN 模型的仿真结果表明，与其他最先进的基于小芯片的 DNN 加速器相比，SPACX 可以分别减少 78% 和 75% 的执行时间和能耗。

papers.title: Stay in your Lane: A NoC with Low-overhead Multi-packet Bypassing.
papers.abstract: NoCs are over-provisioned with large virtual channels to provide deadlock freedom and performance improvement. This use of virtual channels leads to considerable power and area overhead. In this paper, we introduce a novel flow control, called FastFlow, to enhance performance and avoid both protocol- and network-level deadlocks with an impressive reduction in number of virtual channels compared to the state-of-the-art NoCs. FastPass promotes a packet to traverse the network bufferlessly; the packet bypasses the routers to reach its destination. During the traversals, the packet is guaranteed to make forward progress every cycle. As a result, such a packet cannot be blocked by congestion nor deadlock. Promoting more packets to FastPass will provide higher throughput. To this end, FastPass allows multiple packets to be upgraded as FastPass packets simultaneously. To avoid any collision between these packets, FastPass provides multiple pre-defined non-overlapping lanes. Each lane is allowed to propagate only one FastPass packet. In a time-division multiplexed way, each router gets a chance to upgrade its packets to the FastPass packets and then transfer them via the pre-defined non-overlapping lanes. FastPass not only provides high throughput but also resolves both protocol-and network-level deadlocks. Compared to the state-of-the-art, FastPass presents a 1.8 × increase in throughput for synthetic traffic, 46% improvement in average packet latency for real applications, and 40% reduction in power and area consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: NoC 过度配置大型虚拟通道，以消除死锁并提高性能。虚拟通道的使用导致相当大的功率和面积开销。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 FastFlow 的新颖流控制，以提高性能并避免协议级和网络级死锁，与最先进的片上网络相比，虚拟通道数量显着减少。 FastPass 促进数据包无缓冲地穿越网络；数据包绕过路由器到达目的地。在遍历过程中，保证数据包在每个周期都向前推进。因此，这样的数据包不会因拥塞或死锁而被阻塞。将更多数据包提升到 FastPass 将提供更高的吞吐量。为此，FastPass 允许多个数据包同时升级为 FastPass 数据包。为了避免这些数据包之间发生任何冲突，FastPass 提供了多个预定义的非重叠通道。每个通道仅允许传播一个 FastPass 数据包。以时分复用的方式，每个路由器都有机会将其数据包升级为 FastPass 数据包，然后通过预定义的非重叠通道传输它们。 FastPass 不仅提供高吞吐量，还解决了协议级和网络级死锁。与最先进的技术相比，FastPass 的综合流量吞吐量提高了 1.8 倍，实际应用的平均数据包延迟提高了 46%，功耗和面积消耗降低了 40%。

papers.title: SupermarQ: A Scalable Quantum Benchmark Suite.
papers.abstract: The emergence of quantum computers as a new computational paradigm has been accompanied by speculation concerning the scope and timeline of their anticipated revolutionary changes. While quantum computing is still in its infancy, the variety of different architectures used to implement quantum computations make it difficult to reliably measure and compare performance. This problem motivates our introduction of SupermarQ, a scalable, hardware-agnostic quantum benchmark suite which uses application-level metrics to measure performance. SupermarQ is the first attempt to systematically apply techniques from classical benchmarking methodology to the quantum domain. We define a set of feature vectors to quantify coverage, select applications from a variety of domains to ensure the suite is representative of real workloads, and collect benchmark results from the IBM, IonQ, and AQT@LBNL platforms. Looking forward, we envision that quantum benchmarking will encompass a large cross-community effort built on open source, constantly evolving benchmark suites. We introduce SupermarQ as an important step in this direction.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算机作为一种新的计算范式的出现，伴随着对其预期革命性变化的范围和时间表的猜测。虽然量子计算仍处于起步阶段，但用于实现量子计算的各种不同架构使得可靠地测量和比较性能变得困难。这个问题促使我们推出 SupermarQ，这是一个可扩展的、与硬件无关的量子基准套件，它使用应用程序级指标来衡量性能。 SupermarQ 是系统地将经典基准测试方法论技术应用到量子领域的首次尝试。我们定义一组特征向量来量化覆盖范围，从各个领域选择应用程序以确保该套件能够代表真实的工作负载，并从 IBM、IonQ 和 AQT@LBNL 平台收集基准测试结果。展望未来，我们预计量子基准测试将包含基于开源、不断发展的基准套件的大型跨社区努力。我们推出 SupermarQ 作为朝这个方向迈出的重要一步。

papers.title: Tacker: Tensor-CUDA Core Kernel Fusion for Improving the GPU Utilization while Ensuring QoS.
papers.abstract: The proliferation of machine learning applications has promoted both CUDA Cores and Tensor Cores’ integration to meet their acceleration demands. While studies have shown that co-locating multiple tasks on the same GPU can effectively improve system throughput and resource utilization, existing schemes focus on scheduling the resources of traditional CUDA Cores and thus lack the ability to exploit the parallelism between Tensor Cores and CUDA Cores.In this paper, we propose Tacker, a static kernel fusion and scheduling approach to improve GPU utilization of both types of cores while ensuring the QoS (Quality-of-Service) of co-located tasks. Tacker consists of a Tensor-CUDA Core kernel fuser, a duration predictor for fused kernels, and a runtime QoS-aware kernel manager. The kernel fuser enables the flexible fusion of kernels that use Tensor Cores and CUDA Cores, respectively. The duration predictor precisely predicts the duration of the fused kernels. Finally, the kernel manager invokes the fused kernel or the original kernel based on the QoS headroom of latency-critical tasks to improve the system throughput. Our experimental results show that Tacker improves the throughput of best-effort applications compared with state-of-the-art solutions by 18.6% on average, while ensuring the QoS of latency-critical tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习应用的激增促进了 CUDA Core 和 Tensor Core 的集成以满足其加速需求。虽然研究表明，在同一 GPU 上共置多个任务可以有效提高系统吞吐量和资源利用率，但现有方案侧重于调度传统 CUDA Core 的资源，因此缺乏利用 Tensor Core 和 CUDA Core 之间并行性的能力。在本文中，我们提出了 Tacker，一种静态内核融合和调度方法，以提高两种类型内核的 GPU 利用率，同时保证共置任务的 QoS（服务质量）。 Tacker 由 Tensor-CUDA Core 内核融合器、融合内核的持续时间预测器和运行时 QoS 感知内核管理器组成。内核融合器可以灵活地融合分别使用 Tensor Core 和 CUDA Core 的内核。持续时间预测器精确预测融合内核的持续时间。最后，内核管理器根据延迟关键任务的 QoS 余量调用融合内核或原始内核，以提高系统吞吐量。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Tacker 将尽力而为应用程序的吞吐量平均提高了 18.6%，同时确保了延迟关键任务的 QoS。

papers.title: TCOR: A Tile Cache with Optimal Replacement.
papers.abstract: Cache Replacement Policies are known to have an important impact on hit rates. The OPT replacement policy [27] has been formally proven as optimal for minimizing misses. Due to its need to look far ahead for future memory accesses, it is often reduced to a yardstick for measuring the efficacy of other practical caches. In this paper, we bring the OPT to life, in architectures for mobile GPUs, for which energy efficiency is of great consequence. We also mold other factors in the memory hierarchy to enhance its impact. The end results are a 13.8% decrease in the memory hierarchy energy consumption and an increased throughput in the Tiling Engine. We also observe a 5.5% decrease in the total GPU energy and a 3.7% increase in frames per second (FPS).
papers.abstract_zh: 众所周知，缓存替换策略对命中率有重要影响。 OPT 替换政策 [27] 已被正式证明是最大限度减少失误的最佳选择。由于它需要前瞻性地预测未来的内存访问，因此它通常被简化为衡量其他实际缓存功效的标准。在本文中，我们在移动 GPU 架构中将 OPT 变为现实，能源效率对于该架构至关重要。我们还在内存层次结构中塑造其他因素以增强其影响。最终结果是内存层次结构能耗降低了 13.8%，并且平铺引擎的吞吐量增加了。我们还观察到 GPU 总能量下降了 5.5%，每秒帧数 (FPS) 增加了 3.7%。

papers.title: Temporal Exposure Reduction Protection for Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract: The long-living nature and byte-addressability of persistent memory (PM) amplifies the importance of strong memory protections. This paper develops temporal exposure reduction protection (TERP) as a framework for enforcing memory safety. Aiming to minimize the time when a PM region is accessible, TERP offers a complementary dimension of memory protection. The paper gives a formal definition of TERP, explores the semantics space of TERP constructs, and the relations with security and composability in both sequential and parallel executions. It proposes programming system and architecture solutions for the key challenges for the adoption of TERP, which draws on novel supports in both compilers and hardware to efficiently meet the exposure time target. Experiments validate the efficacy of the proposed support of TERP, in both efficiency and exposure time minimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存 (PM) 的长寿命特性和字节寻址能力增强了强大的内存保护的重要性。本文开发了时间暴露减少保护（TERP）作为强制内存安全的框架。 TERP 旨在最大限度地减少可访问 PM 区域的时间，提供内存保护的补​​充维度。本文给出了 TERP 的正式定义，探讨了 TERP 结构的语义空间，以及顺序执行和并行执行中与安全性和可组合性的关系。它针对采用 TERP 的关键挑战提出了编程系统和架构解决方案，它利用编译器和硬件的新颖支持来有效地满足曝光时间目标。实验验证了所提议的 TERP 支持在效率和暴露时间最小化方面的功效。

papers.title: The Specialized High-Performance Network on Anton 3.
papers.abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) simulation, a computationally intensive method that provides invaluable insights into the behavior of biomolecules, typically requires large-scale parallelization. Implementation of fast parallel MD simulation demands both high bandwidth and low latency for inter-node communication, but in current semiconductor technology, neither of these properties is scaling as quickly as intra-node computational capacity. This disparity in scaling necessitates architectural innovations to maximize the utilization of computational units. For Anton 3, the latest in a family of highly successful special-purpose supercomputers designed for MD simulations, we thus designed and built a completely new specialized network as part of our ASIC. Tightly integrating this network with specialized computation pipelines enables Anton 3 to perform simulations orders of magnitude faster than any general-purpose supercomputer, and to outperform its predecessor, Anton 2 (the state of the art prior to Anton 3), by an order of magnitude. In this paper, we present the three key features of the network that contribute to the high performance of Anton 3. First, through architectural optimizations, the network achieves very low end-to-end inter-node communication latency for fine-grained messages, allowing for better overlap of computation and communication. Second, novel application-specific compression techniques reduce the size of most messages sent between nodes, thereby increasing effective inter-node bandwidth. Lastly, a new hardware synchronization primitive, called a network fence, supports fast fine-grained synchronization tailored to the data flow within a parallel MD application. These application-driven specializations to the network are critical for Anton 3’s MD simulation performance advantage over all other machines.
papers.abstract_zh: 分子动力学 (MD) 模拟是一种计算密集型方法，可为生物分子行为提供宝贵的见解，通常需要大规模并行化。快速并行 MD 仿真的实现需要节点间通信的高带宽和低延迟，但在当前的半导体技术中，这些特性都无法像节点内计算能力那样快速扩展。这种扩展上的差异需要架构创新来最大限度地利用计算单元。 Anton 3 是专为 MD 模拟而设计的非常成功的专用超级计算机系列中的最新产品，因此我们设计并构建了一个全新的专用网络作为 ASIC 的一部分。将该网络与专用计算管道紧密集成，使 Anton 3 执行模拟的速度比任何通用超级计算机快几个数量级，并且比其前身 Anton 2（Anton 3 之前的最先进技术）性能好一个数量级。在本文中，我们介绍了网络的三个关键特征，这些特征有助于 Anton 3 的高性能。首先，通过架构优化，网络为细粒度消息实现了非常低的端到端节点间通信延迟，从而允许计算和通信更好地重叠。其次，新颖的特定于应用程序的压缩技术减少了节点之间发送的大多数消息的大小，从而增加了有效的节点间带宽。最后，一种称为网络围栏的新硬件同步原语支持针对并行 MD 应用程序内的数据流定制的快速细粒度同步。这些应用程序驱动的网络专业化对于 Anton 3 相对于所有其他机器的 MD 模拟性能优势至关重要。

papers.title: TNPU: Supporting Trusted Execution with Tree-less Integrity Protection for Neural Processing Unit.
papers.abstract: As neural processing units (NPUs) for machine learning inference have been incorporated into a wide range of system-on-a-chips, NPUs are processing more and more mission-critical computations such as autonomous driving. With the increasing application scenarios, securing NPU operations from potential attacks has become crucial for the safety of the entire system. To address the security challenges of NPU operations, this study investigates how the trusted execution technology can be extended to harden the NPU execution by hardware supports. This paper proposes trusted NPU (TNPU) which supports trusted execution for NPUs integrated in a processor. For securing NPUs, a key performance challenge is in the encryption and integrity protection for external memory. This work proposes a novel tree-less integrity protection by exploiting the data flow semantics of DNN computation. The tree-less integrity protection maintains a version number for each tensor or sub-tensor inside the CPU enclave which drives the NPU computation. By exploiting the data flow of tensor updates, a per-tensor version number can efficiently verify the recency of the data in the tensor. The tree-less integrity protection eliminates performance losses by counter and hash cache misses, which are major performance overheads of hardware-based memory protection. Our evaluation with simulated NPUs shows that the performance overheads for trusted NPUs can be significantly reduced from the prior tree-based design, improving the performance of a single NPU by 10.0% and 7.5% on average over the prior one with two different NPU configurations. When the number of NPUs is increased to three, the performance gains further improve, achieving on average 13.3% and 8.7% improvements.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着用于机器学习推理的神经处理单元 (NPU) 已被广泛纳入片上系统中，NPU 正在处理越来越多的关键任务计算，例如自动驾驶。随着应用场景的不断增加，保护NPU操作免受潜在攻击对于整个系统的安全至关重要。为了解决NPU运行的安全挑战，本研究研究了如何扩展可信执行技术，通过硬件支持来强化NPU的执行。本文提出了可信 NPU（TNPU），它支持集成在处理器中的 NPU 的可信执行。为了确保 NPU 的安全，关键的性能挑战在于外部存储器的加密和完整性保护。这项工作通过利用 DNN 计算的数据流语义，提出了一种新颖的无树完整性保护。无树完整性保护为驱动 NPU 计算的 CPU enclave 内的每个张量或子张量维护一个版本号。通过利用张量更新的数据流，每个张量的版本号可以有效地验证张量中数据的新近度。无树完整性保护消除了计数器和哈希缓存未命中造成的性能损失，这是基于硬件的内存保护的主要性能开销。我们对模拟 NPU 的评估表明，与之前基于树的设计相比，可信 NPU 的性能开销可以显着降低，单个 NPU 的性能比之前具有两种不同 NPU 配置的 NPU 平均提高 10.0% 和 7.5%。当NPU数量增加到3个时，性能增益进一步提升，平均提升13.3%和8.7%。

papers.title: TransPIM: A Memory-based Acceleration via Software-Hardware Co-Design for Transformer.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based models are state-of-the-art for many machine learning (ML) tasks. Executing Transformer usually requires a long execution time due to the large memory footprint and the low data reuse rate, stressing the memory system while under-utilizing the computing resources. Memory-based processing technologies, including processing in-memory (PIM) and near-memory computing (NMC), are promising to accelerate Transformer since they provide high memory bandwidth utilization and extensive computation parallelism. However, the previous memory-based ML accelerators mainly target at optimizing dataflow and hardware for compute-intensive ML models (e.g., CNNs), which do not fit the memory-intensive characteristics of Transformer. In this work, we propose TransPIM, a memory-based acceleration for Transformer using software and hardware co-design. In the software-level, TransPIM adopts a token-based dataflow to avoid the expensive inter-layer data movements introduced by previous layer-based dataflow. In the hardware-level, TransPIM introduces lightweight modifications in the conventional high bandwidth memory (HBM) architecture to support PIM-NMC hybrid processing and efficient data communication for accelerating Transformer-based models. Our experiments show that TransPIM is 3.7× to 9.1× faster than existing memory-based acceleration. As compared to conventional accelerators, TransPIM is 22.1× to 114.9× faster than GPUs and provides 2.0× more throughput than existing ASIC-based accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型对于许多机器学习 (ML) 任务来说都是最先进的。由于内存占用大、数据复用率低，执行 Transformer 通常需要很长的执行时间，给内存系统带来压力，同时计算资源利用率不足。基于内存的处理技术，包括内存处理 (PIM) 和近内存计算 (NMC)，有望加速 Transformer，因为它们提供高内存带宽利用率和广泛的计算并行性。然而，之前基于内存的机器学习加速器主要针对计算密集型机器学习模型（例如CNN）的数据流和硬件的优化，这不符合Transformer的内存密集型特性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TransPIM，这是一种使用软件和硬件协同设计的基于内存的 Transformer 加速。在软件层面，TransPIM采用基于令牌的数据流，以避免先前基于层的数据流引入的昂贵的层间数据移动。在硬件层面，TransPIM在传统的高带宽内存（HBM）架构中引入了轻量级修改，以支持PIM-NMC混合处理和高效数据通信，从而加速基于Transformer的模型。我们的实验表明，TransPIM 比现有的基于内存的加速快 3.7 倍到 9.1 倍。与传统加速器相比，TransPIM 的速度比 GPU 快 22.1 倍至 114.9 倍，吞吐量比现有基于 ASIC 的加速器高 2.0 倍。

papers.title: unXpec: Breaking Undo-based Safe Speculation.
papers.abstract: Speculative execution attacks exploiting speculative execution to leak secrets have aroused significant concerns in both industry and academia. They mainly exploit covert or side channels over microarchitectural states left by mis-speculated and squashed instructions (i.e., transient instructions). Most such attacks target cache states. Existing cache-based defenses against speculative execution attacks fall into two categories, Invisible and Undo. Most Invisible defenses buffer execution metadata of speculative instructions and place them into the cache only if the speculatively executed instructions become determined. Motivated by the fact that mis-speculations are rare cases, Undo defenses allow speculative instructions to modify cache states. Upon a mis-speculation, they rollback cache states to the ones prior to the execution of transient instructions. However, Invisible defenses have been recently found insecure by the speculative interference attack. This calls for a deep security inspection of Undo defenses against speculative execution attacks.In this paper, we present unXpec as the first attack against Undo-based safe speculation. It exploits the secret-dependent timing channel exhibited through the rollback operations of Undo defenses. Specifically, the rollback process requires both invalidating cache lines brought into the cache by transient instructions and restoring evicted cache lines from the cache by transiently loaded data. This opens up a channel that encodes secret via the timing difference between when rollback involves much invalidation and restoration or not. We further leverage eviction sets to enforce more restoration operations. This yields a longer rollback time and thus a larger secret-dependent timing difference. We demonstrate the timing channel over the open-source CleanupSpec, a representative Undo solution. A single transient load can trigger a secret-dependent timing difference of 22 cycles (without eviction sets) of 32 cycles (with eviction sets), which is sufficiently exploitable for constructing a covert channel for speculative execution attacks. We run unXpec on the gem5 simulator with CleanupSpec enabled. The results show that unXpec can leak secrets at a high rate of 140 Kbps with an accuracy over 90%. Simply enforcing constant-time rollback to mitigate unXpec may induce an over 70% performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 利用推测执行来泄露机密的推测执行攻击引起了工业界和学术界的严重关注。它们主要利用错误推测和压缩指令（即瞬态指令）留下的微架构状态上的隐蔽或侧通道。大多数此类攻击都针对缓存状态。现有的基于缓存的针对推测执行攻击的防御分为两类：隐形攻击和撤消攻击。大多数隐形防御都会缓冲推测指令的执行元数据，并且仅当推测执行的指令被确定时才将它们放入缓存中。由于错误推测很少见，撤消防御允许推测指令修改缓存状态。一旦发生错误推测，它们会将缓存状态回滚到执行瞬态指令之前的状态。然而，最近发现隐形防御因投机干扰攻击而变得不安全。这就需要对 Undo 防御进行深入的安全检查，以防止推测执行攻击。在本文中，我们提出 unXpec 作为针对基于 Undo 的安全推测的第一个攻击。它利用了通过撤消防御的回滚操作展示的依赖于秘密的计时通道。具体地，回滚过程需要使由瞬时指令带入高速缓存的高速缓存行无效以及由瞬时加载的数据从高速缓存恢复逐出的高速缓存行。这开辟了一个通道，通过回滚涉及大量失效和恢复与否之间的时间差异来编码秘密。我们进一步利用驱逐集来执行更多的恢复操作。这会产生更长的回滚时间，从而产生更大的依赖于秘密的时序差异。我们通过开源 CleanupSpec（一种代表性的撤消解决方案）演示了计时通道。单个瞬态负载可以触发 22 个周期（无逐出集）与 32 个周期（有逐出集）的秘密相关时序差异，这足以用于构建用于推测执行攻击的隐蔽通道。我们在启用 CleanupSpec 的 gem5 模拟器上运行 unXpec。结果表明，unXpec能够以140Kbps的高速率泄密，准确率超过90%。简单地强制执行恒定时间回滚来缓解 unXpec 可能会导致超过 70% 的性能开销。

papers.title: Upward Packet Popup for Deadlock Freedom in Modular Chiplet-Based Systems.
papers.abstract: Monolithic SoCs can be decomposed into disparate chiplets that support integration with advanced pack-aging technologies. This concept is promising in reducing the manufacturing cost of large scale SoCs due to the higher yield rate and reusability of chiplets. The chiplets should be designed in a modular manner without holistic system knowledge so that they can be reused in different SoCs. However, the design modularity is a major challenge to the networks-on-chip (NoCs) of chiplets.New deadlocks may occur across both the chiplets and the interposer due to the integration, even if the NoC of each individually designed chiplet is deadlock free. However, conventional deadlock freedom approaches are unsuitable to handle such deadlocks because they require holistic knowledge and violate the modularity. Although there are several modular approaches that specifically target at integration-induced deadlocks, their routing is overly restricted and the injection control incurs additional latency. They also lack flexibility in dynamically changing topologies due to their complex software algorithm and the hard-wired components.In this paper, a key insight on the chiplet integration-induced deadlocks is gained, inspired by which a deadlock recovery framework (named UPP) is proposed. Specifically, it is verified that an integration-induced deadlock always involves a stalled upward packet moving from the interposer to the connected chiplet via the vertical link. Thus, UPP detects a deadlock by discovering the upward packet and recovers the system from deadlock by transmitting the upward packet to its destination. Hybrid flow control mechanisms are proposed to enable the upward packet to bypass the buffers and be transmitted via the normal router datapath. To guarantee the ejection of the upward packet after transmission, a lightweight protocol is proposed to reserve ejection queue entries of the network interface. Experimental results show that while adhering to design modularity, UPP provides an average runtime speedup of 3.1%∼10.3% with an area overhead of less than 4%.
papers.abstract_zh: 单片 SoC 可以分解为不同的小芯片，支持与先进封装技术的集成。由于小芯片具有更高的良率和可重用性，这一概念有望降低大规模 SoC 的制造成本。小芯片应以模块化方式设计，无需整体系统知识，以便它们可以在不同的 SoC 中重复使用。然而，设计模块化是chiplet的片上网络(NoC)的主要挑战。即使每个单独设计的chiplet的NoC没有死锁，由于集成，在chiplet和中介层上也可能会出现新的死锁。然而，传统的死锁自由方法不适合处理此类死锁，因为它们需要整体知识并且违反了模块化性。尽管有几种专门针对集成引起的死锁的模块化方法，但它们的路由受到过度限制，并且注入控制会产生额外的延迟。由于其复杂的软件算法和硬连线组件，它们还缺乏动态改变拓扑的灵活性。 在本文中，获得了对小芯片集成引起的死锁的关键见解，并受其启发，提出了死锁恢复框架（称为 UPP）。具体而言，已验证集成引起的死锁总是涉及停滞的向上数据包通过垂直链路从中介层移动到连接的小芯片。因此，UPP通过发现上行数据包来检测死锁，并通过将上行数据包发送到其目的地来使系统从死锁中恢复。提出了混合流控制机制，以使上行数据包能够绕过缓冲区并通过正常的路由器数据路径进行传输。为了保证上行数据包在传输后被弹出，提出了一种轻量级协议来保留网络接口的弹出队列条目。实验结果表明，在坚持设计模块化的同时，UPP 的平均运行加速比为 3.1%∼10.3%，面积开销小于 4%。

papers.title: Using Psychophysics to Guide Power Adaptation for Input Methods on Mobile Architectures.
papers.abstract: The predominant user activities on mobile architectures (e.g., smartphones) involve entering text in instant messaging apps, short message services, and social networking services. Recent research reveals that the normal use of input methods drains approximately half of the battery capacity due to their above-average power requirements and frequent use. In this paper, we first study the power characteristics of mobile input methods and find that they consistently over-provision resources to satisfy users. For example, the psychophysical evidence available indicates the response of spell-checking features within a time threshold makes users feel they have instant feedback. However, current systems perform it very quickly, which is imperceptible to users and costly in terms of energy use. Given this over- provisioning, the system can be slowed down to save energy while retaining the feeling of instant response. Inspired by this observation, we also exploit several other psychophysical facts to identify the exact criteria to satisfy users. As a result, we present a user experience-oriented technology, utexia, to optimize the energy use of mobile input methods. The evaluation shows that utexia conserves up to 42.9% in energy use while strictly ensuring a good user experience.
papers.abstract_zh: 移动架构（例如智能手机）上的主要用户活动涉及在即时消息应用程序、短信服务和社交网络服务中输入文本。最近的研究表明，由于输入法的功耗要求高于平均水平且频繁使用，因此正常使用输入法会消耗大约一半的电池容量。在本文中，我们首先研究了移动输入法的功耗特性，发现它们始终过度提供资源来满足用户的需求。例如，可用的心理物理学证据表明拼写检查功能在时间阈值内的响应使用户感觉他们有即时反馈。然而，当前的系统执行速度非常快，用户无法察觉，而且能源使用成本高昂。鉴于这种过度配置，系统可以放慢速度以节省能源，同时保留即时响应的感觉。受这一观察的启发，我们还利用其他几个心理物理学事实来确定满足用户需求的确切标准。因此，我们提出了一种以用户体验为导向的技术 utexia，以优化移动输入法的能源使用。评估显示，在严格保证良好用户体验的同时，utexia能源使用节省高达42.9%。

papers.title: uSystolic: Byte-Crawling Unary Systolic Array.
papers.abstract: General matrix multiply (GEMM) is an important operation in broad applications, especially the thriving deep neural networks. To achieve low power consumption for GEMM, researchers have already leveraged unary computing, which manipulates bitstreams with extremely simple logic. However, existing unary architectures are not well generalizable to varying GEMM configurations in versatile applications and incompatible to the binary computing stack, imposing challenges to execute unary GEMM effortlessly. In this work, we address the problem by architecting a hybrid unary-binary systolic array, uSystolic, to inherit the legacy-binary data scheduling with slow (thus power-efficient) data movement, i.e., data bytes are crawling out from memory to drive uSystolic. uSystolic exhibits tremendous area and power improvements as a joint effect of 1) low-power computing kernel, 2) spatial-temporal bitstream reuse, and 3) on-chip SRAM elimination. For the evaluated edge computing scenario, compared with the binary parallel design, the rated-coded uSystolic reduces the systolic array area and total on-chip area by 59.0% and 91.3%, with the on-chip energy and power efficiency improved by up to 112.2× and 44.8× for AlexNet.
papers.abstract_zh: 通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）是广泛应用中的重要运算，尤其是蓬勃发展的深度神经网络。为了实现 GEMM 的低功耗，研究人员已经利用一元计算，它用极其简单的逻辑来操纵比特流。然而，现有的一元架构不能很好地推广到通用应用程序中不同的 GEMM 配置，并且与二进制计算堆栈不兼容，这给轻松执行一元 GEMM 带来了挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过构建一个混合一元-二进制脉动阵列 uSystolic 来解决这个问题，以继承传统的二进制数据调度，并进行缓慢（因此节能）的数据移动，即数据字节从内存中爬出以驱动 uSystolic。 uSystolic 在 1) 低功耗计算内核、2) 时空比特流重用和 3) 片上 SRAM 消除的共同作用下展现出巨大的面积和功耗改进。对于评估的边缘计算场景，与二进制并行设计相比，额定编码uSystolic将脉动阵列面积和片上总面积减少了59.0%和91.3%，AlexNet的片上能源和功率效率分别提高了112.2倍和44.8倍。

papers.title: VAQEM: A Variational Approach to Quantum Error Mitigation.
papers.abstract: Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQA) are one of the most promising candidates for near-term quantum advantage. Traditionally, these algorithms are parameterized by rotational gate angles whose values are tuned over iterative execution on quantum machines. The iterative tuning of these gate angle parameters make VQAs more robust to a quantum machine’s noise profile. However, the effect of noise is still a significant detriment to VQA’s target estimations on real quantum machines — they are far from ideal. Thus, it is imperative to employ effective error mitigation strategies to improve the fidelity of these quantum algorithms on near-term machines.While existing error mitigation techniques built from theory do provide substantial gains, the disconnect between theory and real machine execution characteristics limit the scope of these improvements. Thus, it is critical to optimize mitigation techniques to explicitly suit the target application as well as the noise characteristics of the target machine.We propose VAQEM, which dynamically tailors existing error mitigation techniques to the actual, dynamic noisy execution characteristics of VQAs on a target quantum machine. We do so by tuning specific features of these mitigation techniques similar to the traditional rotation angle parameters -by targeting improvements towards a specific objective function which represents the VQA problem at hand. In this paper, we target two types of error mitigation techniques which are suited to idle times in quantum circuits: single qubit gate scheduling and the insertion of dynamical decoupling sequences. We gain substantial improvements to VQA objective measurements — a mean of over 3x across a variety of VQA applications, run on IBM Quantum machines.More importantly, while we study two specific error mitigation techniques, the proposed variational approach is general and can be extended to many other error mitigation techniques whose specific configurations are hard to select a priori. Integrating more mitigation techniques into the VAQEM framework in the future can lead to further formidable gains, potentially realizing practically useful VQA benefits on today’s noisy quantum machines.
papers.abstract_zh: 变分量子算法（VQA）是近期量子优势最有希望的候选算法之一。传统上，这些算法通过旋转门角度进行参数化，其值通过量子机上的迭代执行进行调整。这些门角参数的迭代调整使 VQA 对量子机的噪声分布更加稳健。然而，噪声的影响仍然严重损害 VQA 对真实量子机器的目标估计——它们远非理想。因此，必须采用有效的错误缓解策略来提高这些量子算法在近期机器上的保真度。虽然根据理论构建的现有错误缓解技术确实提供了实质性的收益，但理论与实际机器执行特性之间的脱节限制了这些改进的范围。因此，优化缓解技术以明确适应目标应用程序以及目标机器的噪声特征至关重要。我们提出了 VAQEM，它根据目标量子机器上 VQA 的实际动态噪声执行特征动态定制现有的错误缓解技术。我们通过调整这些缓解技术的特定功能来实现这一点，类似于传统的旋转角度参数 - 通过针对代表当前 VQA 问题的特定目标函数进行改进。在本文中，我们针对两种适合量子电路空闲时间的错误缓解技术：单量子位门调度和动态解耦序列的插入。我们在 VQA 客观测量方面取得了重大改进——在 IBM Quantum 机器上运行的各种 VQA 应用程序的平均值超过 3 倍。更重要的是，虽然我们研究了两种特定的错误缓解技术，但所提出的变分方法是通用的，可以扩展到许多其他错误缓解技术，而这些技术的具体配置很难先验选择。未来将更多缓解技术集成到 VAQEM 框架中可以带来进一步的巨大收益，有可能在当今嘈杂的量子机器上实现实用的 VQA 优势。

papers.title: Virtual Coset Coding for Encrypted Non-Volatile Memories with Multi-Level Cells.
papers.abstract: Recently, Phase-Change Memory (PCM) has become a popular commercialized non-volatile memory (NVM), which has been deployed as a backing memory for DRAM main memory, secondary storage, or even as a DRAM main memory replacement. Like other NVMs, PCM has asymmetric access energy; writes dominate reads. When considering multilevel cells (MLC), this asymmetry can vary by an order of magnitude. Many schemes have been developed to take advantage of the asymmetric patterns of ‘0’s and ‘1’s in the data to reduce write energy. Because the memory is non-volatile, data can be recovered via physical attack or across system reboot cycles. To protect information stored in PCM against these attacks requires encryption. Unfortunately, most encryption algorithms scramble ‘0’s and ‘1’s in the data, effectively removing any patterns and negatively impacting schemes that leverage data bias and similarity to reduce write energy. In this paper, we introduce Virtual Coset Coding (VCC) as a workload-independent approach that reduces costly symbol transitions for storing encrypted data. VCC is based on two ideas. First, using coset encoding with random coset candidates, it is possible to effectively reduce the frequency of costly bit/symbol transitions when writing encrypted data. Second, a small set of random substrings can be used to achieve the same encoding efficiency as a large number of random coset candidates, but at a much lower encoding/decoding cost. Additionally, we demonstrate how VCC can be leveraged for energy reduction in combination with fault-mitigation and fault-tolerance to dramatically increase the lifetimes of endurance-limited NVMs, such as PCM. We evaluate the design of VCC and demonstrate that it can be implemented on-chip with only a nominal area overhead. VCC reduces dynamic energy by 22-28% while maintaining the same performance. Using our multi-objective optimization approach achieves at least a 36% improvement in lifetime over the state-of-the-art and at least a 50% improvement in lifetime vs. an unencoded memory, while maintaining its energy savings and system performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，相变存储器（PCM）已成为一种流行的商业化非易失性存储器（NVM），它已被部署为DRAM主存储器、辅助存储的后备存储器，甚至作为DRAM主存储器的替代品。与其他NVM一样，PCM具有不对称的访问能量；写主导读。当考虑多级单元 (MLC) 时，这种不对称性可能会发生一个数量级的变化。人们已经开发出许多方案来利用数据中“0”和“1”的不对称模式来减少写入能量。由于内存是非易失性的，因此可以通过物理攻击或跨系统重启周期恢复数据。为了保护存储在 PCM 中的信息免受这些攻击，需要加密。不幸的是，大多数加密算法都会扰乱数据中的“0”和“1”，从而有效地消除任何模式以及利用数据偏差和相似性来减少写入能量的负面影响方案。在本文中，我们引入虚拟陪集编码（VCC）作为一种独立于工作负载的方法，可减少存储加密数据时昂贵的符号转换。 VCC 基于两个想法。首先，使用具有随机陪集候选的陪集编码，可以有效地降低写入加密数据时昂贵的比特/符号转换的频率。其次，可以使用一小组随机子串来实现与大量随机陪集候选相同的编码效率，但编码/解码成本要低得多。此外，我们还演示了如何利用 VCC 来降低能耗，并结合故障缓解和容错功能，从而显着延长耐用性有限的 NVM（例如 PCM）的使用寿命。我们评估了 VCC 的设计，并证明它可以在片上实现，只需标称面积开销。 VCC 在保持相同性能的同时，将动态能量降低了 22-28%。使用我们的多目标优化方法，与最先进的技术相比，寿命延长了至少 36%，与未编码存储器相比，寿命延长了至少 50%，同时保持了节能和系统性能。
